# CandlestickChart - Flet

 

[Skip to content](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/candlestickchart/#flet_charts.candlestick_chart.CandlestickChart)

CandlestickChart
================

Draws a candlestick chart representing OHLC values.

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/candlestickchart/#__codelineno-0-1) fch.CandlestickChart(     [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/candlestickchart/#__codelineno-0-2)     min_x=-1,    [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/candlestickchart/#__codelineno-0-3)     max_x=2,    [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/candlestickchart/#__codelineno-0-4)     min_y=20,    [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/candlestickchart/#__codelineno-0-5)     max_y=30,    [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/candlestickchart/#__codelineno-0-6)     bgcolor=ft.Colors.AMBER_200,    [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/candlestickchart/#__codelineno-0-7)     spots=[        [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/candlestickchart/#__codelineno-0-8)         fch.CandlestickChartSpot(            [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/candlestickchart/#__codelineno-0-9)             x=0,            [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/candlestickchart/#__codelineno-0-10)             open=22.6,            [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/candlestickchart/#__codelineno-0-11)             high=28.3,            [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/candlestickchart/#__codelineno-0-12)             low=21.4,            [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/candlestickchart/#__codelineno-0-13)             close=24.1,        [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/candlestickchart/#__codelineno-0-14)         ),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/candlestickchart/#__codelineno-0-15)         ...,    [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/candlestickchart/#__codelineno-0-16)     ], [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/candlestickchart/#__codelineno-0-17) )`

[![CandlestickChart](https://docs.flet.dev/test-images-charts/examples/golden/macos/candlestick_chart/image_for_docs.png)](https://docs.flet.dev/test-images-charts/examples/golden/macos/candlestick_chart/image_for_docs.png)

Basic candlestick chart

Inherits: `[LayoutControl](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/layoutcontrol/#flet.LayoutControl) `

Properties

*   **`[animation](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/candlestickchart/#flet_charts.candlestick_chart.CandlestickChart.animation) `**(`[AnimationValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.AnimationValue) `) –
    
    Controls chart implicit animations.
    
*   **`[baseline_x](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/candlestickchart/#flet_charts.candlestick_chart.CandlestickChart.baseline_x) `**(`[Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  | None`) –
    
    Baseline value on the X axis.
    
*   **`[baseline_y](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/candlestickchart/#flet_charts.candlestick_chart.CandlestickChart.baseline_y) `**(`[Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  | None`) –
    
    Baseline value on the Y axis.
    
*   **`[bgcolor](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/candlestickchart/#flet_charts.candlestick_chart.CandlestickChart.bgcolor) `**(`[ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None`) –
    
    Background color of the chart.
    
*   **`[border](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/candlestickchart/#flet_charts.candlestick_chart.CandlestickChart.border) `**(`[Border](https://docs.flet.dev/types/border/#flet.Border)  | None`) –
    
    Border drawn around the chart.
    
*   **`[bottom_axis](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/candlestickchart/#flet_charts.candlestick_chart.CandlestickChart.bottom_axis) `**(`[ChartAxis](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/types/chartaxis/#flet_charts.chart_axis.ChartAxis)  | None`) –
    
    Appearance of the bottom axis, its title and labels.
    
*   **`[horizontal_grid_lines](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/candlestickchart/#flet_charts.candlestick_chart.CandlestickChart.horizontal_grid_lines) `**(`[ChartGridLines](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/types/chartgridlines/#flet_charts.types.ChartGridLines)  | None`) –
    
    Horizontal grid lines configuration.
    
*   **`[interactive](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/candlestickchart/#flet_charts.candlestick_chart.CandlestickChart.interactive) `**(`[bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool) `) –
    
    Enables automatic tooltips and highlighting when hovering the chart.
    
*   **`[left_axis](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/candlestickchart/#flet_charts.candlestick_chart.CandlestickChart.left_axis) `**(`[ChartAxis](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/types/chartaxis/#flet_charts.chart_axis.ChartAxis)  | None`) –
    
    Appearance of the left axis, its title and labels.
    
*   **`[long_press_duration](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/candlestickchart/#flet_charts.candlestick_chart.CandlestickChart.long_press_duration) `**(`[DurationValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.DurationValue)  | None`) –
    
    The duration of a long press on the chart.
    
*   **`[max_x](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/candlestickchart/#flet_charts.candlestick_chart.CandlestickChart.max_x) `**(`[Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  | None`) –
    
    Maximum value displayed on the X axis.
    
*   **`[max_y](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/candlestickchart/#flet_charts.candlestick_chart.CandlestickChart.max_y) `**(`[Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  | None`) –
    
    Maximum value displayed on the Y axis.
    
*   **`[min_x](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/candlestickchart/#flet_charts.candlestick_chart.CandlestickChart.min_x) `**(`[Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  | None`) –
    
    Minimum value displayed on the X axis.
    
*   **`[min_y](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/candlestickchart/#flet_charts.candlestick_chart.CandlestickChart.min_y) `**(`[Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  | None`) –
    
    Minimum value displayed on the Y axis.
    
*   **`[right_axis](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/candlestickchart/#flet_charts.candlestick_chart.CandlestickChart.right_axis) `**(`[ChartAxis](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/types/chartaxis/#flet_charts.chart_axis.ChartAxis)  | None`) –
    
    Appearance of the right axis, its title and labels.
    
*   **`[rotation_quarter_turns](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/candlestickchart/#flet_charts.candlestick_chart.CandlestickChart.rotation_quarter_turns) `**(`[Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number) `) –
    
    Number of quarter turns (90-degree increments) to rotate the chart.
    
*   **`[show_tooltips_for_selected_spots_only](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/candlestickchart/#flet_charts.candlestick_chart.CandlestickChart.show_tooltips_for_selected_spots_only) `**(`[bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool) `) –
    
    Whether to permanently and only show the tooltips of spots with their
    
*   **`[spots](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/candlestickchart/#flet_charts.candlestick_chart.CandlestickChart.spots) `**(`[list](https://docs.python.org/3/glossary.html#term-list) [[CandlestickChartSpot](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/types/candlestickchartspot/#flet_charts.candlestick_chart_spot.CandlestickChartSpot) ]`) –
    
    Candlesticks to display on the chart.
    
*   **`[tooltip](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/candlestickchart/#flet_charts.candlestick_chart.CandlestickChart.tooltip) `**(`[CandlestickChartTooltip](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/types/candlestickcharttooltip/#flet_charts.candlestick_chart.CandlestickChartTooltip)  | None`) –
    
    Tooltip configuration for the chart.
    
*   **`[top_axis](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/candlestickchart/#flet_charts.candlestick_chart.CandlestickChart.top_axis) `**(`[ChartAxis](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/types/chartaxis/#flet_charts.chart_axis.ChartAxis)  | None`) –
    
    Appearance of the top axis, its title and labels.
    
*   **`[touch_spot_threshold](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/candlestickchart/#flet_charts.candlestick_chart.CandlestickChart.touch_spot_threshold) `**(`[Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number) `) –
    
    The distance threshold to consider a touch near a candlestick.
    
*   **`[vertical_grid_lines](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/candlestickchart/#flet_charts.candlestick_chart.CandlestickChart.vertical_grid_lines) `**(`[ChartGridLines](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/types/chartgridlines/#flet_charts.types.ChartGridLines)  | None`) –
    
    Vertical grid lines configuration.
    

Events

*   **`[on_event](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/candlestickchart/#flet_charts.candlestick_chart.CandlestickChart.on_event) `**(`[EventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.EventHandler) [[CandlestickChartEvent](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/types/candlestickchartevent/#flet_charts.candlestick_chart.CandlestickChartEvent) ] | None`) –
    
    Called when an event occurs on this chart.
    

Examples[#](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/candlestickchart/#examples "Permanent link")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Basic Candlestick Chart[#](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/candlestickchart/#basic-candlestick-chart "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/candlestickchart/#__codelineno-0-1) import flet as ft [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/candlestickchart/#__codelineno-0-2) import flet_charts as fch [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/candlestickchart/#__codelineno-0-3)[](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/candlestickchart/#__codelineno-0-4) CANDLE_DATA = [     [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/candlestickchart/#__codelineno-0-5)     ("Mon", 24.8, 28.6, 23.9, 27.2),    [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/candlestickchart/#__codelineno-0-6)     ("Tue", 27.2, 30.1, 25.8, 28.4),    [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/candlestickchart/#__codelineno-0-7)     ("Wed", 28.4, 31.2, 26.5, 29.1),    [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/candlestickchart/#__codelineno-0-8)     ("Thu", 29.1, 32.4, 27.9, 31.8),    [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/candlestickchart/#__codelineno-0-9)     ("Fri", 31.8, 34.0, 29.7, 30.2),    [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/candlestickchart/#__codelineno-0-10)     ("Sat", 30.2, 33.6, 28.3, 32.7),    [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/candlestickchart/#__codelineno-0-11)     ("Sun", 32.7, 35.5, 30.1, 34.6), [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/candlestickchart/#__codelineno-0-12) ] [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/candlestickchart/#__codelineno-0-13) [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/candlestickchart/#__codelineno-0-14)[](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/candlestickchart/#__codelineno-0-15) def build_spots() -> list[fch.CandlestickChartSpot]:     [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/candlestickchart/#__codelineno-0-16)     """Create candlestick spots from the static data."""    [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/candlestickchart/#__codelineno-0-17)     spots: list[fch.CandlestickChartSpot] = []    [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/candlestickchart/#__codelineno-0-18)     for index, (label, open_, high, low, close) in enumerate(CANDLE_DATA):        [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/candlestickchart/#__codelineno-0-19)         spots.append(            [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/candlestickchart/#__codelineno-0-20)             fch.CandlestickChartSpot(                [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/candlestickchart/#__codelineno-0-21)                 x=float(index),                [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/candlestickchart/#__codelineno-0-22)                 open=open_,                [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/candlestickchart/#__codelineno-0-23)                 high=high,                [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/candlestickchart/#__codelineno-0-24)                 low=low,                [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/candlestickchart/#__codelineno-0-25)                 close=close,                [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/candlestickchart/#__codelineno-0-26)                 selected=index == len(CANDLE_DATA) - 1,                [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/candlestickchart/#__codelineno-0-27)                 tooltip=fch.CandlestickChartSpotTooltip(                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/candlestickchart/#__codelineno-0-28)                     text=(                        [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/candlestickchart/#__codelineno-0-29)                         f"{label}\n"                        [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/candlestickchart/#__codelineno-0-30)                         f"Open: {open_:0.1f}\n"                        [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/candlestickchart/#__codelineno-0-31)                         f"High: {high:0.1f}\n"                        [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/candlestickchart/#__codelineno-0-32)                         f"Low : {low:0.1f}\n"                        [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/candlestickchart/#__codelineno-0-33)                         f"Close: {close:0.1f}"                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/candlestickchart/#__codelineno-0-34)                     ),                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/candlestickchart/#__codelineno-0-35)                     bottom_margin=12,                [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/candlestickchart/#__codelineno-0-36)                 ),            [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/candlestickchart/#__codelineno-0-37)             )        [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/candlestickchart/#__codelineno-0-38)         )    [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/candlestickchart/#__codelineno-0-39)     return spots [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/candlestickchart/#__codelineno-0-40) [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/candlestickchart/#__codelineno-0-41)[](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/candlestickchart/#__codelineno-0-42) def main(page: ft.Page):     [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/candlestickchart/#__codelineno-0-43)     page.title = "Candlestick chart"    [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/candlestickchart/#__codelineno-0-44)     page.padding = 24    [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/candlestickchart/#__codelineno-0-45)     page.theme_mode = ft.ThemeMode.DARK [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/candlestickchart/#__codelineno-0-46)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/candlestickchart/#__codelineno-0-47)     info = ft.Text("Interact with the chart to see event details.") `[](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/candlestickchart/#__codelineno-0-1) animation: [AnimationValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.AnimationValue)  = [field](https://docs.python.org/3/library/dataclasses.html#dataclasses.field "<code>dataclasses.field</code>") (     [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/candlestickchart/#__codelineno-0-2)     default_factory=lambda: [Animation](https://docs.flet.dev/types/animation/#flet.Animation) (        [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/candlestickchart/#__codelineno-0-3)         duration=[Duration](https://docs.flet.dev/types/duration/#flet.Duration) (milliseconds=150), curve=[LINEAR](https://docs.flet.dev/types/animationcurve/#flet.AnimationCurve.LINEAR)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/candlestickchart/#__codelineno-0-4)     ) [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/candlestickchart/#__codelineno-0-5) )`

# PieChart - Flet

 

[Skip to content](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/piechart/#flet_charts.pie_chart.PieChart)

PieChart
========

A pie chart control displaying multiple sections as slices of a circle.

[![PieChart](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/assets/pie-chart-diagram.svg)](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/assets/pie-chart-diagram.svg)

Inherits: `[LayoutControl](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/layoutcontrol/#flet.LayoutControl) `

Properties

*   **`[animation](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/piechart/#flet_charts.pie_chart.PieChart.animation) `**(`[AnimationValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.AnimationValue) `) –
    
    Controls chart implicit animation.
    
*   **`[center_space_color](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/piechart/#flet_charts.pie_chart.PieChart.center_space_color) `**(`[ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None`) –
    
    Free space color in the middle of a chart.
    
*   **`[center_space_radius](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/piechart/#flet_charts.pie_chart.PieChart.center_space_radius) `**(`[Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  | None`) –
    
    Free space radius in the middle of a chart.
    
*   **`[sections](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/piechart/#flet_charts.pie_chart.PieChart.sections) `**(`[list](https://docs.python.org/3/glossary.html#term-list) [[PieChartSection](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/types/piechartsection/#flet_charts.pie_chart_section.PieChartSection) ]`) –
    
    A list of [`PieChartSection`](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/types/piechartsection/#flet_charts.pie_chart_section.PieChartSection)
    
*   **`[sections_space](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/piechart/#flet_charts.pie_chart.PieChart.sections_space) `**(`[Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  | None`) –
    
    A gap between `sections`.
    
*   **`[start_degree_offset](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/piechart/#flet_charts.pie_chart.PieChart.start_degree_offset) `**(`[Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  | None`) –
    
    By default, `sections` are drawn from zero degree (right side of the circle)
    

Events

*   **`[on_event](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/piechart/#flet_charts.pie_chart.PieChart.on_event) `**(`[EventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.EventHandler) [[PieChartEvent](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/types/piechartevent/#flet_charts.pie_chart.PieChartEvent) ] | None`) –
    
    Fires when a chart section is hovered or clicked.
    

Examples[#](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/piechart/#examples "Permanent link")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Example 1[#](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/piechart/#example-1 "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/piechart/#__codelineno-0-1) import flet_charts as fch [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/piechart/#__codelineno-0-2)[](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/piechart/#__codelineno-0-3) import flet as ft [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/piechart/#__codelineno-0-4) [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/piechart/#__codelineno-0-7)     normal_border = ft.BorderSide(0, ft.Colors.with_opacity(0, ft.Colors.WHITE))    [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/piechart/#__codelineno-0-8)     hovered_border = ft.BorderSide(6, ft.Colors.SECONDARY) [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/piechart/#__codelineno-0-9)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/piechart/#__codelineno-0-10)     def on_chart_event(e: fch.PieChartEvent):        [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/piechart/#__codelineno-0-11)         for idx, section in enumerate(chart.sections):            [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/piechart/#__codelineno-0-12)             section.border_side = (                [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/piechart/#__codelineno-0-13)                 hovered_border if idx == e.section_index else normal_border            [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/piechart/#__codelineno-0-14)             )        [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/piechart/#__codelineno-0-15)         chart.update() [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/piechart/#__codelineno-0-16)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/piechart/#__codelineno-0-17)     chart = fch.PieChart(                [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/piechart/#__codelineno-0-26)                 radius=80,                [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/piechart/#__codelineno-0-27)                 border_side=normal_border,            [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/piechart/#__codelineno-0-28)             ),            [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/piechart/#__codelineno-0-29)               color=ft.Colors.YELLOW,                [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/piechart/#__codelineno-0-32)                 radius=65, Properties[#](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/piechart/#flet_charts.pie_chart.PieChart-properties "Permanent link")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### animation `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/piechart/#flet_charts.pie_chart.PieChart.animation "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/piechart/#__codelineno-0-1) animation: [AnimationValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.AnimationValue)  = [field](https://docs.python.org/3/library/dataclasses.html#dataclasses.field "<code>dataclasses.field</code>") (     [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/piechart/#__codelineno-0-2)     default_factory=lambda: [Animation](https://docs.flet.dev/types/animation/#flet.Animation) (        [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/piechart/#__codelineno-0-3)         duration=[Duration](https://docs.flet.dev/types/duration/#flet.Duration) (milliseconds=150), curve=[LINEAR](https://docs.flet.dev/types/animationcurve/#flet.AnimationCurve.LINEAR)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/piechart/#__codelineno-0-4)     ) [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/piechart/#__codelineno-0-5) )`

Controls chart implicit animation.

### center\_space\_color `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/piechart/#flet_charts.pie_chart.PieChart.center_space_color "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/piechart/#__codelineno-0-1) center_space_color: [ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None = None`

Free space color in the middle of a chart.

### center\_space\_radius `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/piechart/#flet_charts.pie_chart.PieChart.center_space_radius "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/piechart/#__codelineno-0-1) center_space_radius: [Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  | None = None`

Free space radius in the middle of a chart.

### sections `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/piechart/#flet_charts.pie_chart.PieChart.sections "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/piechart/#__codelineno-0-1) sections: [list](https://docs.python.org/3/glossary.html#term-list) [[PieChartSection](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/types/piechartsection/#flet_charts.pie_chart_section.PieChartSection) ] = [field](https://docs.python.org/3/library/dataclasses.html#dataclasses.field "<code>dataclasses.field</code>") (     [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/piechart/#__codelineno-0-2)     default_factory=[list](https://docs.python.org/3/glossary.html#term-list) [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/piechart/#__codelineno-0-3) )`

A list of [`PieChartSection`](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/types/piechartsection/#flet_charts.pie_chart_section.PieChartSection)
 controls drawn in a circle.

### sections\_space `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/piechart/#flet_charts.pie_chart.PieChart.sections_space "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/piechart/#__codelineno-0-1) sections_space: [Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  | None = None`

A gap between `sections`.

### start\_degree\_offset `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/piechart/#flet_charts.pie_chart.PieChart.start_degree_offset "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/piechart/#__codelineno-0-1) start_degree_offset: [Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  | None = None`

By default, `sections` are drawn from zero degree (right side of the circle) clockwise. You can change the starting point by setting `start_degree_offset` (in degrees).

Events[#](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/piechart/#flet_charts.pie_chart.PieChart-events "Permanent link")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### on\_event `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/piechart/#flet_charts.pie_chart.PieChart.on_event "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/piechart/#__codelineno-0-1) on_event: [EventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.EventHandler) [[PieChartEvent](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/types/piechartevent/#flet_charts.pie_chart.PieChartEvent) ] | None = None`

Fires when a chart section is hovered or clicked.

# ScatterChart - Flet

 

[Skip to content](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/scatterchart/#flet_charts.scatter_chart.ScatterChart)

ScatterChart
============

A scatter chart control.

ScatterChart draws some points in a square space, points are defined by [`ScatterChartSpot`](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/types/scatterchartspot/#flet_charts.scatter_chart_spot.ScatterChartSpot)
s.

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/scatterchart/#__codelineno-0-1) fch.ScatterChart(     [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/scatterchart/#__codelineno-0-2)     aspect_ratio=1.0,    [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/scatterchart/#__codelineno-0-3)     spots=[        [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/scatterchart/#__codelineno-0-4)         fch.ScatterChartSpot(            [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/scatterchart/#__codelineno-0-5)             x=random.uniform(4, 50),            [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/scatterchart/#__codelineno-0-6)             y=random.uniform(4, 50),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/scatterchart/#__codelineno-0-7)         )        [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/scatterchart/#__codelineno-0-8)         for _ in range(30)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/scatterchart/#__codelineno-0-9)     ], [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/scatterchart/#__codelineno-0-10) )`

[![ScatterChart](https://docs.flet.dev/test-images-charts/examples/golden/macos/scatter_chart/image_for_docs.png)](https://docs.flet.dev/test-images-charts/examples/golden/macos/scatter_chart/image_for_docs.png)

Basic scatter chart

Inherits: `[LayoutControl](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/layoutcontrol/#flet.LayoutControl) `

Properties

*   **`[animation](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/scatterchart/#flet_charts.scatter_chart.ScatterChart.animation) `**(`[AnimationValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.AnimationValue) `) –
    
    Controls chart implicit animation.
    
*   **`[baseline_x](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/scatterchart/#flet_charts.scatter_chart.ScatterChart.baseline_x) `**(`[Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  | None`) –
    
    The baseline value for X axis.
    
*   **`[baseline_y](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/scatterchart/#flet_charts.scatter_chart.ScatterChart.baseline_y) `**(`[Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  | None`) –
    
    Baseline value for Y axis.
    
*   **`[bgcolor](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/scatterchart/#flet_charts.scatter_chart.ScatterChart.bgcolor) `**(`[ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None`) –
    
    The chart's background color.
    
*   **`[border](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/scatterchart/#flet_charts.scatter_chart.ScatterChart.border) `**(`[Border](https://docs.flet.dev/types/border/#flet.Border)  | None`) –
    
    The border around the chart.
    
*   **`[bottom_axis](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/scatterchart/#flet_charts.scatter_chart.ScatterChart.bottom_axis) `**(`[ChartAxis](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/types/chartaxis/#flet_charts.chart_axis.ChartAxis)  | None`) –
    
    Configures the appearance of the bottom axis, its title and labels.
    
*   **`[horizontal_grid_lines](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/scatterchart/#flet_charts.scatter_chart.ScatterChart.horizontal_grid_lines) `**(`[ChartGridLines](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/types/chartgridlines/#flet_charts.types.ChartGridLines)  | None`) –
    
    Controls drawing of chart's horizontal lines.
    
*   **`[interactive](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/scatterchart/#flet_charts.scatter_chart.ScatterChart.interactive) `**(`[bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool) `) –
    
    Enables automatic tooltips when hovering chart bars.
    
*   **`[left_axis](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/scatterchart/#flet_charts.scatter_chart.ScatterChart.left_axis) `**(`[ChartAxis](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/types/chartaxis/#flet_charts.chart_axis.ChartAxis)  | None`) –
    
    Configures the appearance of the left axis, its title and labels.
    
*   **`[long_press_duration](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/scatterchart/#flet_charts.scatter_chart.ScatterChart.long_press_duration) `**(`[DurationValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.DurationValue)  | None`) –
    
    The duration of a long press on the chart.
    
*   **`[max_x](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/scatterchart/#flet_charts.scatter_chart.ScatterChart.max_x) `**(`[Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  | None`) –
    
    The maximum displayed value for X axis.
    
*   **`[max_y](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/scatterchart/#flet_charts.scatter_chart.ScatterChart.max_y) `**(`[Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  | None`) –
    
    The maximum displayed value for Y axis.
    
*   **`[min_x](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/scatterchart/#flet_charts.scatter_chart.ScatterChart.min_x) `**(`[Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  | None`) –
    
    The minimum displayed value for X axis.
    
*   **`[min_y](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/scatterchart/#flet_charts.scatter_chart.ScatterChart.min_y) `**(`[Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  | None`) –
    
    The minimum displayed value for Y axis.
    
*   **`[right_axis](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/scatterchart/#flet_charts.scatter_chart.ScatterChart.right_axis) `**(`[ChartAxis](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/types/chartaxis/#flet_charts.chart_axis.ChartAxis)  | None`) –
    
    Configures the appearance of the right axis, its title and labels.
    
*   **`[rotation_quarter_turns](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/scatterchart/#flet_charts.scatter_chart.ScatterChart.rotation_quarter_turns) `**(`[Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number) `) –
    
    Number of quarter turns (90-degree increments) to rotate the chart.
    
*   **`[show_tooltips_for_selected_spots_only](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/scatterchart/#flet_charts.scatter_chart.ScatterChart.show_tooltips_for_selected_spots_only) `**(`[bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool) `) –
    
    Whether to permanently and only show the tooltips of spots with their
    
*   **`[spots](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/scatterchart/#flet_charts.scatter_chart.ScatterChart.spots) `**(`[list](https://docs.python.org/3/glossary.html#term-list) [[ScatterChartSpot](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/types/scatterchartspot/#flet_charts.scatter_chart_spot.ScatterChartSpot) ]`) –
    
    List of [`ScatterChartSpot`](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/types/scatterchartspot/#flet_charts.scatter_chart_spot.ScatterChartSpot)
    s to show on the chart.
    
*   **`[tooltip](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/scatterchart/#flet_charts.scatter_chart.ScatterChart.tooltip) `**(`[ScatterChartTooltip](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/types/scattercharttooltip/#flet_charts.scatter_chart.ScatterChartTooltip) `) –
    
    The tooltip configuration for the chart.
    
*   **`[top_axis](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/scatterchart/#flet_charts.scatter_chart.ScatterChart.top_axis) `**(`[ChartAxis](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/types/chartaxis/#flet_charts.chart_axis.ChartAxis)  | None`) –
    
    Configures the appearance of the top axis, its title and labels.
    
*   **`[vertical_grid_lines](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/scatterchart/#flet_charts.scatter_chart.ScatterChart.vertical_grid_lines) `**(`[ChartGridLines](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/types/chartgridlines/#flet_charts.types.ChartGridLines)  | None`) –
    
    Controls drawing of chart's vertical lines.
    

Events

*   **`[on_event](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/scatterchart/#flet_charts.scatter_chart.ScatterChart.on_event) `**(`[EventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.EventHandler) [[ScatterChartEvent](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/types/scatterchartevent/#flet_charts.scatter_chart.ScatterChartEvent) ] | None`) –
    
    Called when an event occurs on this chart.
    

Examples[#](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/scatterchart/#examples "Permanent link")

### animation `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/scatterchart/#flet_charts.scatter_chart.ScatterChart.animation "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/scatterchart/#__codelineno-0-1) animation: [AnimationValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.AnimationValue)  = [field](https://docs.python.org/3/library/dataclasses.html#dataclasses.field "<code>dataclasses.field</code>") (     [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/scatterchart/#__codelineno-0-2)     default_factory=lambda: [Animation](https://docs.flet.dev/types/animation/#flet.Animation) (        [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/scatterchart/#__codelineno-0-3)         duration=[Duration](https://docs.flet.dev/types/duration/#flet.Duration) (milliseconds=150), curve=[LINEAR](https://docs.flet.dev/types/animationcurve/#flet.AnimationCurve.LINEAR)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/scatterchart/#__codelineno-0-4)     ) [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/scatterchart/#__codelineno-0-5) )`

Controls chart implicit animation.

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/scatterchart/#__codelineno-0-1) baseline_x: [Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  | None = None`

The baseline value for X axis.

### baseline\_y `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/scatterchart/#flet_charts.scatter_chart.ScatterChart.baseline_y "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/scatterchart/#__codelineno-0-1) baseline_y: [Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  | None = None`

Baseline value for Y axis.

### bgcolor `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/scatterchart/#flet_charts.scatter_chart.ScatterChart.bgcolor "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/scatterchart/#__codelineno-0-1) bgcolor: [ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None = None`

The chart's background color.

### border `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/scatterchart/#flet_charts.scatter_chart.ScatterChart.border "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/scatterchart/#__codelineno-0-1) border: [Border](https://docs.flet.dev/types/border/#flet.Border)  | None = None`

### bottom\_axis `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/scatterchart/#flet_charts.scatter_chart.ScatterChart.bottom_axis "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/scatterchart/#__codelineno-0-1) bottom_axis: [ChartAxis](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/types/chartaxis/#flet_charts.chart_axis.ChartAxis)  | None = None`

Configures the appearance of the bottom axis, its title and labels.

### horizontal\_grid\_lines `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/scatterchart/#flet_charts.scatter_chart.ScatterChart.horizontal_grid_lines "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/scatterchart/#__codelineno-0-1) horizontal_grid_lines: [ChartGridLines](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/types/chartgridlines/#flet_charts.types.ChartGridLines)  | None = None`

Controls drawing of chart's horizontal lines.

### interactive `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/scatterchart/#flet_charts.scatter_chart.ScatterChart.interactive "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/scatterchart/#__codelineno-0-1) interactive: [bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool)  = True`

Enables automatic tooltips when hovering chart bars.

### left\_axis `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/scatterchart/#flet_charts.scatter_chart.ScatterChart.left_axis "Permanent link")

Configures the appearance of the left axis, its title and labels.

### long\_press\_duration `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/scatterchart/#flet_charts.scatter_chart.ScatterChart.long_press_duration "Permanent link")

The maximum displayed value for X axis.

### max\_y `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/scatterchart/#flet_charts.scatter_chart.ScatterChart.max_y "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/scatterchart/#__codelineno-0-1) max_y: [Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  | None = None`

The maximum displayed value for Y axis.

### min\_x `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/scatterchart/#flet_charts.scatter_chart.ScatterChart.min_x "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/scatterchart/#__codelineno-0-1) min_x: [Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  | None = None`

The minimum displayed value for X axis.

### min\_y `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/scatterchart/#flet_charts.scatter_chart.ScatterChart.min_y "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/scatterchart/#__codelineno-0-1) min_y: [Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  | None = None`

### right\_axis `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/scatterchart/#flet_charts.scatter_chart.ScatterChart.right_axis "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/scatterchart/#__codelineno-0-1) right_axis: [ChartAxis](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/types/chartaxis/#flet_charts.chart_axis.ChartAxis)  | None = None`

### rotation\_quarter\_turns `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/scatterchart/#flet_charts.scatter_chart.ScatterChart.rotation_quarter_turns "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/scatterchart/#__codelineno-0-1) rotation_quarter_turns: [Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  = 0`

Number of quarter turns (90-degree increments) to rotate the chart. Ex: `1` rotates the chart `90` degrees clockwise, `2` rotates `180` degrees and `0` for no rotation.

### show\_tooltips\_for\_selected\_spots\_only `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/scatterchart/#flet_charts.scatter_chart.ScatterChart.show_tooltips_for_selected_spots_only "Permanent link")

Whether to permanently and only show the tooltips of spots with their [`selected`](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/types/scatterchartspot/#flet_charts.scatter_chart_spot.ScatterChartSpot.selected)
 property set to `True`.

s to show on the chart.

### vertical\_grid\_lines `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/scatterchart/#flet_charts.scatter_chart.ScatterChart.vertical_grid_lines "Permanent link")

# MatplotlibChartWithToolbar - Flet

 

[Skip to content](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#flet_charts.matplotlib_chart_with_toolbar.MatplotlibChartWithToolbar)

MatplotlibChartWithToolbar
==========================

Composite control that combines a `MatplotlibChart` with a ready-made toolbar UI.

Warning

This control requires the [`matplotlib`](https://matplotlib.org/)
 Python package to be installed.

See this [installation guide](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/#installation)
 for more information.

[![MatplotlibChartWithToolbar](https://docs.flet.dev/test-images-charts/examples/golden/macos/matplotlib_chart/toolbar.png)](https://docs.flet.dev/test-images-charts/examples/golden/macos/matplotlib_chart/toolbar.png)

Inherits: `[Column](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/column/#flet.Column) `

Properties

*   **`[figure](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#flet_charts.matplotlib_chart_with_toolbar.MatplotlibChartWithToolbar.figure) `**(`Figure`) –
    
    Matplotlib figure to draw - an instance of
    

Methods

*   **`[download_click](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#flet_charts.matplotlib_chart_with_toolbar.MatplotlibChartWithToolbar.download_click) `** –
    
    Export the figure in the selected format and prompt user to save it.
    
*   **`[on_message](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#flet_charts.matplotlib_chart_with_toolbar.MatplotlibChartWithToolbar.on_message) `** –
    
    Show status text produced by the underlying chart toolbar backend.
    
*   **`[on_toolbar_update](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#flet_charts.matplotlib_chart_with_toolbar.MatplotlibChartWithToolbar.on_toolbar_update) `** –
    
    Synchronize back/forward button enabled state with chart history.
    
*   **`[pan_click](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#flet_charts.matplotlib_chart_with_toolbar.MatplotlibChartWithToolbar.pan_click) `** –
    
    Toggle pan mode and ensure zoom mode is turned off.
    
*   **`[zoom_click](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#flet_charts.matplotlib_chart_with_toolbar.MatplotlibChartWithToolbar.zoom_click) `** –
    
    Toggle zoom mode and ensure pan mode is turned off.
    

Examples[#](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#examples "Permanent link")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Basic[#](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#basic "Permanent link")

Based on an official [Matplotlib example](https://matplotlib.org/stable/gallery/lines_bars_and_markers/cohere.html#sphx-glr-gallery-lines-bars-and-markers-cohere-py)
.

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-0-1) import matplotlib.pyplot as plt [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-0-2) import numpy as np [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-0-3)[](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-0-4) import flet as ft [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-0-5) import flet_charts as fch [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-0-6) [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-0-7)[](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-0-8) def main(page: ft.Page):     [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-0-9)     # Fixing random state for reproducibility    [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-0-10)     np.random.seed(19680801) [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-0-11)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-0-12)     dt = 0.01    [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-0-13)     t = np.arange(0, 30, dt)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-0-14)     nse1 = np.random.randn(len(t))  # white noise 1    [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-0-15)     nse2 = np.random.randn(len(t))  # white noise 2 [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-0-16)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-0-17)     # Two signals with a coherent part at 10Hz and a random part    [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-0-18)     s1 = np.sin(2 * np.pi * 10 * t) + nse1    [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-0-19)     s2 = np.sin(2 * np.pi * 10 * t) + nse2 [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-0-20)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-0-21)     fig, axs = plt.subplots(2, 1)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-0-22)     axs[0].plot(t, s1, t, s2)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-0-23)     axs[0].set_xlim(0, 2)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-0-24)     axs[0].set_xlabel("time")    [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-0-25)     axs[0].set_ylabel("s1 and s2")    [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-0-26)     axs[0].grid(True) [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-0-27)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-0-28)     cxy, f = axs[1].cohere(s1, s2, 256, 1.0 / dt)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-0-29)     axs[1].set_ylabel("coherence") [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-0-30)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-0-31)     fig.tight_layout() [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-0-32)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-0-33)     page.add(fch.MatplotlibChartWithToolbar(figure=fig, expand=True)) [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-0-34) [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-0-35)[](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-0-36) if __name__ == "__main__":     [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-0-37)     ft.run(main)`

[![toolbar.png](https://docs.flet.dev/test-images-charts/examples/golden/macos/matplotlib_chart/toolbar.png)](https://docs.flet.dev/test-images-charts/examples/golden/macos/matplotlib_chart/toolbar.png)

### 3D chart[#](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#3d-chart "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-1-1) import logging [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-1-2)[](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-1-3) import matplotlib.pyplot as plt [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-1-4) import numpy as np [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-1-5)[](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-1-6) import flet as ft [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-1-7) import flet_charts [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-1-8)[](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-1-9) logging.basicConfig(level=logging.INFO) [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-1-10) [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-1-11)[](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-1-12) def main(page: ft.Page):     [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-1-13)     plt.style.use("_mpl-gallery") [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-1-14)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-1-15)     # Make data for a double helix    [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-1-16)     n = 50    [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-1-17)     theta = np.linspace(0, 2 * np.pi, n)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-1-18)     x1 = np.cos(theta)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-1-19)     y1 = np.sin(theta)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-1-20)     z1 = np.linspace(0, 1, n)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-1-21)     x2 = np.cos(theta + np.pi)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-1-22)     y2 = np.sin(theta + np.pi)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-1-23)     z2 = z1 [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-1-24)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-1-25)     # Plot with defined figure size    [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-1-26)     fig, ax = plt.subplots(subplot_kw={"projection": "3d"}, figsize=(8, 6))    [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-1-27)     ax.fill_between(x1, y1, z1, x2, y2, z2, alpha=0.5)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-1-28)     ax.plot(x1, y1, z1, linewidth=2, color="C0")    [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-1-29)     ax.plot(x2, y2, z2, linewidth=2, color="C0") [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-1-30)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-1-31)     ax.set(xticklabels=[], yticklabels=[], zticklabels=[]) [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-1-32)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-1-33)     page.add(flet_charts.MatplotlibChartWithToolbar(figure=fig)) [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-1-34) [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-1-35)[](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-1-36) if __name__ == "__main__":     [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-1-37)     ft.run(main)`

[![three_d.png](https://docs.flet.dev/test-images-charts/examples/golden/macos/matplotlib_chart/three_d.png)](https://docs.flet.dev/test-images-charts/examples/golden/macos/matplotlib_chart/three_d.png)

### Handle events[#](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#handle-events "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-2-1) import matplotlib.pyplot as plt [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-2-2) import numpy as np [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-2-3)[](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-2-4) import flet as ft [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-2-5) import flet_charts as fch [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-2-6)[](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-2-7) state = {} [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-2-8) [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-2-9)[](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-2-10) def main(page: ft.Page):     [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-2-11)     # Fixing random state for reproducibility    [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-2-12)     np.random.seed(19680801) [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-2-13)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-2-14)     X = np.random.rand(100, 200)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-2-15)     xs = np.mean(X, axis=1)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-2-16)     ys = np.std(X, axis=1) [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-2-17)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-2-18)     fig, (ax, ax2) = plt.subplots(2, 1)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-2-19)     ax.set_title("click on point to plot time series")    [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-2-20)     (line,) = ax.plot(xs, ys, "o", picker=True, pickradius=5) [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-2-21)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-2-22)     class PointBrowser:        [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-2-23)         """        [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-2-24)         Click on a point to select and highlight it -- the data that        [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-2-25)         generated the point will be shown in the lower Axes.  Use the 'n'        [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-2-26)         and 'p' keys to browse through the next and previous points        [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-2-27)         """ [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-2-28)        [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-2-29)         def __init__(self):            [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-2-30)             self.lastind = 0 [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-2-31)            [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-2-32)             self.text = ax.text(                [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-2-33)                 0.05, 0.95, "selected: none", transform=ax.transAxes, va="top"            [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-2-34)             )            [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-2-35)             (self.selected,) = ax.plot(                [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-2-36)                 [xs[0]], [ys[0]], "o", ms=12, alpha=0.4, color="yellow", visible=False            [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-2-37)             ) [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-2-38) [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-2-40)             if self.lastind is None:                [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-2-41)                 return            [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-2-42)             if event.key not in ("n", "p"):                [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-2-43)                 return            [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-2-44)             inc = 1 if event.key == "n" else -1 [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-2-45)            [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-2-46)             self.lastind += inc            [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-2-47)             self.lastind = np.clip(self.lastind, 0, len(xs) - 1)            [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-2-48)             self.update() [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-2-49)        [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-2-50)         def on_pick(self, event):            [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-2-51)             if event.artist != line:                [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-2-52)                 return True [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-2-53)            [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-2-54)             N = len(event.ind)            [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-2-55)             if not N:                [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-2-56)                 return True [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-2-57)            [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-2-58)             # the click locations            [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-2-59)             x = event.mouseevent.xdata            [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-2-60)             y = event.mouseevent.ydata [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-2-61)            [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-2-62)             distances = np.hypot(x - xs[event.ind], y - ys[event.ind])            [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-2-63)             indmin = distances.argmin()            [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-2-64)             dataind = event.ind[indmin] [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-2-65)            [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-2-66)             self.lastind = dataind            [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-2-67)             self.update() [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-2-68)        [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-2-69)         def update(self):            [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-2-70)             if self.lastind is None:                [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-2-71)                 return [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-2-72)            [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-2-73)             dataind = self.lastind [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-2-74)            [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-2-75)             ax2.clear()            [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-2-76)             ax2.plot(X[dataind]) [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-2-77)            [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-2-78)             ax2.text(                [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-2-79)                 0.05,                [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-2-80)                 0.9,                [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-2-81)                 f"mu={xs[dataind]:1.3f}\nsigma={ys[dataind]:1.3f}",                [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-2-82)                 transform=ax2.transAxes,                [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-2-83)                 va="top",            [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-2-84)             )            [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-2-85)             ax2.set_ylim(-0.5, 1.5)            [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-2-86)             self.selected.set_visible(True)            [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-2-87)             self.selected.set_data([xs[dataind]], [ys[dataind]]) [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-2-88)            [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-2-89)             self.text.set_text(f"selected: {dataind:d}")            [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-2-90)             fig.canvas.draw() ### Animated chart[#](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#animated-chart "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-3-1) import logging [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-3-2)[](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-3-3) import matplotlib.pyplot as plt [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-3-4) import numpy as np [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-3-5)[](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-3-6) import flet as ft [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-3-7) import flet_charts [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-3-8)[](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-3-9) logging.basicConfig(level=logging.INFO) [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-3-10)[](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-3-11) state = {} [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-3-12) [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-3-13)[](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-3-14) def main(page: ft.Page):     [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-3-15)     import matplotlib.animation as animation [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-3-16)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-3-17)     # Fixing random state for reproducibility    [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-3-18)     np.random.seed(19680801) [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-3-19)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-3-20)     def random_walk(num_steps, max_step=0.05):        [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-3-21)         """Return a 3D random walk as (num_steps, 3) array."""        [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-3-22)         start_pos = np.random.random(3)        [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-3-23)         steps = np.random.uniform(-max_step, max_step, size=(num_steps, 3))        [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-3-24)         walk = start_pos + np.cumsum(steps, axis=0)        [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-3-25)         return walk [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-3-26)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-3-27)     def update_lines(num, walks, lines):        [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-3-28)         for line, walk in zip(lines, walks):            [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-3-29)             line.set_data_3d(walk[:num, :].T)        [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-3-30)         return lines [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-3-31)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-3-32)     # Data: 40 random walks as (num_steps, 3) arrays    [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-3-33)     num_steps = 30    [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-3-34)     walks = [random_walk(num_steps) for index in range(40)] [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-3-35)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-3-36)     # Attaching 3D axis to the figure    [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-3-37)     fig = plt.figure()    [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-3-38)     ax = fig.add_subplot(projection="3d") [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-3-39)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-3-40)     # Create lines initially without data    [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-3-41)     lines = [ax.plot([], [], [])[0] for _ in walks] [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-3-42)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-3-43)     # Setting the Axes properties    [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-3-44)     ax.set(xlim3d=(0, 1), xlabel="X")    [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-3-45)     ax.set(ylim3d=(0, 1), ylabel="Y")    [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-3-46)     ax.set(zlim3d=(0, 1), zlabel="Z") [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-3-47)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-3-48)     # Creating the Animation object    [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-3-49)     state["anim"] = animation.FuncAnimation(        [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-3-50)         fig, update_lines, num_steps, fargs=(walks, lines), interval=100    [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-3-51)     ) [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-3-52)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-3-53)     page.add(flet_charts.MatplotlibChartWithToolbar(figure=fig, expand=True)) [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-3-54) [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-3-55)[](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-3-56) if __name__ == "__main__":     [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-3-57)     ft.run(main)`

[![animate.png](https://docs.flet.dev/examples/controls/charts/matplotlib_chart/media/animate.png)](https://docs.flet.dev/examples/controls/charts/matplotlib_chart/media/animate.png)

Properties[#](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#flet_charts.matplotlib_chart_with_toolbar.MatplotlibChartWithToolbar-properties "Permanent link")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### figure `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#flet_charts.matplotlib_chart_with_toolbar.MatplotlibChartWithToolbar.figure "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-0-1) figure: Figure = [field](https://docs.python.org/3/library/dataclasses.html#dataclasses.field "<code>dataclasses.field</code>") (metadata={'skip': True})`

Matplotlib figure to draw - an instance of [`matplotlib.figure.Figure`](https://matplotlib.org/stable/api/_as_gen/matplotlib.figure.Figure.html#matplotlib.figure.Figure)
.

Methods[#](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#flet_charts.matplotlib_chart_with_toolbar.MatplotlibChartWithToolbar-methods "Permanent link")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### download\_click `async` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#flet_charts.matplotlib_chart_with_toolbar.MatplotlibChartWithToolbar.download_click "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-0-1) download_click()`

Export the figure in the selected format and prompt user to save it.

### on\_message [#](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#flet_charts.matplotlib_chart_with_toolbar.MatplotlibChartWithToolbar.on_message "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-0-1) on_message(e: MatplotlibChartMessageEvent)`

Show status text produced by the underlying chart toolbar backend.

Parameters:

*   **`e`** (`MatplotlibChartMessageEvent`) –
    
    Message event emitted by [`MatplotlibChart`](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchart/#flet_charts.matplotlib_chart.MatplotlibChart)
    .
    

### on\_toolbar\_update [#](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#flet_charts.matplotlib_chart_with_toolbar.MatplotlibChartWithToolbar.on_toolbar_update "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-0-1) on_toolbar_update(     [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-0-2)     e: MatplotlibChartToolbarButtonsUpdateEvent, [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-0-3) )`

Synchronize back/forward button enabled state with chart history.

Parameters:

*   **`e`** (`MatplotlibChartToolbarButtonsUpdateEvent`) –
    
    Toolbar state update event from [`MatplotlibChart`](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchart/#flet_charts.matplotlib_chart.MatplotlibChart)
    .
    

### pan\_click [#](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#flet_charts.matplotlib_chart_with_toolbar.MatplotlibChartWithToolbar.pan_click "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-0-1) pan_click()`

Toggle pan mode and ensure zoom mode is turned off.

### zoom\_click [#](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#flet_charts.matplotlib_chart_with_toolbar.MatplotlibChartWithToolbar.zoom_click "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/matplotlibchartwithtoolbar/#__codelineno-0-1) zoom_click()`

Toggle zoom mode and ensure pan mode is turned off.

# Overview - Flet

 

[Skip to content](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/#flet-cli)

Flet CLI[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/#flet-cli "Permanent link")

==================================================================

Flet command-line interface (CLI) provides an easy way to create, run, test and package Flet apps.

Usage[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/#usage "Permanent link")

------------------------------------------------------------

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/#__codelineno-0-1) flet [-h] [--version]               [](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/#__codelineno-0-2)               {create,run,build,debug,pack,publish,serve,emulators,devices,doctor}              [](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/#__codelineno-0-3)               ...`

Options[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/#options "Permanent link")

----------------------------------------------------------------

### `--help`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/#-help "Permanent link")

Show this help message and exit.

**Aliases:** `-h`

### `--version`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/#-version "Permanent link")

Show program's version number and exit.

**Aliases:** `-V`

Subcommands[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/#subcommands "Permanent link")

------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   [`build`](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-build/)
    : Build a Flet Python app into a platform-specific executable or.
*   [`create`](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-create/)
    : Create a new Flet project using a predefined template.
*   [`debug`](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-debug/)
    : Run a Flet Python app in debug mode on a specified platform (desktop, web, mobile).
*   [`devices`](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-devices/)
    : List all connected iOS and Android devices.
*   [`doctor`](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-doctor/)
    : Get information about the system and environment setup.
*   [`emulators`](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-emulators/)
    : List, create, and launch available emulators.
*   [`pack`](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-pack/)
    : Package a Flet application into a standalone desktop executable or app bundle.
*   [`publish`](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-publish/)
    : Compile and package a Flet app as a standalone static web application.
*   [`run`](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-run/)
    : Run a Flet application in hot reload mode.
*   [`serve`](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-serve/)
    : Serve static files from a directory with a lightweight web server,.

Back to top

---

# flet create - Flet

 

[Skip to content](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-create/#usage)

flet create
===========

Create a new Flet project using a predefined template. It sets up the initial directory structure, metadata, and required files to help you get started quickly.

Usage[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-create/#usage "Permanent link")

------------------------------------------------------------------------

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-create/#__codelineno-0-1) flet create [-h] [-v] [--project-name PROJECT_NAME]                      [](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-create/#__codelineno-0-2)                      [--description DESCRIPTION] [--template {app,extension}]                     [](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-create/#__codelineno-0-3)                      [--template-ref TEMPLATE_REF]                     [](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-create/#__codelineno-0-4)                      [output_directory]`

Positional arguments[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-create/#positional-arguments "Permanent link")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### `output_directory`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-create/#output_directory "Permanent link")

Directory where the new Flet project will be created. If omitted, the project is created in the current directory.

**Default:** `.`

Options[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-create/#options "Permanent link")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------

### `--description`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-create/#-description "Permanent link")

Short description of the new Flet project. This will appear in generated metadata.

### `--help`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-create/#-help "Permanent link")

Show this help message and exit.

**Aliases:** `-h`

### `--project-name`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-create/#-project-name "Permanent link")

Name of the new Flet project. This will be used in metadata files such as `pyproject.toml`.

### `--template`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-create/#-template "Permanent link")

The template to use (or type of project to create) for new Flet project.

**Possible values:** `app`, `extension`

**Default:** `app`

### `--template-ref`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-create/#-template-ref "Permanent link")

Git reference (branch, tag, or commit ID) of the Flet template repository (flet-dev/flet-app-templates) to use. Useful when using a custom or development version of templates.

### `--verbose`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-create/#-verbose "Permanent link")

Enable verbose output. Use -v for standard verbose logging and -vv for more detailed output.

**Aliases:** `-v`

Back to top

---

# flet doctor - Flet

 

[Skip to content](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-doctor/#usage)

flet doctor
===========

Get information about the system and environment setup.

Usage[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-doctor/#usage "Permanent link")

------------------------------------------------------------------------

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-doctor/#__codelineno-0-1) flet doctor [-h] [-v]`

Options[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-doctor/#options "Permanent link")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------

### `--help`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-doctor/#-help "Permanent link")

Show this help message and exit.

**Aliases:** `-h`

### `--verbose`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-doctor/#-verbose "Permanent link")

Enable verbose output. Use -v for standard verbose logging and -vv for more detailed output.

**Aliases:** `-v`

Back to top
