# LineChart - Flet

 

[Skip to content](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#flet_charts.line_chart.LineChart)

LineChart
=========

Draws a line chart.

Example:

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#__codelineno-0-1) fch.LineChart(     [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#__codelineno-0-2)     min_y=0,    [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#__codelineno-0-3)     max_y=3,    [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#__codelineno-0-4)     min_x=0,    [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#__codelineno-0-5)     max_x=5,    [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#__codelineno-0-6)     data_series=[        [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#__codelineno-0-7)         fch.LineChartData(            [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#__codelineno-0-8)             color=ft.Colors.BLUE_GREY_500,            [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#__codelineno-0-9)             curved=True,            [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#__codelineno-0-10)             points=[                [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#__codelineno-0-11)                 fch.LineChartDataPoint(1, 0.5),                [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#__codelineno-0-12)                 fch.LineChartDataPoint(2, 1.5),                [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#__codelineno-0-13)                 fch.LineChartDataPoint(3, 1),            [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#__codelineno-0-14)             ],        [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#__codelineno-0-15)         ),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#__codelineno-0-16)         ...,    [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#__codelineno-0-17)     ], [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#__codelineno-0-18) )`

[![LineChart](https://docs.flet.dev/test-images-charts/examples/golden/macos/line_chart/image_for_docs.png)](https://docs.flet.dev/test-images-charts/examples/golden/macos/line_chart/image_for_docs.png)

Basic line chart

Inherits: `[LayoutControl](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/layoutcontrol/#flet.LayoutControl) `

Properties

*   **`[animation](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#flet_charts.line_chart.LineChart.animation) `**(`[AnimationValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.AnimationValue) `) –
    
    Controls chart implicit animation.
    
*   **`[baseline_x](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#flet_charts.line_chart.LineChart.baseline_x) `**(`[Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  | None`) –
    
    Baseline value for X axis.
    
*   **`[baseline_y](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#flet_charts.line_chart.LineChart.baseline_y) `**(`[Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  | None`) –
    
    Baseline value for Y axis.
    
*   **`[bgcolor](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#flet_charts.line_chart.LineChart.bgcolor) `**(`[ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None`) –
    
    Background color of the chart.
    
*   **`[border](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#flet_charts.line_chart.LineChart.border) `**(`[Border](https://docs.flet.dev/types/border/#flet.Border)  | None`) –
    
    The border around the chart.
    
*   **`[bottom_axis](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#flet_charts.line_chart.LineChart.bottom_axis) `**(`[ChartAxis](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/types/chartaxis/#flet_charts.chart_axis.ChartAxis)  | None`) –
    
    Defines the appearance of the bottom axis, its title and labels.
    
*   **`[data_series](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#flet_charts.line_chart.LineChart.data_series) `**(`[list](https://docs.python.org/3/glossary.html#term-list) [[LineChartData](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/types/linechartdata/#flet_charts.line_chart_data.LineChartData) ]`) –
    
    A list of [`LineChartData`](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/types/linechartdata/#flet_charts.line_chart_data.LineChartData)
    
*   **`[horizontal_grid_lines](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#flet_charts.line_chart.LineChart.horizontal_grid_lines) `**(`[ChartGridLines](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/types/chartgridlines/#flet_charts.types.ChartGridLines)  | None`) –
    
    Controls drawing of chart's horizontal lines.
    
*   **`[interactive](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#flet_charts.line_chart.LineChart.interactive) `**(`[bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool) `) –
    
    Enables automatic tooltips and points highlighting when hovering over the chart.
    
*   **`[left_axis](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#flet_charts.line_chart.LineChart.left_axis) `**(`[ChartAxis](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/types/chartaxis/#flet_charts.chart_axis.ChartAxis)  | None`) –
    
    Defines the appearance of the left axis, its title and labels.
    
*   **`[max_x](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#flet_charts.line_chart.LineChart.max_x) `**(`[Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  | None`) –
    
    Defines the maximum displayed value for X axis.
    
*   **`[max_y](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#flet_charts.line_chart.LineChart.max_y) `**(`[Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  | None`) –
    
    Defines the maximum displayed value for Y axis.
    
*   **`[min_x](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#flet_charts.line_chart.LineChart.min_x) `**(`[Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  | None`) –
    
    Defines the minimum displayed value for X axis.
    
*   **`[min_y](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#flet_charts.line_chart.LineChart.min_y) `**(`[Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  | None`) –
    
    Defines the minimum displayed value for Y axis.
    
*   **`[point_line_end](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#flet_charts.line_chart.LineChart.point_line_end) `**(`[Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  | None`) –
    
    The end of the vertical line drawn at selected point position.
    
*   **`[point_line_start](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#flet_charts.line_chart.LineChart.point_line_start) `**(`[Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  | None`) –
    
    The start of the vertical line drawn under the selected point.
    
*   **`[right_axis](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#flet_charts.line_chart.LineChart.right_axis) `**(`[ChartAxis](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/types/chartaxis/#flet_charts.chart_axis.ChartAxis)  | None`) –
    
    Defines the appearance of the right axis, its title and labels.
    
*   **`[tooltip](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#flet_charts.line_chart.LineChart.tooltip) `**(`[LineChartTooltip](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/types/linecharttooltip/#flet_charts.line_chart.LineChartTooltip)  | None`) –
    
    The tooltip configuration for this chart.
    
*   **`[top_axis](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#flet_charts.line_chart.LineChart.top_axis) `**(`[ChartAxis](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/types/chartaxis/#flet_charts.chart_axis.ChartAxis)  | None`) –
    
    Defines the appearance of the top axis, its title and labels.
    
*   **`[vertical_grid_lines](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#flet_charts.line_chart.LineChart.vertical_grid_lines) `**(`[ChartGridLines](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/types/chartgridlines/#flet_charts.types.ChartGridLines)  | None`) –
    
    Controls drawing of chart's vertical lines.
    

Events

*   **`[on_event](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#flet_charts.line_chart.LineChart.on_event) `**(`[EventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.EventHandler) [[LineChartEvent](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/types/linechartevent/#flet_charts.line_chart.LineChartEvent) ] | None`) –
    
    Fires when a chart line is hovered or clicked.
    

Examples[#](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#examples "Permanent link")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Example 1[#](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#example-1 "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#__codelineno-0-1) import flet_charts as fch [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#__codelineno-0-2)[](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#__codelineno-0-3) import flet as ft [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#__codelineno-0-4) [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#__codelineno-0-5)[](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#__codelineno-0-6) class State:     [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#__codelineno-0-7)     toggled = True [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#__codelineno-0-8) [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#__codelineno-0-9)[](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#__codelineno-0-10) state = State() [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#__codelineno-0-11) [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#__codelineno-0-12)[](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#__codelineno-0-13) def main(page: ft.Page):     [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#__codelineno-0-14)     data_1 = [        [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#__codelineno-0-15)         fch.LineChartData(            [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#__codelineno-0-16)             stroke_width=8,            [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#__codelineno-0-17)             color=ft.Colors.LIGHT_GREEN,            [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#__codelineno-0-18)             curved=True,            [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#__codelineno-0-19)             rounded_stroke_cap=True,            [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#__codelineno-0-20)             points=[                [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#__codelineno-0-21)                 fch.LineChartDataPoint(1, 1),                [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#__codelineno-0-22)                 fch.LineChartDataPoint(3, 1.5),                [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#__codelineno-0-23)                 fch.LineChartDataPoint(5, 1.4),                [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#__codelineno-0-24)                 fch.LineChartDataPoint(7, 3.4),                [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#__codelineno-0-25)                 fch.LineChartDataPoint(10, 2),                [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#__codelineno-0-26)                 fch.LineChartDataPoint(12, 2.2),                [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#__codelineno-0-27)                 fch.LineChartDataPoint(13, 1.8),            [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#__codelineno-0-28)             ],        [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#__codelineno-0-29)         ),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#__codelineno-0-30)         fch.LineChartData(            [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#__codelineno-0-31)             color=ft.Colors.PINK,            [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#__codelineno-0-32)             below_line_bgcolor=ft.Colors.with_opacity(0, ft.Colors.PINK),            [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#__codelineno-0-33)             stroke_width=8,            [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#__codelineno-0-34)             curved=True,            [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#__codelineno-0-35)             rounded_stroke_cap=True,            [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#__codelineno-0-36)             points=[                [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#__codelineno-0-37)                 fch.LineChartDataPoint(1, 1),                [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#__codelineno-0-38)                 fch.LineChartDataPoint(3, 2.8), Properties[#](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#flet_charts.line_chart.LineChart-properties "Permanent link")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### animation `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#flet_charts.line_chart.LineChart.animation "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#__codelineno-0-1) animation: [AnimationValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.AnimationValue)  = [field](https://docs.python.org/3/library/dataclasses.html#dataclasses.field "<code>dataclasses.field</code>") (     [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#__codelineno-0-2)     default_factory=lambda: [Animation](https://docs.flet.dev/types/animation/#flet.Animation) (        [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#__codelineno-0-3)         duration=[Duration](https://docs.flet.dev/types/duration/#flet.Duration) (milliseconds=150), curve=[LINEAR](https://docs.flet.dev/types/animationcurve/#flet.AnimationCurve.LINEAR)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#__codelineno-0-4)     ) [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#__codelineno-0-5) )`

Controls chart implicit animation.

### baseline\_x `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#flet_charts.line_chart.LineChart.baseline_x "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#__codelineno-0-1) baseline_x: [Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  | None = None`

Baseline value for X axis.

### baseline\_y `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#flet_charts.line_chart.LineChart.baseline_y "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#__codelineno-0-1) baseline_y: [Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  | None = None`

Baseline value for Y axis.

### bgcolor `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#flet_charts.line_chart.LineChart.bgcolor "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#__codelineno-0-1) bgcolor: [ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None = None`

Background color of the chart.

### border `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#flet_charts.line_chart.LineChart.border "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#__codelineno-0-1) border: [Border](https://docs.flet.dev/types/border/#flet.Border)  | None = None`

The border around the chart.

### bottom\_axis `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#flet_charts.line_chart.LineChart.bottom_axis "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#__codelineno-0-1) bottom_axis: [ChartAxis](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/types/chartaxis/#flet_charts.chart_axis.ChartAxis)  | None = None`

Defines the appearance of the bottom axis, its title and labels.

### data\_series `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#flet_charts.line_chart.LineChart.data_series "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#__codelineno-0-1) data_series: [list](https://docs.python.org/3/glossary.html#term-list) [[LineChartData](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/types/linechartdata/#flet_charts.line_chart_data.LineChartData) ] = [field](https://docs.python.org/3/library/dataclasses.html#dataclasses.field "<code>dataclasses.field</code>") (     [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#__codelineno-0-2)     default_factory=[list](https://docs.python.org/3/glossary.html#term-list) [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#__codelineno-0-3) )`

A list of [`LineChartData`](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/types/linechartdata/#flet_charts.line_chart_data.LineChartData)
 controls drawn as separate lines on a chart.

### horizontal\_grid\_lines `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#flet_charts.line_chart.LineChart.horizontal_grid_lines "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#__codelineno-0-1) horizontal_grid_lines: [ChartGridLines](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/types/chartgridlines/#flet_charts.types.ChartGridLines)  | None = None`

Controls drawing of chart's horizontal lines.

### interactive `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#flet_charts.line_chart.LineChart.interactive "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#__codelineno-0-1) interactive: [bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool)  = True`

Enables automatic tooltips and points highlighting when hovering over the chart.

### left\_axis `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#flet_charts.line_chart.LineChart.left_axis "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#__codelineno-0-1) left_axis: [ChartAxis](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/types/chartaxis/#flet_charts.chart_axis.ChartAxis)  | None = None`

Defines the appearance of the left axis, its title and labels.

### max\_x `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#flet_charts.line_chart.LineChart.max_x "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#__codelineno-0-1) max_x: [Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  | None = None`

Defines the maximum displayed value for X axis.

### max\_y `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#flet_charts.line_chart.LineChart.max_y "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#__codelineno-0-1) max_y: [Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  | None = None`

Defines the maximum displayed value for Y axis.

### min\_x `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#flet_charts.line_chart.LineChart.min_x "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#__codelineno-0-1) min_x: [Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  | None = None`

Defines the minimum displayed value for X axis.

### min\_y `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#flet_charts.line_chart.LineChart.min_y "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#__codelineno-0-1) min_y: [Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  | None = None`

Defines the minimum displayed value for Y axis.

### point\_line\_end `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#flet_charts.line_chart.LineChart.point_line_end "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#__codelineno-0-1) point_line_end: [Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  | None = None`

The end of the vertical line drawn at selected point position.

Defaults to data point's `y` value.

### point\_line\_start `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#flet_charts.line_chart.LineChart.point_line_start "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#__codelineno-0-1) point_line_start: [Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  | None = None`

The start of the vertical line drawn under the selected point.

Defaults to chart's bottom edge.

### right\_axis `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#flet_charts.line_chart.LineChart.right_axis "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#__codelineno-0-1) right_axis: [ChartAxis](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/types/chartaxis/#flet_charts.chart_axis.ChartAxis)  | None = None`

Defines the appearance of the right axis, its title and labels.

### tooltip `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#flet_charts.line_chart.LineChart.tooltip "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#__codelineno-0-1) tooltip: [LineChartTooltip](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/types/linecharttooltip/#flet_charts.line_chart.LineChartTooltip)  | None = [field](https://docs.python.org/3/library/dataclasses.html#dataclasses.field "<code>dataclasses.field</code>") (     [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#__codelineno-0-2)     default_factory=lambda: [LineChartTooltip](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/types/linecharttooltip/#flet_charts.line_chart.LineChartTooltip) () [](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#__codelineno-0-3) )`

The tooltip configuration for this chart.

If set to `None`, no tooltips will be shown throughout this chart.

### top\_axis `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#flet_charts.line_chart.LineChart.top_axis "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#__codelineno-0-1) top_axis: [ChartAxis](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/types/chartaxis/#flet_charts.chart_axis.ChartAxis)  | None = None`

Defines the appearance of the top axis, its title and labels.

### vertical\_grid\_lines `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#flet_charts.line_chart.LineChart.vertical_grid_lines "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#__codelineno-0-1) vertical_grid_lines: [ChartGridLines](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/types/chartgridlines/#flet_charts.types.ChartGridLines)  | None = None`

Controls drawing of chart's vertical lines.

Events[#](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#flet_charts.line_chart.LineChart-events "Permanent link")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### on\_event `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#flet_charts.line_chart.LineChart.on_event "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/linechart/#__codelineno-0-1) on_event: [EventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.EventHandler) [[LineChartEvent](https://docs.flet.dev/charts/types/linechartevent/#flet_charts.line_chart.LineChartEvent) ] | None = None`

Fires when a chart line is hovered or clicked.

# flet run - Flet

 

[Skip to content](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-run/#usage)

flet run
========

Run a Flet application in hot reload mode.

Usage[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-run/#usage "Permanent link")

---------------------------------------------------------------------

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-run/#__codelineno-0-1) flet run [-h] [-v] [-p PORT] [--host HOST] [--name APP_NAME] [-m]                   [](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-run/#__codelineno-0-2)                   [-d] [-r] [-n] [-w] [--ios] [--android] [-a ASSETS_DIR]                  [](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-run/#__codelineno-0-3)                   [--ignore-dirs IGNORE_DIRS]                  [](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-run/#__codelineno-0-4)                   [script]`

Positional arguments[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-run/#positional-arguments "Permanent link")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### `script`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-run/#script "Permanent link")

Path to the Python script that starts your Flet app.

**Default:** `.`

Options[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-run/#options "Permanent link")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------

### `--android`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-run/#-android "Permanent link")

Launch the app on an Android device.

### `--assets`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-run/#-assets "Permanent link")

Path to a directory containing static assets used by the app (e.g. images, fonts).

**Default:** `assets`

**Aliases:** `-a`

### `--directory`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-run/#-directory "Permanent link")

Watch the directory of the script for changes and hot reload the app accordingly.

**Aliases:** `-d`

### `--help`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-run/#-help "Permanent link")

Show this help message and exit.

**Aliases:** `-h`

### `--hidden`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-run/#-hidden "Permanent link")

Start the application with the window hidden.

**Aliases:** `-n`

### `--host`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-run/#-host "Permanent link")

The host to run Flet web app on. Use "\*" to listen on all IPs.

### `--ignore-dirs`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-run/#-ignore-dirs "Permanent link")

Comma-separated list of directory names to ignore when watching for file changes.

### `--ios`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-run/#-ios "Permanent link")

Launch the app on an iOS device.

### `--module`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-run/#-module "Permanent link")

Treat the script as a python module path instead of a file path. Example: flet run -m my\_app.main.

**Aliases:** `-m`

### `--name`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-run/#-name "Permanent link")

A unique name for your app. Useful when running multiple apps on the same port.

### `--port`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-run/#-port "Permanent link")

Custom TCP or HTTP (if `--web` option is used) port to run the Flet app on. If not specified, a random port will be chosen.

**Value:** `PORT <int>`

**Aliases:** `-p`

### `--recursive`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-run/#-recursive "Permanent link")

Watch script directory and all its sub-directories recursively for file changes.

**Aliases:** `-r`

### `--verbose`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-run/#-verbose "Permanent link")

Enable verbose output. Use -v for standard verbose logging and -vv for more detailed output.

**Aliases:** `-v`

### `--web`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-run/#-web "Permanent link")

Launch the Flet app as a dynamic website and automatically open it in your web browser after startup.

**Aliases:** `-w`

Back to top

---

# flet devices - Flet

 

[Skip to content](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-devices/#usage)

flet devices
============

List all connected iOS and Android devices.

Usage[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-devices/#usage "Permanent link")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-devices/#__codelineno-0-1) flet devices [-h] [-v] [--device-timeout DEVICE_TIMEOUT]                       [](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-devices/#__codelineno-0-2)                       [--device-connection {both,attached,wireless}]                      [](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-devices/#__codelineno-0-3)                       [--no-rich-output] [--yes] [--skip-flutter-doctor]                      [](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-devices/#__codelineno-0-4)                       [{ios,android}]`

Positional arguments[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-devices/#positional-arguments "Permanent link")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### `platform`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-devices/#platform "Permanent link")

The target platform to list devices for. If not specified, lists all platforms.

**Possible values:** `android`, `ios`

**Required:** false

Options[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-devices/#options "Permanent link")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

### `--device-connection`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-devices/#-device-connection "Permanent link")

Filter devices by connection type: attached (USB) or wireless.

**Possible values:** `attached`, `both`, `wireless`

**Default:** `both`

### `--device-timeout`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-devices/#-device-timeout "Permanent link")

Time (in seconds) to wait for devices to attach.

**Value:** `DEVICE_TIMEOUT <int>`

**Default:** `10`

### `--help`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-devices/#-help "Permanent link")

Show this help message and exit.

**Aliases:** `-h`

### `--no-rich-output`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-devices/#-no-rich-output "Permanent link")

Disable rich output and prefer plain text. Useful on Windows builds.

**Environment variable:** [`FLET_CLI_NO_RICH_OUTPUT`](https://docs.flet.dev/reference/environment-variables/#flet_cli_no_rich_output)

### `--skip-flutter-doctor`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-devices/#-skip-flutter-doctor "Permanent link")

Skip running Flutter doctor upon failed builds.

**Environment variable:** [`FLET_CLI_SKIP_FLUTTER_DOCTOR`](https://docs.flet.dev/reference/environment-variables/#flet_cli_skip_flutter_doctor)

### `--verbose`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-devices/#-verbose "Permanent link")

Enable verbose output. Use -v for standard verbose logging and -vv for more detailed output.

**Aliases:** `-v`

### `--yes`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-devices/#-yes "Permanent link")

Answer yes to all prompts (install dependencies without confirmation).

Back to top

---

# flet emulators - Flet

 

[Skip to content](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-emulators/#usage)

flet emulators
==============

List, create, and launch available emulators.

Usage[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-emulators/#usage "Permanent link")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-emulators/#__codelineno-0-1) flet emulators [-h] [-v] [--cold] [--no-rich-output] [--yes]                         [](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-emulators/#__codelineno-0-2)                         [--skip-flutter-doctor]                        [](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-emulators/#__codelineno-0-3)                         [{start,create,delete}] [emulator]`

Positional arguments[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-emulators/#positional-arguments "Permanent link")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### `action`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-emulators/#action "Permanent link")

Action to perform: start an emulator, create a new one, or delete it.

**Possible values:** `create`, `delete`, `start`

**Required:** false

### `emulator`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-emulators/#emulator "Permanent link")

Emulator ID or name (required for start, create, and delete).

**Required:** false

Options[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-emulators/#options "Permanent link")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### `--cold`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-emulators/#-cold "Permanent link")

Cold boot the emulator when starting.

### `--help`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-emulators/#-help "Permanent link")

Show this help message and exit.

**Aliases:** `-h`

### `--no-rich-output`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-emulators/#-no-rich-output "Permanent link")

Disable rich output and prefer plain text. Useful on Windows builds.

**Environment variable:** [`FLET_CLI_NO_RICH_OUTPUT`](https://docs.flet.dev/reference/environment-variables/#flet_cli_no_rich_output)

### `--skip-flutter-doctor`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-emulators/#-skip-flutter-doctor "Permanent link")

Skip running Flutter doctor upon failed builds.

**Environment variable:** [`FLET_CLI_SKIP_FLUTTER_DOCTOR`](https://docs.flet.dev/reference/environment-variables/#flet_cli_skip_flutter_doctor)

### `--verbose`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-emulators/#-verbose "Permanent link")

Enable verbose output. Use -v for standard verbose logging and -vv for more detailed output.

**Aliases:** `-v`

### `--yes`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-emulators/#-yes "Permanent link")

Answer yes to all prompts (install dependencies without confirmation).

Back to top

# flet publish - Flet

 

[Skip to content](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-publish/#usage)

flet publish
============

Compile and package a Flet app as a standalone static web application.

Usage[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-publish/#usage "Permanent link")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-publish/#__codelineno-0-1) flet publish [-h] [-v] [--pre] [-a ASSETS_DIR] [--distpath DISTPATH]                       [](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-publish/#__codelineno-0-2)                       [--app-name APP_NAME] [--app-short-name APP_SHORT_NAME]                      [](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-publish/#__codelineno-0-3)                       [--app-description APP_DESCRIPTION]                      [](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-publish/#__codelineno-0-4)                       [--base-url BASE_URL]                      [](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-publish/#__codelineno-0-5)                       [--web-renderer {auto,canvaskit,skwasm}]                      [](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-publish/#__codelineno-0-6)                       [--route-url-strategy {path,hash}]                      [](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-publish/#__codelineno-0-7)                       [--pwa-background-color PWA_BACKGROUND_COLOR]                      [](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-publish/#__codelineno-0-8)                       [--pwa-theme-color PWA_THEME_COLOR] [--no-cdn]                      [](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-publish/#__codelineno-0-9)                       [script]`

Positional arguments[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-publish/#positional-arguments "Permanent link")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### `script`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-publish/#script "Permanent link")

Path to the Python script that starts your Flet app.

**Default:** `.`

Options[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-publish/#options "Permanent link")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

### `--app-description`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-publish/#-app-description "Permanent link")

Short description of the application. Used in PWA manifests and metadata.

### `--app-name`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-publish/#-app-name "Permanent link")

Full name of the application. This is used in PWA metadata and may appear in the install prompt.

### `--app-short-name`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-publish/#-app-short-name "Permanent link")

A shorter version of the application name, often used in homescreen icons or install prompts.

### `--assets`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-publish/#-assets "Permanent link")

Path to a directory containing static assets used by the app (e.g., images, fonts, icons).

**Environment variable:** [`FLET_ASSETS_DIR`](https://docs.flet.dev/reference/environment-variables/#flet_assets_dir)

**Aliases:** `-a`

### `--base-url`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-publish/#-base-url "Permanent link")

Base URL path to serve the app from. Useful if the app is hosted in a subdirectory.

### `--distpath`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-publish/#-distpath "Permanent link")

Directory where the published web app should be placed.

**Default:** `dist`

### `--help`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-publish/#-help "Permanent link")

Show this help message and exit.

**Aliases:** `-h`

### `--no-cdn`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-publish/#-no-cdn "Permanent link")

Disable loading of CanvasKit, Pyodide, and fonts from CDNs. Use this for full offline deployments or air-gapped environments.

### `--pre`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-publish/#-pre "Permanent link")

Allow micropip to install pre-release Python packages. Use this if your app depends on a prerelease version of a package.

### `--pwa-background-color`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-publish/#-pwa-background-color "Permanent link")

Initial background color of your web app during the loading phase (used in splash screens).

### `--pwa-theme-color`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-publish/#-pwa-theme-color "Permanent link")

Default color of the browser UI (e.g., address bar) when your app is installed as a PWA.

### `--route-url-strategy`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-publish/#-route-url-strategy "Permanent link")

Controls how routes are handled in the browser.

**Possible values:** `hash`, `path`

**Default:** `path`

**Environment variable:** [`FLET_WEB_ROUTE_URL_STRATEGY`](https://docs.flet.dev/reference/environment-variables/#flet_web_route_url_strategy)

### `--verbose`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-publish/#-verbose "Permanent link")

Enable verbose output. Use -v for standard verbose logging and -vv for more detailed output.

**Aliases:** `-v`

### `--web-renderer`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-publish/#-web-renderer "Permanent link")

Flutter web renderer to use.

**Possible values:** `auto`, `canvaskit`, `skwasm`

**Default:** `auto`

**Environment variable:** [`FLET_WEB_RENDERER`](https://docs.flet.dev/reference/environment-variables/#flet_web_renderer)

Back to top

# flet serve - Flet

 

[Skip to content](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-serve/#usage)

flet serve
==========

Serve static files from a directory with a lightweight web server, optionally adding WebAssembly-related headers for Flet web apps.

Usage[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-serve/#usage "Permanent link")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-serve/#__codelineno-0-1) flet serve [-h] [-v] [-p PORT] [web_root]`

Positional arguments[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-serve/#positional-arguments "Permanent link")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### `web_root`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-serve/#web_root "Permanent link")

Directory to serve.

**Default:** `./build/web`

Options[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-serve/#options "Permanent link")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------

### `--help`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-serve/#-help "Permanent link")

Show this help message and exit.

**Aliases:** `-h`

### `--port`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-serve/#-port "Permanent link")

Port number to serve the files on. Use this to customize the port if the default is already in use or needs to be changed.

**Value:** `PORT <int>`

**Default:** `8000`

**Aliases:** `-p`

### `--verbose`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-serve/#-verbose "Permanent link")

Enable verbose output. Use -v for standard verbose logging and -vv for more detailed output.

**Aliases:** `-v`

Back to top

# flet pack - Flet

 

[Skip to content](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-pack/#usage)

flet pack
=========

Package a Flet application into a standalone desktop executable or app bundle using PyInstaller.

Usage[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-pack/#usage "Permanent link")

----------------------------------------------------------------------

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-pack/#__codelineno-0-1) flet pack [-h] [-v] [-i ICON] [-n NAME] [-D] [--distpath DISTPATH]                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-pack/#__codelineno-0-2)                    [--add-data [ADD_DATA ...]] [--add-binary [ADD_BINARY ...]]                   [](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-pack/#__codelineno-0-3)                    [--hidden-import [HIDDEN_IMPORT ...]]                   [](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-pack/#__codelineno-0-4)                    [--product-name PRODUCT_NAME]                   [](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-pack/#__codelineno-0-5)                    [--file-description FILE_DESCRIPTION]                   [](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-pack/#__codelineno-0-6)                    [--product-version PRODUCT_VERSION]                   [](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-pack/#__codelineno-0-7)                    [--file-version FILE_VERSION] [--company-name COMPANY_NAME]                   [](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-pack/#__codelineno-0-8)                    [--copyright COPYRIGHT]                   [](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-pack/#__codelineno-0-9)                    [--codesign-identity CODESIGN_IDENTITY]                   [](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-pack/#__codelineno-0-10)                    [--bundle-id BUNDLE_ID] [--debug-console DEBUG_CONSOLE]                   [](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-pack/#__codelineno-0-11)                    [--uac-admin]                   [](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-pack/#__codelineno-0-12)                    [--pyinstaller-build-args [PYINSTALLER_BUILD_ARGS ...]]                   [](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-pack/#__codelineno-0-13)                    [-y]                   [](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-pack/#__codelineno-0-14)                    script`

Positional arguments[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-pack/#positional-arguments "Permanent link")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### `script`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-pack/#script "Permanent link")

Path to the Python script that launches your Flet app.

**Required:** true

Options[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-pack/#options "Permanent link")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

### `--add-binary`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-pack/#-add-binary "Permanent link")

Additional binary files to be added to the executable.Format: `source:destination[:platform]`.

**Value:** `ADD_BINARY*`

### `--add-data`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-pack/#-add-data "Permanent link")

Add additional non-binary files or folders to the bundle. Accepts one or more arguments in the form `source:destination`.

**Value:** `ADD_DATA*`

### `--bundle-id`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-pack/#-bundle-id "Permanent link")

Bundle identifier used for macOS app packaging.

### `--codesign-identity`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-pack/#-codesign-identity "Permanent link")

Code signing identity to sign the app bundle (macOS only).

### `--company-name`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-pack/#-company-name "Permanent link")

Company name metadata for the Windows executable.

### `--copyright`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-pack/#-copyright "Permanent link")

Copyright string embedded in the executable (Windows) or bundle (macOS).

### `--debug-console`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-pack/#-debug-console "Permanent link")

Show python debug console window (ensure correct DEBUG level). Useful for troubleshooting runtime errors.

### `--distpath`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-pack/#-distpath "Permanent link")

Directory where the packaged app will be placed.

**Default:** `dist`

### `--file-description`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-pack/#-file-description "Permanent link")

File description to embed in the executable (Windows).

### `--file-version`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-pack/#-file-version "Permanent link")

File version for the executable in `n.n.n.n` format (Windows only).

### `--help`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-pack/#-help "Permanent link")

Show this help message and exit.

**Aliases:** `-h`

### `--hidden-import`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-pack/#-hidden-import "Permanent link")

Add Python modules that are dynamically imported and not detected by static analysis.

**Value:** `HIDDEN_IMPORT*`

### `--icon`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-pack/#-icon "Permanent link")

Path to an icon file for your executable or app bundle. Supported formats: `.ico` (Windows), `.png` (Linux) and `.icns` (macOS).

**Aliases:** `-i`

### `--name`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-pack/#-name "Permanent link")

Name for the generated executable (Windows) or app bundle (macOS).

**Aliases:** `-n`

### `--onedir`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-pack/#-onedir "Permanent link")

Create a one-folder bundle instead of a single-file executable (Windows only).

**Aliases:** `-D`

### `--product-name`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-pack/#-product-name "Permanent link")

Product name to be embedded in the executable (Windows) or bundle (macOS).

### `--product-version`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-pack/#-product-version "Permanent link")

Product version for the executable (Windows) or bundle (macOS).

### `--pyinstaller-build-args`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-pack/#-pyinstaller-build-args "Permanent link")

Additional raw arguments to the underlying pyinstaller build command.

**Value:** `PYINSTALLER_BUILD_ARGS*`

### `--uac-admin`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-pack/#-uac-admin "Permanent link")

Request elevated (admin) permissions on application start (Windows only). Adds a UAC manifest to the executable.

### `--verbose`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-pack/#-verbose "Permanent link")

Enable verbose output. Use -v for standard verbose logging and -vv for more detailed output.

**Aliases:** `-v`

### `--yes`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-pack/#-yes "Permanent link")

Enable non-interactive mode. All prompts will be skipped.

**Aliases:** `-y`

Back to top

# AdRequest - Flet

 

[Skip to content](https://docs.flet.dev/ads/types/adrequest/#flet_ads.types.AdRequest)

AdRequest
=========

Targeting info per the AdMob API.

This class's properties mirror the native AdRequest API. See for example: [AdRequest.Builder for Android](https://developers.google.com/android/reference/com/google/android/gms/ads/AdRequest.Builder)
.

Properties

*   **`[content_url](https://docs.flet.dev/ads/types/adrequest/#flet_ads.types.AdRequest.content_url) `**(`[str](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str)  | None`) –
    
    URL string for a webpage whose content matches the app’s primary content.
    
*   **`[extras](https://docs.flet.dev/ads/types/adrequest/#flet_ads.types.AdRequest.extras) `**(`[dict](https://docs.python.org/3/reference/expressions.html#dict) [[str](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str) , [str](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str) ] | None`) –
    
    Extras to pass to the AdMob adapter.
    
*   **`[http_timeout](https://docs.flet.dev/ads/types/adrequest/#flet_ads.types.AdRequest.http_timeout) `**(`[int](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#int)  | None`) –
    
    A custom timeout (in milliseconds) for HTTPS calls during an ad request.
    
*   **`[keywords](https://docs.flet.dev/ads/types/adrequest/#flet_ads.types.AdRequest.keywords) `**(`[list](https://docs.python.org/3/glossary.html#term-list) [[str](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str) ] | None`) –
    
    Words or phrases describing the current user activity.
    
*   **`[neighboring_content_urls](https://docs.flet.dev/ads/types/adrequest/#flet_ads.types.AdRequest.neighboring_content_urls) `**(`[list](https://docs.python.org/3/glossary.html#term-list) [[str](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str) ] | None`) –
    
    URLs representing web content near an ad.
    
*   **`[non_personalized_ads](https://docs.flet.dev/ads/types/adrequest/#flet_ads.types.AdRequest.non_personalized_ads) `**(`[bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool)  | None`) –
    
    Non-personalized ads are ads that are not based on a user’s past behavior.
    

Properties[#](https://docs.flet.dev/ads/types/adrequest/#flet_ads.types.AdRequest-properties "Permanent link")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### content\_url `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/ads/types/adrequest/#flet_ads.types.AdRequest.content_url "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/ads/types/adrequest/#__codelineno-0-1) content_url: [str](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str)  | None = None`

URL string for a webpage whose content matches the app’s primary content.

This webpage content is used for targeting and brand safety purposes.

### extras `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/ads/types/adrequest/#flet_ads.types.AdRequest.extras "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/ads/types/adrequest/#__codelineno-0-1) extras: [dict](https://docs.python.org/3/reference/expressions.html#dict) [[str](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str) , [str](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str) ] | None = None`

Extras to pass to the AdMob adapter.

### http\_timeout `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/ads/types/adrequest/#flet_ads.types.AdRequest.http_timeout "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/ads/types/adrequest/#__codelineno-0-1) http_timeout: [int](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#int)  | None = None`

A custom timeout (in milliseconds) for HTTPS calls during an ad request.

Note

This is only supported in Android. (ignored on iOS)

### keywords `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/ads/types/adrequest/#flet_ads.types.AdRequest.keywords "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/ads/types/adrequest/#__codelineno-0-1) keywords: [list](https://docs.python.org/3/glossary.html#term-list) [[str](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str) ] | None = None`

Words or phrases describing the current user activity.

### neighboring\_content\_urls `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/ads/types/adrequest/#flet_ads.types.AdRequest.neighboring_content_urls "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/ads/types/adrequest/#__codelineno-0-1) neighboring_content_urls: [list](https://docs.python.org/3/glossary.html#term-list) [[str](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str) ] | None = None`

URLs representing web content near an ad.

### non\_personalized\_ads `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/ads/types/adrequest/#flet_ads.types.AdRequest.non_personalized_ads "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/ads/types/adrequest/#__codelineno-0-1) non_personalized_ads: [bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool)  | None = None`

Non-personalized ads are ads that are not based on a user’s past behavior.

For more information: [https://support.google.com/admob/answer/7676680?hl=en](https://support.google.com/admob/answer/7676680?hl=en)

Back to top

---

# flet build - Flet

 

[Skip to content](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-build/#usage)

flet build
==========

Build a Flet Python app into a platform-specific executable or installable bundle. It supports building for desktop (macOS, Linux, Windows), web, Android (APK/AAB), and iOS (IPA and simulator .app), with a wide range of customization options for metadata, assets, splash screens, and signing.

Detailed guide with usage examples: [https://docs.flet.dev/publish](https://docs.flet.dev/publish)
.

Usage[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-build/#usage "Permanent link")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-build/#__codelineno-0-1) flet build [-h] [-v] [-o OUTPUT_DIR]                     [](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-build/#__codelineno-0-2)                     [--arch TARGET_ARCH [TARGET_ARCH ...]]                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-build/#__codelineno-0-3)                     [--exclude EXCLUDE [EXCLUDE ...]] [--clear-cache]                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-build/#__codelineno-0-4)                     [--project PROJECT_NAME] [--artifact ARTIFACT_NAME]                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-build/#__codelineno-0-5)                     [--description DESCRIPTION] [--product PRODUCT_NAME]           [--module-name MODULE_NAME] [--template TEMPLATE]                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-build/#__codelineno-0-43)                     [--template-dir TEMPLATE_DIR] [](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-build/#__codelineno-0-46)                     {macos,linux,windows,web,apk,aab,ipa,ios-simulator}                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-build/#__codelineno-0-47)                     [python_app_path]`

Positional arguments[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-build/#positional-arguments "Permanent link")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### `target_platform`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-build/#target_platform "Permanent link")

The target platform or type of package to build.

**Possible values:** `aab`, `apk`, `ios-simulator`, `ipa`, `linux`, `macos`, `web`, `windows`

**Required:** true

### `python_app_path`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-build/#python_app_path "Permanent link")

Path to a directory with a Flet Python program.

**Default:** `.`

Options[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-build/#options "Permanent link")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------

### `--android-adaptive-icon-background`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-build/#-android-adaptive-icon-background "Permanent link")

The color to be used to fill out the background of Android adaptive icons.

### `--android-features`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-build/#-android-features "Permanent link")

The list of `<feature_name>=true|false` features to add to AndroidManifest.xml (android only); can be used multiple times.

**Value:** `ANDROID_FEATURES+`

### `--android-meta-data`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-build/#-android-meta-data "Permanent link")

The list of `<name>=<value>` app meta-data entries to add to AndroidManifest.xml (android only); can be used multiple times.

**Value:** `ANDROID_META_DATA+`

### `--android-permissions`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-build/#-android-permissions "Permanent link")

The list of `<permission_name>=true|false` permissions to add to AndroidManifest.xml (android only); can be used multiple times.

**Value:** `ANDROID_PERMISSIONS+`

### `--android-signing-key-alias`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-build/#-android-signing-key-alias "Permanent link")

Android signing key alias.

**Environment variable:** [`FLET_ANDROID_SIGNING_KEY_ALIAS`](https://docs.flet.dev/reference/environment-variables/#flet_android_signing_key_alias)

### `--android-signing-key-password`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-build/#-android-signing-key-password "Permanent link")

Android signing key password.

**Environment variable:** [`FLET_ANDROID_SIGNING_KEY_PASSWORD`](https://docs.flet.dev/reference/environment-variables/#flet_android_signing_key_password)

### `--android-signing-key-store`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-build/#-android-signing-key-store "Permanent link")

Path to an upload keystore `.jks` file for Android apps.

**Environment variable:** [`FLET_ANDROID_SIGNING_KEY_STORE`](https://docs.flet.dev/reference/environment-variables/#flet_android_signing_key_store)

### `--android-signing-key-store-password`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-build/#-android-signing-key-store-password "Permanent link")

Android signing store password.

**Environment variable:** [`FLET_ANDROID_SIGNING_KEY_STORE_PASSWORD`](https://docs.flet.dev/reference/environment-variables/#flet_android_signing_key_store_password)

### `--arch`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-build/#-arch "Permanent link")

Build for specific CPU architectures (used in macOS and Android builds only). Example: `--arch arm64 x64`.

**Value:** `TARGET_ARCH+`

### `--artifact`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-build/#-artifact "Permanent link")

Executable or bundle name on disk.

### `--base-url`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-build/#-base-url "Permanent link")

Base URL from which the app is served (web only).

### `--build-number`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-build/#-build-number "Permanent link")

Build number - an identifier used as an internal version number.

**Value:** `BUILD_NUMBER <int>`

### `--build-version`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-build/#-build-version "Permanent link")

Build version - a `x.y.z` string used as the version number shown to users.

### `--bundle-id`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-build/#-bundle-id "Permanent link")

Bundle ID for the application, e.g. `com.mycompany.app-name`. It is used as an iOS, Android, macOS and Linux bundle ID.

### `--cleanup-app`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-build/#-cleanup-app "Permanent link")

Remove unnecessary app files upon packaging.

### `--cleanup-app-files`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-build/#-cleanup-app-files "Permanent link")

The list of globs to delete extra app files and directories.

**Value:** `CLEANUP_APP_FILES+`

### `--cleanup-package-files`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-build/#-cleanup-package-files "Permanent link")

The list of globs to delete extra package files and directories.

**Value:** `CLEANUP_PACKAGE_FILES+`

### `--cleanup-packages`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-build/#-cleanup-packages "Permanent link")

Remove unnecessary package files upon packaging.

### `--clear-cache`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-build/#-clear-cache "Permanent link")

Remove any existing build cache before starting the build process.

### `--company`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-build/#-company "Permanent link")

Company name to display in about app dialogs.

### `--compile-app`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-build/#-compile-app "Permanent link")

Pre-compile app's `.py` files to `.pyc`.

### `--compile-packages`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-build/#-compile-packages "Permanent link")

Pre-compile site packages' `.py` files to `.pyc`.

### `--copyright`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-build/#-copyright "Permanent link")

Copyright text to display in about app dialogs.

### `--deep-linking-host`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-build/#-deep-linking-host "Permanent link")

Deep linking URL host for iOS and Android builds.

### `--deep-linking-scheme`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-build/#-deep-linking-scheme "Permanent link")

Deep linking URL scheme to configure for iOS and Android builds, i.g. `https` or `myapp`.

### `--description`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-build/#-description "Permanent link")

Short description of the application.

### `--exclude`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-build/#-exclude "Permanent link")

Files and/or directories to exclude from the package; can be used multiple times.

**Value:** `EXCLUDE+`

### `--flutter-build-args`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-build/#-flutter-build-args "Permanent link")

Additional arguments for flutter build command.

**Value:** `FLUTTER_BUILD_ARGS*`

### `--help`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-build/#-help "Permanent link")

Show this help message and exit.

**Aliases:** `-h`

### `--info-plist`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-build/#-info-plist "Permanent link")

The list of `<key>=<value>` pairs to add to Info.plist. Values can be booleans, strings, numbers, TOML arrays, or TOML inline tables (macos, ipa and ios-simulator only); can be used multiple times.

**Value:** `INFO_PLIST+`

### `--ios-export-method`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-build/#-ios-export-method "Permanent link")

Export method for iOS app bundle (default: debugging).

### `--ios-provisioning-profile`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-build/#-ios-provisioning-profile "Permanent link")

Provisioning profile name or UUID that should be used to sign and export iOS app bundle.

### `--ios-signing-certificate`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-build/#-ios-signing-certificate "Permanent link")

Signing certificate name, SHA-1 hash, or automatic selector to use for signing iOS app bundle.

### `--ios-team-id`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-build/#-ios-team-id "Permanent link")

Apple developer team ID for signing iOS app bundle (ipa only).

### `--macos-entitlements`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-build/#-macos-entitlements "Permanent link")

The list of `<key>=<value>` entitlements. Values can be booleans, strings, numbers, TOML arrays, or TOML inline tables (macos only); can be used multiple times.

**Value:** `MACOS_ENTITLEMENTS+`

### `--module-name`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-build/#-module-name "Permanent link")

Python module name with an app entry point.

### `--no-android-splash`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-build/#-no-android-splash "Permanent link")

Disable splash screen on Android platform.

### `--no-cdn`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-build/#-no-cdn "Permanent link")

Disable loading of CanvasKit, Pyodide and fonts from CDN.

**Environment variable:** [`FLET_WEB_NO_CDN`](https://docs.flet.dev/reference/environment-variables/#flet_web_no_cdn)

### `--no-ios-splash`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-build/#-no-ios-splash "Permanent link")

Disable splash screen on iOS platform.

### `--no-rich-output`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-build/#-no-rich-output "Permanent link")

Disable rich output and prefer plain text. Useful on Windows builds.

**Environment variable:** [`FLET_CLI_NO_RICH_OUTPUT`](https://docs.flet.dev/reference/environment-variables/#flet_cli_no_rich_output)

### `--no-wasm`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-build/#-no-wasm "Permanent link")

Disable WASM target for web build (web only).

### `--no-web-splash`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-build/#-no-web-splash "Permanent link")

Disable splash screen on web platform.

### `--org`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-build/#-org "Permanent link")

Organization name in reverse domain name notation, e.g. `com.mycompany`, combined with project name and used in bundle IDs and signing.

### `--output`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-build/#-output "Permanent link")

Output directory for the final executable/bundle (default: /build/).

**Aliases:** `-o`

### `--permissions`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-build/#-permissions "Permanent link")

The list of pre-defined cross-platform permissions for iOS, Android and macOS builds.

**Possible values:** `camera`, `location`, `microphone`, `photo_library`

### `--product`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-build/#-product "Permanent link")

Display name shown in app launchers, window titles, and about dialogs.

### `--project`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-build/#-project "Permanent link")

Project name for bundle IDs and identifiers; used as the default for artifact and product names.

### `--pwa-background-color`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-build/#-pwa-background-color "Permanent link")

Initial background color for your web app (web only).

### `--pwa-theme-color`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-build/#-pwa-theme-color "Permanent link")

Default color for your web app's user interface (web only).

### `--route-url-strategy`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-build/#-route-url-strategy "Permanent link")

Base URL path to serve the app from. Useful if the app is hosted in a subdirectory (web only).

**Possible values:** `hash`, `path`

**Environment variable:** [`FLET_WEB_ROUTE_URL_STRATEGY`](https://docs.flet.dev/reference/environment-variables/#flet_web_route_url_strategy)

### `--show-platform-matrix`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-build/#-show-platform-matrix "Permanent link")

Display the build platform matrix in a table, then exit.

### `--skip-flutter-doctor`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-build/#-skip-flutter-doctor "Permanent link")

Skip running Flutter doctor upon failed builds.

**Environment variable:** [`FLET_CLI_SKIP_FLUTTER_DOCTOR`](https://docs.flet.dev/reference/environment-variables/#flet_cli_skip_flutter_doctor)

### `--source-packages`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-build/#-source-packages "Permanent link")

The list of Python packages to install from source distributions.

**Value:** `SOURCE_PACKAGES+`

### `--splash-color`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-build/#-splash-color "Permanent link")

Background color of app splash screen on iOS, Android and web.

### `--splash-dark-color`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-build/#-splash-dark-color "Permanent link")

Background color in dark mode of app splash screen on iOS, Android and web.

### `--split-per-abi`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-build/#-split-per-abi "Permanent link")

Split the APKs per ABIs (Android only).

### `--template`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-build/#-template "Permanent link")

Directory containing Flutter bootstrap template, or a URL to a git repository template.

### `--template-dir`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-build/#-template-dir "Permanent link")

Relative path to a Flutter bootstrap template in a repository.

### `--template-ref`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-build/#-template-ref "Permanent link")

The branch, tag or commit ID to checkout after cloning the repository with Flutter bootstrap template.

### `--verbose`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-build/#-verbose "Permanent link")

Enable verbose output. Use -v for standard verbose logging and -vv for more detailed output.

**Aliases:** `-v`

### `--web-renderer`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-build/#-web-renderer "Permanent link")

Flutter web renderer to use (web only).

**Possible values:** `auto`, `canvaskit`, `skwasm`

**Environment variable:** [`FLET_WEB_RENDERER`](https://docs.flet.dev/reference/environment-variables/#flet_web_renderer)

### `--yes`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-build/#-yes "Permanent link")

Answer yes to all prompts (install dependencies without confirmation).

Back to top

---

# flet debug - Flet

 

[Skip to content](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-debug/#usage)

flet debug
==========

Run a Flet Python app in debug mode on a specified platform (desktop, web, mobile).

Usage[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-debug/#usage "Permanent link")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-debug/#__codelineno-0-1) flet debug [-h] [-v] [--device-id DEVICE_ID] [--show-devices]                     [](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-debug/#__codelineno-0-2)                     [--release] [--route ROUTE]                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-debug/#__codelineno-0-3)                     [--arch TARGET_ARCH [TARGET_ARCH ...]]                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-debug/#__codelineno-0-4)                     [--exclude EXCLUDE [EXCLUDE ...]] [--clear-cache]                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-debug/#__codelineno-0-5)                     [--project PROJECT_NAME] [--artifact ARTIFACT_NAME]                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-debug/#__codelineno-0-6)                     [--description DESCRIPTION] [--product PRODUCT_NAME]                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-debug/#__codelineno-0-7)                     [--org ORG_NAME] [--bundle-id BUNDLE_ID]                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-debug/#__codelineno-0-8)                     [--company COMPANY_NAME] [--copyright COPYRIGHT]                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-debug/#__codelineno-0-9)                     [--android-adaptive-icon-background ANDROID_ADAPTIVE_ICON_BACKGROUND]                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-debug/#__codelineno-0-10)                     [--splash-color SPLASH_COLOR]                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-debug/#__codelineno-0-11)                     [--splash-dark-color SPLASH_DARK_COLOR] [--no-web-splash]                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-debug/#__codelineno-0-12)                     [--no-ios-splash] [--no-android-splash]                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-debug/#__codelineno-0-13)                     [--ios-team-id IOS_TEAM_ID]                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-debug/#__codelineno-0-14)                     [--ios-export-method IOS_EXPORT_METHOD]                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-debug/#__codelineno-0-15)                     [--ios-provisioning-profile IOS_PROVISIONING_PROFILE]                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-debug/#__codelineno-0-16)                     [--ios-signing-certificate IOS_SIGNING_CERTIFICATE]                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-debug/#__codelineno-0-17)                     [--base-url BASE_URL]                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-debug/#__codelineno-0-18) [--cleanup-app-files CLEANUP_APP_FILES [CLEANUP_APP_FILES ...]]                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-debug/#__codelineno-0-25)                     [--cleanup-packages] [](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-debug/#__codelineno-0-27)                     [--flutter-build-args [FLUTTER_BUILD_ARGS ...]]                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-debug/#__codelineno-0-28)                     [--source-packages SOURCE_PACKAGES [SOURCE_PACKAGES ...]]                   [--android-signing-key-store ANDROID_SIGNING_KEY_STORE]                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-debug/#__codelineno-0-38) ANDROID_SIGNING_KEY_ALIAS]                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-debug/#__codelineno-0-41)                     [--build-number BUILD_NUMBER]                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-debug/#__codelineno-0-42)                     [--build-version BUILD_VERSION]                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-debug/#__codelineno-0-43)                     [--module-name MODULE_NAME] [--template TEMPLATE]                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-debug/#__codelineno-0-44)                     [--template-dir TEMPLATE_DIR]
