[](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-debug/#__codelineno-0-46)                     [--no-rich-output] [--yes] [--skip-flutter-doctor]                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-debug/#__codelineno-0-47)                     [{macos,linux,windows,web,ios,android}] [python_app_path]`

Positional arguments[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-debug/#positional-arguments "Permanent link")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### `platform`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-debug/#platform "Permanent link")

The target platform to run the app on.

**Possible values:** `android`, `ios`, `linux`, `macos`, `web`, `windows`

**Required:** false

### `python_app_path`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-debug/#python_app_path "Permanent link")

Path to a directory with a Flet Python program.

**Default:** `.`

Options[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-debug/#options "Permanent link")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------

### `--android-adaptive-icon-background`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-debug/#-android-adaptive-icon-background "Permanent link")

The color to be used to fill out the background of Android adaptive icons.

### `--android-features`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-debug/#-android-features "Permanent link")

The list of `<feature_name>=true|false` features to add to AndroidManifest.xml (android only); can be used multiple times.

**Value:** `ANDROID_FEATURES+`

### `--android-meta-data`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-debug/#-android-meta-data "Permanent link")

The list of `<name>=<value>` app meta-data entries to add to AndroidManifest.xml (android only); can be used multiple times.

**Value:** `ANDROID_META_DATA+`

### `--android-permissions`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-debug/#-android-permissions "Permanent link")

The list of `<permission_name>=true|false` permissions to add to AndroidManifest.xml (android only); can be used multiple times.

**Value:** `ANDROID_PERMISSIONS+`

### `--android-signing-key-alias`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-debug/#-android-signing-key-alias "Permanent link")

Android signing key alias.

**Environment variable:** [`FLET_ANDROID_SIGNING_KEY_ALIAS`](https://docs.flet.dev/reference/environment-variables/#flet_android_signing_key_alias)

### `--android-signing-key-password`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-debug/#-android-signing-key-password "Permanent link")

Android signing key password.

**Environment variable:** [`FLET_ANDROID_SIGNING_KEY_PASSWORD`](https://docs.flet.dev/reference/environment-variables/#flet_android_signing_key_password)

### `--android-signing-key-store`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-debug/#-android-signing-key-store "Permanent link")

Path to an upload keystore `.jks` file for Android apps.

**Environment variable:** [`FLET_ANDROID_SIGNING_KEY_STORE`](https://docs.flet.dev/reference/environment-variables/#flet_android_signing_key_store)

### `--android-signing-key-store-password`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-debug/#-android-signing-key-store-password "Permanent link")

Android signing store password.

**Environment variable:** [`FLET_ANDROID_SIGNING_KEY_STORE_PASSWORD`](https://docs.flet.dev/reference/environment-variables/#flet_android_signing_key_store_password)

### `--arch`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-debug/#-arch "Permanent link")

Build for specific CPU architectures (used in macOS and Android builds only). Example: `--arch arm64 x64`.

**Value:** `TARGET_ARCH+`

### `--artifact`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-debug/#-artifact "Permanent link")

Executable or bundle name on disk.

### `--base-url`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-debug/#-base-url "Permanent link")

Base URL from which the app is served (web only).

### `--build-number`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-debug/#-build-number "Permanent link")

Build number - an identifier used as an internal version number.

**Value:** `BUILD_NUMBER <int>`

### `--build-version`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-debug/#-build-version "Permanent link")

Build version - a `x.y.z` string used as the version number shown to users.

### `--bundle-id`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-debug/#-bundle-id "Permanent link")

Bundle ID for the application, e.g. `com.mycompany.app-name`. It is used as an iOS, Android, macOS and Linux bundle ID.

### `--cleanup-app`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-debug/#-cleanup-app "Permanent link")

Remove unnecessary app files upon packaging.

### `--cleanup-app-files`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-debug/#-cleanup-app-files "Permanent link")

The list of globs to delete extra app files and directories.

**Value:** `CLEANUP_APP_FILES+`

### `--cleanup-package-files`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-debug/#-cleanup-package-files "Permanent link")

The list of globs to delete extra package files and directories.

**Value:** `CLEANUP_PACKAGE_FILES+`

### `--cleanup-packages`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-debug/#-cleanup-packages "Permanent link")

Remove unnecessary package files upon packaging.

### `--clear-cache`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-debug/#-clear-cache "Permanent link")

Remove any existing build cache before starting the build process.

### `--company`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-debug/#-company "Permanent link")

Company name to display in about app dialogs.

### `--compile-app`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-debug/#-compile-app "Permanent link")

Pre-compile app's `.py` files to `.pyc`.

### `--compile-packages`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-debug/#-compile-packages "Permanent link")

Pre-compile site packages' `.py` files to `.pyc`.

### `--copyright`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-debug/#-copyright "Permanent link")

Copyright text to display in about app dialogs.

### `--deep-linking-host`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-debug/#-deep-linking-host "Permanent link")

Deep linking URL host for iOS and Android builds.

### `--deep-linking-scheme`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-debug/#-deep-linking-scheme "Permanent link")

Deep linking URL scheme to configure for iOS and Android builds, i.g. `https` or `myapp`.

### `--description`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-debug/#-description "Permanent link")

Short description of the application.

### `--device-id`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-debug/#-device-id "Permanent link")

Device ID to run the app on for iOS and Android builds.

**Aliases:** `-d`

### `--exclude`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-debug/#-exclude "Permanent link")

Files and/or directories to exclude from the package; can be used multiple times.

**Value:** `EXCLUDE+`

### `--flutter-build-args`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-debug/#-flutter-build-args "Permanent link")

Additional arguments for flutter build command.

**Value:** `FLUTTER_BUILD_ARGS*`

### `--help`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-debug/#-help "Permanent link")

Show this help message and exit.

**Aliases:** `-h`

### `--info-plist`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-debug/#-info-plist "Permanent link")

The list of `<key>=<value>` pairs to add to Info.plist. Values can be booleans, strings, numbers, TOML arrays, or TOML inline tables (macos, ipa and ios-simulator only); can be used multiple times.

**Value:** `INFO_PLIST+`

### `--ios-export-method`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-debug/#-ios-export-method "Permanent link")

Export method for iOS app bundle (default: debugging).

### `--ios-provisioning-profile`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-debug/#-ios-provisioning-profile "Permanent link")

Provisioning profile name or UUID that should be used to sign and export iOS app bundle.

### `--ios-signing-certificate`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-debug/#-ios-signing-certificate "Permanent link")

Signing certificate name, SHA-1 hash, or automatic selector to use for signing iOS app bundle.

### `--ios-team-id`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-debug/#-ios-team-id "Permanent link")

Apple developer team ID for signing iOS app bundle (ipa only).

### `--macos-entitlements`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-debug/#-macos-entitlements "Permanent link")

The list of `<key>=<value>` entitlements. Values can be booleans, strings, numbers, TOML arrays, or TOML inline tables (macos only); can be used multiple times.

**Value:** `MACOS_ENTITLEMENTS+`

### `--module-name`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-debug/#-module-name "Permanent link")

Python module name with an app entry point.

### `--no-android-splash`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-debug/#-no-android-splash "Permanent link")

Disable splash screen on Android platform.

### `--no-cdn`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-debug/#-no-cdn "Permanent link")

Disable loading of CanvasKit, Pyodide and fonts from CDN.

**Environment variable:** [`FLET_WEB_NO_CDN`](https://docs.flet.dev/reference/environment-variables/#flet_web_no_cdn)

### `--no-ios-splash`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-debug/#-no-ios-splash "Permanent link")

Disable splash screen on iOS platform.

### `--no-rich-output`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-debug/#-no-rich-output "Permanent link")

Disable rich output and prefer plain text. Useful on Windows builds.

**Environment variable:** [`FLET_CLI_NO_RICH_OUTPUT`](https://docs.flet.dev/reference/environment-variables/#flet_cli_no_rich_output)

### `--no-wasm`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-debug/#-no-wasm "Permanent link")

Disable WASM target for web build (web only).

### `--no-web-splash`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-debug/#-no-web-splash "Permanent link")

Disable splash screen on web platform.

### `--org`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-debug/#-org "Permanent link")

Organization name in reverse domain name notation, e.g. `com.mycompany`, combined with project name and used in bundle IDs and signing.

### `--permissions`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-debug/#-permissions "Permanent link")

The list of pre-defined cross-platform permissions for iOS, Android and macOS builds.

**Possible values:** `camera`, `location`, `microphone`, `photo_library`

### `--product`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-debug/#-product "Permanent link")

Display name shown in app launchers, window titles, and about dialogs.

### `--project`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-debug/#-project "Permanent link")

Project name for bundle IDs and identifiers; used as the default for artifact and product names.

### `--pwa-background-color`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-debug/#-pwa-background-color "Permanent link")

Initial background color for your web app (web only).

### `--pwa-theme-color`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-debug/#-pwa-theme-color "Permanent link")

Default color for your web app's user interface (web only).

### `--release`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-debug/#-release "Permanent link")

Build the app in release mode.

### `--route`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-debug/#-route "Permanent link")

Route to open the app on for web, iOS and Android builds.

### `--route-url-strategy`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-debug/#-route-url-strategy "Permanent link")

Base URL path to serve the app from. Useful if the app is hosted in a subdirectory (web only).

**Possible values:** `hash`, `path`

**Environment variable:** [`FLET_WEB_ROUTE_URL_STRATEGY`](https://docs.flet.dev/reference/environment-variables/#flet_web_route_url_strategy)

### `--show-devices`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-debug/#-show-devices "Permanent link")

Show connected devices for iOS and Android builds.

### `--show-platform-matrix`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-debug/#-show-platform-matrix "Permanent link")

Display the build platform matrix in a table, then exit.

### `--skip-flutter-doctor`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-debug/#-skip-flutter-doctor "Permanent link")

Skip running Flutter doctor upon failed builds.

**Environment variable:** [`FLET_CLI_SKIP_FLUTTER_DOCTOR`](https://docs.flet.dev/reference/environment-variables/#flet_cli_skip_flutter_doctor)

### `--source-packages`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-debug/#-source-packages "Permanent link")

The list of Python packages to install from source distributions.

**Value:** `SOURCE_PACKAGES+`

### `--splash-color`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-debug/#-splash-color "Permanent link")

Background color of app splash screen on iOS, Android and web.

### `--splash-dark-color`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-debug/#-splash-dark-color "Permanent link")

Background color in dark mode of app splash screen on iOS, Android and web.

### `--split-per-abi`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-debug/#-split-per-abi "Permanent link")

Split the APKs per ABIs (Android only).

### `--template`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-debug/#-template "Permanent link")

Directory containing Flutter bootstrap template, or a URL to a git repository template.

### `--template-dir`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-debug/#-template-dir "Permanent link")

Relative path to a Flutter bootstrap template in a repository.

### `--template-ref`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-debug/#-template-ref "Permanent link")

The branch, tag or commit ID to checkout after cloning the repository with Flutter bootstrap template.

### `--verbose`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-debug/#-verbose "Permanent link")

Enable verbose output. Use -v for standard verbose logging and -vv for more detailed output.

**Aliases:** `-v`

### `--web-renderer`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-debug/#-web-renderer "Permanent link")

Flutter web renderer to use (web only).

**Possible values:** `auto`, `canvaskit`, `skwasm`

**Environment variable:** [`FLET_WEB_RENDERER`](https://docs.flet.dev/reference/environment-variables/#flet_web_renderer)

### `--yes`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/cli/flet-debug/#-yes "Permanent link")

Answer yes to all prompts (install dependencies without confirmation).

Back to top

# AutofillGroup - Flet

 

[Skip to content](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autofillgroup/#flet.AutofillGroup)

AutofillGroup
=============

Used to group autofill controls together.

Inherits: `[Control](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/control/#flet.Control) `

Properties

*   **`[content](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autofillgroup/#flet.AutofillGroup.content) `**(`[Control](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/control/#flet.Control) `) –
    
    The content of this group.
    
*   **`[dispose_action](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autofillgroup/#flet.AutofillGroup.dispose_action) `**(`[AutofillGroupDisposeAction](https://docs.flet.dev/types/autofillgroupdisposeaction/#flet.AutofillGroupDisposeAction) `) –
    
    The action to be run when this group is the topmost and it's being disposed, in order to clean up the current autofill context.
    

Examples[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autofillgroup/#examples "Permanent link")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

[Live example](https://flet-controls-gallery.fly.dev/input/autofillgroup)

### Basic example[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autofillgroup/#basic-example "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autofillgroup/#__codelineno-0-1) import flet as ft [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autofillgroup/#__codelineno-0-2) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autofillgroup/#__codelineno-0-3)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autofillgroup/#__codelineno-0-4) def main(page: ft.Page):     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autofillgroup/#__codelineno-0-5)     page.add(        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autofillgroup/#__codelineno-0-6)         ft.AutofillGroup(            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autofillgroup/#__codelineno-0-7)             content=ft.Column(                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autofillgroup/#__codelineno-0-8)                 controls=[                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autofillgroup/#__codelineno-0-9)                     ft.TextField(                        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autofillgroup/#__codelineno-0-10)                         label="Name",                        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autofillgroup/#__codelineno-0-11)                         autofill_hints=ft.AutofillHint.NAME,                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autofillgroup/#__codelineno-0-12)                     ),                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autofillgroup/#__codelineno-0-13)                     ft.TextField(                        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autofillgroup/#__codelineno-0-14)                         label="Email",                        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autofillgroup/#__codelineno-0-15)                         autofill_hints=[ft.AutofillHint.EMAIL],                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autofillgroup/#__codelineno-0-16)                     ),                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autofillgroup/#__codelineno-0-17)                     ft.TextField(                        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autofillgroup/#__codelineno-0-18)                         label="Phone Number",                        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autofillgroup/#__codelineno-0-19)                         autofill_hints=[ft.AutofillHint.TELEPHONE_NUMBER],                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autofillgroup/#__codelineno-0-20)                     ),                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autofillgroup/#__codelineno-0-21)                     ft.TextField(                        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autofillgroup/#__codelineno-0-22)                         label="Street Address",                        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autofillgroup/#__codelineno-0-23)                         autofill_hints=ft.AutofillHint.FULL_STREET_ADDRESS,                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autofillgroup/#__codelineno-0-24)                     ),                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autofillgroup/#__codelineno-0-25)                     ft.TextField(                        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autofillgroup/#__codelineno-0-26)                         label="Postal Code",                        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autofillgroup/#__codelineno-0-27)                         autofill_hints=ft.AutofillHint.POSTAL_CODE,                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autofillgroup/#__codelineno-0-28)                     ),                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autofillgroup/#__codelineno-0-29)                 ]            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autofillgroup/#__codelineno-0-30)             )        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autofillgroup/#__codelineno-0-31)         )    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autofillgroup/#__codelineno-0-32)     ) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autofillgroup/#__codelineno-0-33) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autofillgroup/#__codelineno-0-34)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autofillgroup/#__codelineno-0-35) ft.run(main)`

[![basic](https://docs.flet.dev/examples/controls/autofill_group/media/basic.gif)](https://docs.flet.dev/examples/controls/autofill_group/media/basic.gif)

Properties[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autofillgroup/#flet.AutofillGroup-properties "Permanent link")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### content `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autofillgroup/#flet.AutofillGroup.content "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autofillgroup/#__codelineno-0-1) content: [Control](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/control/#flet.Control)`

The content of this group.

Raises:

*   `[ValueError](https://docs.python.org/3/library/exceptions.html#ValueError) ` –
    
    If it is not visible.
    

### dispose\_action `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autofillgroup/#flet.AutofillGroup.dispose_action "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autofillgroup/#__codelineno-0-1) dispose_action: [AutofillGroupDisposeAction](https://docs.flet.dev/types/autofillgroupdisposeaction/#flet.AutofillGroupDisposeAction)  = [COMMIT](https://docs.flet.dev/types/autofillgroupdisposeaction/#flet.AutofillGroupDisposeAction.COMMIT)`

The action to be run when this group is the topmost and it's being disposed, in order to clean up the current autofill context.

# CupertinoTintedButton - Flet

 

[Skip to content](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinotintedbutton/#flet.CupertinoTintedButton)

CupertinoTintedButton
=====================

An iOS-style button filled with default background color.

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinotintedbutton/#__codelineno-0-1) ft.CupertinoTintedButton("Tap me")`

Basic CupertinoTintedButton

# AutoComplete - Flet

 

[Skip to content](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autocomplete/#flet.AutoComplete)

AutoComplete
============

Helps the user make a selection by entering some text and choosing from among a list of displayed options.

Inherits: `[LayoutControl](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/layoutcontrol/#flet.LayoutControl) `

Properties

*   **`[selected_index](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autocomplete/#flet.AutoComplete.selected_index) `**(`[int](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#int)  | None`) –
    
    The index of the (last) selected suggestion.
    
*   **`[suggestions](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autocomplete/#flet.AutoComplete.suggestions) `**(`[list](https://docs.python.org/3/glossary.html#term-list) [[AutoCompleteSuggestion](https://docs.flet.dev/types/autocompletesuggestion/#flet.AutoCompleteSuggestion) ]`) –
    
    A list of [`AutoCompleteSuggestion`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/autocompletesuggestion/#flet.AutoCompleteSuggestion)
    
*   **`[suggestions_max_height](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autocomplete/#flet.AutoComplete.suggestions_max_height) `**(`[Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number) `) –
    
    The maximum - visual - height of the suggestions list.
    
*   **`[value](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autocomplete/#flet.AutoComplete.value) `**(`[str](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str) `) –
    
    Current text displayed in the input field.
    

Events

*   **`[on_change](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autocomplete/#flet.AutoComplete.on_change) `**(`[ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[AutoComplete](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autocomplete/#flet.AutoComplete) ] | None`) –
    
    Called when the input text changes.
    
*   **`[on_select](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autocomplete/#flet.AutoComplete.on_select) `**(`[EventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.EventHandler) [[AutoCompleteSelectEvent](https://docs.flet.dev/types/autocompleteselectevent/#flet.AutoCompleteSelectEvent) ] | None`) –
    
    Called when a suggestion is selected.
    

Examples[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autocomplete/#examples "Permanent link")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

[Live example](https://flet-controls-gallery.fly.dev/input/autocomplete)

### Basic example[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autocomplete/#basic-example "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autocomplete/#__codelineno-0-1) import flet as ft [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autocomplete/#__codelineno-0-2)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autocomplete/#__codelineno-0-3) numbers = [     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autocomplete/#__codelineno-0-4)     ("one 1", "One"),    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autocomplete/#__codelineno-0-5)     ("two 2", "Two"),    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autocomplete/#__codelineno-0-6)     ("three 3", "Three"),    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autocomplete/#__codelineno-0-7)     ("four 4", "Four"),    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autocomplete/#__codelineno-0-8)     ("five 5", "Five"),    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autocomplete/#__codelineno-0-9)     ("six 6", "Six"),    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autocomplete/#__codelineno-0-10)     ("seven 7", "Seven"),    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autocomplete/#__codelineno-0-11)     ("eight 8", "Eight"),    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autocomplete/#__codelineno-0-12)     ("nine 9", "Nine"),    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autocomplete/#__codelineno-0-13)     ("ten 10", "Ten"), [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autocomplete/#__codelineno-0-14) ] [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autocomplete/#__codelineno-0-15) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autocomplete/#__codelineno-0-16)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autocomplete/#__codelineno-0-17) def main(page: ft.Page):     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autocomplete/#__codelineno-0-18)     page.theme_mode = ft.ThemeMode.LIGHT    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autocomplete/#__codelineno-0-19)     page.horizontal_alignment = ft.CrossAxisAlignment.CENTER    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autocomplete/#__codelineno-0-20)     page.vertical_alignment = ft.MainAxisAlignment.CENTER [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autocomplete/#__codelineno-0-21)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autocomplete/#__codelineno-0-22)     def handle_change(e: ft.Event[ft.AutoComplete]):        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autocomplete/#__codelineno-0-23)         info.value = f"Current input 👀: {e.data!r} \n" [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autocomplete/#__codelineno-0-24)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autocomplete/#__codelineno-0-25)     def handle_select(e: ft.AutoCompleteSelectEvent):        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autocomplete/#__codelineno-0-26)         info.value = (            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autocomplete/#__codelineno-0-27)             f"Current input 👀: {e.control.value!r} \n"            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autocomplete/#__codelineno-0-28)             f"Your selection: {e.selection.value}"        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autocomplete/#__codelineno-0-29)         ) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autocomplete/#__codelineno-0-30)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autocomplete/#__codelineno-0-31)     page.add(        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autocomplete/#__codelineno-0-32)         ft.AutoComplete(            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autocomplete/#__codelineno-0-33)             value="One",            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autocomplete/#__codelineno-0-34)             width=200,            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autocomplete/#__codelineno-0-35)             on_change=handle_change,            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autocomplete/#__codelineno-0-36)             on_select=handle_select,            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autocomplete/#__codelineno-0-37)             suggestions=[                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autocomplete/#__codelineno-0-38)                 ft.AutoCompleteSuggestion(key=key, value=value)                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autocomplete/#__codelineno-0-39)                 for key, value in numbers            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autocomplete/#__codelineno-0-40)             ],        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autocomplete/#__codelineno-0-41)         ),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autocomplete/#__codelineno-0-42)         info := ft.Text("Enter a number (in words or digits) to get suggestions."),    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autocomplete/#__codelineno-0-43)     ) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autocomplete/#__codelineno-0-44) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autocomplete/#__codelineno-0-45)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autocomplete/#__codelineno-0-46) ft.run(main)`

Properties[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autocomplete/#flet.AutoComplete-properties "Permanent link")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### selected\_index `property` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autocomplete/#flet.AutoComplete.selected_index "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autocomplete/#__codelineno-0-1) selected_index: [int](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#int)  | None`

The index of the (last) selected suggestion.

It is `None` until a suggestion has been selected from the UI.

Note

This property is read-only.

### suggestions `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autocomplete/#flet.AutoComplete.suggestions "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autocomplete/#__codelineno-0-1) suggestions: [list](https://docs.python.org/3/glossary.html#term-list) [[AutoCompleteSuggestion](https://docs.flet.dev/types/autocompletesuggestion/#flet.AutoCompleteSuggestion) ] = [field](https://docs.python.org/3/library/dataclasses.html#dataclasses.field "<code>dataclasses.field</code>") (     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autocomplete/#__codelineno-0-2)     default_factory=[list](https://docs.python.org/3/glossary.html#term-list) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autocomplete/#__codelineno-0-3) )`

A list of [`AutoCompleteSuggestion`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/autocompletesuggestion/#flet.AutoCompleteSuggestion)
 controls representing the suggestions to be displayed.

Note

*   A valid [`AutoCompleteSuggestion`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/autocompletesuggestion/#flet.AutoCompleteSuggestion)
     must have at least a [`key`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/autocompletesuggestion/#flet.AutoCompleteSuggestion.key)
     or [`value`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/autocompletesuggestion/#flet.AutoCompleteSuggestion.value)
     specified, else it will be ignored. If only `key` is provided, `value` will be set to `key` as fallback and vice versa.
*   The internal filtration process of the suggestions (based on their `key`s) with respect to the user's input is case-insensitive because the comparison is done in lowercase.

### suggestions\_max\_height `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autocomplete/#flet.AutoComplete.suggestions_max_height "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autocomplete/#__codelineno-0-1) suggestions_max_height: [Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  = 200`

The maximum - visual - height of the suggestions list.

### value `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autocomplete/#flet.AutoComplete.value "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autocomplete/#__codelineno-0-1) value: [str](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str)  = ''`

Current text displayed in the input field.

This value reflects user input even if it does not match any provided suggestion.

Events[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autocomplete/#flet.AutoComplete-events "Permanent link")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### on\_change `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autocomplete/#flet.AutoComplete.on_change "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autocomplete/#__codelineno-0-1) on_change: [ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[AutoComplete](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autocomplete/#flet.AutoComplete) ] | None = None`

Called when the input text changes.

### on\_select `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autocomplete/#flet.AutoComplete.on_select "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autocomplete/#__codelineno-0-1) on_select: [EventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.EventHandler) [[AutoCompleteSelectEvent](https://docs.flet.dev/types/autocompleteselectevent/#flet.AutoCompleteSelectEvent) ] | None = (     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autocomplete/#__codelineno-0-2)     None [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/autocomplete/#__codelineno-0-3) )`

Called when a suggestion is selected.

# CupertinoDialogAction - Flet

 

[Skip to content](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodialogaction/#examples)

CupertinoDialogAction
=====================

Examples[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodialogaction/#examples "Permanent link")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

See [these](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoalertdialog/#examples)
.

Inherits: `[Control](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/control/#flet.Control) `

A dialog action button.

Typically used as a child of [`CupertinoAlertDialog.actions`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoalertdialog/#flet.CupertinoAlertDialog.actions)
.

Properties

*   **`[content](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodialogaction/#flet.CupertinoDialogAction.content) `**(`[StrOrControl](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.StrOrControl) `) –
    
    The content of this action button.
    
*   **`[default](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodialogaction/#flet.CupertinoDialogAction.default) `**(`[bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool) `) –
    
    Whether this action is a default action.
    
*   **`[destructive](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodialogaction/#flet.CupertinoDialogAction.destructive) `**(`[bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool) `) –
    
    If set to `True`, this button's text color will be red.
    
*   **`[text_style](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodialogaction/#flet.CupertinoDialogAction.text_style) `**(`[TextStyle](https://docs.flet.dev/types/textstyle/#flet.TextStyle)  | None`) –
    
    The text style to use for text in this button.
    

Events

*   **`[on_click](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodialogaction/#flet.CupertinoDialogAction.on_click) `**(`[ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[CupertinoDialogAction](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodialogaction/#flet.CupertinoDialogAction) ] | None`) –
    
    Called when a user clicks this button.
    

Properties[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodialogaction/#flet.CupertinoDialogAction-properties "Permanent link")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### content `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodialogaction/#flet.CupertinoDialogAction.content "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodialogaction/#__codelineno-0-1) content: [StrOrControl](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.StrOrControl)`

The content of this action button.

Raises:

*   `[ValueError](https://docs.python.org/3/library/exceptions.html#ValueError) ` –
    
    If it is neither a string nor a visible `Control`.
    

### default `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodialogaction/#flet.CupertinoDialogAction.default "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodialogaction/#__codelineno-0-1) default: [bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool)  = False`

Whether this action is a default action. In this case, the button will have bold text.

Info

Multiple actions can have this property set to `True` in a [`CupertinoAlertDialog`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoalertdialog/#flet.CupertinoAlertDialog)
.

### destructive `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodialogaction/#flet.CupertinoDialogAction.destructive "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodialogaction/#__codelineno-0-1) destructive: [bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool)  = False`

If set to `True`, this button's text color will be red.

Typically used for actions that destroy objects, such as an delete that deletes an email etc.

### text\_style `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodialogaction/#flet.CupertinoDialogAction.text_style "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodialogaction/#__codelineno-0-1) text_style: [TextStyle](https://docs.flet.dev/types/textstyle/#flet.TextStyle)  | None = None`

The text style to use for text in this button.

Can be useful when [`content`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodialogaction/#flet.CupertinoDialogAction.content)
 is a string.

Events[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodialogaction/#flet.CupertinoDialogAction-events "Permanent link")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### on\_click `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodialogaction/#flet.CupertinoDialogAction.on_click "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodialogaction/#__codelineno-0-1) on_click: (     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodialogaction/#__codelineno-0-2)     [ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[CupertinoDialogAction](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodialogaction/#flet.CupertinoDialogAction) ] | None [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodialogaction/#__codelineno-0-3) ) = None`

Called when a user clicks this button.

Back to top

# CupertinoFilledButton - Flet

 

[Skip to content](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinofilledbutton/#flet.CupertinoFilledButton)

CupertinoFilledButton
=====================

An iOS-style button filled with default background color.

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinofilledbutton/#__codelineno-0-1) ft.CupertinoFilledButton("Tap me")`

[![CupertinoFilledButton](https://docs.flet.dev/test-images/examples/cupertino/golden/macos/cupertino_filled_button/image_for_docs.png)](https://docs.flet.dev/test-images/examples/cupertino/golden/macos/cupertino_filled_button/image_for_docs.png)

Basic CupertinoFilledButton

Inherits: `[CupertinoButton](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#flet.CupertinoButton) `

Examples[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinofilledbutton/#examples "Permanent link")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

[Live example](https://flet-controls-gallery.fly.dev/buttons/cupertinofilledbutton)

### Basic Example[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinofilledbutton/#basic-example "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinofilledbutton/#__codelineno-0-1) import flet as ft [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinofilledbutton/#__codelineno-0-2) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinofilledbutton/#__codelineno-0-3)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinofilledbutton/#__codelineno-0-4) def main(page: ft.Page):     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinofilledbutton/#__codelineno-0-5)     page.add(        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinofilledbutton/#__codelineno-0-6)         ft.CupertinoFilledButton(            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinofilledbutton/#__codelineno-0-7)             content=ft.Text("CupertinoFilledButton"),            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinofilledbutton/#__codelineno-0-8)             opacity_on_click=0.3,            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinofilledbutton/#__codelineno-0-9)             on_click=lambda e: print("CupertinoFilledButton clicked!"),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinofilledbutton/#__codelineno-0-10)         ),    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinofilledbutton/#__codelineno-0-11)     ) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinofilledbutton/#__codelineno-0-12) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinofilledbutton/#__codelineno-0-13)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinofilledbutton/#__codelineno-0-14) ft.run(main)`

[![basic](https://docs.flet.dev/examples/controls/cupertino_filled_button/media/basic.png)](https://docs.flet.dev/examples/controls/cupertino_filled_button/media/basic.png)

# FilledTonalIconButton - Flet

 

[Skip to content](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/filledtonaliconbutton/#flet.FilledTonalIconButton)

FilledTonalIconButton
=====================

A filled tonal variant of [`IconButton`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/iconbutton/#flet.IconButton)
.

Filled tonal icon buttons are a middle ground between filled and outlined icon buttons. They're useful in contexts where the button requires slightly more emphasis than an outline would give, such as a secondary action paired with a high emphasis action.

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/filledtonaliconbutton/#__codelineno-0-1) ft.FilledTonalIconButton(icon=ft.Icons.CHECK)`

[![FilledTonalIconButton](https://docs.flet.dev/test-images/examples/material/golden/macos/filled_tonal_icon_button/image_for_docs.png)](https://docs.flet.dev/test-images/examples/material/golden/macos/filled_tonal_icon_button/image_for_docs.png)

Basic FilledTonalIconButton

Inherits: `[IconButton](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/iconbutton/#flet.IconButton) `

Back to top

---

# CupertinoBottomSheet - Flet

 

[Skip to content](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobottomsheet/#flet.CupertinoBottomSheet)

CupertinoBottomSheet
====================

A Cupertino bottom sheet.

Inherits: `[DialogControl](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dialogcontrol/#flet.DialogControl) `

Properties

*   **`[bgcolor](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobottomsheet/#flet.CupertinoBottomSheet.bgcolor) `**(`[ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None`) –
    
    The background color of this bottom sheet.
    
*   **`[content](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobottomsheet/#flet.CupertinoBottomSheet.content) `**(`[Control](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/control/#flet.Control) `) –
    
    The control to be displayed in this bottom sheet.
    
*   **`[height](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobottomsheet/#flet.CupertinoBottomSheet.height) `**(`[Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  | None`) –
    
    The height of this bottom sheet.
    
*   **`[modal](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobottomsheet/#flet.CupertinoBottomSheet.modal) `**(`[bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool) `) –
    
    Whether this bottom sheet can be dismissed/closed by clicking the area outside of it.
    
*   **`[padding](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobottomsheet/#flet.CupertinoBottomSheet.padding) `**(`[PaddingValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.PaddingValue)  | None`) –
    
    The sheet's padding.
    

Examples[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobottomsheet/#examples "Permanent link")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

[Live example](https://flet-controls-gallery.fly.dev/dialogs/cupertinobottomsheet)

### Displaying a `CupertinoActionSheet`[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobottomsheet/#displaying-a-cupertinoactionsheet "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobottomsheet/#__codelineno-0-1) import flet as ft [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobottomsheet/#__codelineno-0-2) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobottomsheet/#__codelineno-0-3)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobottomsheet/#__codelineno-0-4) def main(page: ft.Page):     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobottomsheet/#__codelineno-0-5)     page.horizontal_alignment = ft.CrossAxisAlignment.CENTER [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobottomsheet/#__codelineno-0-6)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobottomsheet/#__codelineno-0-7)     def handle_click(e):        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobottomsheet/#__codelineno-0-8)         page.add(ft.Text(f"Action clicked: {e.control.content.value}"))        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobottomsheet/#__codelineno-0-9)         page.pop_dialog() [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobottomsheet/#__codelineno-0-10)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobottomsheet/#__codelineno-0-11)     action_sheet = ft.CupertinoActionSheet(        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobottomsheet/#__codelineno-0-12)         title=ft.Row(            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobottomsheet/#__codelineno-0-13)             controls=[ft.Text("Title"), ft.Icon(ft.Icons.BEDTIME)],            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobottomsheet/#__codelineno-0-14)             alignment=ft.MainAxisAlignment.CENTER,        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobottomsheet/#__codelineno-0-15)         ),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobottomsheet/#__codelineno-0-16)         message=ft.Row(            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobottomsheet/#__codelineno-0-17)             controls=[ft.Text("Description"), ft.Icon(ft.Icons.AUTO_AWESOME)],            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobottomsheet/#__codelineno-0-18)             alignment=ft.MainAxisAlignment.CENTER,        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobottomsheet/#__codelineno-0-19)         ),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobottomsheet/#__codelineno-0-20)         cancel=ft.CupertinoActionSheetAction(            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobottomsheet/#__codelineno-0-21)             content=ft.Text("Cancel"),            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobottomsheet/#__codelineno-0-22)             on_click=handle_click,        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobottomsheet/#__codelineno-0-23)         ),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobottomsheet/#__codelineno-0-24)         actions=[            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobottomsheet/#__codelineno-0-25) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobottomsheet/#__codelineno-0-27)                 default=True,                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobottomsheet/#__codelineno-0-28)                 on_click=handle_click,            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobottomsheet/#__codelineno-0-29)             ),            ),            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobottomsheet/#__codelineno-0-34)             ft.CupertinoActionSheetAction( ft.CupertinoBottomSheet(action_sheet) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobottomsheet/#__codelineno-0-43)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobottomsheet/#__codelineno-0-44) `[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobottomsheet/#__codelineno-0-1) bgcolor: [ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None = None`

### content `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobottomsheet/#flet.CupertinoBottomSheet.content "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobottomsheet/#__codelineno-0-1) content: [Control](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/control/#flet.Control)`

The control to be displayed in this bottom sheet.

### height `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobottomsheet/#flet.CupertinoBottomSheet.height "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobottomsheet/#__codelineno-0-1) height: [Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  | None = None`

The height of this bottom sheet.

### modal `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobottomsheet/#flet.CupertinoBottomSheet.modal "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobottomsheet/#__codelineno-0-1) modal: [bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool)  = False`

Whether this bottom sheet can be dismissed/closed by clicking the area outside of it.

### padding `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobottomsheet/#flet.CupertinoBottomSheet.padding "Permanent link")

# CupertinoActionSheetAction - Flet

 

[Skip to content](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoactionsheetaction/#flet.CupertinoActionSheetAction)

CupertinoActionSheetAction
==========================

Inherits: `[LayoutControl](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/layoutcontrol/#flet.LayoutControl) `

An action button typically used in a CupertinoActionSheet.

Properties

*   **`[content](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoactionsheetaction/#flet.CupertinoActionSheetAction.content) `**(`[StrOrControl](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.StrOrControl) `) –
    
    The child control to be shown in this action button.
    
*   **`[default](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoactionsheetaction/#flet.CupertinoActionSheetAction.default) `**(`[bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool) `) –
    
    Whether this action should receive the style of an emphasized, default action.
    
*   **`[destructive](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoactionsheetaction/#flet.CupertinoActionSheetAction.destructive) `**(`[bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool) `) –
    
    Whether this action should receive the style of a destructive action.
    
*   **`[mouse_cursor](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoactionsheetaction/#flet.CupertinoActionSheetAction.mouse_cursor) `**(`[MouseCursor](https://docs.flet.dev/types/mousecursor/#flet.MouseCursor)  | None`) –
    
    Defines the mouse cursor for this action button.
    

Events

*   **`[on_click](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoactionsheetaction/#flet.CupertinoActionSheetAction.on_click) `**(`[ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[CupertinoActionSheetAction](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoactionsheetaction/#flet.CupertinoActionSheetAction) ] | None`) –
    
    Called when this action button is clicked.
    

Properties[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoactionsheetaction/#flet.CupertinoActionSheetAction-properties "Permanent link")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### content `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoactionsheetaction/#flet.CupertinoActionSheetAction.content "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoactionsheetaction/#__codelineno-0-1) content: [StrOrControl](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.StrOrControl)`

The child control to be shown in this action button.

Raises:

*   `[ValueError](https://docs.python.org/3/library/exceptions.html#ValueError) ` –
    
    If it is neither a string nor a visible `Control`.
    

### default `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoactionsheetaction/#flet.CupertinoActionSheetAction.default "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoactionsheetaction/#__codelineno-0-1) default: [bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool)  = False`

Whether this action should receive the style of an emphasized, default action.

### destructive `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoactionsheetaction/#flet.CupertinoActionSheetAction.destructive "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoactionsheetaction/#__codelineno-0-1) destructive: [bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool)  = False`

Whether this action should receive the style of a destructive action.

### mouse\_cursor `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoactionsheetaction/#flet.CupertinoActionSheetAction.mouse_cursor "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoactionsheetaction/#__codelineno-0-1) mouse_cursor: [MouseCursor](https://docs.flet.dev/types/mousecursor/#flet.MouseCursor)  | None = None`

Defines the mouse cursor for this action button.

Events[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoactionsheetaction/#flet.CupertinoActionSheetAction-events "Permanent link")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### on\_click `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoactionsheetaction/#flet.CupertinoActionSheetAction.on_click "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoactionsheetaction/#__codelineno-0-1) on_click: (     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoactionsheetaction/#__codelineno-0-2)     [ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[CupertinoActionSheetAction](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoactionsheetaction/#flet.CupertinoActionSheetAction) ] | None [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoactionsheetaction/#__codelineno-0-3) ) = None`

Called when this action button is clicked.

# FilledButton - Flet

 

[Skip to content](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/filledbutton/#flet.FilledButton)

FilledButton
============

Filled buttons have the most visual impact after the [`FloatingActionButton`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/floatingactionbutton/#flet.FloatingActionButton)
, and is typically used for important, final actions that complete a flow, like "Save", "Join now", or "Confirm".

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/filledbutton/#__codelineno-0-1) ft.FilledButton(content="Tap me")`

[![FilledButton](https://docs.flet.dev/test-images/examples/material/golden/macos/filled_button/image_for_docs.png)](https://docs.flet.dev/test-images/examples/material/golden/macos/filled_button/image_for_docs.png)

Basic FilledButton

Inherits: `[Button](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/button/#flet.Button) `

Examples[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/filledbutton/#examples "Permanent link")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

[Live example](https://flet-controls-gallery.fly.dev/buttons/filledbutton)

### Basic Example[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/filledbutton/#basic-example "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/filledbutton/#__codelineno-0-1) import flet as ft [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/filledbutton/#__codelineno-0-2) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/filledbutton/#__codelineno-0-3)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/filledbutton/#__codelineno-0-4) def main(page: ft.Page):     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/filledbutton/#__codelineno-0-5)     page.title = "FilledButton Example" [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/filledbutton/#__codelineno-0-6)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/filledbutton/#__codelineno-0-7)     page.add(        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/filledbutton/#__codelineno-0-8)         ft.FilledButton(content="Filled button"),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/filledbutton/#__codelineno-0-9)         ft.FilledButton(content="Disabled button", disabled=True),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/filledbutton/#__codelineno-0-10)         ft.FilledButton(content="Button with icon", icon=ft.Icons.ADD_OUTLINED),    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/filledbutton/#__codelineno-0-11)     ) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/filledbutton/#__codelineno-0-12) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/filledbutton/#__codelineno-0-13)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/filledbutton/#__codelineno-0-14) ft.run(main)`

[![basic](https://docs.flet.dev/examples/controls/filled_button/media/basic.png)](https://docs.flet.dev/examples/controls/filled_button/media/basic.png)

Back to top

# FilledTonalButton - Flet

 

[Skip to content](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/filledtonalbutton/#flet.FilledTonalButton)

FilledTonalButton
=================

A filled tonal button is an alternative middle ground between FilledButton and OutlinedButton buttons. They're useful in contexts where a lower-priority button requires slightly more emphasis than an outline would give, such as "Next" in an onboarding flow. Tonal buttons use the secondary color mapping.

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/filledtonalbutton/#__codelineno-0-1) ft.FilledTonalButton(content="Tap me")`

[![FilledTonalButton](https://docs.flet.dev/test-images/examples/material/golden/macos/filled_tonal_button/image_for_docs.png)](https://docs.flet.dev/test-images/examples/material/golden/macos/filled_tonal_button/image_for_docs.png)

Basic FilledTonalButton

Inherits: `[Button](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/button/#flet.Button) `

Examples[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/filledtonalbutton/#examples "Permanent link")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

[Live example](https://flet-controls-gallery.fly.dev/buttons/filledtonalbutton)

### Basic Example[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/filledtonalbutton/#basic-example "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/filledtonalbutton/#__codelineno-0-1) import flet as ft [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/filledtonalbutton/#__codelineno-0-2) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/filledtonalbutton/#__codelineno-0-3)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/filledtonalbutton/#__codelineno-0-4) def main(page: ft.Page):     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/filledtonalbutton/#__codelineno-0-5)     page.title = "FilledTonalButton Example" [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/filledtonalbutton/#__codelineno-0-6)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/filledtonalbutton/#__codelineno-0-7)     page.add(        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/filledtonalbutton/#__codelineno-0-8)         ft.FilledTonalButton(content="Filled tonal button"),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/filledtonalbutton/#__codelineno-0-9)         ft.FilledTonalButton(content="Disabled button", disabled=True),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/filledtonalbutton/#__codelineno-0-10)         ft.FilledTonalButton(content="Button with icon", icon=ft.Icons.ADD_OUTLINED),    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/filledtonalbutton/#__codelineno-0-11)     ) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/filledtonalbutton/#__codelineno-0-12) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/filledtonalbutton/#__codelineno-0-13)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/filledtonalbutton/#__codelineno-0-14) ft.run(main)`
