Properties[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/animatedswitcher/#flet.AnimatedSwitcher-properties "Permanent link")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### content `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/animatedswitcher/#flet.AnimatedSwitcher.content "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/animatedswitcher/#__codelineno-0-1) content: [Control](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/control/#flet.Control)`

The content to display.

When it changes, this switcher will animate the transition from the old/previous `content` to the new one.

Raises:

*   `[ValueError](https://docs.python.org/3/library/exceptions.html#ValueError) ` –
    
    If it is not visible.
    

### duration `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/animatedswitcher/#flet.AnimatedSwitcher.duration "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/animatedswitcher/#__codelineno-0-1) duration: [DurationValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.DurationValue)  = [field](https://docs.python.org/3/library/dataclasses.html#dataclasses.field "<code>dataclasses.field</code>") (     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/animatedswitcher/#__codelineno-0-2)     default_factory=lambda: [Duration](https://docs.flet.dev/types/duration/#flet.Duration) (seconds=1) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/animatedswitcher/#__codelineno-0-3) )`

The duration of the transition from the old [`content`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/animatedswitcher/#flet.AnimatedSwitcher.content)
 to the new one.

### reverse\_duration `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/animatedswitcher/#flet.AnimatedSwitcher.reverse_duration "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/animatedswitcher/#__codelineno-0-1) reverse_duration: [DurationValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.DurationValue)  = [field](https://docs.python.org/3/library/dataclasses.html#dataclasses.field "<code>dataclasses.field</code>") (     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/animatedswitcher/#__codelineno-0-2)     default_factory=lambda: [Duration](https://docs.flet.dev/types/duration/#flet.Duration) (seconds=1) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/animatedswitcher/#__codelineno-0-3) )`

The duration of the transition from the new [`content`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/animatedswitcher/#flet.AnimatedSwitcher.content)
 to the old one.

### switch\_in\_curve `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/animatedswitcher/#flet.AnimatedSwitcher.switch_in_curve "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/animatedswitcher/#__codelineno-0-1) switch_in_curve: [AnimationCurve](https://docs.flet.dev/types/animationcurve/#flet.AnimationCurve)  = [LINEAR](https://docs.flet.dev/types/animationcurve/#flet.AnimationCurve.LINEAR)`

The animation curve to use when transitioning in a new [`content`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/animatedswitcher/#flet.AnimatedSwitcher.content)
.

### switch\_out\_curve `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/animatedswitcher/#flet.AnimatedSwitcher.switch_out_curve "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/animatedswitcher/#__codelineno-0-1) switch_out_curve: [AnimationCurve](https://docs.flet.dev/types/animationcurve/#flet.AnimationCurve)  = [LINEAR](https://docs.flet.dev/types/animationcurve/#flet.AnimationCurve.LINEAR)`

The animation curve to use when transitioning an old [`content`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/animatedswitcher/#flet.AnimatedSwitcher.content)
 out.

### transition `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/animatedswitcher/#flet.AnimatedSwitcher.transition "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/animatedswitcher/#__codelineno-0-1) transition: [AnimatedSwitcherTransition](https://docs.flet.dev/types/animatedswitchertransition/#flet.AnimatedSwitcherTransition)  = [FADE](https://docs.flet.dev/types/animatedswitchertransition/#flet.AnimatedSwitcherTransition.FADE)`

An animation type to transition between new and old [`content`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/animatedswitcher/#flet.AnimatedSwitcher.content)
.

# Banner - Flet

 

[Skip to content](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/banner/#flet.Banner)

Banner
======

A banner displays an important, succinct message, and provides actions for users to address (or dismiss the banner). A user action is required for it to be dismissed.

Banners are displayed at the top of the screen, below a top app bar. They are persistent and non-modal, allowing the user to either ignore them or interact with them at any time.

Example:

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/banner/#__codelineno-0-1) banner = ft.Banner(     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/banner/#__codelineno-0-2)     leading=ft.Icon(ft.Icons.INFO_OUTLINED, color=ft.Colors.PRIMARY),    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/banner/#__codelineno-0-3)     content=ft.Text("Backup completed successfully."),    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/banner/#__codelineno-0-4)     actions=[ft.TextButton("Dismiss")],    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/banner/#__codelineno-0-5)     bgcolor=ft.Colors.SURFACE_CONTAINER_LOW,    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/banner/#__codelineno-0-6)     open=True, [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/banner/#__codelineno-0-7) ) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/banner/#__codelineno-0-8) page.show_dialog(banner)`

[![Banner](https://docs.flet.dev/test-images/examples/material/golden/macos/banner/image_for_docs.png)](https://docs.flet.dev/test-images/examples/material/golden/macos/banner/image_for_docs.png)

Basic Banner

Inherits: `[DialogControl](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dialogcontrol/#flet.DialogControl) `

Properties

*   **`[actions](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/banner/#flet.Banner.actions) `**(`[list](https://docs.python.org/3/glossary.html#term-list) [[Control](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/control/#flet.Control) ]`) –
    
    The set of actions that are displayed at the bottom or trailing side of this banner.
    
*   **`[bgcolor](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/banner/#flet.Banner.bgcolor) `**(`[ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None`) –
    
    The color of the surface of this banner.
    
*   **`[content](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/banner/#flet.Banner.content) `**(`[StrOrControl](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.StrOrControl) `) –
    
    The content of this banner.
    
*   **`[content_padding](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/banner/#flet.Banner.content_padding) `**(`[PaddingValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.PaddingValue)  | None`) –
    
    The amount of space by which to inset the [`content`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/banner/#flet.Banner.content)
    .
    
*   **`[content_text_style](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/banner/#flet.Banner.content_text_style) `**(`[TextStyle](https://docs.flet.dev/types/textstyle/#flet.TextStyle)  | None`) –
    
    The style to be used for the [`Text`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/text/#flet.Text)
     controls in the [`content`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/banner/#flet.Banner.content)
    .
    
*   **`[divider_color](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/banner/#flet.Banner.divider_color) `**(`[ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None`) –
    
    The color of the divider.
    
*   **`[elevation](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/banner/#flet.Banner.elevation) `**(`[Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  | None`) –
    
    The elevation of this banner.
    
*   **`[force_actions_below](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/banner/#flet.Banner.force_actions_below) `**(`[bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool) `) –
    
    An override to force the [`actions`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/banner/#flet.Banner.actions)
     to be below the [`content`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/banner/#flet.Banner.content)
     regardless of how many there are.
    
*   **`[leading](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/banner/#flet.Banner.leading) `**(`[IconDataOrControl](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.IconDataOrControl)  | None`) –
    
    The leading Control of this banner.
    
*   **`[leading_padding](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/banner/#flet.Banner.leading_padding) `**(`[PaddingValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.PaddingValue)  | None`) –
    
    The amount of space by which to inset the [`leading`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/banner/#flet.Banner.leading)
     control.
    
*   **`[margin](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/banner/#flet.Banner.margin) `**(`[MarginValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.MarginValue)  | None`) –
    
    The amount of space surrounding this banner.
    
*   **`[min_action_bar_height](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/banner/#flet.Banner.min_action_bar_height) `**(`[Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number) `) –
    
    The minimum action bar height.
    
*   **`[shadow_color](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/banner/#flet.Banner.shadow_color) `**(`[ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None`) –
    
    The color of the shadow below this banner.
    

Events

*   **`[on_visible](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/banner/#flet.Banner.on_visible) `**(`[ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[Banner](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/banner/#flet.Banner) ] | None`) –
    
    Called when this banner is shown or made visible for the first time.

### Basic example[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/banner/#basic-example "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/banner/#__codelineno-0-1) import flet as ft [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/banner/#__codelineno-0-2) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/banner/#__codelineno-0-3)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/banner/#__codelineno-0-4) def main(page: ft.Page):     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/banner/#__codelineno-0-5)     page.horizontal_alignment = ft.CrossAxisAlignment.CENTER [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/banner/#__codelineno-0-6)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/banner/#__codelineno-0-7)     def handle_banner_close(e: ft.Event[ft.TextButton]):        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/banner/#__codelineno-0-8)         page.pop_dialog()        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/banner/#__codelineno-0-9)         page.add(ft.Text("Action clicked: " + e.control.data)) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/banner/#__codelineno-0-10)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/banner/#__codelineno-0-11)     action_button_style = ft.ButtonStyle(color=ft.Colors.BLUE)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/banner/#__codelineno-0-12)     banner = ft.Banner(        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/banner/#__codelineno-0-13)         bgcolor=ft.Colors.AMBER_100,        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/banner/#__codelineno-0-14)         leading=ft.Icon(ft.Icons.WARNING_AMBER_ROUNDED, color=ft.Colors.AMBER, size=40),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/banner/#__codelineno-0-15)         content=ft.Text(            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/banner/#__codelineno-0-16)             value="Oops, there were some errors while trying to delete the file. "            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/banner/#__codelineno-0-17)             "What would you like to do?",            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/banner/#__codelineno-0-18)             color=ft.Colors.BLACK,        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/banner/#__codelineno-0-19)         ),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/banner/#__codelineno-0-20)         actions=[            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/banner/#__codelineno-0-21)             ft.TextButton(                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/banner/#__codelineno-0-22)                 content="Retry",                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/banner/#__codelineno-0-23)                 style=action_button_style,                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/banner/#__codelineno-0-24)                 on_click=handle_banner_close,                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/banner/#__codelineno-0-25)                 data="retry",            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/banner/#__codelineno-0-26)             ),            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/banner/#__codelineno-0-27)             ft.TextButton(                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/banner/#__codelineno-0-28)                 content="Ignore",                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/banner/#__codelineno-0-29)                 style=action_button_style,                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/banner/#__codelineno-0-30)                 on_click=handle_banner_close,                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/banner/#__codelineno-0-31)                 data="ignore",            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/banner/#__codelineno-0-32)             ),            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/banner/#__codelineno-0-33)             ft.TextButton(                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/banner/#__codelineno-0-34)                 content="Cancel",                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/banner/#__codelineno-0-35)                 style=action_button_style,                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/banner/#__codelineno-0-36)                 on_click=handle_banner_close,                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/banner/#__codelineno-0-37)                 data="cancel",            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/banner/#__codelineno-0-38)             ),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/banner/#__codelineno-0-39)         ],    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/banner/#__codelineno-0-40)     ) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/banner/#__codelineno-0-41)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/banner/#__codelineno-0-42)     page.add(ft.Button("Show Banner", on_click=lambda e: page.show_dialog(banner))) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/banner/#__codelineno-0-43) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/banner/#__codelineno-0-44)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/banner/#__codelineno-0-45) ft.run(main)`

[![basic](https://docs.flet.dev/examples/controls/banner/media/basic.gif)](https://docs.flet.dev/examples/controls/banner/media/basic.gif)

Properties[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/banner/#flet.Banner-properties "Permanent link")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### actions `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/banner/#flet.Banner.actions "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/banner/#__codelineno-0-1) actions: [list](https://docs.python.org/3/glossary.html#term-list) [[Control](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/control/#flet.Control) ]`

The set of actions that are displayed at the bottom or trailing side of this banner.

Typically this is a list of [`TextButton`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/textbutton/#flet.TextButton)
 controls.

Raises:

*   `[ValueError](https://docs.python.org/3/library/exceptions.html#ValueError) ` –
    
    If it does not contain at least one visible `Control`.
    

### bgcolor `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/banner/#flet.Banner.bgcolor "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/banner/#__codelineno-0-1) bgcolor: [ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None = None`

The color of the surface of this banner.

### content `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/banner/#flet.Banner.content "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/banner/#__codelineno-0-1) content: [StrOrControl](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.StrOrControl)`

The content of this banner.

Typically a [`Text`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/text/#flet.Text)
 control.

Raises:

*   `[ValueError](https://docs.python.org/3/library/exceptions.html#ValueError) ` –
    
    If [`content`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/banner/#flet.Banner.content)
     is not visible.
    

### content\_padding `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/banner/#flet.Banner.content_padding "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/banner/#__codelineno-0-1) content_padding: [PaddingValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.PaddingValue)  | None = None`

The amount of space by which to inset the [`content`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/banner/#flet.Banner.content)
.

If the actions are below the content, this defaults to `Padding.only(left=16.0, top=24.0, right=16.0, bottom=4.0)`.

If the actions are trailing the `content`, this defaults to `Padding.only(left=16.0, top=2.0)`.

### content\_text\_style `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/banner/#flet.Banner.content_text_style "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/banner/#__codelineno-0-1) content_text_style: [TextStyle](https://docs.flet.dev/types/textstyle/#flet.TextStyle)  | None = None`

The style to be used for the [`Text`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/text/#flet.Text)
 controls in the [`content`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/banner/#flet.Banner.content)
.

### divider\_color `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/banner/#flet.Banner.divider_color "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/banner/#__codelineno-0-1) divider_color: [ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None = None`

The color of the divider.

### elevation `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/banner/#flet.Banner.elevation "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/banner/#__codelineno-0-1) elevation: [Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  | None = None`

The elevation of this banner.

Raises:

*   `[ValueError](https://docs.python.org/3/library/exceptions.html#ValueError) ` –
    
    If it is not greater than or equal to `0`.
    

### force\_actions\_below `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/banner/#flet.Banner.force_actions_below "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/banner/#__codelineno-0-1) force_actions_below: [bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool)  = False`

An override to force the [`actions`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/banner/#flet.Banner.actions)
 to be below the [`content`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/banner/#flet.Banner.content)
 regardless of how many there are.

If this is `True`, the [`actions`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/banner/#flet.Banner.actions)
 will be placed below the content. If this is `False`, the [`actions`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/banner/#flet.Banner.actions)
 will be placed on the trailing side of the [`content`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/banner/#flet.Banner.content)
 if `actions` length is `1` and below the `content` if greater than `1`.

### leading `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/banner/#flet.Banner.leading "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/banner/#__codelineno-0-1) leading: [IconDataOrControl](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.IconDataOrControl)  | None = None`

The leading Control of this banner.

Typically an [`Icon`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/icon/#flet.Icon)
 control.

### leading\_padding `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/banner/#flet.Banner.leading_padding "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/banner/#__codelineno-0-1) leading_padding: [PaddingValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.PaddingValue)  | None = None`

The amount of space by which to inset the [`leading`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/banner/#flet.Banner.leading)
 control.

Defaults to [`BannerTheme.leading_padding`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/bannertheme/#flet.BannerTheme.leading_padding)
, or if that is `None`, falls back to `Padding.only(end=16)`.

### margin `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/banner/#flet.Banner.margin "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/banner/#__codelineno-0-1) margin: [MarginValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.MarginValue)  | None = None`

The amount of space surrounding this banner.

### min\_action\_bar\_height `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/banner/#flet.Banner.min_action_bar_height "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/banner/#__codelineno-0-1) min_action_bar_height: [Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  = 52.0`

The minimum action bar height.

### shadow\_color `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/banner/#flet.Banner.shadow_color "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/banner/#__codelineno-0-1) shadow_color: [ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None = None`

The color of the shadow below this banner.

Events[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/banner/#flet.Banner-events "Permanent link")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### on\_visible `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/banner/#flet.Banner.on_visible "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/banner/#__codelineno-0-1) on_visible: [ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[Banner](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/banner/#flet.Banner) ] | None = None`

Called when this banner is shown or made visible for the first time.

# MergeSemantics - Flet

 

[Skip to content](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/mergesemantics/#flet.MergeSemantics)

MergeSemantics
==============

Inherits: `[Control](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/control/#flet.Control) `

A control that merges the semantics of its descendants.

Causes all the semantics of the subtree rooted at this node to be merged into one node in the semantics tree.

Used by accessibility tools, search engines, and other semantic analysis software to determine the meaning of the application.

Properties

*   **`[content](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/mergesemantics/#flet.MergeSemantics.content) `**(`[Control](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/control/#flet.Control)  | None`) –
    
    The `Control` to annotate.
    

Properties[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/mergesemantics/#flet.MergeSemantics-properties "Permanent link")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### content `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/mergesemantics/#flet.MergeSemantics.content "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/mergesemantics/#__codelineno-0-1) content: [Control](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/control/#flet.Control)  | None = None`

The `Control` to annotate.

# BlockPicker - Flet

 

[Skip to content](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/blockpicker/#blockpicker)

BlockPicker[#](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/blockpicker/#blockpicker "Permanent link")

=============================================================================================

A color picker that lets users choose a color from a grid of available colors.

[![BlockPicker](https://docs.flet.dev/test-images/examples/extensions/color_pickers/golden/macos/color_pickers/block_picker.png)](https://docs.flet.dev/test-images/examples/extensions/color_pickers/golden/macos/color_pickers/block_picker.png)

Basic BlockPicker

Inherits: `[LayoutControl](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/layoutcontrol/#flet.LayoutControl) `

Properties

*   **`[available_colors](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/blockpicker/#flet_color_pickers.BlockPicker.available_colors) `**(`[list](https://docs.python.org/3/glossary.html#term-list) [[ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue) ] | None`) –
    
    A list of available colors to pick from.
    
*   **`[color](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/blockpicker/#flet_color_pickers.BlockPicker.color) `**(`[ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None`) –
    
    The currently selected color.
    

Events

*   **`[on_color_change](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/blockpicker/#flet_color_pickers.BlockPicker.on_color_change) `**(`[ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[BlockPicker](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/blockpicker/#flet_color_pickers.BlockPicker) ] | None`) –
    
    Called when the picker color is changed.
    

Example[#](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/blockpicker/#example "Permanent link")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/blockpicker/#__codelineno-0-1) import flet as ft [](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/blockpicker/#__codelineno-0-2) from flet_color_pickers import BlockPicker [](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/blockpicker/#__codelineno-0-3) [](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/blockpicker/#__codelineno-0-4)[](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/blockpicker/#__codelineno-0-5) def main(page: ft.Page):     [](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/blockpicker/#__codelineno-0-6)     page.title = "BlockPicker"    [](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/blockpicker/#__codelineno-0-7)     page.padding = 20 [](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/blockpicker/#__codelineno-0-8)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/blockpicker/#__codelineno-0-9)     def on_color_change(e: ft.ControlEvent):        [](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/blockpicker/#__codelineno-0-10)         print(f"color: {e.data}") [](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/blockpicker/#__codelineno-0-11)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/blockpicker/#__codelineno-0-12)     dialog_picker = BlockPicker(        [](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/blockpicker/#__codelineno-0-13)         color="#9c27b0",        [](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/blockpicker/#__codelineno-0-14)         available_colors=[            [](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/blockpicker/#__codelineno-0-15)             "#f44336",            [](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/blockpicker/#__codelineno-0-16)             "#e91e63",            [](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/blockpicker/#__codelineno-0-17)             "#9c27b0",            [](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/blockpicker/#__codelineno-0-18)             "#3f51b5",            [](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/blockpicker/#__codelineno-0-19)             "#2196f3",            [](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/blockpicker/#__codelineno-0-20)             "#009688",            [](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/blockpicker/#__codelineno-0-21)             "#4caf50",            [](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/blockpicker/#__codelineno-0-22)             "#795548",        [](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/blockpicker/#__codelineno-0-23)         ],        [](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/blockpicker/#__codelineno-0-24)         on_color_change=on_color_change,    [](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/blockpicker/#__codelineno-0-25)     ) [](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/blockpicker/#__codelineno-0-26)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/blockpicker/#__codelineno-0-27)     dialog = ft.AlertDialog(        [](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/blockpicker/#__codelineno-0-28)         modal=True,        [](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/blockpicker/#__codelineno-0-29)         title=ft.Text("Pick a color"),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/blockpicker/#__codelineno-0-30)         content=dialog_picker,        [](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/blockpicker/#__codelineno-0-31)         actions=[            [](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/blockpicker/#__codelineno-0-32)             ft.TextButton("Close", on_click=lambda e: page.pop_dialog()),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/blockpicker/#__codelineno-0-33)         ],    [](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/blockpicker/#__codelineno-0-34)     ) [](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/blockpicker/#__codelineno-0-37)         ft.IconButton(icon=ft.Icons.BRUSH, on_click=lambda e: page.show_dialog(dialog)),    [](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/blockpicker/#__codelineno-0-38)     ) [](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/blockpicker/#__codelineno-0-39) [](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/blockpicker/#__codelineno-0-40)[](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/blockpicker/#__codelineno-0-41) ft.run(main)`

### available\_colors `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/blockpicker/#flet_color_pickers.BlockPicker.available_colors "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/blockpicker/#__codelineno-0-1) available_colors: [list](https://docs.python.org/3/glossary.html#term-list) [[ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue) ] | None = None`

A list of available colors to pick from.

### color `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/blockpicker/#flet_color_pickers.BlockPicker.color "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/blockpicker/#__codelineno-0-1) color: [ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None = None`

The currently selected color.

Events[#](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/blockpicker/#flet_color_pickers.BlockPicker-events "Permanent link")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### on\_color\_change `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/blockpicker/#flet_color_pickers.BlockPicker.on_color_change "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/blockpicker/#__codelineno-0-1) on_color_change: [ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[BlockPicker](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/blockpicker/#flet_color_pickers.BlockPicker) ] | None = (     [](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/blockpicker/#__codelineno-0-2)     None [](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/blockpicker/#__codelineno-0-3) )`

Called when the picker color is changed.

The [`data`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/event/#flet.Event.data)
 property of the event handler argument contains the color value as a hex string.

# MaterialPicker - Flet

 

[Skip to content](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/materialpicker/#materialpicker)

MaterialPicker[#](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/materialpicker/#materialpicker "Permanent link")

======================================================================================================

A material palette picker for selecting primary and shade colors, with optional shade labels.

[![MaterialPicker](https://docs.flet.dev/test-images/examples/extensions/color_pickers/golden/macos/color_pickers/material_picker.png)](https://docs.flet.dev/test-images/examples/extensions/color_pickers/golden/macos/color_pickers/material_picker.png)

Basic MaterialPicker

Inherits: `[LayoutControl](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/layoutcontrol/#flet.LayoutControl) `

Properties

*   **`[color](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/materialpicker/#flet_color_pickers.MaterialPicker.color) `**(`[ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None`) –
    
    The currently selected color.
    
*   **`[enable_label](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/materialpicker/#flet_color_pickers.MaterialPicker.enable_label) `**(`[bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool) `) –
    
    Whether to show color shade labels.
    
*   **`[portrait_only](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/materialpicker/#flet_color_pickers.MaterialPicker.portrait_only) `**(`[bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool) `) –
    
    Whether to force portrait layout.
    

Events

*   **`[on_color_change](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/materialpicker/#flet_color_pickers.MaterialPicker.on_color_change) `**(`[ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[MaterialPicker](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/materialpicker/#flet_color_pickers.MaterialPicker) ] | None`) –
    
    Called when the picker color is changed.
    
*   **`[on_primary_change](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/materialpicker/#flet_color_pickers.MaterialPicker.on_primary_change) `**(`[ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[MaterialPicker](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/materialpicker/#flet_color_pickers.MaterialPicker) ] | None`) –
    
    Called when the primary color is changed.
    

Example[#](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/materialpicker/#example "Permanent link")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/materialpicker/#__codelineno-0-1) import flet as ft [](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/materialpicker/#__codelineno-0-2) from flet_color_pickers import MaterialPicker [](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/materialpicker/#__codelineno-0-3) [](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/materialpicker/#__codelineno-0-4)[](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/materialpicker/#__codelineno-0-5) def main(page: ft.Page):     [](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/materialpicker/#__codelineno-0-6)     page.title = "MaterialPicker"    [](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/materialpicker/#__codelineno-0-7)     page.padding = 20 [](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/materialpicker/#__codelineno-0-8)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/materialpicker/#__codelineno-0-9)     def on_color_change(e: ft.ControlEvent):        [](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/materialpicker/#__codelineno-0-10)         print(f"color: {e.data}") [](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/materialpicker/#__codelineno-0-11)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/materialpicker/#__codelineno-0-12)     def on_primary_change(e: ft.ControlEvent):        [](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/materialpicker/#__codelineno-0-13)         print(f"primary: {e.data}") [](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/materialpicker/#__codelineno-0-14)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/materialpicker/#__codelineno-0-15)     picker = MaterialPicker(        [](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/materialpicker/#__codelineno-0-16)         color="#ff9800",        [](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/materialpicker/#__codelineno-0-17)         on_color_change=on_color_change,        [](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/materialpicker/#__codelineno-0-18)         on_primary_change=on_primary_change,    [](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/materialpicker/#__codelineno-0-19)     ) [](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/materialpicker/#__codelineno-0-20)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/materialpicker/#__codelineno-0-21)     page.add(picker) [](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/materialpicker/#__codelineno-0-22) [](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/materialpicker/#__codelineno-0-23)[](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/materialpicker/#__codelineno-0-24) ft.run(main)`

# MultipleChoiceBlockPicker - Flet

 

[Skip to content](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/multiplechoiceblockpicker/#multiplechoiceblockpicker)

MultipleChoiceBlockPicker[#](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/multiplechoiceblockpicker/#multiplechoiceblockpicker "Permanent link")

=======================================================================================================================================

A color picker that lets users choose multiple colors from a grid of available colors.

[![MultipleChoiceBlockPicker](https://docs.flet.dev/test-images/examples/extensions/color_pickers/golden/macos/color_pickers/multiple_choice_block_picker.png)](https://docs.flet.dev/test-images/examples/extensions/color_pickers/golden/macos/color_pickers/multiple_choice_block_picker.png)

Basic MultipleChoiceBlockPicker

Inherits: `[LayoutControl](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/layoutcontrol/#flet.LayoutControl) `

Properties

*   **`[available_colors](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/multiplechoiceblockpicker/#flet_color_pickers.MultipleChoiceBlockPicker.available_colors) `**(`[list](https://docs.python.org/3/glossary.html#term-list) [[ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue) ] | None`) –
    
    A list of available colors to pick from.
    
*   **`[colors](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/multiplechoiceblockpicker/#flet_color_pickers.MultipleChoiceBlockPicker.colors) `**(`[list](https://docs.python.org/3/glossary.html#term-list) [[ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue) ] | None`) –
    
    The currently selected colors.
    

Events

*   **`[on_colors_change](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/multiplechoiceblockpicker/#flet_color_pickers.MultipleChoiceBlockPicker.on_colors_change) `**(`[ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[MultipleChoiceBlockPicker](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/multiplechoiceblockpicker/#flet_color_pickers.MultipleChoiceBlockPicker) ] | None`) –
    
    Called when the picker colors are changed.

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

# HueRingPicker - Flet

 

[Skip to content](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/hueringpicker/#hueringpicker)

HueRingPicker[#](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/hueringpicker/#hueringpicker "Permanent link")

===================================================================================================

A hue ring color picker that lets users select a hue on a circular ring, with an optional alpha slider.

[![HueRingPicker](https://docs.flet.dev/test-images/examples/extensions/color_pickers/golden/macos/color_pickers/hue_ring_picker.png)](https://docs.flet.dev/test-images/examples/extensions/color_pickers/golden/macos/color_pickers/hue_ring_picker.png)

Basic HueRingPicker

Inherits: `[LayoutControl](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/layoutcontrol/#flet.LayoutControl) `

Properties

*   **`[color](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/hueringpicker/#flet_color_pickers.HueRingPicker.color) `**(`[ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None`) –
    
    The currently selected color.
    
*   **`[color_picker_height](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/hueringpicker/#flet_color_pickers.HueRingPicker.color_picker_height) `**(`[Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  | None`) –
    
    Height of the color picker in virtual pixels.
    
*   **`[enable_alpha](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/hueringpicker/#flet_color_pickers.HueRingPicker.enable_alpha) `**(`[bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool) `) –
    
    Whether to enable alpha (opacity) slider.
    
*   **`[hue_ring_stroke_width](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/hueringpicker/#flet_color_pickers.HueRingPicker.hue_ring_stroke_width) `**(`[Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  | None`) –
    
    Stroke width for the hue ring.
    
*   **`[picker_area_border_radius](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/hueringpicker/#flet_color_pickers.HueRingPicker.picker_area_border_radius) `**(`[BorderRadiusValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.BorderRadiusValue)  | None`) –
    
    Border radius for the picker area.
    
*   **`[portrait_only](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/hueringpicker/#flet_color_pickers.HueRingPicker.portrait_only) `**(`[bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool) `) –
    
    Whether to force portrait layout.
    

Events

*   **`[on_color_change](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/hueringpicker/#flet_color_pickers.HueRingPicker.on_color_change) `**(`[ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[HueRingPicker](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/hueringpicker/#flet_color_pickers.HueRingPicker) ] | None`) –
    
    Called when the picker color is changed.
    

Example[#](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/hueringpicker/#example "Permanent link")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/hueringpicker/#__codelineno-0-1) import flet as ft [](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/hueringpicker/#__codelineno-0-2) from flet_color_pickers import [](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/hueringpicker/#__codelineno-0-6)     page.title = "HueRingPicker"    [](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/hueringpicker/#__codelineno-0-7)     page.padding = 20 [](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/hueringpicker/#__codelineno-0-8)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/hueringpicker/#__codelineno-0-9)     def on_color_change(e: ft.ControlEvent):        [](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/hueringpicker/#__codelineno-0-10)         print(f"color: {e.data}") [](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/hueringpicker/#__codelineno-0-11)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/hueringpicker/#__codelineno-0-12)     picker = HueRingPicker(        [](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/hueringpicker/#__codelineno-0-13)         color="#00ff00",        [](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/hueringpicker/#__codelineno-0-14)         hue_ring_stroke_width=20,        [](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/hueringpicker/#__codelineno-0-15)         picker_area_border_radius=ft.BorderRadius.all(5),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/hueringpicker/#__codelineno-0-16)         on_color_change=on_color_change,    [](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/hueringpicker/#__codelineno-0-17)     ) [](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/hueringpicker/#__codelineno-0-18)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/hueringpicker/#__codelineno-0-19)     page.add(picker) [](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/hueringpicker/#__codelineno-0-20) [](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/hueringpicker/#__codelineno-0-21)[](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/hueringpicker/#__codelineno-0-22) ft.run(main)`

Properties[#](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/hueringpicker/#flet_color_pickers.HueRingPicker-properties "Permanent link")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### color `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/hueringpicker/#flet_color_pickers.HueRingPicker.color "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/hueringpicker/#__codelineno-0-1) color: [ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None = None`

The currently selected color.

### color\_picker\_height `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/hueringpicker/#flet_color_pickers.HueRingPicker.color_picker_height "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/hueringpicker/#__codelineno-0-1) color_picker_height: [Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  | None = None`

Height of the color picker in virtual pixels.

### enable\_alpha `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/hueringpicker/#flet_color_pickers.HueRingPicker.enable_alpha "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/hueringpicker/#__codelineno-0-1) enable_alpha: [bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool)  = False`

Whether to enable alpha (opacity) slider.

### hue\_ring\_stroke\_width `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/hueringpicker/#flet_color_pickers.HueRingPicker.hue_ring_stroke_width "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/hueringpicker/#__codelineno-0-1) hue_ring_stroke_width: [Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  | None = None`

Stroke width for the hue ring.

### picker\_area\_border\_radius `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/hueringpicker/#flet_color_pickers.HueRingPicker.picker_area_border_radius "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/hueringpicker/#__codelineno-0-1) picker_area_border_radius: [BorderRadiusValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.BorderRadiusValue)  | None = None`

Border radius for the picker area.

### portrait\_only `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/hueringpicker/#flet_color_pickers.HueRingPicker.portrait_only "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/hueringpicker/#__codelineno-0-1) portrait_only: [bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool)  = False`

Whether to force portrait layout.

Events[#](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/hueringpicker/#flet_color_pickers.HueRingPicker-events "Permanent link")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### on\_color\_change `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/hueringpicker/#flet_color_pickers.HueRingPicker.on_color_change "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/hueringpicker/#__codelineno-0-1) on_color_change: (     [](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/hueringpicker/#__codelineno-0-2)     [ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[HueRingPicker](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/hueringpicker/#flet_color_pickers.HueRingPicker) ] | None [](https://docs.flet.dev/colorpickers/hueringpicker/#__codelineno-0-3) ) = None`

Called when the picker color is changed.

The [`data`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/event/#flet.Event.data)
 property of the event handler argument contains the color value as a hex string.

# DataColumn - Flet

 

[Skip to content](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datacolumn/#examples)

DataColumn
==========

Examples[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datacolumn/#examples "Permanent link")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------

See [these](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datatable/#examples)
.

Inherits: `[Control](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/control/#flet.Control) `

Column configuration for a [`DataTable`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datatable/#flet.DataTable)
.

Properties

*   **`[heading_row_alignment](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datacolumn/#flet.DataColumn.heading_row_alignment) `**(`[MainAxisAlignment](https://docs.flet.dev/types/mainaxisalignment/#flet.MainAxisAlignment)  | None`) –
    
    Defines the horizontal layout of the label and sort indicator in the heading row.
    
*   **`[label](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datacolumn/#flet.DataColumn.label) `**(`[StrOrControl](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.StrOrControl) `) –
    
    The column heading.
    
*   **`[numeric](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datacolumn/#flet.DataColumn.numeric) `**(`[bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool) `) –
    
    Whether this column represents numeric data or not.
    
*   **`[tooltip](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datacolumn/#flet.DataColumn.tooltip) `**(`[str](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str)  | None`) –
    
    The column heading's tooltip.
    

Events

*   **`[on_sort](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datacolumn/#flet.DataColumn.on_sort) `**(`[EventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.EventHandler) [[DataColumnSortEvent](https://docs.flet.dev/types/datacolumnsortevent/#flet.DataColumnSortEvent) ] | None`) –
    
    Called when the user asks to sort the table using this column.
    

Properties[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datacolumn/#flet.DataColumn-properties "Permanent link")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### heading\_row\_alignment `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datacolumn/#flet.DataColumn.heading_row_alignment "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datacolumn/#__codelineno-0-1) heading_row_alignment: [MainAxisAlignment](https://docs.flet.dev/types/mainaxisalignment/#flet.MainAxisAlignment)  | None = None`

Defines the horizontal layout of the label and sort indicator in the heading row.

### label `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datacolumn/#flet.DataColumn.label "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datacolumn/#__codelineno-0-1) label: [StrOrControl](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.StrOrControl)`

The column heading.

Typically, this will be a [`Text`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/text/#flet.Text)
 control. It could also be an [`Icon`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/icon/#flet.Icon)
 (typically using size 18), or a combination of both in a [`Row`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/row/#flet.Row)
.

Raises:

*   `[ValueError](https://docs.python.org/3/library/exceptions.html#ValueError) ` –
    
    If it is neither a string nor a visible `Control`.
    

### numeric `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datacolumn/#flet.DataColumn.numeric "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datacolumn/#__codelineno-0-1) numeric: [bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool)  = False`

Whether this column represents numeric data or not.

The contents of cells of columns containing numeric data are right-aligned.

### tooltip `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datacolumn/#flet.DataColumn.tooltip "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datacolumn/#__codelineno-0-1) tooltip: [str](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str)  | None = [field](https://docs.python.org/3/library/dataclasses.html#dataclasses.field "<code>dataclasses.field</code>") (default=None, kw_only=True)`

The column heading's tooltip.

This is a longer description of the column heading, for cases where the heading might have been abbreviated to keep the column width to a reasonable size.

Events[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datacolumn/#flet.DataColumn-events "Permanent link")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### on\_sort `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datacolumn/#flet.DataColumn.on_sort "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datacolumn/#__codelineno-0-1) on_sort: [EventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.EventHandler) [[DataColumnSortEvent](https://docs.flet.dev/types/datacolumnsortevent/#flet.DataColumnSortEvent) ] | None = None`

Called when the user asks to sort the table using this column.

If not set, the column will not be considered sortable.

Back to top

# DataCell - Flet

 

[Skip to content](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datacell/#examples)

DataCell
========

Examples[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datacell/#examples "Permanent link")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

See [these](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datatable/#examples)
.

Inherits: `[Control](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/control/#flet.Control) `

The data for a cell of a [`DataTable`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datatable/#flet.DataTable)
.

Properties

*   **`[content](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datacell/#flet.DataCell.content) `**(`[StrOrControl](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.StrOrControl) `) –
    
    The content of this cell.
    
*   **`[placeholder](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datacell/#flet.DataCell.placeholder) `**(`[bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool) `) –
    
    Whether the [`content`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datacell/#flet.DataCell.content)
     is actually a placeholder.
    
*   **`[show_edit_icon](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datacell/#flet.DataCell.show_edit_icon) `**(`[bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool) `) –
    
    Whether to show an edit icon at the end of this cell.
    

Events

*   **`[on_double_tap](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datacell/#flet.DataCell.on_double_tap) `**(`[ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[DataCell](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datacell/#flet.DataCell) ] | None`) –
    
    Called when this cell is double tapped.
    
*   **`[on_long_press](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datacell/#flet.DataCell.on_long_press) `**(`[ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[DataCell](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datacell/#flet.DataCell) ] | None`) –
    
    Called if this cell is long-pressed.
    
*   **`[on_tap](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datacell/#flet.DataCell.on_tap) `**(`[ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[DataCell](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datacell/#flet.DataCell) ] | None`) –
    
    Called if this cell is tapped.
    
*   **`[on_tap_cancel](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datacell/#flet.DataCell.on_tap_cancel) `**(`[ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[DataCell](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datacell/#flet.DataCell) ] | None`) –
    
    Called if the user cancels a tap was started on cell.
    
*   **`[on_tap_down](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datacell/#flet.DataCell.on_tap_down) `**(`[EventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.EventHandler) [[TapEvent](https://docs.flet.dev/types/tapevent/#flet.TapEvent) [[DataCell](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datacell/#flet.DataCell) ]] | None`) –
    
    Called if this cell is tapped down.
    

Properties[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datacell/#flet.DataCell-properties "Permanent link")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### content `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datacell/#flet.DataCell.content "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datacell/#__codelineno-0-1) content: [StrOrControl](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.StrOrControl)`

The content of this cell.

Typically a [`Text`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/text/#flet.Text)
 control or a [`Dropdown`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdown/#flet.Dropdown)
 control.

If the cell has no data, then a [`Text`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/text/#flet.Text)
 control with placeholder text should be provided instead, and [`placeholder`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datacell/#flet.DataCell.placeholder)
 should be set to `True`.

Tip

To lay out multiple children, set the [`content`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datacell/#flet.DataCell.content)
 to a container-like control such as [`Row`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/row/#flet.Row)
, [`Column`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/column/#flet.Column)
, or [`Stack`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/stack/#flet.Stack)
, which have a `controls` property.

Raises:

*   `[ValueError](https://docs.python.org/3/library/exceptions.html#ValueError) ` –
    
    If it is neither a string nor a visible `Control`.
    

### placeholder `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datacell/#flet.DataCell.placeholder "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datacell/#__codelineno-0-1) placeholder: [bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool)  = False`

Whether the [`content`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datacell/#flet.DataCell.content)
 is actually a placeholder.

If this is `True`, the default text style for the cell is changed to be appropriate for placeholder text.

### show\_edit\_icon `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datacell/#flet.DataCell.show_edit_icon "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datacell/#__codelineno-0-1) show_edit_icon: [bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool)  = False`

Whether to show an edit icon at the end of this cell.

This does not make the cell actually editable; the caller must implement editing behavior if desired (initiated from the [`on_tap`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datacell/#flet.DataCell.on_tap)
 callback).

Note

If this is set, [`on_tap`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datacell/#flet.DataCell.on_tap)
 should also be set, otherwise tapping the icon will have no effect.

Events[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datacell/#flet.DataCell-events "Permanent link")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### on\_double\_tap `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datacell/#flet.DataCell.on_double_tap "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datacell/#__codelineno-0-1) on_double_tap: [ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[DataCell](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datacell/#flet.DataCell) ] | None = None`

Called when this cell is double tapped.

Note

If this is `None` (including [`on_tap`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datacell/#flet.DataCell.on_tap)
, [`on_long_press`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datacell/#flet.DataCell.on_long_press)
, [`on_tap_cancel`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datacell/#flet.DataCell.on_tap_cancel)
, [`on_tap_down`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datacell/#flet.DataCell.on_tap_down)
), tapping this cell will attempt to select its row (if [`DataRow.on_select_change`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datarow/#flet.DataRow.on_select_change)
 is provided).

### on\_long\_press `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datacell/#flet.DataCell.on_long_press "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datacell/#__codelineno-0-1) on_long_press: [ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[DataCell](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datacell/#flet.DataCell) ] | None = None`

Called if this cell is long-pressed.

Note

If this is `None` (including [`on_tap`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datacell/#flet.DataCell.on_tap)
, [`on_double_tap`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datacell/#flet.DataCell.on_double_tap)
, [`on_tap_cancel`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datacell/#flet.DataCell.on_tap_cancel)
, [`on_tap_down`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datacell/#flet.DataCell.on_tap_down)
), tapping this cell will attempt to select its row (if [`DataRow.on_select_change`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datarow/#flet.DataRow.on_select_change)
 is provided).

### on\_tap `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datacell/#flet.DataCell.on_tap "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datacell/#__codelineno-0-1) on_tap: [ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[DataCell](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datacell/#flet.DataCell) ] | None = None`

Called if this cell is tapped.

Note

If this is `None` (including [`on_double_tap`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datacell/#flet.DataCell.on_double_tap)
, [`on_long_press`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datacell/#flet.DataCell.on_long_press)
, [`on_tap_cancel`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datacell/#flet.DataCell.on_tap_cancel)
, [`on_tap_down`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datacell/#flet.DataCell.on_tap_down)
), tapping this cell will attempt to select its row (if [`DataRow.on_select_change`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datarow/#flet.DataRow.on_select_change)
 is provided).

### on\_tap\_cancel `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datacell/#flet.DataCell.on_tap_cancel "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datacell/#__codelineno-0-1) on_tap_cancel: [ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[DataCell](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datacell/#flet.DataCell) ] | None = None`

Called if the user cancels a tap was started on cell.

Note

If this is `None` (including [`on_tap`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datacell/#flet.DataCell.on_tap)
, [`on_double_tap`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datacell/#flet.DataCell.on_double_tap)
, [`on_long_press`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datacell/#flet.DataCell.on_long_press)
, [`on_tap_down`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datacell/#flet.DataCell.on_tap_down)
), tapping this cell will attempt to select its row (if [`DataRow.on_select_change`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datarow/#flet.DataRow.on_select_change)
 is provided).

### on\_tap\_down `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datacell/#flet.DataCell.on_tap_down "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datacell/#__codelineno-0-1) on_tap_down: [EventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.EventHandler) [[TapEvent](https://docs.flet.dev/types/tapevent/#flet.TapEvent) [[DataCell](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datacell/#flet.DataCell) ]] | None = None`

Called if this cell is tapped down.

Note

If this is `None` (including [`on_tap`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datacell/#flet.DataCell.on_tap)
, [`on_double_tap`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datacell/#flet.DataCell.on_double_tap)
, [`on_long_press`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datacell/#flet.DataCell.on_long_press)
, [`on_tap_cancel`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datacell/#flet.DataCell.on_tap_cancel)
), tapping this cell will attempt to select its row (if [`DataRow.on_select_change`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datarow/#flet.DataRow.on_select_change)
 is provided).

Back to top

# Card - Flet

 

[Skip to content](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/card/#flet.Card)

Card
====

A material design card: a panel with slightly rounded corners and an elevation shadow.

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/card/#__codelineno-0-1) ft.Card(     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/card/#__codelineno-0-2)     shadow_color=ft.Colors.ON_SURFACE_VARIANT,    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/card/#__codelineno-0-3)     content=ft.Container(        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/card/#__codelineno-0-4)         width=400,        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/card/#__codelineno-0-5)         padding=10,        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/card/#__codelineno-0-6)         content=ft.ListTile(            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/card/#__codelineno-0-7)             bgcolor=ft.Colors.GREY_400,            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/card/#__codelineno-0-8)             leading=ft.Icon(ft.Icons.FOREST),            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/card/#__codelineno-0-9)             title=ft.Text("Card Name"),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/card/#__codelineno-0-10)         ),    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/card/#__codelineno-0-11)     ), [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/card/#__codelineno-0-12) )`

[![Card](https://docs.flet.dev/test-images/examples/material/golden/macos/card/image_for_docs.png)](https://docs.flet.dev/test-images/examples/material/golden/macos/card/image_for_docs.png)

Basic card

Inherits: `[LayoutControl](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/layoutcontrol/#flet.LayoutControl) `, `[AdaptiveControl](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/adaptivecontrol/#flet.AdaptiveControl) `

Properties

*   **`[bgcolor](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/card/#flet.Card.bgcolor) `**(`[ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None`) –
    
    The card's background color.
    
*   **`[clip_behavior](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/card/#flet.Card.clip_behavior) `**(`[ClipBehavior](https://docs.flet.dev/types/clipbehavior/#flet.ClipBehavior)  | None`) –
    
    Defines how the [`content`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/card/#flet.Card.content)
     will be clipped.
    
*   **`[content](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/card/#flet.Card.content) `**(`[Control](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/control/#flet.Control)  | None`) –
    
    The Control to display inside the card.
    
*   **`[elevation](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/card/#flet.Card.elevation) `**(`[Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  | None`) –
    
    The z-coordinate at which to place this card.
    
*   **`[semantic_container](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/card/#flet.Card.semantic_container) `**(`[bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool) `) –
    
    Whether this card represents a single semantic container, or if it instead represents a collection of individual semantic nodes (different types of content).
    
*   **`[shadow_color](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/card/#flet.Card.shadow_color) `**(`[ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None`) –
    
    The color to paint the shadow below this card.
    
*   **`[shape](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/card/#flet.Card.shape) `**(`[OutlinedBorder](https://docs.flet.dev/types/outlinedborder/#flet.OutlinedBorder)  | None`) –
    
    The shape of this card.
    
*   **`[show_border_on_foreground](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/card/#flet.Card.show_border_on_foreground) `**(`[bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool) `) –
    
    Whether the shape of the border should be painted in front of the [`content`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/card/#flet.Card.content)
     or behind.
    
*   **`[variant](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/card/#flet.Card.variant) `**(`[CardVariant](https://docs.flet.dev/types/cardvariant/#flet.CardVariant) `) –
    
    Defines the card variant to be used.
    

Examples[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/card/#examples "Permanent link")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------

[Live example](https://flet-controls-gallery.fly.dev/layout/card)

content=ft.Column(                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/card/#__codelineno-0-15)                     controls=[ Lyrics by Sidney Stein." [![music-info](https://docs.flet.dev/test-images/examples/material/golden/macos/card/music_info.png)](https://docs.flet.dev/test-images/examples/material/golden/macos/card/music_info.png)

Properties[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/card/#flet.Card-properties "Permanent link")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### bgcolor `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/card/#flet.Card.bgcolor "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/card/#__codelineno-0-1) bgcolor: [ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None = None`

The card's background color.

### clip\_behavior `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/card/#flet.Card.clip_behavior "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/card/#__codelineno-0-1) clip_behavior: [ClipBehavior](https://docs.flet.dev/types/clipbehavior/#flet.ClipBehavior)  | None = None`

Defines how the [`content`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/card/#flet.Card.content)
 will be clipped.

Defaults to [`CardTheme.clip_behavior`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/cardtheme/#flet.CardTheme.clip_behavior)
, or if that is `None`, falls back to `ClipBehavior.NONE`.

### content `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/card/#flet.Card.content "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/card/#__codelineno-0-1) content: [Control](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/control/#flet.Control)  | None = None`

The Control to display inside the card.

Tip

To display multiple children, wrap them in a control like [`Row`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/row/#flet.Row)
, [`Column`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/column/#flet.Column)
, or [`Stack`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/stack/#flet.Stack)
, which accept a `controls` list.

### elevation `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/card/#flet.Card.elevation "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/card/#__codelineno-0-1) elevation: [Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  | None = None`

The z-coordinate at which to place this card. Defines the size of the shadow below the card.

Defaults to [`CardTheme.elevation`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/cardtheme/#flet.CardTheme.elevation)
, or if that is `None`, falls back to `1.0`.

### semantic\_container `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/card/#flet.Card.semantic_container "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/card/#__codelineno-0-1) semantic_container: [bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool)  = True`

Whether this card represents a single semantic container, or if it instead represents a collection of individual semantic nodes (different types of content).

### shadow\_color `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/card/#flet.Card.shadow_color "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/card/#__codelineno-0-1) shadow_color: [ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None = None`

The color to paint the shadow below this card.

Defaults to [`CardTheme.shadow_color`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/cardtheme/#flet.CardTheme.shadow_color)

### shape `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/card/#flet.Card.shape "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/card/#__codelineno-0-1) shape: [OutlinedBorder](https://docs.flet.dev/types/outlinedborder/#flet.OutlinedBorder)  | None = None`

The shape of this card.

Defaults to [`CardTheme.shape`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/cardtheme/#flet.CardTheme.shape)
, or if that is `None`, falls back to `RoundedRectangleBorder(radius=12.0)`.

### show\_border\_on\_foreground `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/card/#flet.Card.show_border_on_foreground "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/card/#__codelineno-0-1) show_border_on_foreground: [bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool)  = True`

Whether the shape of the border should be painted in front of the [`content`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/card/#flet.Card.content)
 or behind.

### variant `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/card/#flet.Card.variant "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/card/#__codelineno-0-1) variant: [CardVariant](https://docs.flet.dev/types/cardvariant/#flet.CardVariant)  = [ELEVATED](https://docs.flet.dev/types/cardvariant/#flet.CardVariant.ELEVATED)`

Defines the card variant to be used.

Back to top

# CupertinoAlertDialog - Flet

 

[Skip to content](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoalertdialog/#flet.CupertinoAlertDialog)

CupertinoAlertDialog
====================

An iOS-style alert dialog.

An alert dialog informs the user about situations that require acknowledgement. An alert dialog has an optional title and an optional list of actions. The title is displayed above the content and the actions are displayed below the content.

Inherits: `[DialogControl](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dialogcontrol/#flet.DialogControl) `

Properties

*   **`[actions](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoalertdialog/#flet.CupertinoAlertDialog.actions) `**(`[list](https://docs.python.org/3/glossary.html#term-list) [[Control](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/control/#flet.Control) ]`) –
    
    A set of actions that are displayed at the bottom of the dialog.
    
*   **`[barrier_color](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoalertdialog/#flet.CupertinoAlertDialog.barrier_color) `**(`[ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None`) –
    
    The color of the modal barrier below this dialog.
    
*   **`[content](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoalertdialog/#flet.CupertinoAlertDialog.content) `**(`[Control](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/control/#flet.Control)  | None`) –
    
    The content of this dialog, displayed in a light font at the center of this dialog.
    
*   **`[inset_animation](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoalertdialog/#flet.CupertinoAlertDialog.inset_animation) `**(`[Animation](https://docs.flet.dev/types/animation/#flet.Animation) `) –
    
    The animation style to be used when the system keyboard intrudes into the space that the dialog is placed in.
    
*   **`[modal](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoalertdialog/#flet.CupertinoAlertDialog.modal) `**(`[bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool) `) –
    
    Whether this dialog cannot be dismissed by clicking the area outside of it.
    
*   **`[title](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoalertdialog/#flet.CupertinoAlertDialog.title) `**(`[StrOrControl](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.StrOrControl)  | None`) –
    
    The title of this dialog, displayed in a large font at the top of this dialog.
    

Examples[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoalertdialog/#examples "Permanent link")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

[Live example](https://flet-controls-gallery.fly.dev/dialogs/cupertinoalertdialog)

### File deletion confirmation[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoalertdialog/#file-deletion-confirmation "Permanent link")

[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoalertdialog/#__codelineno-0-6)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoalertdialog/#__codelineno-0-7)     def handle_dialog_dismissal(e: ft.Event[ft.DialogControl]):        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoalertdialog/#__codelineno-0-8)         page.add(ft.Text("Dialog dismissed")) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoalertdialog/#__codelineno-0-9)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoalertdialog/#__codelineno-0-10)     def handle_action_click(e: ft.Event[ft.CupertinoDialogAction]):        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoalertdialog/#__codelineno-0-11)         page.add(ft.Text(f"Action clicked: {e.control.content}"))        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoalertdialog/#__codelineno-0-12)         page.pop_dialog() [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoalertdialog/#__codelineno-0-13) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoalertdialog/#__codelineno-0-16)         content=ft.Text("Do you want to delete this file?"), [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoalertdialog/#__codelineno-0-26)             ),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoalertdialog/#__codelineno-0-27)         ], ft.CupertinoFilledButton(            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoalertdialog/#__codelineno-0-32)             content="Open CupertinoAlertDialog",
