[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoalertdialog/#__codelineno-1-60)                 ft.AlertDialog(                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoalertdialog/#__codelineno-1-61)                     adaptive=True,                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoalertdialog/#__codelineno-1-62)                     title=ft.Text("Adaptive Alert Dialog"),                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoalertdialog/#__codelineno-1-63)                     content=ft.Text("Do you want to delete this file?"),                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoalertdialog/#__codelineno-1-64)                     actions=(                        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoalertdialog/#__codelineno-1-65)                         cupertino_actions                        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoalertdialog/#__codelineno-1-66)                         if page.platform.is_apple()                        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoalertdialog/#__codelineno-1-67)                         else material_actions                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoalertdialog/#__codelineno-1-68)                     ),                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoalertdialog/#__codelineno-1-69)                 )            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoalertdialog/#__codelineno-1-70)             ),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoalertdialog/#__codelineno-1-71)         ),    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoalertdialog/#__codelineno-1-72)     ) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoalertdialog/#__codelineno-1-73) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoalertdialog/#__codelineno-1-74)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoalertdialog/#__codelineno-1-75) ft.run(main)`

Properties[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoalertdialog/#flet.CupertinoAlertDialog-properties "Permanent link")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### actions `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoalertdialog/#flet.CupertinoAlertDialog.actions "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoalertdialog/#__codelineno-0-1) actions: [list](https://docs.python.org/3/glossary.html#term-list) [[Control](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/control/#flet.Control) ] = [field](https://docs.python.org/3/library/dataclasses.html#dataclasses.field "<code>dataclasses.field</code>") (default_factory=[list](https://docs.python.org/3/glossary.html#term-list) )`

A set of actions that are displayed at the bottom of the dialog.

Typically this is a list of [`CupertinoDialogAction`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodialogaction/#flet.CupertinoDialogAction)
 controls.

### barrier\_color `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoalertdialog/#flet.CupertinoAlertDialog.barrier_color "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoalertdialog/#__codelineno-0-1) barrier_color: [ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None = None`

The color of the modal barrier below this dialog.

If `None`, then [`DialogTheme.barrier_color`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/dialogtheme/#flet.DialogTheme.barrier_color)
 is used. If that is also `None`, the default is `Colors.BLACK_54`.

### content `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoalertdialog/#flet.CupertinoAlertDialog.content "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoalertdialog/#__codelineno-0-1) content: [Control](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/control/#flet.Control)  | None = None`

The content of this dialog, displayed in a light font at the center of this dialog.

Typically a [`Column`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/column/#flet.Column)
 that contains the dialog's [`Text`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/text/#flet.Text)
 message.

### inset\_animation `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoalertdialog/#flet.CupertinoAlertDialog.inset_animation "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoalertdialog/#__codelineno-0-1) inset_animation: [Animation](https://docs.flet.dev/types/animation/#flet.Animation)  = [field](https://docs.python.org/3/library/dataclasses.html#dataclasses.field "<code>dataclasses.field</code>") (     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoalertdialog/#__codelineno-0-2)     default_factory=lambda: [Animation](https://docs.flet.dev/types/animation/#flet.Animation) (        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoalertdialog/#__codelineno-0-3)         curve=[DECELERATE](https://docs.flet.dev/types/animationcurve/#flet.AnimationCurve.DECELERATE) ,        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoalertdialog/#__codelineno-0-4)         duration=[Duration](https://docs.flet.dev/types/duration/#flet.Duration) (milliseconds=100),    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoalertdialog/#__codelineno-0-5)     ) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoalertdialog/#__codelineno-0-6) )`

The animation style to be used when the system keyboard intrudes into the space that the dialog is placed in.

### modal `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoalertdialog/#flet.CupertinoAlertDialog.modal "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoalertdialog/#__codelineno-0-1) modal: [bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool)  = False`

Whether this dialog cannot be dismissed by clicking the area outside of it.

### title `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoalertdialog/#flet.CupertinoAlertDialog.title "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoalertdialog/#__codelineno-0-1) title: [StrOrControl](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.StrOrControl)  | None = None`

The title of this dialog, displayed in a large font at the top of this dialog.

Typically a [`Text`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/text/#flet.Text)
 control.

# CupertinoTimerPicker - Flet

 

[Skip to content](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinotimerpicker/#flet.CupertinoTimerPicker)

CupertinoTimerPicker
====================

A countdown timer picker in iOS style.

It can show a countdown duration with hour, minute and second spinners. The duration is bound between `0` and `23` hours `59` minutes `59` seconds.

Example:

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinotimerpicker/#__codelineno-0-1) ft.CupertinoTimerPicker(value=1000)`

[![CupertinoTimerPicker](https://docs.flet.dev/test-images/examples/cupertino/golden/macos/cupertino_timer_picker/image_for_docs.png)](https://docs.flet.dev/test-images/examples/cupertino/golden/macos/cupertino_timer_picker/image_for_docs.png)

Simple Cupertino timer picker

Inherits: `[LayoutControl](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/layoutcontrol/#flet.LayoutControl) `

Properties

*   **`[alignment](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinotimerpicker/#flet.CupertinoTimerPicker.alignment) `**(`[Alignment](https://docs.flet.dev/types/alignment/#flet.Alignment) `) –
    
    Defines how this picker should be positioned within its parent.
    
*   **`[bgcolor](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinotimerpicker/#flet.CupertinoTimerPicker.bgcolor) `**(`[ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None`) –
    
    The background color of this picker.
    
*   **`[item_extent](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinotimerpicker/#flet.CupertinoTimerPicker.item_extent) `**(`[Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number) `) –
    
    The uniform height of all children.
    
*   **`[minute_interval](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinotimerpicker/#flet.CupertinoTimerPicker.minute_interval) `**(`[int](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#int) `) –
    
    The granularity of the minute spinner.
    
*   **`[mode](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinotimerpicker/#flet.CupertinoTimerPicker.mode) `**(`[CupertinoTimerPickerMode](https://docs.flet.dev/types/cupertinotimerpickermode/#flet.CupertinoTimerPickerMode) `) –
    
    The mode of this picker.
    
*   **`[second_interval](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinotimerpicker/#flet.CupertinoTimerPicker.second_interval) `**(`[int](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#int) `) –
    
    The granularity of the second spinner.
    
*   **`[value](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinotimerpicker/#flet.CupertinoTimerPicker.value) `**(`[DurationValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.DurationValue) `) –
    
    The initial duration of the countdown timer.
    

Events

*   **`[on_change](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinotimerpicker/#flet.CupertinoTimerPicker.on_change) `**(`[ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[CupertinoTimerPicker](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinotimerpicker/#flet.CupertinoTimerPicker) ] | None`) –
    
    Called when the timer's duration changes.
    

Examples[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinotimerpicker/#examples "Permanent link")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

[Live example](https://flet-controls-gallery.fly.dev/dialogs/cupertinotimerpicker)

### Basic Example[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinotimerpicker/#basic-example "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinotimerpicker/#__codelineno-0-1) import time [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinotimerpicker/#__codelineno-0-2)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinotimerpicker/#__codelineno-0-3) import flet as ft [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinotimerpicker/#__codelineno-0-4) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinotimerpicker/#__codelineno-0-5)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinotimerpicker/#__codelineno-0-6) def main(page: ft.Page):     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinotimerpicker/#__codelineno-0-7)     page.horizontal_alignment = ft.CrossAxisAlignment.CENTER [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinotimerpicker/#__codelineno-0-8)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinotimerpicker/#__codelineno-0-9)     timer_value_text = ft.Text(        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinotimerpicker/#__codelineno-0-10)         value="00:01:10",        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinotimerpicker/#__codelineno-0-11)         size=23,        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinotimerpicker/#__codelineno-0-12)         color=ft.CupertinoColors.DESTRUCTIVE_RED,    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinotimerpicker/#__codelineno-0-13)     ) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinotimerpicker/#__codelineno-0-14)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinotimerpicker/#__codelineno-0-15)     def handle_timer_picker_change(e: ft.Event[ft.CupertinoTimerPicker]):        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinotimerpicker/#__codelineno-0-16)         timer_value_text.value = time.strftime("%H:%M:%S", time.gmtime(e.data))        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinotimerpicker/#__codelineno-0-17)         page.update() [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinotimerpicker/#__codelineno-0-18)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinotimerpicker/#__codelineno-0-19)     timer_picker = ft.CupertinoTimerPicker(        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinotimerpicker/#__codelineno-0-20)         value=300,        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinotimerpicker/#__codelineno-0-21)         second_interval=10,        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinotimerpicker/#__codelineno-0-22)         minute_interval=1,        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinotimerpicker/#__codelineno-0-23)         mode=ft.CupertinoTimerPickerMode.HOUR_MINUTE_SECONDS,        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinotimerpicker/#__codelineno-0-24)         on_change=handle_timer_picker_change,    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinotimerpicker/#__codelineno-0-25)     ) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinotimerpicker/#__codelineno-0-26)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinotimerpicker/#__codelineno-0-27)     page.add(        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinotimerpicker/#__codelineno-0-28)         ft.Row(            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinotimerpicker/#__codelineno-0-29)             tight=True,            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinotimerpicker/#__codelineno-0-30)             controls=[                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinotimerpicker/#__codelineno-0-31)                 ft.Text("TimerPicker Value:", size=23),                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinotimerpicker/#__codelineno-0-32)                 ft.CupertinoButton(                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinotimerpicker/#__codelineno-0-33)                     content=timer_value_text,                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinotimerpicker/#__codelineno-0-34)                     on_click=lambda e: page.show_dialog(                        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinotimerpicker/#__codelineno-0-35)                         ft.CupertinoBottomSheet(                            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinotimerpicker/#__codelineno-0-36)                             content=timer_picker,                            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinotimerpicker/#__codelineno-0-37)                             height=216,                            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinotimerpicker/#__codelineno-0-38)                             padding=ft.Padding.only(top=6),                        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinotimerpicker/#__codelineno-0-39)                         )                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinotimerpicker/#__codelineno-0-40)                     ),                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinotimerpicker/#__codelineno-0-41)                 ),            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinotimerpicker/#__codelineno-0-42)             ],        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinotimerpicker/#__codelineno-0-43)         ),    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinotimerpicker/#__codelineno-0-44)     ) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinotimerpicker/#__codelineno-0-45) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinotimerpicker/#__codelineno-0-46)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinotimerpicker/#__codelineno-0-47) if __name__ == "__main__":     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinotimerpicker/#__codelineno-0-48)     ft.run(main)`

[![basic](https://docs.flet.dev/examples/controls/cupertino_timer_picker/media/basic.gif)](https://docs.flet.dev/examples/controls/cupertino_timer_picker/media/basic.gif)

Properties[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinotimerpicker/#flet.CupertinoTimerPicker-properties "Permanent link")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### alignment `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinotimerpicker/#flet.CupertinoTimerPicker.alignment "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinotimerpicker/#__codelineno-0-1) alignment: [Alignment](https://docs.flet.dev/types/alignment/#flet.Alignment)  = [field](https://docs.python.org/3/library/dataclasses.html#dataclasses.field "<code>dataclasses.field</code>") (default_factory=lambda: [CENTER](https://docs.flet.dev/types/alignment/#flet.Alignment.CENTER) )`

Defines how this picker should be positioned within its parent.

### bgcolor `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinotimerpicker/#flet.CupertinoTimerPicker.bgcolor "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinotimerpicker/#__codelineno-0-1) bgcolor: [ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None = None`

The background color of this picker.

### item\_extent `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinotimerpicker/#flet.CupertinoTimerPicker.item_extent "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinotimerpicker/#__codelineno-0-1) item_extent: [Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  = 32.0`

The uniform height of all children.

Raises:

*   `[ValueError](https://docs.python.org/3/library/exceptions.html#ValueError) ` –
    
    If it is not strictly greater than `0.0`.
    

### minute\_interval `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinotimerpicker/#flet.CupertinoTimerPicker.minute_interval "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinotimerpicker/#__codelineno-0-1) minute_interval: [int](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#int)  = 1`

The granularity of the minute spinner.

Raises:

*   `[ValueError](https://docs.python.org/3/library/exceptions.html#ValueError) ` –
    
    If it is not strictly greater than `0`.
    
*   `[ValueError](https://docs.python.org/3/library/exceptions.html#ValueError) ` –
    
    If it is not a factor of `60`.
    

### mode `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinotimerpicker/#flet.CupertinoTimerPicker.mode "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinotimerpicker/#__codelineno-0-1) mode: [CupertinoTimerPickerMode](https://docs.flet.dev/types/cupertinotimerpickermode/#flet.CupertinoTimerPickerMode)  = [HOUR_MINUTE_SECONDS](https://docs.flet.dev/types/cupertinotimerpickermode/#flet.CupertinoTimerPickerMode.HOUR_MINUTE_SECONDS)`

The mode of this picker.

### second\_interval `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinotimerpicker/#flet.CupertinoTimerPicker.second_interval "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinotimerpicker/#__codelineno-0-1) second_interval: [int](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#int)  = 1`

The granularity of the second spinner.

Raises:

*   `[ValueError](https://docs.python.org/3/library/exceptions.html#ValueError) ` –
    
    If it is not strictly greater than `0`.
    
*   `[ValueError](https://docs.python.org/3/library/exceptions.html#ValueError) ` –
    
    If it is not a factor of `60`.
    

### value `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinotimerpicker/#flet.CupertinoTimerPicker.value "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinotimerpicker/#__codelineno-0-1) value: [DurationValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.DurationValue)  = [field](https://docs.python.org/3/library/dataclasses.html#dataclasses.field "<code>dataclasses.field</code>") (     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinotimerpicker/#__codelineno-0-2)     default_factory=lambda: [Duration](https://docs.flet.dev/types/duration/#flet.Duration) () [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinotimerpicker/#__codelineno-0-3) )`

The initial duration of the countdown timer.

If specified as an integer, it will be assumed to be in seconds.

Raises:

*   `[ValueError](https://docs.python.org/3/library/exceptions.html#ValueError) ` –
    
    If it is not greater than or equal to `0`.
    
*   `[ValueError](https://docs.python.org/3/library/exceptions.html#ValueError) ` –
    
    If it is not strictly less than `24` hours.
    
*   `[ValueError](https://docs.python.org/3/library/exceptions.html#ValueError) ` –
    
    If it is not a multiple of [`minute_interval`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinotimerpicker/#flet.CupertinoTimerPicker.minute_interval)
    .
    
*   `[ValueError](https://docs.python.org/3/library/exceptions.html#ValueError) ` –
    
    If it is not a multiple of [`second_interval`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinotimerpicker/#flet.CupertinoTimerPicker.second_interval)
    .
    

Events[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinotimerpicker/#flet.CupertinoTimerPicker-events "Permanent link")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### on\_change `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinotimerpicker/#flet.CupertinoTimerPicker.on_change "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinotimerpicker/#__codelineno-0-1) on_change: (     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinotimerpicker/#__codelineno-0-2)     [ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[CupertinoTimerPicker](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinotimerpicker/#flet.CupertinoTimerPicker) ] | None [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinotimerpicker/#__codelineno-0-3) ) = None`

Called when the timer's duration changes.

The [`data`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/event/#flet.Event.data)
 property of the event handler contains the new duration value. Its type matches [`value`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinotimerpicker/#flet.CupertinoTimerPicker.value)
: if `value` is a `Duration`, then `data` is also a `Duration`; otherwise, it is an `int` (seconds).

Back to top

---

# BottomSheet - Flet

 

[Skip to content](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#flet.BottomSheet)

BottomSheet
===========

A modal bottom sheet.

Displays a temporary surface anchored to the bottom of the screen that presents supplemental content or actions. Prevents interaction with the underlying app while visible.

Example:

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#__codelineno-0-1) sheet = ft.BottomSheet(     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#__codelineno-0-2)     content=ft.Column(        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#__codelineno-0-3)         width=150,        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#__codelineno-0-4)         alignment=ft.MainAxisAlignment.CENTER,        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#__codelineno-0-5)         horizontal_alignment=ft.CrossAxisAlignment.CENTER,        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#__codelineno-0-6)         controls=[            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#__codelineno-0-7)             ft.Text("Choose an option"),            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#__codelineno-0-8)             ft.TextButton("Dismiss"),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#__codelineno-0-9)         ],    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#__codelineno-0-10)     ) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#__codelineno-0-11) ) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#__codelineno-0-12) page.show_dialog(sheet)`

[![BottomSheet](https://docs.flet.dev/test-images/examples/material/golden/macos/bottom_sheet/image_for_docs.png)](https://docs.flet.dev/test-images/examples/material/golden/macos/bottom_sheet/image_for_docs.png)

Basic BottomSheet

Inherits: `[DialogControl](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dialogcontrol/#flet.DialogControl) `

Properties

*   **`[animation_style](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#flet.BottomSheet.animation_style) `**(`[AnimationStyle](https://docs.flet.dev/types/animationstyle/#flet.AnimationStyle)  | None`) –
    
    The animation style of this bottom sheet.
    
*   **`[barrier_color](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#flet.BottomSheet.barrier_color) `**(`[ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None`) –
    
    The color of the scrim that obscures content behind this bottom sheet.
    
*   **`[bgcolor](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#flet.BottomSheet.bgcolor) `**(`[ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None`) –
    
    The background color of this bottom sheet.
    
*   **`[clip_behavior](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#flet.BottomSheet.clip_behavior) `**(`[ClipBehavior](https://docs.flet.dev/types/clipbehavior/#flet.ClipBehavior)  | None`) –
    
    Defines how the content of this bottom sheet should be clipped.
    
*   **`[content](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#flet.BottomSheet.content) `**(`[Control](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/control/#flet.Control) `) –
    
    The content of this bottom sheet.
    
*   **`[dismissible](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#flet.BottomSheet.dismissible) `**(`[bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool) `) –
    
    Specifies whether this bottom sheet will be dismissed when user taps on the scrim.
    
*   **`[draggable](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#flet.BottomSheet.draggable) `**(`[bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool) `) –
    
    Specifies whether this bottom sheet can be dragged up and down and dismissed by swiping downwards.
    
*   **`[elevation](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#flet.BottomSheet.elevation) `**(`[Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  | None`) –
    
    Defines the size of the shadow below this bottom sheet.
    
*   **`[fullscreen](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#flet.BottomSheet.fullscreen) `**(`[bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool) `) –
    
    Expands the sheet to fill the window/page height.
    
*   **`[maintain_bottom_view_insets_padding](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#flet.BottomSheet.maintain_bottom_view_insets_padding) `**(`[bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool) `) –
    
    Adds a padding at the bottom to avoid obstructing this bottom sheet's [`content`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#flet.BottomSheet.content)
     with on-screen keyboard or other system elements.
    
*   **`[scrollable](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#flet.BottomSheet.scrollable) `**(`[bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool) `) –
    
    Removes the half-height cap so the sheet can grow with its content.
    
*   **`[shape](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#flet.BottomSheet.shape) `**(`[OutlinedBorder](https://docs.flet.dev/types/outlinedborder/#flet.OutlinedBorder)  | None`) –
    
    Defines the shape of this bottom sheet.
    
*   **`[show_drag_handle](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#flet.BottomSheet.show_drag_handle) `**(`[bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool) `) –
    
    Whether to display drag handle at the top of sheet or not.
    
*   **`[size_constraints](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#flet.BottomSheet.size_constraints) `**(`[BoxConstraints](https://docs.flet.dev/types/boxconstraints/#flet.BoxConstraints)  | None`) –
    
    The size constraints to apply to this bottom sheet.
    
*   **`[use_safe_area](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#flet.BottomSheet.use_safe_area) `**(`[bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool) `) –
    
    Specifies whether the sheet will avoid system intrusions on the top, left, and right.
    

Examples[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#examples "Permanent link")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------

[Live example](https://flet-controls-gallery.fly.dev/dialogs/bottomsheet)

### Basic example[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#basic-example "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#__codelineno-0-1) import flet as ft [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#__codelineno-0-2) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#__codelineno-0-3)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#__codelineno-0-4) def main(page: ft.Page):     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#__codelineno-0-5)     page.title = "BottomSheet Example"    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#__codelineno-0-6)     page.horizontal_alignment = ft.CrossAxisAlignment.CENTER [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#__codelineno-0-7)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#__codelineno-0-8)     def handle_sheet_dismissal(e: ft.Event[ft.DialogControl]):        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#__codelineno-0-9)         page.add(ft.Text("Bottom sheet dismissed")) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#__codelineno-0-10)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#__codelineno-0-11)     sheet = ft.BottomSheet(        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#__codelineno-0-12)         on_dismiss=handle_sheet_dismissal,        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#__codelineno-0-13)         content=ft.Container(            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#__codelineno-0-14)             padding=50,            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#__codelineno-0-15)             content=ft.Column(                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#__codelineno-0-16)                 horizontal_alignment=ft.CrossAxisAlignment.CENTER,                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#__codelineno-0-17)                 tight=True,                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#__codelineno-0-18)                 controls=[                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#__codelineno-0-19)                     ft.Text("Here is a bottom sheet!"),                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#__codelineno-0-20)                     ft.Button("Dismiss", on_click=lambda _: page.pop_dialog()),                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#__codelineno-0-21)                 ],            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#__codelineno-0-22)             ),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#__codelineno-0-23)         ),    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#__codelineno-0-24)     ) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#__codelineno-0-25)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#__codelineno-0-26)     page.add(        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#__codelineno-0-27)         ft.Button(            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#__codelineno-0-28)             content="Display bottom sheet",            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#__codelineno-0-29)             on_click=lambda e: page.show_dialog(sheet),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#__codelineno-0-30)         )    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#__codelineno-0-31)     ) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#__codelineno-0-32) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#__codelineno-0-33)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#__codelineno-0-34) if __name__ == "__main__":     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#__codelineno-0-35)     ft.run(main)`

[![basic.gif](https://docs.flet.dev/test-images/examples/material/golden/macos/bottom_sheet/basic.gif)](https://docs.flet.dev/test-images/examples/material/golden/macos/bottom_sheet/basic.gif)

### Fullscreen[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#fullscreen "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#__codelineno-1-1) import flet as ft [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#__codelineno-1-2) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#__codelineno-1-3)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#__codelineno-1-4) def main(page: ft.Page):     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#__codelineno-1-5)     page.horizontal_alignment = ft.CrossAxisAlignment.CENTER [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#__codelineno-1-6)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#__codelineno-1-7)     def handle_switch_change(e: ft.Event[ft.Switch]):        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#__codelineno-1-8)         sheet.fullscreen = e.control.value [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#__codelineno-1-9)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#__codelineno-1-10)     sheet = ft.BottomSheet(        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#__codelineno-1-11)         fullscreen=True,        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#__codelineno-1-12)         show_drag_handle=True,        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#__codelineno-1-13)         content=ft.Container(            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#__codelineno-1-14)             padding=ft.Padding.all(10),            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#__codelineno-1-15)             content=ft.Column(                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#__codelineno-1-16)                 horizontal_alignment=ft.CrossAxisAlignment.CENTER,                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#__codelineno-1-17)                 controls=[                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#__codelineno-1-18)                     ft.Text("This is bottom sheet's content!"),                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#__codelineno-1-19)                     ft.Button("Close bottom sheet", on_click=lambda: page.pop_dialog()),                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#__codelineno-1-20)                 ],            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#__codelineno-1-21)             ),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#__codelineno-1-22)         ),    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#__codelineno-1-23)     ) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#__codelineno-1-24)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#__codelineno-1-25)     page.add(        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#__codelineno-1-26)         ft.Button(            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#__codelineno-1-27)             content="Display bottom sheet",            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#__codelineno-1-28)             on_click=lambda e: page.show_dialog(sheet),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#__codelineno-1-29)         ),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#__codelineno-1-30)         ft.Switch(value=True, label="Fullscreen", on_change=handle_switch_change),    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#__codelineno-1-31)     ) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#__codelineno-1-32) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#__codelineno-1-33)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#__codelineno-1-34) if __name__ == "__main__":     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#__codelineno-1-35)     ft.run(main)`

[![fullscreen.gif](https://docs.flet.dev/test-images/examples/material/golden/macos/bottom_sheet/fullscreen.gif)](https://docs.flet.dev/test-images/examples/material/golden/macos/bottom_sheet/fullscreen.gif)

Properties[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#flet.BottomSheet-properties "Permanent link")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### animation\_style `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#flet.BottomSheet.animation_style "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#__codelineno-0-1) animation_style: [AnimationStyle](https://docs.flet.dev/types/animationstyle/#flet.AnimationStyle)  | None = None`

The animation style of this bottom sheet.

### barrier\_color `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#flet.BottomSheet.barrier_color "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#__codelineno-0-1) barrier_color: [ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None = None`

The color of the scrim that obscures content behind this bottom sheet.

### bgcolor `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#flet.BottomSheet.bgcolor "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#__codelineno-0-1) bgcolor: [ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None = None`

The background color of this bottom sheet.

### clip\_behavior `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#flet.BottomSheet.clip_behavior "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#__codelineno-0-1) clip_behavior: [ClipBehavior](https://docs.flet.dev/types/clipbehavior/#flet.ClipBehavior)  | None = None`

Defines how the content of this bottom sheet should be clipped.

### content `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#flet.BottomSheet.content "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#__codelineno-0-1) content: [Control](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/control/#flet.Control)`

The content of this bottom sheet.

Tip

Set [`scrollable`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#flet.BottomSheet.scrollable)
 `True` if this content is or contains scrollable controls (e.g., [`ListView`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/listview/#flet.ListView)
, [`GridView`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/gridview/#flet.GridView)
) or you plan to `expand` the [`content`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#flet.BottomSheet.content)
 or give it a custom height, else the bottom sheet might ignore the custom height and stop around mid-screen.

### dismissible `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#flet.BottomSheet.dismissible "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#__codelineno-0-1) dismissible: [bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool)  = True`

Specifies whether this bottom sheet will be dismissed when user taps on the scrim.

### draggable `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#flet.BottomSheet.draggable "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#__codelineno-0-1) draggable: [bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool)  = False`

Specifies whether this bottom sheet can be dragged up and down and dismissed by swiping downwards.

### elevation `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#flet.BottomSheet.elevation "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#__codelineno-0-1) elevation: [Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  | None = None`

Defines the size of the shadow below this bottom sheet.

Raises:

*   `[ValueError](https://docs.python.org/3/library/exceptions.html#ValueError) ` –
    
    If it is not greater than or equal to `0`.
    

### fullscreen `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#flet.BottomSheet.fullscreen "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#__codelineno-0-1) fullscreen: [bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool)  = False`

Expands the sheet to fill the window/page height.

If set to `True`, [`scrollable`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#flet.BottomSheet.scrollable)
 is internally set to `True` equally, so the sheet can grow freely to fill the page.

### maintain\_bottom\_view\_insets\_padding `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#flet.BottomSheet.maintain_bottom_view_insets_padding "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#__codelineno-0-1) maintain_bottom_view_insets_padding: [bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool)  = True`

Adds a padding at the bottom to avoid obstructing this bottom sheet's [`content`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#flet.BottomSheet.content)
 with on-screen keyboard or other system elements.

### scrollable `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#flet.BottomSheet.scrollable "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#__codelineno-0-1) scrollable: [bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool)  = False`

Removes the half-height cap so the sheet can grow with its content.

Set this to `True` whenever the sheet body contains scrollable controls (e.g., [`ListView`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/listview/#flet.ListView)
, [`GridView`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/gridview/#flet.GridView)
) or you plan to `expand` the [`content`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#flet.BottomSheet.content)
 or give it a custom height, else the bottom sheet might ignore the custom height and stop around mid-screen.

### shape `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#flet.BottomSheet.shape "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#__codelineno-0-1) shape: [OutlinedBorder](https://docs.flet.dev/types/outlinedborder/#flet.OutlinedBorder)  | None = None`

Defines the shape of this bottom sheet.

### show\_drag\_handle `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#flet.BottomSheet.show_drag_handle "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#__codelineno-0-1) show_drag_handle: [bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool)  = False`

Whether to display drag handle at the top of sheet or not.

### size\_constraints `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#flet.BottomSheet.size_constraints "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#__codelineno-0-1) size_constraints: [BoxConstraints](https://docs.flet.dev/types/boxconstraints/#flet.BoxConstraints)  | None = None`

The size constraints to apply to this bottom sheet.

### use\_safe\_area `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#flet.BottomSheet.use_safe_area "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomsheet/#__codelineno-0-1) use_safe_area: [bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool)  = True`

Specifies whether the sheet will avoid system intrusions on the top, left, and right.

Back to top

# CupertinoRadio - Flet

 

[Skip to content](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoradio/#flet.CupertinoRadio)

CupertinoRadio
==============

A macOS-styled radio button, allowing the user to select a single option from two or more choices.

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoradio/#__codelineno-0-1) ft.RadioGroup(     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoradio/#__codelineno-0-2)     value="option_2",    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoradio/#__codelineno-0-3)     content=ft.Column(        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoradio/#__codelineno-0-4)         intrinsic_width=True,        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoradio/#__codelineno-0-5)         controls=[            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoradio/#__codelineno-0-6)             ft.CupertinoRadio(value="option_1", label="Option 1"),            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoradio/#__codelineno-0-7)             ft.CupertinoRadio(value="option_2", label="Option 2"),            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoradio/#__codelineno-0-8)             ft.CupertinoRadio(value="option_3", label="Option 3"),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoradio/#__codelineno-0-9)         ],    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoradio/#__codelineno-0-10)     ), [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoradio/#__codelineno-0-11) )`

[![CupertinoRadio](https://docs.flet.dev/test-images/examples/cupertino/golden/macos/cupertino_radio/image_for_docs.png)](https://docs.flet.dev/test-images/examples/cupertino/golden/macos/cupertino_radio/image_for_docs.png)

Basic CupertinoRadios

Inherits: `[LayoutControl](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/layoutcontrol/#flet.LayoutControl) `

Properties

*   **`[active_color](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoradio/#flet.CupertinoRadio.active_color) `**(`[ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None`) –
    
    The color used to fill this radio when it is selected.
    
*   **`[autofocus](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoradio/#flet.CupertinoRadio.autofocus) `**(`[bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool) `) –
    
    Whether this radio will be selected as the initial focus.
    
*   **`[fill_color](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoradio/#flet.CupertinoRadio.fill_color) `**(`[ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None`) –
    
    The color that fills this radio.
    
*   **`[focus_color](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoradio/#flet.CupertinoRadio.focus_color) `**(`[ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None`) –
    
    The color for the radio's border when it has the input focus.
    
*   **`[inactive_color](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoradio/#flet.CupertinoRadio.inactive_color) `**(`[ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None`) –
    
    The color used to fill this radio when it is not selected.
    
*   **`[label](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoradio/#flet.CupertinoRadio.label) `**(`[str](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str)  | None`) –
    
    The clickable label to display on the right of this radio.
    
*   **`[label_position](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoradio/#flet.CupertinoRadio.label_position) `**(`[LabelPosition](https://docs.flet.dev/types/labelposition/#flet.LabelPosition) `) –
    
    The position of the label relative to this radio.
    
*   **`[mouse_cursor](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoradio/#flet.CupertinoRadio.mouse_cursor) `**(`[MouseCursor](https://docs.flet.dev/types/mousecursor/#flet.MouseCursor)  | None`) –
    
    The cursor for a mouse pointer when it enters or is hovering over this radio.
    
*   **`[toggleable](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoradio/#flet.CupertinoRadio.toggleable) `**(`[bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool) `) –
    
    Whether this radio button can return to an indeterminate state by selecting it again when already selected.
    
*   **`[use_checkmark_style](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoradio/#flet.CupertinoRadio.use_checkmark_style) `**(`[bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool) `) –
    
    Whether the radio displays in a checkbox style instead of the default radio style.
    
*   **`[value](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoradio/#flet.CupertinoRadio.value) `**(`[str](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str) `) –
    
    The value to set to [`RadioGroup`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radiogroup/#flet.RadioGroup)
     ancestor/parent when this radio is selected.
    

Events

*   **`[on_blur](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoradio/#flet.CupertinoRadio.on_blur) `**(`[ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[CupertinoRadio](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoradio/#flet.CupertinoRadio) ] | None`) –
    
    Called when this radio has lost focus.
    
*   **`[on_focus](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoradio/#flet.CupertinoRadio.on_focus) `**(`[ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[CupertinoRadio](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoradio/#flet.CupertinoRadio) ] | None`) –
    
    Called when this radio has received focus.
    

Examples[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoradio/#examples "Permanent link")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

[Live example](https://flet-controls-gallery.fly.dev/input/cupertinoradio)

### Cupertino, Material and Adaptive Radios[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoradio/#cupertino-material-and-adaptive-radios "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoradio/#__codelineno-0-1) import flet as ft [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoradio/#__codelineno-0-2) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoradio/#__codelineno-0-3)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoradio/#__codelineno-0-4) def main(page: ft.Page):     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoradio/#__codelineno-0-5)     def handle_button_click(e: ft.Event[ft.Button]):        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoradio/#__codelineno-0-6)         message.value = f"Your favorite color is:  {group.value}"        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoradio/#__codelineno-0-7)         page.update() [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoradio/#__codelineno-0-8)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoradio/#__codelineno-0-9)     page.add(        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoradio/#__codelineno-0-10)         ft.Text("Select your favorite color:"),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoradio/#__codelineno-0-11)         group := ft.RadioGroup(            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoradio/#__codelineno-0-12)             content=ft.Column(                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoradio/#__codelineno-0-13)                 controls=[                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoradio/#__codelineno-0-14)                     ft.CupertinoRadio(                        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoradio/#__codelineno-0-15)                         value="red",                        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoradio/#__codelineno-0-16)                         label="Red - Cupertino Radio",                        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoradio/#__codelineno-0-17)                         active_color=ft.Colors.RED,                        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoradio/#__codelineno-0-18)                         inactive_color=ft.Colors.RED,                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoradio/#__codelineno-0-19)                     ),                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoradio/#__codelineno-0-20)                     ft.Radio(                        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoradio/#__codelineno-0-21)                         value="green",                        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoradio/#__codelineno-0-22)                         label="Green - Material Radio",                        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoradio/#__codelineno-0-23)                         fill_color=ft.Colors.GREEN,                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoradio/#__codelineno-0-24)                     ),                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoradio/#__codelineno-0-25)                     ft.Radio(                        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoradio/#__codelineno-0-26)                         value="blue",                        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoradio/#__codelineno-0-27)                         label="Blue - Adaptive Radio",                        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoradio/#__codelineno-0-28)                         adaptive=True,                        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoradio/#__codelineno-0-29)                         active_color=ft.Colors.BLUE,                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoradio/#__codelineno-0-30)                     ),                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoradio/#__codelineno-0-31)                 ]            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoradio/#__codelineno-0-32)             )        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoradio/#__codelineno-0-33)         ),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoradio/#__codelineno-0-34)         ft.Button(content="Submit", on_click=handle_button_click),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoradio/#__codelineno-0-35)         message := ft.Text(),    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoradio/#__codelineno-0-36)     ) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoradio/#__codelineno-0-37) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoradio/#__codelineno-0-38)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoradio/#__codelineno-0-39) ft.run(main)`

[![cupertino-material-and-adaptive](https://docs.flet.dev/examples/controls/cupertino_radio/media/cupertino_material_and_adaptive.png)](https://docs.flet.dev/examples/controls/cupertino_radio/media/cupertino_material_and_adaptive.png)

Properties[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoradio/#flet.CupertinoRadio-properties "Permanent link")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### active\_color `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoradio/#flet.CupertinoRadio.active_color "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoradio/#__codelineno-0-1) active_color: [ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None = [PRIMARY](https://docs.flet.dev/types/colors/#flet.Colors.PRIMARY)`

The color used to fill this radio when it is selected.

### autofocus `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoradio/#flet.CupertinoRadio.autofocus "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoradio/#__codelineno-0-1) autofocus: [bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool)  = False`

Whether this radio will be selected as the initial focus.

If there is more than one control on a page with autofocus set, then the first one added to the page will get focus.

### fill\_color `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoradio/#flet.CupertinoRadio.fill_color "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoradio/#__codelineno-0-1) fill_color: [ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None = None`

The color that fills this radio.

### focus\_color `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoradio/#flet.CupertinoRadio.focus_color "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoradio/#__codelineno-0-1) focus_color: [ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None = None`

The color for the radio's border when it has the input focus.

### inactive\_color `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoradio/#flet.CupertinoRadio.inactive_color "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoradio/#__codelineno-0-1) inactive_color: [ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None = None`

The color used to fill this radio when it is not selected.

### label `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoradio/#flet.CupertinoRadio.label "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoradio/#__codelineno-0-1) label: [str](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str)  | None = None`

The clickable label to display on the right of this radio.

### label\_position `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoradio/#flet.CupertinoRadio.label_position "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoradio/#__codelineno-0-1) label_position: [LabelPosition](https://docs.flet.dev/types/labelposition/#flet.LabelPosition)  = [RIGHT](https://docs.flet.dev/types/labelposition/#flet.LabelPosition.RIGHT)`

The position of the label relative to this radio.

### mouse\_cursor `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoradio/#flet.CupertinoRadio.mouse_cursor "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoradio/#__codelineno-0-1) mouse_cursor: [MouseCursor](https://docs.flet.dev/types/mousecursor/#flet.MouseCursor)  | None = None`

The cursor for a mouse pointer when it enters or is hovering over this radio.

### toggleable `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoradio/#flet.CupertinoRadio.toggleable "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoradio/#__codelineno-0-1) toggleable: [bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool)  = False`

Whether this radio button can return to an indeterminate state by selecting it again when already selected.

### use\_checkmark\_style `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoradio/#flet.CupertinoRadio.use_checkmark_style "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoradio/#__codelineno-0-1) use_checkmark_style: [bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool)  = False`

Whether the radio displays in a checkbox style instead of the default radio style.

### value `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoradio/#flet.CupertinoRadio.value "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoradio/#__codelineno-0-1) value: [str](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str)  = ''`

The value to set to [`RadioGroup`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radiogroup/#flet.RadioGroup)
 ancestor/parent when this radio is selected.

Events[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoradio/#flet.CupertinoRadio-events "Permanent link")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### on\_blur `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoradio/#flet.CupertinoRadio.on_blur "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoradio/#__codelineno-0-1) on_blur: [ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[CupertinoRadio](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoradio/#flet.CupertinoRadio) ] | None = None`

Called when this radio has lost focus.

### on\_focus `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoradio/#flet.CupertinoRadio.on_focus "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoradio/#__codelineno-0-1) on_focus: [ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[CupertinoRadio](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoradio/#flet.CupertinoRadio) ] | None = None`

Called when this radio has received focus.

# CupertinoSlider - Flet

 

[Skip to content](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslider/#flet.CupertinoSlider)

CupertinoSlider
===============

An iOS-type slider.

It provides a visual indication of adjustable content, as well as the current setting in the total range of content.

Use a slider when you want people to set defined values (such as volume or brightness), or when people would benefit from instant feedback on the effect of setting changes.

Example:

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslider/#__codelineno-0-1) ft.CupertinoSlider(value=0.6)`

[![CupertinoSlider](https://docs.flet.dev/test-images/examples/cupertino/golden/macos/cupertino_slider/image_for_docs.png)](https://docs.flet.dev/test-images/examples/cupertino/golden/macos/cupertino_slider/image_for_docs.png)

Basic CupertinoSlider

Inherits: `[LayoutControl](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/layoutcontrol/#flet.LayoutControl) `

Properties

*   **`[active_color](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslider/#flet.CupertinoSlider.active_color) `**(`[ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None`) –
    
    The color to use for the portion of the slider track that is active.
    
*   **`[divisions](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslider/#flet.CupertinoSlider.divisions) `**(`[int](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#int)  | None`) –
    
    The number of discrete divisions.
    
*   **`[max](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslider/#flet.CupertinoSlider.max) `**(`[Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number) `) –
    
    The maximum value the user can select.
    
*   **`[min](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslider/#flet.CupertinoSlider.min) `**(`[Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number) `) –
    
    The minimum value the user can select.
    
*   **`[thumb_color](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslider/#flet.CupertinoSlider.thumb_color) `**(`[ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None`) –
    
    The color of this slider's thumb.
    
*   **`[value](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslider/#flet.CupertinoSlider.value) `**(`[Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  | None`) –
    
    The currently selected value for this slider.
    

Events

*   **`[on_blur](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslider/#flet.CupertinoSlider.on_blur) `**(`[ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[CupertinoSlider](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslider/#flet.CupertinoSlider) ] | None`) –
    
    Called when this slider has lost focus.
    
*   **`[on_change](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslider/#flet.CupertinoSlider.on_change) `**(`[ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[CupertinoSlider](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslider/#flet.CupertinoSlider) ] | None`) –
    
    Called when the state of this slider changed.
    
*   **`[on_change_end](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslider/#flet.CupertinoSlider.on_change_end) `**(`[ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[CupertinoSlider](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslider/#flet.CupertinoSlider) ] | None`) –
    
    Called when the user is done selecting a new value for this slider.
    
*   **`[on_change_start](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslider/#flet.CupertinoSlider.on_change_start) `**(`[ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[CupertinoSlider](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslider/#flet.CupertinoSlider) ] | None`) –
    
    Called when the user starts selecting a new value for this slider.
    
*   **`[on_focus](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslider/#flet.CupertinoSlider.on_focus) `**(`[ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[CupertinoSlider](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslider/#flet.CupertinoSlider) ] | None`) –
    
    Called when this slider has received focus.
    

Examples[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslider/#examples "Permanent link")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

[Live example](https://flet-controls-gallery.fly.dev/input/cupertinoslider)

### Handling events[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslider/#handling-events "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslider/#__codelineno-0-1) import flet as ft [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslider/#__codelineno-0-2) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslider/#__codelineno-0-3)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslider/#__codelineno-0-4) def main(page: ft.Page):     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslider/#__codelineno-0-5)     page.horizontal_alignment = ft.CrossAxisAlignment.CENTER    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslider/#__codelineno-0-6)     page.vertical_alignment = ft.MainAxisAlignment.CENTER    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslider/#__codelineno-0-7)     page.theme_mode = ft.ThemeMode.LIGHT [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslider/#__codelineno-0-8)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslider/#__codelineno-0-9)     def handle_change_start(e: ft.Event[ft.CupertinoSlider]):        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslider/#__codelineno-0-10)         slider_status.value = "Sliding"        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslider/#__codelineno-0-11)         page.update() [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslider/#__codelineno-0-12)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslider/#__codelineno-0-13)     def handle_change(e: ft.Event[ft.CupertinoSlider]):        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslider/#__codelineno-0-14)         slider_value.value = str(e.control.value)        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslider/#__codelineno-0-15)         page.update() [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslider/#__codelineno-0-16)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslider/#__codelineno-0-17)     def handle_change_end(e: ft.Event[ft.CupertinoSlider]):        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslider/#__codelineno-0-18)         slider_status.value = "Finished sliding"        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslider/#__codelineno-0-19)         page.update() [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslider/#__codelineno-0-20)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslider/#__codelineno-0-21)     page.add(        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslider/#__codelineno-0-22)         slider_value := ft.Text("0.0"),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslider/#__codelineno-0-23)         ft.CupertinoSlider(            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslider/#__codelineno-0-24)             divisions=20,            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslider/#__codelineno-0-25)             min=0,            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslider/#__codelineno-0-26)             max=100,            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslider/#__codelineno-0-27)             active_color=ft.Colors.PURPLE,            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslider/#__codelineno-0-28)             thumb_color=ft.Colors.PURPLE,            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslider/#__codelineno-0-29)             on_change_start=handle_change_start,            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslider/#__codelineno-0-30)             on_change_end=handle_change_end,            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslider/#__codelineno-0-31)             on_change=handle_change,        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslider/#__codelineno-0-32)         ),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslider/#__codelineno-0-33)         slider_status := ft.Text(),    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslider/#__codelineno-0-34)     ) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslider/#__codelineno-0-35) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslider/#__codelineno-0-36)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslider/#__codelineno-0-37) ft.run(main)`

[![handling-events](https://docs.flet.dev/examples/controls/cupertino_slider/media/handling_events.gif)](https://docs.flet.dev/examples/controls/cupertino_slider/media/handling_events.gif)

Properties[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslider/#flet.CupertinoSlider-properties "Permanent link")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### active\_color `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslider/#flet.CupertinoSlider.active_color "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslider/#__codelineno-0-1) active_color: [ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None = None`

The color to use for the portion of the slider track that is active.

The "active" side of the slider is the side between the thumb and the minimum value.

### divisions `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslider/#flet.CupertinoSlider.divisions "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslider/#__codelineno-0-1) divisions: [int](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#int)  | None = None`

The number of discrete divisions.

If `None`, the slider is continuous.

### max `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslider/#flet.CupertinoSlider.max "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslider/#__codelineno-0-1) max: [Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  = 1.0`

The maximum value the user can select.

If [`min`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslider/#flet.CupertinoSlider.min)
 is equal to the `max`, then this slider is disabled.

Raises:

*   `[ValueError](https://docs.python.org/3/library/exceptions.html#ValueError) ` –
    
    If it is not greater than or equal to [`min`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslider/#flet.CupertinoSlider.min)
    .
    
*   `[ValueError](https://docs.python.org/3/library/exceptions.html#ValueError) ` –
    
    If it is not greater than or equal to [`value`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslider/#flet.CupertinoSlider.value)
    , when [`value`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslider/#flet.CupertinoSlider.value)
     is set.
    

### min `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslider/#flet.CupertinoSlider.min "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslider/#__codelineno-0-1) min: [Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  = 0.0`

The minimum value the user can select.

If [`max`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslider/#flet.CupertinoSlider.max)
 is equal to the `min`, then this slider is disabled.

Raises:

*   `[ValueError](https://docs.python.org/3/library/exceptions.html#ValueError) ` –
    
    If it is not less than or equal to [`max`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslider/#flet.CupertinoSlider.max)
    .
    
*   `[ValueError](https://docs.python.org/3/library/exceptions.html#ValueError) ` –
    
    If it is not less than or equal to [`value`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslider/#flet.CupertinoSlider.value)
    , when [`value`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslider/#flet.CupertinoSlider.value)
     is set.
    

### thumb\_color `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslider/#flet.CupertinoSlider.thumb_color "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslider/#__codelineno-0-1) thumb_color: [ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None = None`

The color of this slider's thumb.

### value `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslider/#flet.CupertinoSlider.value "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslider/#__codelineno-0-1) value: [Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  | None = None`

The currently selected value for this slider.

The slider's thumb is drawn at a position that corresponds to this value.

Raises:

*   `[ValueError](https://docs.python.org/3/library/exceptions.html#ValueError) ` –
    
    If it is not greater than or equal to [`min`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslider/#flet.CupertinoSlider.min)
    .
    
*   `[ValueError](https://docs.python.org/3/library/exceptions.html#ValueError) ` –
    
    If it is not less than or equal to [`max`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslider/#flet.CupertinoSlider.max)
    .
    

Events[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslider/#flet.CupertinoSlider-events "Permanent link")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### on\_blur `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslider/#flet.CupertinoSlider.on_blur "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslider/#__codelineno-0-1) on_blur: [ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[CupertinoSlider](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslider/#flet.CupertinoSlider) ] | None = None`

Called when this slider has lost focus.

### on\_change `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslider/#flet.CupertinoSlider.on_change "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslider/#__codelineno-0-1) on_change: [ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[CupertinoSlider](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslider/#flet.CupertinoSlider) ] | None = (     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslider/#__codelineno-0-2)     None [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslider/#__codelineno-0-3) )`

Called when the state of this slider changed.

### on\_change\_end `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslider/#flet.CupertinoSlider.on_change_end "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslider/#__codelineno-0-1) on_change_end: (     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslider/#__codelineno-0-2)     [ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[CupertinoSlider](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslider/#flet.CupertinoSlider) ] | None [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslider/#__codelineno-0-3) ) = None`

Called when the user is done selecting a new value for this slider.

### on\_change\_start `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslider/#flet.CupertinoSlider.on_change_start "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslider/#__codelineno-0-1) on_change_start: (     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslider/#__codelineno-0-2)     [ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[CupertinoSlider](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslider/#flet.CupertinoSlider) ] | None [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslider/#__codelineno-0-3) ) = None`

Called when the user starts selecting a new value for this slider.

### on\_focus `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslider/#flet.CupertinoSlider.on_focus "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslider/#__codelineno-0-1) on_focus: [ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[CupertinoSlider](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslider/#flet.CupertinoSlider) ] | None = None`

Called when this slider has received focus.
