# CupertinoNavigationBar - Flet

 

[Skip to content](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#flet.CupertinoNavigationBar)

CupertinoNavigationBar
======================

An iOS-styled bottom navigation tab bar.

Navigation bars offer a persistent and convenient way to switch between primary destinations in an app.

Inherits: `[LayoutControl](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/layoutcontrol/#flet.LayoutControl) `

Properties

*   **`[active_color](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#flet.CupertinoNavigationBar.active_color) `**(`[ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None`) –
    
    The foreground color of the icon and title of the selected [`destination`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#flet.CupertinoNavigationBar.destinations)
    .
    
*   **`[bgcolor](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#flet.CupertinoNavigationBar.bgcolor) `**(`[ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None`) –
    
    The color of the navigation bar itself.
    
*   **`[border](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#flet.CupertinoNavigationBar.border) `**(`[Border](https://docs.flet.dev/types/border/#flet.Border)  | None`) –
    
    Defines the border of this navigation bar.
    
*   **`[destinations](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#flet.CupertinoNavigationBar.destinations) `**(`[list](https://docs.python.org/3/glossary.html#term-list) [[NavigationBarDestination](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/navigationbardestination/#flet.NavigationBarDestination) ]`) –
    
    The destinations of this navigation bar.
    
*   **`[icon_size](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#flet.CupertinoNavigationBar.icon_size) `**(`[Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number) `) –
    
    The size of all destination icons.
    
*   **`[inactive_color](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#flet.CupertinoNavigationBar.inactive_color) `**(`[ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue) `) –
    
    The foreground color of the icon and title of the unselected [`destinations`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#flet.CupertinoNavigationBar.destinations)
    .
    
*   **`[selected_index](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#flet.CupertinoNavigationBar.selected_index) `**(`[int](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#int) `) –
    
    The index into [`destinations`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#flet.CupertinoNavigationBar.destinations)
     for the currently selected [`NavigationBarDestination`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/navigationbardestination/#flet.NavigationBarDestination)
    .
    

Events

*   **`[on_change](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#flet.CupertinoNavigationBar.on_change) `**(`[ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[CupertinoNavigationBar](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#flet.CupertinoNavigationBar) ] | None`) –
    
    Called when selected destination changed.
    

Examples[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#examples "Permanent link")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

[Live example](https://flet-controls-gallery.fly.dev/navigation/cupertinonavigationbar)

### Basic Example[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#basic-example "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#__codelineno-0-1) import flet as ft [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#__codelineno-0-2) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#__codelineno-0-3)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#__codelineno-0-4) def main(page: ft.Page):     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#__codelineno-0-5)     page.title = "CupertinoNavigationBar Example" [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#__codelineno-0-6)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#__codelineno-0-7)     page.navigation_bar = ft.CupertinoNavigationBar(        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#__codelineno-0-8)         bgcolor=ft.Colors.AMBER_100,        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#__codelineno-0-9)         inactive_color=ft.Colors.GREY,        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#__codelineno-0-10)         active_color=ft.Colors.BLACK,        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#__codelineno-0-11)         on_change=lambda e: print("Selected tab:", e.control.selected_index),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#__codelineno-0-12)         destinations=[            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#__codelineno-0-13)             ft.NavigationBarDestination(                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#__codelineno-0-14)                 icon=ft.Icons.EXPLORE_OUTLINED,                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#__codelineno-0-15)                 selected_icon=ft.Icons.EXPLORE,                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#__codelineno-0-16)                 label="Explore",            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#__codelineno-0-17)             ),            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#__codelineno-0-18)             ft.NavigationBarDestination(                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#__codelineno-0-19)                 icon=ft.Icons.COMMUTE_OUTLINED,                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#__codelineno-0-20)                 selected_icon=ft.Icons.COMMUTE,                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#__codelineno-0-21)                 label="Commute",            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#__codelineno-0-22)             ),            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#__codelineno-0-23)             ft.NavigationBarDestination(                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#__codelineno-0-24)                 icon=ft.Icons.BOOKMARK_BORDER,                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#__codelineno-0-25)                 selected_icon=ft.Icons.BOOKMARK,                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#__codelineno-0-26)                 label="Favorites",            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#__codelineno-0-27)             ),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#__codelineno-0-28)         ],    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#__codelineno-0-29)     ) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#__codelineno-0-30)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#__codelineno-0-31)     page.add(ft.SafeArea(content=ft.Text("Body!"))) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#__codelineno-0-32) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#__codelineno-0-33)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#__codelineno-0-34) ft.run(main)`

[![basic](https://docs.flet.dev/examples/controls/cupertino_navigation_bar/media/basic.png)](https://docs.flet.dev/examples/controls/cupertino_navigation_bar/media/basic.png)

### Wired navigation bar[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#wired-navigation-bar "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#__codelineno-1-1) import flet as ft [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#__codelineno-1-2) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#__codelineno-1-3)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#__codelineno-1-4) def main(page: ft.Page):     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#__codelineno-1-5)     page.title = "CupertinoNavigationBar Example" [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#__codelineno-1-6)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#__codelineno-1-7)     def handle_nav_destination_change(e: ft.Event[ft.CupertinoNavigationBar]):        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#__codelineno-1-8)         if e.control.selected_index == 0:            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#__codelineno-1-9)             body.content.value = "Explore!"        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#__codelineno-1-10)         elif e.control.selected_index == 1:            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#__codelineno-1-11)             body.content.value = "Find Your Way!"        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#__codelineno-1-12)         else:            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#__codelineno-1-13)             body.content.value = "Your Favorites!"        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#__codelineno-1-14)         page.update() [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#__codelineno-1-15)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#__codelineno-1-16)     page.navigation_bar = ft.CupertinoNavigationBar(        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#__codelineno-1-17)         bgcolor=ft.Colors.AMBER_100,        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#__codelineno-1-18)         inactive_color=ft.Colors.GREY,        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#__codelineno-1-19)         active_color=ft.Colors.BLACK,        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#__codelineno-1-20)         on_change=handle_nav_destination_change,        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#__codelineno-1-21)         destinations=[            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#__codelineno-1-22)             ft.NavigationBarDestination(                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#__codelineno-1-23)                 icon=ft.Icons.EXPLORE_OUTLINED,                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#__codelineno-1-24)                 selected_icon=ft.Icons.EXPLORE,                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#__codelineno-1-25)                 label="Explore",            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#__codelineno-1-26)             ),            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#__codelineno-1-27)             ft.NavigationBarDestination(                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#__codelineno-1-28)                 icon=ft.Icons.COMMUTE_OUTLINED,                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#__codelineno-1-29)                 selected_icon=ft.Icons.COMMUTE,                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#__codelineno-1-30)                 label="Commute",            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#__codelineno-1-31)             ),            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#__codelineno-1-32)             ft.NavigationBarDestination(                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#__codelineno-1-33)                 icon=ft.Icons.BOOKMARK_BORDER,                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#__codelineno-1-34)                 selected_icon=ft.Icons.BOOKMARK,                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#__codelineno-1-35)                 label="Favorites",            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#__codelineno-1-36)             ),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#__codelineno-1-37)         ],    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#__codelineno-1-38)     ) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#__codelineno-1-39)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#__codelineno-1-40)     page.add(        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#__codelineno-1-41)         body := ft.SafeArea(content=ft.Text("Explore!")),    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#__codelineno-1-42)     ) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#__codelineno-1-43) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#__codelineno-1-44)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#__codelineno-1-45) ft.run(main)`

Properties[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#flet.CupertinoNavigationBar-properties "Permanent link")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### active\_color `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#flet.CupertinoNavigationBar.active_color "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#__codelineno-0-1) active_color: [ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None = None`

The foreground color of the icon and title of the selected [`destination`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#flet.CupertinoNavigationBar.destinations)
.

### bgcolor `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#flet.CupertinoNavigationBar.bgcolor "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#__codelineno-0-1) bgcolor: [ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None = None`

The color of the navigation bar itself.

### border `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#flet.CupertinoNavigationBar.border "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#__codelineno-0-1) border: [Border](https://docs.flet.dev/types/border/#flet.Border)  | None = None`

Defines the border of this navigation bar.

### destinations `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#flet.CupertinoNavigationBar.destinations "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#__codelineno-0-1) destinations: [list](https://docs.python.org/3/glossary.html#term-list) [[NavigationBarDestination](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/navigationbardestination/#flet.NavigationBarDestination) ]`

The destinations of this navigation bar.

Raises:

*   `[ValueError](https://docs.python.org/3/library/exceptions.html#ValueError) ` –
    
    If it does not contain at least two visible `NavigationBarDestination`s.
    

### icon\_size `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#flet.CupertinoNavigationBar.icon_size "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#__codelineno-0-1) icon_size: [Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  = 30`

The size of all destination icons.

### inactive\_color `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#flet.CupertinoNavigationBar.inactive_color "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#__codelineno-0-1) inactive_color: [ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  = [INACTIVE_GRAY](https://docs.flet.dev/types/cupertinocolors/#flet.CupertinoColors.INACTIVE_GRAY)`

The foreground color of the icon and title of the unselected [`destinations`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#flet.CupertinoNavigationBar.destinations)
.

### selected\_index `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#flet.CupertinoNavigationBar.selected_index "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#__codelineno-0-1) selected_index: [int](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#int)  = 0`

The index into [`destinations`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#flet.CupertinoNavigationBar.destinations)
 for the currently selected [`NavigationBarDestination`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/navigationbardestination/#flet.NavigationBarDestination)
.

Raises:

*   `[IndexError](https://docs.python.org/3/library/exceptions.html#IndexError) ` –
    
    If it is not greater than or equal to `0`.
    
*   `[IndexError](https://docs.python.org/3/library/exceptions.html#IndexError) ` –
    
    If it is not less than the length of visible [`destinations`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#flet.CupertinoNavigationBar.destinations)
    .
    

Events[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#flet.CupertinoNavigationBar-events "Permanent link")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### on\_change `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#flet.CupertinoNavigationBar.on_change "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#__codelineno-0-1) on_change: (     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#__codelineno-0-2)     [ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[CupertinoNavigationBar](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#flet.CupertinoNavigationBar) ] | None [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#__codelineno-0-3) ) = None`

Called when selected destination changed.

# CupertinoSlidingSegmentedButton - Flet

 

[Skip to content](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslidingsegmentedbutton/#flet.CupertinoSlidingSegmentedButton)

CupertinoSlidingSegmentedButton
===============================

A cupertino sliding segmented button.

Example:

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslidingsegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-0-1) ft.CupertinoSlidingSegmentedButton(     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslidingsegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-0-2)     selected_index=1,    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslidingsegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-0-3)     controls=[        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslidingsegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-0-4)         ft.Text("One"),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslidingsegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-0-5)         ft.Text("Two"),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslidingsegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-0-6)         ft.Text("Three"),    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslidingsegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-0-7)     ], [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslidingsegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-0-8) )`

[![CupertinoSlidingSegmentedButton](https://docs.flet.dev/test-images/examples/cupertino/golden/macos/cupertino_sliding_segmented_button/image_for_docs.png)](https://docs.flet.dev/test-images/examples/cupertino/golden/macos/cupertino_sliding_segmented_button/image_for_docs.png)

Basic CupertinoSlidingSegmentedButton

Inherits: `[LayoutControl](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/layoutcontrol/#flet.LayoutControl) `

Properties

*   **`[bgcolor](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslidingsegmentedbutton/#flet.CupertinoSlidingSegmentedButton.bgcolor) `**(`[ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue) `) –
    
    The background color of this button.
    
*   **`[controls](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslidingsegmentedbutton/#flet.CupertinoSlidingSegmentedButton.controls) `**(`[list](https://docs.python.org/3/glossary.html#term-list) [[Control](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/control/#flet.Control) ]`) –
    
    The list of segments to be displayed.
    
*   **`[padding](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslidingsegmentedbutton/#flet.CupertinoSlidingSegmentedButton.padding) `**(`[PaddingValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.PaddingValue) `) –
    
    The amount of space by which to inset the [`controls`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslidingsegmentedbutton/#flet.CupertinoSlidingSegmentedButton.controls)
    .
    
*   **`[proportional_width](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslidingsegmentedbutton/#flet.CupertinoSlidingSegmentedButton.proportional_width) `**(`[bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool) `) –
    
    Determine whether segments have proportional widths based on their content.
    
*   **`[selected_index](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslidingsegmentedbutton/#flet.CupertinoSlidingSegmentedButton.selected_index) `**(`[int](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#int) `) –
    
    The index (starting from 0) of the selected segment in the [`controls`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslidingsegmentedbutton/#flet.CupertinoSlidingSegmentedButton.controls)
     list.
    
*   **`[thumb_color](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslidingsegmentedbutton/#flet.CupertinoSlidingSegmentedButton.thumb_color) `**(`[ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None`) –
    
    The color of this button when it is not selected.
    

Events

*   **`[on_change](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslidingsegmentedbutton/#flet.CupertinoSlidingSegmentedButton.on_change) `**(`[ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[CupertinoSlidingSegmentedButton](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslidingsegmentedbutton/#flet.CupertinoSlidingSegmentedButton) ] | None`) –
    
    Called when the state of the button is changed - when one of the [`controls`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslidingsegmentedbutton/#flet.CupertinoSlidingSegmentedButton.controls)
     is clicked.
    

Examples[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslidingsegmentedbutton/#examples "Permanent link")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

[Live example](https://flet-controls-gallery.fly.dev/buttons/cupertinoslidingsegmentedbutton)

### Basic Example[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslidingsegmentedbutton/#basic-example "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslidingsegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-0-1) import flet as ft [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslidingsegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-0-2) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslidingsegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-0-3)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslidingsegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-0-4) def main(page: ft.Page):     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslidingsegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-0-5)     page.title = "CupertinoSlidingSegmentedButton Example"    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslidingsegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-0-6)     page.theme_mode = ft.ThemeMode.LIGHT [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslidingsegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-0-7)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslidingsegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-0-8)     def handle_selection_change(e: ft.Event[ft.CupertinoSlidingSegmentedButton]):        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslidingsegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-0-9)         page.show_dialog(            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslidingsegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-0-10)             ft.SnackBar(ft.Text(f"Segment {e.control.selected_index + 1} was chosen!"))        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslidingsegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-0-11)         ) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslidingsegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-0-12)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslidingsegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-0-13)     page.add(        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslidingsegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-0-14)         ft.CupertinoSlidingSegmentedButton(            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslidingsegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-0-15)             selected_index=1,            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslidingsegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-0-16)             thumb_color=ft.Colors.BLUE_400,            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslidingsegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-0-17)             on_change=handle_selection_change,            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslidingsegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-0-18)             controls=[                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslidingsegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-0-19)                 ft.Text("One"),                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslidingsegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-0-20)                 ft.Text("Two"),                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslidingsegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-0-21)                 ft.Text("Three"),            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslidingsegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-0-22)             ],        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslidingsegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-0-23)         ),    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslidingsegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-0-24)     ) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslidingsegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-0-25) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslidingsegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-0-26)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslidingsegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-0-27) ft.run(main)`

[![basic](https://docs.flet.dev/examples/controls/cupertino_sliding_segmented_button/media/basic.gif)](https://docs.flet.dev/examples/controls/cupertino_sliding_segmented_button/media/basic.gif)

Properties[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslidingsegmentedbutton/#flet.CupertinoSlidingSegmentedButton-properties "Permanent link")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### bgcolor `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslidingsegmentedbutton/#flet.CupertinoSlidingSegmentedButton.bgcolor "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslidingsegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-0-1) bgcolor: [ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  = [TERTIARY_SYSTEM_FILL](https://docs.flet.dev/types/cupertinocolors/#flet.CupertinoColors.TERTIARY_SYSTEM_FILL)`

The background color of this button.

### controls `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslidingsegmentedbutton/#flet.CupertinoSlidingSegmentedButton.controls "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslidingsegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-0-1) controls: [list](https://docs.python.org/3/glossary.html#term-list) [[Control](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/control/#flet.Control) ]`

The list of segments to be displayed.

Raises:

*   `[ValueError](https://docs.python.org/3/library/exceptions.html#ValueError) ` –
    
    If it does not contain at least two visible `Control`s.
    

### padding `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslidingsegmentedbutton/#flet.CupertinoSlidingSegmentedButton.padding "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslidingsegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-0-1) padding: [PaddingValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.PaddingValue)  = [field](https://docs.python.org/3/library/dataclasses.html#dataclasses.field "<code>dataclasses.field</code>") (     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslidingsegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-0-2)     default_factory=lambda: [symmetric](https://docs.flet.dev/types/padding/#flet.Padding.symmetric) (        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslidingsegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-0-3)         vertical=2, horizontal=3    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslidingsegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-0-4)     ) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslidingsegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-0-5) )`

The amount of space by which to inset the [`controls`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslidingsegmentedbutton/#flet.CupertinoSlidingSegmentedButton.controls)
.

### proportional\_width `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslidingsegmentedbutton/#flet.CupertinoSlidingSegmentedButton.proportional_width "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslidingsegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-0-1) proportional_width: [bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool)  = False`

Determine whether segments have proportional widths based on their content.

If `False`, all segments will have the same width, determined by the longest segment. If `True`, each segment's width will be determined by its individual content.

If the max width of parent constraints is smaller than the width that this control needs, the segment widths will scale down proportionally to ensure this control fits within the boundaries; similarly, if the min width of parent constraints is larger, the segment width will scales up to meet the min width requirement.

### selected\_index `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslidingsegmentedbutton/#flet.CupertinoSlidingSegmentedButton.selected_index "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslidingsegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-0-1) selected_index: [int](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#int)  = 0`

The index (starting from 0) of the selected segment in the [`controls`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslidingsegmentedbutton/#flet.CupertinoSlidingSegmentedButton.controls)
 list.

Raises:

*   `[IndexError](https://docs.python.org/3/library/exceptions.html#IndexError) ` –
    
    If it is not between `0` and the length of visible [`controls`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslidingsegmentedbutton/#flet.CupertinoSlidingSegmentedButton.controls)
    , inclusive.
    

### thumb\_color `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslidingsegmentedbutton/#flet.CupertinoSlidingSegmentedButton.thumb_color "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslidingsegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-0-1) thumb_color: [ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None = None`

The color of this button when it is not selected.

Events[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslidingsegmentedbutton/#flet.CupertinoSlidingSegmentedButton-events "Permanent link")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### on\_change `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslidingsegmentedbutton/#flet.CupertinoSlidingSegmentedButton.on_change "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslidingsegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-0-1) on_change: (     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslidingsegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-0-2)     [ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[CupertinoSlidingSegmentedButton](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslidingsegmentedbutton/#flet.CupertinoSlidingSegmentedButton) ]    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslidingsegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-0-3)     | None [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslidingsegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-0-4) ) = None`

Called when the state of the button is changed - when one of the [`controls`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoslidingsegmentedbutton/#flet.CupertinoSlidingSegmentedButton.controls)
 is clicked.

# ExpansionPanel - Flet

 

[Skip to content](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/expansionpanel/#flet.ExpansionPanel)

ExpansionPanel
==============

A material expansion panel. It can either be expanded or collapsed. Its body is only visible when it is expanded.

Example:

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/expansionpanel/#__codelineno-0-1) ft.ExpansionPanelList(     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/expansionpanel/#__codelineno-0-2)     width=400,    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/expansionpanel/#__codelineno-0-3)     controls=[        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/expansionpanel/#__codelineno-0-4)         ft.ExpansionPanel(            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/expansionpanel/#__codelineno-0-5)             header=ft.Text("Shipping address"),            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/expansionpanel/#__codelineno-0-6)             content=ft.Text("123 Market Street, Springfield"),            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/expansionpanel/#__codelineno-0-7)             expanded=True,        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/expansionpanel/#__codelineno-0-8)         ),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/expansionpanel/#__codelineno-0-9)         ft.ExpansionPanel(            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/expansionpanel/#__codelineno-0-10)             header=ft.Text("Billing address"),            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/expansionpanel/#__codelineno-0-11)             content=ft.Text("Same as shipping"),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/expansionpanel/#__codelineno-0-12)         ),    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/expansionpanel/#__codelineno-0-13)     ], [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/expansionpanel/#__codelineno-0-14) )`

[![ExpansionPanel](https://docs.flet.dev/test-images/examples/material/golden/macos/expansion_panel/image_for_docs.png)](https://docs.flet.dev/test-images/examples/material/golden/macos/expansion_panel/image_for_docs.png)

Basic ExpansionPanel

Inherits: `[LayoutControl](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/layoutcontrol/#flet.LayoutControl) `, `[AdaptiveControl](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/adaptivecontrol/#flet.AdaptiveControl) `

Properties

*   **`[bgcolor](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/expansionpanel/#flet.ExpansionPanel.bgcolor) `**(`[ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None`) –
    
    The background color of this panel.
    
*   **`[can_tap_header](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/expansionpanel/#flet.ExpansionPanel.can_tap_header) `**(`[bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool) `) –
    
    Whether tapping on this panel's [`header`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/expansionpanel/#flet.ExpansionPanel.header)
     will expand or collapse it.
    
*   **`[content](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/expansionpanel/#flet.ExpansionPanel.content) `**(`[Control](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/control/#flet.Control)  | None`) –
    
    The control to be found in the body of this panel.
    
*   **`[expanded](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/expansionpanel/#flet.ExpansionPanel.expanded) `**(`[bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool) `) –
    
    Whether this panel is in expanded (`True`) or collapsed (`False`) state.
    
*   **`[header](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/expansionpanel/#flet.ExpansionPanel.header) `**(`[Control](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/control/#flet.Control)  | None`) –
    
    The control to be found in the header of this panel.
    
*   **`[highlight_color](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/expansionpanel/#flet.ExpansionPanel.highlight_color) `**(`[ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None`) –
    
    Defines the highlight color of this panel if [`can_tap_header`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/expansionpanel/#flet.ExpansionPanel.can_tap_header)
     is `True`, or the highlight color of the expand/collapse `IconButton` if [`can_tap_header`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/expansionpanel/#flet.ExpansionPanel.can_tap_header)
     is `False`.
    
*   **`[splash_color](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/expansionpanel/#flet.ExpansionPanel.splash_color) `**(`[ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None`) –
    
    Defines the splash color of this panel if [`can_tap_header`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/expansionpanel/#flet.ExpansionPanel.can_tap_header)
     is `True`, or the splash color of the expand/collapse `IconButton` if [`can_tap_header`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/expansionpanel/#flet.ExpansionPanel.can_tap_header)
     is `False`.
    

Properties[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/expansionpanel/#flet.ExpansionPanel-properties "Permanent link")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### bgcolor `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/expansionpanel/#flet.ExpansionPanel.bgcolor "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/expansionpanel/#__codelineno-0-1) bgcolor: [ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None = None`

The background color of this panel.

### can\_tap\_header `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/expansionpanel/#flet.ExpansionPanel.can_tap_header "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/expansionpanel/#__codelineno-0-1) can_tap_header: [bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool)  = False`

Whether tapping on this panel's [`header`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/expansionpanel/#flet.ExpansionPanel.header)
 will expand or collapse it.

### content `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/expansionpanel/#flet.ExpansionPanel.content "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/expansionpanel/#__codelineno-0-1) content: [Control](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/control/#flet.Control)  | None = None`

The control to be found in the body of this panel.

It is displayed below the [`header`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/expansionpanel/#flet.ExpansionPanel.header)
 when this panel is [`expanded`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/expansionpanel/#flet.ExpansionPanel.expanded)
.

If this property is `None`, this panel will have a placeholder `Text` as content.

### expanded `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/expansionpanel/#flet.ExpansionPanel.expanded "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/expansionpanel/#__codelineno-0-1) expanded: [bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool)  = False`

Whether this panel is in expanded (`True`) or collapsed (`False`) state.

### header `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/expansionpanel/#flet.ExpansionPanel.header "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/expansionpanel/#__codelineno-0-1) header: [Control](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/control/#flet.Control)  | None = None`

The control to be found in the header of this panel.

It is always visible, regardless of whether this panel is expanded or collapsed. If [`can_tap_header`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/expansionpanel/#flet.ExpansionPanel.can_tap_header)
 is `True`, tapping on this `header` will expand or collapse this panel.

If this property is `None`, this panel will have a placeholder `Text` as header.

### highlight\_color `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/expansionpanel/#flet.ExpansionPanel.highlight_color "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/expansionpanel/#__codelineno-0-1) highlight_color: [ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None = None`

Defines the highlight color of this panel if [`can_tap_header`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/expansionpanel/#flet.ExpansionPanel.can_tap_header)
 is `True`, or the highlight color of the expand/collapse `IconButton` if [`can_tap_header`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/expansionpanel/#flet.ExpansionPanel.can_tap_header)
 is `False`.

If this is `None`, then the icon button will use its default highlight color [`Theme.highlight_color`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/theme/#flet.Theme.highlight_color)
, and this panel will use its default highlight color [`Theme.highlight_color`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/theme/#flet.Theme.highlight_color)
 (if [`can_tap_header`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/expansionpanel/#flet.ExpansionPanel.can_tap_header)
 is `True`).

### splash\_color `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/expansionpanel/#flet.ExpansionPanel.splash_color "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/expansionpanel/#__codelineno-0-1) splash_color: [ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None = None`

Defines the splash color of this panel if [`can_tap_header`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/expansionpanel/#flet.ExpansionPanel.can_tap_header)
 is `True`, or the splash color of the expand/collapse `IconButton` if [`can_tap_header`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/expansionpanel/#flet.ExpansionPanel.can_tap_header)
 is `False`.

If [`can_tap_header`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/expansionpanel/#flet.ExpansionPanel.can_tap_header)
 is `False`, and [`Theme.use_material3`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/theme/#flet.Theme.use_material3)
 is `True`, this field will be ignored, as [`IconButton.splash_color`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/iconbutton/#flet.IconButton.splash_color)
 will be ignored, and you should use [`highlight_color`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/expansionpanel/#flet.ExpansionPanel.highlight_color)
 instead.

If this is `None`, then the icon button will use its default splash color [`Theme.splash_color`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/theme/#flet.Theme.splash_color)
, and this panel will use its default splash color [`Theme.splash_color`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/theme/#flet.Theme.splash_color)
 (if [`can_tap_header`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/expansionpanel/#flet.ExpansionPanel.can_tap_header)
 is `True`).

Back to top

# Placeholder - Flet

 

[Skip to content](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/placeholder/#flet.Placeholder)

Placeholder
===========

A placeholder box.

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/placeholder/#__codelineno-0-1) ft.Placeholder(     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/placeholder/#__codelineno-0-2)     expand=True,    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/placeholder/#__codelineno-0-3)     color=ft.Colors.RED_500, [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/placeholder/#__codelineno-0-4) )`

[![Placeholder](https://docs.flet.dev/test-images/examples/core/golden/macos/placeholder/image_for_docs.png)](https://docs.flet.dev/test-images/examples/core/golden/macos/placeholder/image_for_docs.png)

Placeholder

Inherits: `[LayoutControl](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/layoutcontrol/#flet.LayoutControl) `

Properties

*   **`[color](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/placeholder/#flet.Placeholder.color) `**(`[ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue) `) –
    
    The color of the placeholder box.
    
*   **`[content](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/placeholder/#flet.Placeholder.content) `**(`[Control](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/control/#flet.Control)  | None`) –
    
    An optional `Control` to display inside the placeholder.
    
*   **`[fallback_height](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/placeholder/#flet.Placeholder.fallback_height) `**(`[Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number) `) –
    
    The height to use when the placeholder is in a situation with an unbounded height.
    
*   **`[fallback_width](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/placeholder/#flet.Placeholder.fallback_width) `**(`[Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number) `) –
    
    The width to use when the placeholder is in a situation with an unbounded width.
    
*   **`[stroke_width](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/placeholder/#flet.Placeholder.stroke_width) `**(`[Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  | None`) –
    
    The width of the lines in the placeholder box.
    

Examples[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/placeholder/#examples "Permanent link")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------

[Live example](https://flet-controls-gallery.fly.dev/layout/placeholder)

### Basic Example[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/placeholder/#basic-example "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/placeholder/#__codelineno-0-1) import flet as ft [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/placeholder/#__codelineno-0-2) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/placeholder/#__codelineno-0-3)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/placeholder/#__codelineno-0-4) def main(page: ft.Page):     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/placeholder/#__codelineno-0-5)     page.add(        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/placeholder/#__codelineno-0-6)         ft.Placeholder(            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/placeholder/#__codelineno-0-7)             expand=True,            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/placeholder/#__codelineno-0-8)             color=ft.Colors.GREEN_ACCENT,            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/placeholder/#__codelineno-0-9)             fallback_height=200,            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/placeholder/#__codelineno-0-10)             fallback_width=300,            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/placeholder/#__codelineno-0-11)             stroke_width=20,        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/placeholder/#__codelineno-0-12)         )    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/placeholder/#__codelineno-0-13)     ) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/placeholder/#__codelineno-0-14) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/placeholder/#__codelineno-0-15)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/placeholder/#__codelineno-0-16) if __name__ == "__main__":     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/placeholder/#__codelineno-0-17)     ft.run(main)`

[![basic](https://docs.flet.dev/test-images/examples/core/golden/macos/placeholder/basic.png)](https://docs.flet.dev/test-images/examples/core/golden/macos/placeholder/basic.png)

Properties[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/placeholder/#flet.Placeholder-properties "Permanent link")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### color `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/placeholder/#flet.Placeholder.color "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/placeholder/#__codelineno-0-1) color: [ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  = [BLUE_GREY_700](https://docs.flet.dev/types/colors/#flet.Colors.BLUE_GREY_700)`

The color of the placeholder box.

### content `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/placeholder/#flet.Placeholder.content "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/placeholder/#__codelineno-0-1) content: [Control](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/control/#flet.Control)  | None = None`

An optional `Control` to display inside the placeholder.

### fallback\_height `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/placeholder/#flet.Placeholder.fallback_height "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/placeholder/#__codelineno-0-1) fallback_height: [Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  = 400.0`

The height to use when the placeholder is in a situation with an unbounded height.

### fallback\_width `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/placeholder/#flet.Placeholder.fallback_width "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/placeholder/#__codelineno-0-1) fallback_width: [Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  = 400.0`

The width to use when the placeholder is in a situation with an unbounded width.

### stroke\_width `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/placeholder/#flet.Placeholder.stroke_width "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/placeholder/#__codelineno-0-1) stroke_width: [Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  | None = 2.0`

The width of the lines in the placeholder box.

# DataRow - Flet

 

[Skip to content](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datarow/#examples)

DataRow
=======

Examples[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datarow/#examples "Permanent link")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

See [these](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datatable/#examples)
.

Inherits: `[Control](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/control/#flet.Control) `

Row configuration and cell data for a [`DataTable`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datatable/#flet.DataTable)
.

One row configuration must be provided for each row to display in the table.

The data for this row of the table is provided in the [`cells`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datarow/#flet.DataRow.cells)
 property.

Properties

*   **`[cells](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datarow/#flet.DataRow.cells) `**(`[list](https://docs.python.org/3/glossary.html#term-list) [[DataCell](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datacell/#flet.DataCell) ]`) –
    
    The data for this row: a list of [`DataCell`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datacell/#flet.DataCell)
     controls.
    
*   **`[color](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datarow/#flet.DataRow.color) `**(`[ControlStateValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlStateValue) [[ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue) ] | None`) –
    
    The color of this row.
    
*   **`[selected](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datarow/#flet.DataRow.selected) `**(`[bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool) `) –
    
    Whether the row is selected.
    

Events

*   **`[on_long_press](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datarow/#flet.DataRow.on_long_press) `**(`[ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[DataRow](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datarow/#flet.DataRow) ] | None`) –
    
    Called when this row is long-pressed.
    
*   **`[on_select_change](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datarow/#flet.DataRow.on_select_change) `**(`[ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[DataRow](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datarow/#flet.DataRow) ] | None`) –
    
    Called when the user selects or unselects a selectable row.
    

Properties[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datarow/#flet.DataRow-properties "Permanent link")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### cells `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datarow/#flet.DataRow.cells "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datarow/#__codelineno-0-1) cells: [list](https://docs.python.org/3/glossary.html#term-list) [[DataCell](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datacell/#flet.DataCell) ] = [field](https://docs.python.org/3/library/dataclasses.html#dataclasses.field "<code>dataclasses.field</code>") (default_factory=[list](https://docs.python.org/3/glossary.html#term-list) )`

The data for this row: a list of [`DataCell`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datacell/#flet.DataCell)
 controls.

Note

There must be exactly as many cells as there are visible [`columns`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datatable/#flet.DataTable.columns)
 in the table.

Raises:

*   `[ValueError](https://docs.python.org/3/library/exceptions.html#ValueError) ` –
    
    If it does not contain at least one visible [`DataCell`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datacell/#flet.DataCell)
    .
    

### color `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datarow/#flet.DataRow.color "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datarow/#__codelineno-0-1) color: [ControlStateValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlStateValue) [[ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue) ] | None = None`

The color of this row.

By default, the color is transparent unless selected. Selected rows has a grey translucent color.

The effective color can depend on the [`ControlState`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/controlstate/#flet.ControlState)
 state, if the row is selected, pressed, hovered, focused, disabled or enabled. The color is painted as an overlay to the row. To make sure that the row's InkWell is visible (when pressed, hovered and focused), it is recommended to use a translucent color.

### selected `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datarow/#flet.DataRow.selected "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datarow/#__codelineno-0-1) selected: [bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool)  = False`

Whether the row is selected.

If `on_select_change` is non-null for any row in the table, then a checkbox is shown at the start of each row. If the row is selected (`True`), the checkbox will be checked and the row will be highlighted.

Otherwise, the checkbox, if present, will not be checked.

Events[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datarow/#flet.DataRow-events "Permanent link")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### on\_long\_press `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datarow/#flet.DataRow.on_long_press "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datarow/#__codelineno-0-1) on_long_press: [ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[DataRow](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datarow/#flet.DataRow) ] | None = None`

Called when this row is long-pressed.

If a [`DataCell`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datacell/#flet.DataCell)
 in the row has its [`DataCell.on_tap`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datacell/#flet.DataCell.on_tap)
, [`DataCell.on_double_tap`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datacell/#flet.DataCell.on_double_tap)
, [`DataCell.on_long_press`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datacell/#flet.DataCell.on_long_press)
, [`DataCell.on_tap_cancel`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datacell/#flet.DataCell.on_tap_cancel)
 or [`DataCell.on_tap_down`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datacell/#flet.DataCell.on_tap_down)
 callback defined, that callback behavior overrides the gesture behavior of the row for that particular cell.

### on\_select\_change `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datarow/#flet.DataRow.on_select_change "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datarow/#__codelineno-0-1) on_select_change: [ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[DataRow](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datarow/#flet.DataRow) ] | None = None`

Called when the user selects or unselects a selectable row.

If this is not null, then this row is selectable. The current selection state of this row is given by selected.

If any row is selectable, then the table's heading row will have a checkbox that can be checked to select all selectable rows (and which is checked if all the rows are selected), and each subsequent row will have a checkbox to toggle just that row.

A row whose `on_select_change` callback is null is ignored for the purposes of determining the state of the "all" checkbox, and its checkbox is disabled.

If a [`DataCell`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datacell/#flet.DataCell)
 in the row has its [`DataCell.on_tap`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/datacell/#flet.DataCell.on_tap)
 callback defined, that callback behavior overrides the gesture behavior of the row for that particular cell.

Back to top

# NavigationBarDestination - Flet

 

[Skip to content](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/navigationbardestination/#flet.NavigationBarDestination)

NavigationBarDestination
========================

Inherits: `[AdaptiveControl](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/adaptivecontrol/#flet.AdaptiveControl) `

Defines the appearance of the button items that are arrayed within the navigation bar.

The value must be a list of two or more NavigationBarDestination instances.

Properties

*   **`[bgcolor](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/navigationbardestination/#flet.NavigationBarDestination.bgcolor) `**(`[ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None`) –
    
    The color of this destination.
    
*   **`[icon](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/navigationbardestination/#flet.NavigationBarDestination.icon) `**(`[IconDataOrControl](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.IconDataOrControl) `) –
    
    The [name of the icon](https://docs.flet.dev/types/icons)
     or `Control` of the destination.
    
*   **`[label](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/navigationbardestination/#flet.NavigationBarDestination.label) `**(`[str](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str)  | None`) –
    
    The text label that appears below the icon of this `NavigationBarDestination`.
    
*   **`[selected_icon](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/navigationbardestination/#flet.NavigationBarDestination.selected_icon) `**(`[IconDataOrControl](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.IconDataOrControl)  | None`) –
    
    The [name](https://docs.flet.dev/types/icons)
     of alternative icon or `Control` displayed when this destination is selected.
    

Properties[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/navigationbardestination/#flet.NavigationBarDestination-properties "Permanent link")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### bgcolor `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/navigationbardestination/#flet.NavigationBarDestination.bgcolor "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/navigationbardestination/#__codelineno-0-1) bgcolor: [ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None = None`

The color of this destination.

### icon `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/navigationbardestination/#flet.NavigationBarDestination.icon "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/navigationbardestination/#__codelineno-0-1) icon: [IconDataOrControl](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.IconDataOrControl)`

The [name of the icon](https://docs.flet.dev/types/icons)
 or `Control` of the destination.

Example with icon name:

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/navigationbardestination/#__codelineno-0-1) icon=ft.Icons.BOOKMARK`

Example with Control:

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/navigationbardestination/#__codelineno-1-1) icon=ft.Icon(ft.Icons.BOOKMARK)`

If `selected_icon` is provided, this will only be displayed when the destination is not selected.

To make the NavigationBar more accessible, consider choosing an icon with a stroked and filled version, such as `ft.Icons.CLOUD` and `ft.Icons.CLOUD_QUEUE`. The icon should be set to the stroked version and `selected_icon` to the filled version.

### label `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/navigationbardestination/#flet.NavigationBarDestination.label "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/navigationbardestination/#__codelineno-0-1) label: [str](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str)  | None = None`

The text label that appears below the icon of this `NavigationBarDestination`.

### selected\_icon `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/navigationbardestination/#flet.NavigationBarDestination.selected_icon "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/navigationbardestination/#__codelineno-0-1) selected_icon: [IconDataOrControl](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.IconDataOrControl)  | None = None`

The [name](https://docs.flet.dev/types/icons)
 of alternative icon or `Control` displayed when this destination is selected.

Example with icon name:

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/navigationbardestination/#__codelineno-0-1) selected_icon=ft.Icons.BOOKMARK`

Example with Control:

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/navigationbardestination/#__codelineno-1-1) selected_icon=ft.Icon(ft.Icons.BOOKMARK)`

If this icon is not provided, the NavigationBar will display `icon` in either state.

Back to top

---

NavigationDrawerDestination

    The [name](https://docs.flet.dev/types/icons)
     of alternative icon or `Control` displayed when this destination is selected.
    

Properties[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/navigationdrawerdestination/#flet.NavigationDrawerDestination-properties "Permanent link")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/navigationdrawerdestination/#__codelineno-0-1) icon: [IconDataOrControl](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.IconDataOrControl)  | None = None`

 or `Control` of the destination.

If `selected_icon` is provided, this will only be displayed when the destination is not selected.

### label `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/navigationdrawerdestination/#flet.NavigationDrawerDestination.label "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/navigationdrawerdestination/#__codelineno-0-1) label: [str](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str)  | None = None`

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/navigationdrawerdestination/#__codelineno-0-1) selected_icon: [IconDataOrControl](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.IconDataOrControl)  | None = None`

The [name](https://docs.flet.dev/types/icons)
 of alternative icon or `Control` displayed when this destination is selected.

Example with icon name:

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/navigationdrawerdestination/#__codelineno-0-1) selected_icon=ft.Icons.BOOKMARK`

Example with Control:

If this icon is not provided, the NavigationDrawer will display `icon` in either state.
