# CupertinoAppBar - Flet

 

[Skip to content](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#flet.CupertinoAppBar)

CupertinoAppBar
===============

An iOS-styled app bar.

Note

The alignment of the [`title`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#flet.CupertinoAppBar.title)
 depends on whether this app bar is [`large`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#flet.CupertinoAppBar.large)
 or not. If it is `True`, the [`title`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#flet.CupertinoAppBar.title)
 is left-aligned and if it is `False` (the default), the [`title`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#flet.CupertinoAppBar.title)
 is centered.

Inherits: `[Control](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/control/#flet.Control) `

Properties

*   **`[automatic_background_visibility](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#flet.CupertinoAppBar.automatic_background_visibility) `**(`[bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool)  | None`) –
    
    Whether the navigation bar should appear transparent when content is scrolled under it.
    
*   **`[automatically_imply_leading](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#flet.CupertinoAppBar.automatically_imply_leading) `**(`[bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool)  | None`) –
    
    Whether we should try to imply the [`leading`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#flet.CupertinoAppBar.leading)
     control if `None`.
    
*   **`[automatically_imply_title](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#flet.CupertinoAppBar.automatically_imply_title) `**(`[bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool)  | None`) –
    
    Whether we should try to imply the `title` control if `None`.
    
*   **`[bgcolor](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#flet.CupertinoAppBar.bgcolor) `**(`[ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None`) –
    
    The fill color to use for this app bar.
    
*   **`[border](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#flet.CupertinoAppBar.border) `**(`[Border](https://docs.flet.dev/types/border/#flet.Border)  | None`) –
    
    The border of the app bar. By default, a single pixel bottom border side is rendered.
    
*   **`[brightness](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#flet.CupertinoAppBar.brightness) `**(`[Brightness](https://docs.flet.dev/types/brightness/#flet.Brightness)  | None`) –
    
    The brightness of the specified [`bgcolor`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#flet.CupertinoAppBar.bgcolor)
    .
    
*   **`[enable_background_filter_blur](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#flet.CupertinoAppBar.enable_background_filter_blur) `**(`[bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool)  | None`) –
    
    Whether to have a blur effect when a non-opaque [`bgcolor`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#flet.CupertinoAppBar.bgcolor)
     is used.
    
*   **`[large](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#flet.CupertinoAppBar.large) `**(`[bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool) `) –
    
    Whether to use a large app bar layout.
    
*   **`[leading](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#flet.CupertinoAppBar.leading) `**(`[Control](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/control/#flet.Control)  | None`) –
    
    A control to display at the start of this app bar.
    
*   **`[padding](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#flet.CupertinoAppBar.padding) `**(`[PaddingValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.PaddingValue)  | None`) –
    
    Defines the padding for the contents of the app bar.
    
*   **`[previous_page_title](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#flet.CupertinoAppBar.previous_page_title) `**(`[str](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str)  | None`) –
    
    Manually specify the previous route's title when automatically implying the leading back button.
    
*   **`[title](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#flet.CupertinoAppBar.title) `**(`[StrOrControl](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.StrOrControl)  | None`) –
    
    A string or a control to display in the middle of this app bar.
    
*   **`[trailing](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#flet.CupertinoAppBar.trailing) `**(`[Control](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/control/#flet.Control)  | None`) –
    
    A Control to place at the end of the app bar.
    
*   **`[transition_between_routes](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#flet.CupertinoAppBar.transition_between_routes) `**(`[bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool) `) –
    
    Determines whether the app bar transitions between routes.
    

Examples[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#examples "Permanent link")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

[Live example](https://flet-controls-gallery.fly.dev/navigation/cupertinoappbar)

### Basic Example[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#basic-example "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#__codelineno-0-1) import flet as ft [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#__codelineno-0-2) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#__codelineno-0-3)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#__codelineno-0-4) def main(page: ft.Page):     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#__codelineno-0-5)     page.theme_mode = ft.ThemeMode.LIGHT [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#__codelineno-0-6)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#__codelineno-0-7)     page.appbar = ft.CupertinoAppBar(        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#__codelineno-0-8)         leading=ft.Icon(ft.Icons.PALETTE, color=ft.Colors.ON_SECONDARY),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#__codelineno-0-9)         title=ft.Text("CupertinoAppBar Example"),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#__codelineno-0-10)         trailing=ft.Icon(ft.Icons.WB_SUNNY_OUTLINED, color=ft.Colors.ON_SECONDARY),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#__codelineno-0-11)         automatic_background_visibility=False,        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#__codelineno-0-12)         bgcolor=ft.Colors.SECONDARY,        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#__codelineno-0-13)         brightness=ft.Brightness.LIGHT,    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#__codelineno-0-14)     ) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#__codelineno-0-15)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#__codelineno-0-16)     page.add(ft.Text("Body!")) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#__codelineno-0-17) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#__codelineno-0-18)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#__codelineno-0-19) ft.run(main)`

[![basic](https://docs.flet.dev/examples/controls/cupertino_app_bar/media/basic.png)](https://docs.flet.dev/examples/controls/cupertino_app_bar/media/basic.png)

### App bar with theme mode toggle[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#app-bar-with-theme-mode-toggle "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#__codelineno-1-1) import flet as ft [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#__codelineno-1-2) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#__codelineno-1-3)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#__codelineno-1-4) def main(page: ft.Page):     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#__codelineno-1-5)     page.theme_mode = ft.ThemeMode.LIGHT [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#__codelineno-1-6)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#__codelineno-1-7)     def handle_theme_mode_toggle(e: ft.Event[ft.IconButton]):        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#__codelineno-1-8)         page.theme_mode = (            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#__codelineno-1-9)             ft.ThemeMode.DARK            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#__codelineno-1-10)             if page.theme_mode == ft.ThemeMode.LIGHT            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#__codelineno-1-11)             else ft.ThemeMode.LIGHT        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#__codelineno-1-12)         )        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#__codelineno-1-13)         theme_mode_button.icon = (            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#__codelineno-1-14)             ft.Icons.WB_SUNNY_OUTLINED            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#__codelineno-1-15)             if page.theme_mode == ft.ThemeMode.LIGHT            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#__codelineno-1-16)             else ft.Icons.WB_SUNNY        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#__codelineno-1-17)         )        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#__codelineno-1-18)         page.update() [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#__codelineno-1-19)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#__codelineno-1-20)     theme_mode_button = ft.IconButton(        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#__codelineno-1-21)         icon=(            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#__codelineno-1-22)             ft.Icons.WB_SUNNY_OUTLINED            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#__codelineno-1-23)             if page.theme_mode == ft.ThemeMode.LIGHT            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#__codelineno-1-24)             else ft.Icons.WB_SUNNY        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#__codelineno-1-25)         ),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#__codelineno-1-26)         icon_color=ft.Colors.ON_INVERSE_SURFACE,        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#__codelineno-1-27)         on_click=handle_theme_mode_toggle,    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#__codelineno-1-28)     ) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#__codelineno-1-29)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#__codelineno-1-30)     page.appbar = ft.CupertinoAppBar(        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#__codelineno-1-31)         automatic_background_visibility=False,        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#__codelineno-1-32)         leading=ft.Icon(ft.Icons.PALETTE, color=ft.Colors.ON_INVERSE_SURFACE),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#__codelineno-1-33)         bgcolor=ft.Colors.INVERSE_SURFACE,        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#__codelineno-1-34)         trailing=theme_mode_button,        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#__codelineno-1-35)         title=ft.Text("CupertinoAppBar Example", color=ft.Colors.ON_INVERSE_SURFACE),    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#__codelineno-1-36)     ) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#__codelineno-1-37)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#__codelineno-1-38)     page.add(ft.Text("Body!")) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#__codelineno-1-39) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#__codelineno-1-40)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#__codelineno-1-41) ft.run(main)`

Properties[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#flet.CupertinoAppBar-properties "Permanent link")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### automatic\_background\_visibility `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#flet.CupertinoAppBar.automatic_background_visibility "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#__codelineno-0-1) automatic_background_visibility: [bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool)  | None = None`

Whether the navigation bar should appear transparent when content is scrolled under it.

If `False`, the navigation bar will display its [`bgcolor`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#flet.CupertinoAppBar.bgcolor)
.

### automatically\_imply\_leading `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#flet.CupertinoAppBar.automatically_imply_leading "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#__codelineno-0-1) automatically_imply_leading: [bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool)  | None = None`

Whether we should try to imply the [`leading`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#flet.CupertinoAppBar.leading)
 control if `None`.

*   If `True` and [`leading`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#flet.CupertinoAppBar.leading)
     is `None`, the app bar will automatically determine an appropriate leading control.
*   If `False` and [`leading`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#flet.CupertinoAppBar.leading)
     is `None`, the space is allocated to the [`title`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#flet.CupertinoAppBar.title)
    .
*   If a [`leading`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#flet.CupertinoAppBar.leading)
     control is provided, this parameter has no effect.

### automatically\_imply\_title `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#flet.CupertinoAppBar.automatically_imply_title "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#__codelineno-0-1) automatically_imply_title: [bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool)  | None = None`

Whether we should try to imply the `title` control if `None`.

*   If True and `title` is `None`, a [`Text`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/text/#flet.Text)
     control containing the current route's title will be automatically filled in.
*   If the `title` is not `None`, this parameter has no effect.

### bgcolor `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#flet.CupertinoAppBar.bgcolor "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#__codelineno-0-1) bgcolor: [ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None = None`

The fill color to use for this app bar.

Default color is defined by current theme.

### border `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#flet.CupertinoAppBar.border "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#__codelineno-0-1) border: [Border](https://docs.flet.dev/types/border/#flet.Border)  | None = None`

The border of the app bar. By default, a single pixel bottom border side is rendered.

### brightness `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#flet.CupertinoAppBar.brightness "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#__codelineno-0-1) brightness: [Brightness](https://docs.flet.dev/types/brightness/#flet.Brightness)  | None = None`

The brightness of the specified [`bgcolor`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#flet.CupertinoAppBar.bgcolor)
.

Setting this value changes the style of the system status bar. It is typically used to increase the contrast ratio of the system status bar over [`bgcolor`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#flet.CupertinoAppBar.bgcolor)
.

If `None` (the default), its value will be inferred from the relative luminance of the [`bgcolor`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#flet.CupertinoAppBar.bgcolor)
.

### enable\_background\_filter\_blur `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#flet.CupertinoAppBar.enable_background_filter_blur "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#__codelineno-0-1) enable_background_filter_blur: [bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool)  | None = None`

Whether to have a blur effect when a non-opaque [`bgcolor`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#flet.CupertinoAppBar.bgcolor)
 is used.

This will only be respected when [`automatic_background_visibility`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#flet.CupertinoAppBar.automatic_background_visibility)
 is `False` or until content scrolls under the navigation bar.

### large `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#flet.CupertinoAppBar.large "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#__codelineno-0-1) large: [bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool)  = False`

Whether to use a large app bar layout.

If `True`, the [`title`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#flet.CupertinoAppBar.title)
 is left-aligned; if `False`, the [`title`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#flet.CupertinoAppBar.title)
 is centered.

### leading `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#flet.CupertinoAppBar.leading "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#__codelineno-0-1) leading: [Control](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/control/#flet.Control)  | None = None`

A control to display at the start of this app bar.

Typically the leading control is an [`Icon`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/icon/#flet.Icon)
 or an [`IconButton`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/iconbutton/#flet.IconButton)
 .

If it is `None` and [`automatically_imply_leading`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#flet.CupertinoAppBar.automatically_imply_leading)
 is `True`, an appropriate button will be automatically created.

### padding `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#flet.CupertinoAppBar.padding "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#__codelineno-0-1) padding: [PaddingValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.PaddingValue)  | None = None`

Defines the padding for the contents of the app bar.

If `None`, the app bar will adopt the following defaults:

*   vertically, contents will be sized to the same height as the app bar itself minus the status bar.
*   horizontally, padding will be `16` pixels according to iOS specifications unless the leading widget is an automatically inserted back button, in which case the padding will be `0`.

Note

Vertical padding (`top` and `bottom`) won't change the height of this app bar.

### previous\_page\_title `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#flet.CupertinoAppBar.previous_page_title "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#__codelineno-0-1) previous_page_title: [str](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str)  | None = None`

Manually specify the previous route's title when automatically implying the leading back button.

Overrides the text shown with the back chevron instead of automatically showing the previous route's title when [`automatically_imply_leading`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#flet.CupertinoAppBar.automatically_imply_leading)
 is `True`.

Note

Has no effect if `leading` is not `None` or if [`automatically_imply_leading`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#flet.CupertinoAppBar.automatically_imply_leading)
 is `False`.

### title `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#flet.CupertinoAppBar.title "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#__codelineno-0-1) title: [StrOrControl](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.StrOrControl)  | None = None`

A string or a control to display in the middle of this app bar.

Typically a [`Text`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/text/#flet.Text)
.

### trailing `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#flet.CupertinoAppBar.trailing "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#__codelineno-0-1) trailing: [Control](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/control/#flet.Control)  | None = None`

A Control to place at the end of the app bar.

Typically used for actions such as searching or editing.

### transition\_between\_routes `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#flet.CupertinoAppBar.transition_between_routes "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#__codelineno-0-1) transition_between_routes: [bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool)  = True`

Determines whether the app bar transitions between routes.

If `True`, this app bar will animate on top of route transitions when the destination route also contains a `CupertinoAppBar` or `CupertinoSliverAppBar` with `transition_between_routes` set to `True`.

This transition also occurs during edge back swipe gestures, mimicking native iOS behavior.

Note

When enabled, only one app bar can be present per route unless a `hero_tag` is specified.

Back to top

---

# CupertinoPicker - Flet

 

[Skip to content](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinopicker/#flet.CupertinoPicker)

CupertinoPicker
===============

An iOS-styled picker.

Inherits: `[LayoutControl](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/layoutcontrol/#flet.LayoutControl) `

Properties

*   **`[bgcolor](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinopicker/#flet.CupertinoPicker.bgcolor) `**(`[ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None`) –
    
    The background color of this timer picker.
    
*   **`[controls](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinopicker/#flet.CupertinoPicker.controls) `**(`[list](https://docs.python.org/3/glossary.html#term-list) [[Control](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/control/#flet.Control) ]`) –
    
    A list of controls representing items in this picker.
    
*   **`[default_selection_overlay_bgcolor](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinopicker/#flet.CupertinoPicker.default_selection_overlay_bgcolor) `**(`[ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue) `) –
    
    The default background color of the [`selection_overlay`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinopicker/#flet.CupertinoPicker.selection_overlay)
    .
    
*   **`[diameter_ratio](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinopicker/#flet.CupertinoPicker.diameter_ratio) `**(`[Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number) `) –
    
    Relative ratio between this picker's height and the simulated cylinder's diameter.
    
*   **`[item_extent](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinopicker/#flet.CupertinoPicker.item_extent) `**(`[Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number) `) –
    
    The uniform height of all [`controls`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinopicker/#flet.CupertinoPicker.controls)
    .
    
*   **`[looping](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinopicker/#flet.CupertinoPicker.looping) `**(`[bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool) `) –
    
    If `True`, children on a wheel can be scrolled in a loop.
    
*   **`[magnification](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinopicker/#flet.CupertinoPicker.magnification) `**(`[Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number) `) –
    
    The zoomed-in or magnification rate of the magnifier.
    
*   **`[off_axis_fraction](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinopicker/#flet.CupertinoPicker.off_axis_fraction) `**(`[Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number) `) –
    
    How much the wheel is horizontally off-center, as a fraction of its width.
    
*   **`[selected_index](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinopicker/#flet.CupertinoPicker.selected_index) `**(`[int](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#int) `) –
    
    The index (starting from `0`) of the selected item in the [`controls`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinopicker/#flet.CupertinoPicker.controls)
     list.
    
*   **`[selection_overlay](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinopicker/#flet.CupertinoPicker.selection_overlay) `**(`[Control](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/control/#flet.Control)  | None`) –
    
    A control overlaid on the picker to highlight the selected entry, centered and matching the height of the center row.
    
*   **`[squeeze](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinopicker/#flet.CupertinoPicker.squeeze) `**(`[Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number) `) –
    
    The angular compactness of the children on the wheel.
    
*   **`[use_magnifier](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinopicker/#flet.CupertinoPicker.use_magnifier) `**(`[bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool) `) –
    
    Whether to use the magnifier for the center item of this picker's wheel.
    

Events

*   **`[on_change](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinopicker/#flet.CupertinoPicker.on_change) `**(`[ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[CupertinoPicker](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinopicker/#flet.CupertinoPicker) ] | None`) –
    
    Called when the selection changes.
    

Examples[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinopicker/#examples "Permanent link")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

[Live example](https://flet-controls-gallery.fly.dev/dialogs/cupertinotimerpicker)

### Fruit selection[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinopicker/#fruit-selection "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinopicker/#__codelineno-0-1) import flet as ft [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinopicker/#__codelineno-0-2)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinopicker/#__codelineno-0-3) FRUITS = [     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinopicker/#__codelineno-0-4)     "Apple",    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinopicker/#__codelineno-0-5)     "Mango",    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinopicker/#__codelineno-0-6)     "Banana",    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinopicker/#__codelineno-0-7)     "Orange",    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinopicker/#__codelineno-0-8)     "Pineapple",    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinopicker/#__codelineno-0-9)     "Strawberry", [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinopicker/#__codelineno-0-10) ] [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinopicker/#__codelineno-0-11) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinopicker/#__codelineno-0-12)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinopicker/#__codelineno-0-13) def main(page: ft.Page):     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinopicker/#__codelineno-0-14)     page.horizontal_alignment = ft.CrossAxisAlignment.CENTER [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinopicker/#__codelineno-0-15)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinopicker/#__codelineno-0-16)     selected_fruit_ref = ft.Ref[ft.Text]() [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinopicker/#__codelineno-0-17)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinopicker/#__codelineno-0-18)     def handle_selection_change(e: ft.Event[ft.CupertinoPicker]):        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinopicker/#__codelineno-0-19)         selected_fruit_ref.current.value = FRUITS[int(e.data)]        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinopicker/#__codelineno-0-20)         page.update() [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinopicker/#__codelineno-0-21)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinopicker/#__codelineno-0-22)     cupertino_picker = ft.CupertinoPicker(        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinopicker/#__codelineno-0-23)         selected_index=3,        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinopicker/#__codelineno-0-24)         magnification=1.22,        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinopicker/#__codelineno-0-25)         squeeze=1.2,        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinopicker/#__codelineno-0-26)         use_magnifier=True,        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinopicker/#__codelineno-0-27)         on_change=handle_selection_change,        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinopicker/#__codelineno-0-28)         controls=[ft.Text(value=f) for f in FRUITS],    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinopicker/#__codelineno-0-29)     ) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinopicker/#__codelineno-0-30)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinopicker/#__codelineno-0-31)     page.add(        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinopicker/#__codelineno-0-32)         ft.Row(            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinopicker/#__codelineno-0-33)             tight=True,            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinopicker/#__codelineno-0-34)             controls=[                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinopicker/#__codelineno-0-35)                 ft.Text("Selected Fruit:", size=23),                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinopicker/#__codelineno-0-36)                 ft.TextButton(                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinopicker/#__codelineno-0-37)                     content=ft.Text(value=FRUITS[3], ref=selected_fruit_ref, size=23),                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinopicker/#__codelineno-0-38)                     style=ft.ButtonStyle(color=ft.Colors.BLUE),                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinopicker/#__codelineno-0-39)                     on_click=lambda e: page.show_dialog(                        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinopicker/#__codelineno-0-40)                         ft.CupertinoBottomSheet(                            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinopicker/#__codelineno-0-41)                             content=cupertino_picker,                            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinopicker/#__codelineno-0-42)                             height=216,                            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinopicker/#__codelineno-0-43)                             padding=ft.Padding.only(top=6),                        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinopicker/#__codelineno-0-44)                         )                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinopicker/#__codelineno-0-45)                     ),                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinopicker/#__codelineno-0-46)                 ),            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinopicker/#__codelineno-0-47)             ],        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinopicker/#__codelineno-0-48)         ),    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinopicker/#__codelineno-0-49)     ) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinopicker/#__codelineno-0-50) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinopicker/#__codelineno-0-51)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinopicker/#__codelineno-0-52) ft.run(main)`

[![fruit-selection](https://docs.flet.dev/examples/controls/cupertino_picker/media/fruit_selection.gif)](https://docs.flet.dev/examples/controls/cupertino_picker/media/fruit_selection.gif)

Properties[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinopicker/#flet.CupertinoPicker-properties "Permanent link")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### bgcolor `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinopicker/#flet.CupertinoPicker.bgcolor "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinopicker/#__codelineno-0-1) bgcolor: [ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None = None`

The background color of this timer picker.

### controls `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinopicker/#flet.CupertinoPicker.controls "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinopicker/#__codelineno-0-1) controls: [list](https://docs.python.org/3/glossary.html#term-list) [[Control](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/control/#flet.Control) ] = [field](https://docs.python.org/3/library/dataclasses.html#dataclasses.field "<code>dataclasses.field</code>") (default_factory=[list](https://docs.python.org/3/glossary.html#term-list) )`

A list of controls representing items in this picker.

### default\_selection\_overlay\_bgcolor `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinopicker/#flet.CupertinoPicker.default_selection_overlay_bgcolor "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinopicker/#__codelineno-0-1) default_selection_overlay_bgcolor: [ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  = (     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinopicker/#__codelineno-0-2)     [TERTIARY_SYSTEM_FILL](https://docs.flet.dev/types/cupertinocolors/#flet.CupertinoColors.TERTIARY_SYSTEM_FILL) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinopicker/#__codelineno-0-3) )`

The default background color of the [`selection_overlay`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinopicker/#flet.CupertinoPicker.selection_overlay)
.

### diameter\_ratio `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinopicker/#flet.CupertinoPicker.diameter_ratio "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinopicker/#__codelineno-0-1) diameter_ratio: [Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  = 1.07`

Relative ratio between this picker's height and the simulated cylinder's diameter.

Smaller values create more pronounced curvatures in the scrollable wheel.

### item\_extent `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinopicker/#flet.CupertinoPicker.item_extent "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinopicker/#__codelineno-0-1) item_extent: [Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  = 32.0`

The uniform height of all [`controls`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinopicker/#flet.CupertinoPicker.controls)
.

Raises:

*   `[ValueError](https://docs.python.org/3/library/exceptions.html#ValueError) ` –
    
    If it is not strictly greater than `0.0`.
    

### looping `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinopicker/#flet.CupertinoPicker.looping "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinopicker/#__codelineno-0-1) looping: [bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool)  = False`

If `True`, children on a wheel can be scrolled in a loop.

### magnification `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinopicker/#flet.CupertinoPicker.magnification "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinopicker/#__codelineno-0-1) magnification: [Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  = 1.0`

The zoomed-in or magnification rate of the magnifier.

If the value is greater than `1.0`, the item in the center will be zoomed in by that rate, and it will also be rendered as flat, not cylindrical like the rest of the list. The item will be zoomed-out if magnification is less than `1.0`.

Note

Has effect only if [`use_magnifier`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinopicker/#flet.CupertinoPicker.use_magnifier)
 is `True`.

Raises:

*   `[ValueError](https://docs.python.org/3/library/exceptions.html#ValueError) ` –
    
    If it is not strictly greater than `0.0`.
    

### off\_axis\_fraction `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinopicker/#flet.CupertinoPicker.off_axis_fraction "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinopicker/#__codelineno-0-1) off_axis_fraction: [Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  = 0.0`

How much the wheel is horizontally off-center, as a fraction of its width.

### selected\_index `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinopicker/#flet.CupertinoPicker.selected_index "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinopicker/#__codelineno-0-1) selected_index: [int](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#int)  = 0`

The index (starting from `0`) of the selected item in the [`controls`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinopicker/#flet.CupertinoPicker.controls)
 list.

### selection\_overlay `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinopicker/#flet.CupertinoPicker.selection_overlay "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinopicker/#__codelineno-0-1) selection_overlay: [Control](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/control/#flet.Control)  | None = None`

A control overlaid on the picker to highlight the selected entry, centered and matching the height of the center row.

Defaults to a rounded rectangle in iOS 14 style with [`default_selection_overlay_bgcolor`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinopicker/#flet.CupertinoPicker.default_selection_overlay_bgcolor)
 as background color.

### squeeze `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinopicker/#flet.CupertinoPicker.squeeze "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinopicker/#__codelineno-0-1) squeeze: [Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  = 1.45`

The angular compactness of the children on the wheel.

Raises:

*   `[ValueError](https://docs.python.org/3/library/exceptions.html#ValueError) ` –
    
    If it is not strictly greater than `0.0`.
    

### use\_magnifier `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinopicker/#flet.CupertinoPicker.use_magnifier "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinopicker/#__codelineno-0-1) use_magnifier: [bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool)  = False`

Whether to use the magnifier for the center item of this picker's wheel.

Events[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinopicker/#flet.CupertinoPicker-events "Permanent link")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### on\_change `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinopicker/#flet.CupertinoPicker.on_change "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinopicker/#__codelineno-0-1) on_change: [ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[CupertinoPicker](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinopicker/#flet.CupertinoPicker) ] | None = (     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinopicker/#__codelineno-0-2)     None [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinopicker/#__codelineno-0-3) )`

Called when the selection changes.

Back to top

# CodeEditor - Flet

 

[Skip to content](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#flet_code_editor.CodeEditor)

CodeEditor
==========

Edit and highlight source code.

[![CodeEditor](https://docs.flet.dev/test-images/examples/extensions/code_editor/golden/macos/code_editor/image_for_docs.png)](https://docs.flet.dev/test-images/examples/extensions/code_editor/golden/macos/code_editor/image_for_docs.png)

Basic CodeEditor

Inherits: `[LayoutControl](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/layoutcontrol/#flet.LayoutControl) `

Properties

*   **`[autocomplete](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#flet_code_editor.CodeEditor.autocomplete) `**(`[bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool)  | None`) –
    
    Whether autocomplete is enabled.
    
*   **`[autocomplete_words](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#flet_code_editor.CodeEditor.autocomplete_words) `**(`[list](https://docs.python.org/3/glossary.html#term-list) [[str](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str) ] | None`) –
    
    Words offered by autocomplete.
    
*   **`[autofocus](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#flet_code_editor.CodeEditor.autofocus) `**(`[bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool)  | None`) –
    
    Whether this editor should focus itself if nothing else is focused.
    
*   **`[code_theme](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#flet_code_editor.CodeEditor.code_theme) `**(`[CodeTheme](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/types/codetheme/#flet_code_editor.CodeTheme)  | [CustomCodeTheme](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/types/customcodetheme/#flet_code_editor.CustomCodeTheme)  | None`) –
    
    Syntax highlighting theme.
    
*   **`[gutter_style](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#flet_code_editor.CodeEditor.gutter_style) `**(`[GutterStyle](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/types/gutterstyle/#flet_code_editor.GutterStyle)  | None`) –
    
    Gutter styling.
    
*   **`[language](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#flet_code_editor.CodeEditor.language) `**(`[CodeLanguage](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/types/codelanguage/#flet_code_editor.CodeLanguage)  | None`) –
    
    Syntax highlighting language.
    
*   **`[padding](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#flet_code_editor.CodeEditor.padding) `**(`[PaddingValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.PaddingValue)  | None`) –
    
    Padding around the editor.
    
*   **`[read_only](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#flet_code_editor.CodeEditor.read_only) `**(`[bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool)  | None`) –
    
    Whether the editor is read-only.
    
*   **`[selection](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#flet_code_editor.CodeEditor.selection) `**(`[TextSelection](https://docs.flet.dev/types/textselection/#flet.TextSelection)  | None`) –
    
    Represents the current text selection or caret position in the editor.
    
*   **`[text_style](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#flet_code_editor.CodeEditor.text_style) `**(`[TextStyle](https://docs.flet.dev/types/textstyle/#flet.TextStyle)  | None`) –
    
    Text style for the editor content.
    
*   **`[value](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#flet_code_editor.CodeEditor.value) `**(`[str](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str)  | None`) –
    
    Full text including folded sections and service comments.
    

Events

*   **`[on_blur](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#flet_code_editor.CodeEditor.on_blur) `**(`[ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[CodeEditor](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#flet_code_editor.CodeEditor) ] | None`) –
    
    Called when the editor loses focus.
    
*   **`[on_change](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#flet_code_editor.CodeEditor.on_change) `**(`[ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[CodeEditor](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#flet_code_editor.CodeEditor) ] | None`) –
    
    Called when the editor text changes.
    
*   **`[on_focus](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#flet_code_editor.CodeEditor.on_focus) `**(`[ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[CodeEditor](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#flet_code_editor.CodeEditor) ] | None`) –
    
    Called when the editor receives focus.
    
*   **`[on_selection_change](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#flet_code_editor.CodeEditor.on_selection_change) `**(`[EventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.EventHandler) [[TextSelectionChangeEvent](https://docs.flet.dev/types/textselectionchangeevent/#flet.TextSelectionChangeEvent) [[CodeEditor](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#flet_code_editor.CodeEditor) ]] | None`) –
    
    Called when the text selection or caret position changes.
    

Methods

*   **`[focus](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#flet_code_editor.CodeEditor.focus) `** –
    
    Request focus for this editor.
    
*   **`[fold_at](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#flet_code_editor.CodeEditor.fold_at) `** –
    
    Fold the block starting at the given line number.
    
*   **`[fold_comment_at_line_zero](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#flet_code_editor.CodeEditor.fold_comment_at_line_zero) `** –
    
    Fold the comment block at line 0.
    
*   **`[fold_imports](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#flet_code_editor.CodeEditor.fold_imports) `** –
    
    Fold import sections.
    

Usage[#](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#usage "Permanent link")

-------------------------------------------------------------------

Add `flet-code-editor` to your project dependencies:

uvpip

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#__codelineno-0-1) uv add flet-code-editor`

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#__codelineno-1-1) pip install flet-code-editor  # (1)!`

1.  After this, you will have to manually add this package to your `requirements.txt` or `pyproject.toml`.

Examples[#](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#examples "Permanent link")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Basic example[#](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#basic-example "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#__codelineno-2-1) import flet_code_editor as fce [](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#__codelineno-2-2)[](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#__codelineno-2-3) import flet as ft [](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#__codelineno-2-4)[](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#__codelineno-2-5) CODE = """import flet as ft [](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#__codelineno-2-6)[](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#__codelineno-2-7) def main(page: ft.Page):     [](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#__codelineno-2-8)     counter = ft.Text("0", size=50, data=0) [](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#__codelineno-2-9)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#__codelineno-2-10)     def btn_click(e):        [](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#__codelineno-2-11)         counter.data += 1        [](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#__codelineno-2-12)         counter.value = str(counter.data)        [](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#__codelineno-2-13)         counter.update() [](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#__codelineno-2-14)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#__codelineno-2-15)     page.floating_action_button = ft.FloatingActionButton(        [](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#__codelineno-2-16)         icon=ft.Icons.ADD, on_click=btn_click    [](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#__codelineno-2-17)     )    [](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#__codelineno-2-18)     page.add(        [](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#__codelineno-2-19)         ft.SafeArea(            [](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#__codelineno-2-20)             ft.Container(                [](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#__codelineno-2-21)                 counter,                [](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#__codelineno-2-22)                 alignment=ft.Alignment.CENTER,                [](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#__codelineno-2-23)                 expand=True,            [](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#__codelineno-2-24)             ),            [](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#__codelineno-2-25)             expand=True,        [](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#__codelineno-2-26)         ),    [](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#__codelineno-2-27)     ) [](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#__codelineno-2-28)[](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#__codelineno-2-29) ft.run(main) [](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#__codelineno-2-30) """ [](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#__codelineno-2-31) [](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#__codelineno-2-32)[](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#__codelineno-2-33) def main(page: ft.Page):     [](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#__codelineno-2-34)     page.add(        [](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#__codelineno-2-35)         fce.CodeEditor(            [](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#__codelineno-2-36)             language=fce.CodeLanguage.PYTHON,            [](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#__codelineno-2-37)             code_theme=fce.CodeTheme.ATOM_ONE_LIGHT,            [](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#__codelineno-2-38)             value=CODE,            [](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#__codelineno-2-39)             expand=True,            [](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#__codelineno-2-40)             on_change=lambda e: print("Changed:", e.data),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#__codelineno-2-41)         )    [](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#__codelineno-2-42)     ) [](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#__codelineno-2-43) [](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#__codelineno-2-44)[](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#__codelineno-2-45) if __name__ == "__main__":     [](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#__codelineno-2-46)     ft.run(main)`

[![code-editor-example-1](https://docs.flet.dev/test-images/examples/extensions/code_editor/golden/macos/code_editor/example_1.png)](https://docs.flet.dev/test-images/examples/extensions/code_editor/golden/macos/code_editor/example_1.png)

### Selection handling[#](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#selection-handling "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#__codelineno-3-1) import flet_code_editor as fce [](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#__codelineno-3-2)[](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#__codelineno-3-3) [![code-editor-example-3](https://docs.flet.dev/test-images/examples/extensions/code_editor/golden/macos/code_editor/example_3.png)](https://docs.flet.dev/test-images/examples/extensions/code_editor/golden/macos/code_editor/example_3.png)

Properties[#](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#flet_code_editor.CodeEditor-properties "Permanent link")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### autocomplete `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#flet_code_editor.CodeEditor.autocomplete "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#__codelineno-0-1) autocomplete: [bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool)  | None = False`

Whether autocomplete is enabled.

### autocomplete\_words `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#flet_code_editor.CodeEditor.autocomplete_words "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#__codelineno-0-1) autocomplete_words: [list](https://docs.python.org/3/glossary.html#term-list) [[str](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str) ] | None = None`

Words offered by autocomplete.

### autofocus `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#flet_code_editor.CodeEditor.autofocus "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#__codelineno-0-1) autofocus: [bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool)  | None = False`

Whether this editor should focus itself if nothing else is focused.

### code\_theme `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#flet_code_editor.CodeEditor.code_theme "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#__codelineno-0-1) code_theme: [CodeTheme](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/types/codetheme/#flet_code_editor.CodeTheme)  | [CustomCodeTheme](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/types/customcodetheme/#flet_code_editor.CustomCodeTheme)  | None = None`

Syntax highlighting theme.

### gutter\_style `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#flet_code_editor.CodeEditor.gutter_style "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#__codelineno-0-1) gutter_style: [GutterStyle](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/types/gutterstyle/#flet_code_editor.GutterStyle)  | None = None`

Gutter styling.

### language `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#flet_code_editor.CodeEditor.language "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#__codelineno-0-1) language: [CodeLanguage](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/types/codelanguage/#flet_code_editor.CodeLanguage)  | None = None`

Syntax highlighting language.

### padding `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#flet_code_editor.CodeEditor.padding "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#__codelineno-0-1) padding: [PaddingValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.PaddingValue)  | None = None`

Padding around the editor.

### read\_only `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#flet_code_editor.CodeEditor.read_only "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#__codelineno-0-1) read_only: [bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool)  | None = False`

Whether the editor is read-only.

### selection `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#flet_code_editor.CodeEditor.selection "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#__codelineno-0-1) selection: [TextSelection](https://docs.flet.dev/types/textselection/#flet.TextSelection)  | None = None`

Represents the current text selection or caret position in the editor.

Setting this property updates the editor selection and may trigger [`on_selection_change`](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#flet_code_editor.CodeEditor.on_selection_change)
 when the editor is focused.

### text\_style `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#flet_code_editor.CodeEditor.text_style "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#__codelineno-0-1) text_style: [TextStyle](https://docs.flet.dev/types/textstyle/#flet.TextStyle)  | None = None`

Text style for the editor content.

### value `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#flet_code_editor.CodeEditor.value "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#__codelineno-0-1) value: [str](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str)  | None = None`

Full text including folded sections and service comments.

Events[#](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#flet_code_editor.CodeEditor-events "Permanent link")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### on\_blur `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#flet_code_editor.CodeEditor.on_blur "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#__codelineno-0-1) on_blur: [ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[CodeEditor](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#flet_code_editor.CodeEditor) ] | None = None`

Called when the editor loses focus.

### on\_change `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#flet_code_editor.CodeEditor.on_change "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#__codelineno-0-1) on_change: [ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[CodeEditor](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#flet_code_editor.CodeEditor) ] | None = None`

Called when the editor text changes.

### on\_focus `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#flet_code_editor.CodeEditor.on_focus "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#__codelineno-0-1) on_focus: [ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[CodeEditor](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#flet_code_editor.CodeEditor) ] | None = None`

Called when the editor receives focus.

### on\_selection\_change `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#flet_code_editor.CodeEditor.on_selection_change "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#__codelineno-0-1) on_selection_change: (     [](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#__codelineno-0-2)     [EventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.EventHandler) [[TextSelectionChangeEvent](https://docs.flet.dev/types/textselectionchangeevent/#flet.TextSelectionChangeEvent) [[CodeEditor](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#flet_code_editor.CodeEditor) ]]    [](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#__codelineno-0-3)     | None [](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#__codelineno-0-4) ) = None`

Called when the text selection or caret position changes.

Methods[#](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#flet_code_editor.CodeEditor-methods "Permanent link")

### focus `async` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/codeeditor/#flet_code_editor.CodeEditor.focus "Permanent link")

# CupertinoSegmentedButton - Flet

 

[Skip to content](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinosegmentedbutton/#flet.CupertinoSegmentedButton)

CupertinoSegmentedButton
========================

An iOS-style segmented button.

Example:

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinosegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-0-1) ft.CupertinoSegmentedButton(     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinosegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-0-2)     selected_index=1,    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinosegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-0-3)     controls=[        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinosegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-0-4)         ft.Text("One"),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinosegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-0-5)         ft.Text("Two"),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinosegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-0-6)         ft.Text("Three"),    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinosegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-0-7)     ], [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinosegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-0-8) )`

[![CupertinoSegmentedButton](https://docs.flet.dev/test-images/examples/cupertino/golden/macos/cupertino_segmented_button/image_for_docs.png)](https://docs.flet.dev/test-images/examples/cupertino/golden/macos/cupertino_segmented_button/image_for_docs.png)

Basic CupertinoSegmentedButton

Inherits: `[LayoutControl](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/layoutcontrol/#flet.LayoutControl) `

Properties

*   **`[border_color](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinosegmentedbutton/#flet.CupertinoSegmentedButton.border_color) `**(`[ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None`) –
    
    The color of this button's border.
    
*   **`[click_color](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinosegmentedbutton/#flet.CupertinoSegmentedButton.click_color) `**(`[ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None`) –
    
    The color used to fill the background of this control when temporarily interacting with through a long press or drag.
    
*   **`[controls](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinosegmentedbutton/#flet.CupertinoSegmentedButton.controls) `**(`[list](https://docs.python.org/3/glossary.html#term-list) [[Control](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/control/#flet.Control) ]`) –
    
    The list of segments to be displayed.
    
*   **`[disabled_color](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinosegmentedbutton/#flet.CupertinoSegmentedButton.disabled_color) `**(`[ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None`) –
    
    The color used to fill the background of the segment when it is disabled.
    
*   **`[disabled_text_color](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinosegmentedbutton/#flet.CupertinoSegmentedButton.disabled_text_color) `**(`[ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None`) –
    
    The color used for the text of the segment when it is disabled.
    
*   **`[padding](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinosegmentedbutton/#flet.CupertinoSegmentedButton.padding) `**(`[PaddingValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.PaddingValue)  | None`) –
    
    This button's padding.
    
*   **`[selected_color](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinosegmentedbutton/#flet.CupertinoSegmentedButton.selected_color) `**(`[ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None`) –
    
    The color of this button when it is selected.
    
*   **`[selected_index](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinosegmentedbutton/#flet.CupertinoSegmentedButton.selected_index) `**(`[int](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#int) `) –
    
    The index (starting from 0) of the selected segment in the [`controls`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinosegmentedbutton/#flet.CupertinoSegmentedButton.controls)
     list.
    
*   **`[unselected_color](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinosegmentedbutton/#flet.CupertinoSegmentedButton.unselected_color) `**(`[ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None`) –
    
    The color of this button when it is not selected.
    

Events

*   **`[on_change](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinosegmentedbutton/#flet.CupertinoSegmentedButton.on_change) `**(`[ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[CupertinoSegmentedButton](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinosegmentedbutton/#flet.CupertinoSegmentedButton) ] | None`) –
    
    Called when the state of the button is changed - when one of the `controls` is clicked.
    

Examples[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinosegmentedbutton/#examples "Permanent link")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

[Live example](https://flet-controls-gallery.fly.dev/buttons/cupertinosegmentedbutton)

### Basic Example[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinosegmentedbutton/#basic-example "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinosegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-0-1) import flet as ft [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinosegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-0-2) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinosegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-0-3)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinosegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-0-4) def main(page: ft.Page):     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinosegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-0-5)     page.theme_mode = ft.ThemeMode.LIGHT [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinosegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-0-6)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinosegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-0-7)     page.add(        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinosegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-0-8)         ft.CupertinoSegmentedButton(            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinosegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-0-9)             selected_index=1,            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinosegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-0-10)             selected_color=ft.Colors.RED_400,            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinosegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-0-11)             on_change=lambda e: print(f"selected_index: {e.data}"),            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinosegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-0-12)             padding=ft.Padding.symmetric(vertical=20, horizontal=50),            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinosegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-0-13)             controls=[                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinosegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-0-14) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinosegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-0-16)                     padding=ft.Padding.symmetric(vertical=10, horizontal=30),                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinosegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-0-17)                     content=ft.Text("Two"),                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinosegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-0-18)                 ),                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinosegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-0-19)               [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinosegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-0-21)                     content=ft.Text("Three"),                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinosegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-0-22)                 ),            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinosegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-0-23)             ],        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinosegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-0-24)         ),    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinosegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-0-25)     ) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinosegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-0-26) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinosegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-0-27)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinosegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-0-28) ft.run(main)`

### Adjusting segments padding[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinosegmentedbutton/#adjusting-segments-padding "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinosegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-1-1) import flet as ft [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinosegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-1-2) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinosegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-1-3)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinosegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-1-4) def main(page: ft.Page):     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinosegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-1-5)     page.theme_mode = ft.ThemeMode.LIGHT [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinosegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-1-6)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinosegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-1-7)     def handle_vertical_change(e: ft.Event[ft.Slider]):        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinosegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-1-8)         segmented_button.controls[1].padding = ft.Padding.only(            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinosegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-1-9)             top=e.control.value, bottom=e.control.value        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinosegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-1-10)         )        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinosegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-1-11)         page.update() [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinosegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-1-12)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinosegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-1-13)     def handle_horizontal_change(e: ft.Event[ft.Slider]):        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinosegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-1-14)         segmented_button.controls[2].padding = ft.Padding.only(            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinosegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-1-15)             left=e.control.value, right=e.control.value        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinosegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-1-16)         )        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinosegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-1-17)         page.update() [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinosegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-1-21)             selected_index=1,            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinosegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-1-22) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinosegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-1-24)             on_change=lambda e: print(f"selected_index: {e.data}"),            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinosegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-1-25)             controls=[                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinosegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-1-26) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinosegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-1-30)                 ),                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinosegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-1-31)                 ft.Container(                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinosegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-1-32)                     padding=ft.Padding.symmetric(vertical=0, horizontal=30),                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinosegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-1-33)                     content=ft.Text("Some"), ],        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinosegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-1-36)         ),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinosegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-1-37)         ft.Text("Vertical padding button 1: "),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinosegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-1-38)         ft.Slider( Properties[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinosegmentedbutton/#flet.CupertinoSegmentedButton-properties "Permanent link")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### border\_color `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinosegmentedbutton/#flet.CupertinoSegmentedButton.border_color "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinosegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-0-1) border_color: [ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None = None`

The color of this button's border.

### click\_color `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinosegmentedbutton/#flet.CupertinoSegmentedButton.click_color "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinosegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-0-1) click_color: [ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None = None`

The color used to fill the background of this control when temporarily interacting with through a long press or drag.

Defaults to the [`selected_color`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinosegmentedbutton/#flet.CupertinoSegmentedButton.selected_color)
 with 20% opacity.

### controls `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinosegmentedbutton/#flet.CupertinoSegmentedButton.controls "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinosegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-0-1) controls: [list](https://docs.python.org/3/glossary.html#term-list) [[Control](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/control/#flet.Control) ]`

The list of segments to be displayed.

Raises:

*   `[ValueError](https://docs.python.org/3/library/exceptions.html#ValueError) ` –
    
    If it does not contain at least two visible `Control`s.
    

### disabled\_color `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinosegmentedbutton/#flet.CupertinoSegmentedButton.disabled_color "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinosegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-0-1) disabled_color: [ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None = None`

The color used to fill the background of the segment when it is disabled.

If `None`, this color will be 50% opacity of the [`selected_color`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinosegmentedbutton/#flet.CupertinoSegmentedButton.selected_color)
 when the segment is selected. If the segment is unselected, this color will be set to the [`unselected_color`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinosegmentedbutton/#flet.CupertinoSegmentedButton.unselected_color)
.

### disabled\_text\_color `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinosegmentedbutton/#flet.CupertinoSegmentedButton.disabled_text_color "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinosegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-0-1) disabled_text_color: [ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None = None`

The color used for the text of the segment when it is disabled.

### padding `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinosegmentedbutton/#flet.CupertinoSegmentedButton.padding "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinosegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-0-1) padding: [PaddingValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.PaddingValue)  | None = None`

This button's padding.

### selected\_color `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinosegmentedbutton/#flet.CupertinoSegmentedButton.selected_color "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinosegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-0-1) selected_color: [ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None = None`

The color of this button when it is selected.

### selected\_index `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinosegmentedbutton/#flet.CupertinoSegmentedButton.selected_index "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinosegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-0-1) selected_index: [int](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#int)  = 0`

The index (starting from 0) of the selected segment in the [`controls`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinosegmentedbutton/#flet.CupertinoSegmentedButton.controls)
 list.

Raises:

*   `[IndexError](https://docs.python.org/3/library/exceptions.html#IndexError) ` –
    
    If [`selected_index`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinosegmentedbutton/#flet.CupertinoSegmentedButton.selected_index)
     is out of range relative to the visible controls.
    

### unselected\_color `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinosegmentedbutton/#flet.CupertinoSegmentedButton.unselected_color "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinosegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-0-1) unselected_color: [ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None = None`

The color of this button when it is not selected.

Events[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinosegmentedbutton/#flet.CupertinoSegmentedButton-events "Permanent link")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### on\_change `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinosegmentedbutton/#flet.CupertinoSegmentedButton.on_change "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinosegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-0-1) on_change: (     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinosegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-0-2)     [ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[CupertinoSegmentedButton](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinosegmentedbutton/#flet.CupertinoSegmentedButton) ] | None [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinosegmentedbutton/#__codelineno-0-3) ) = None`

Called when the state of the button is changed - when one of the `controls` is clicked.

# KeyboardListener - Flet

 

[Skip to content](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/keyboardlistener/#flet.KeyboardListener)

KeyboardListener
================

A control that calls a callback whenever the user presses or releases a key on a keyboard.

Inherits: `[Control](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/control/#flet.Control) `

Properties

*   **`[autofocus](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/keyboardlistener/#flet.KeyboardListener.autofocus) `**(`[bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool) `) –
    
    True if this control will be selected as the initial focus when no other node in its scope is currently focused.
    
*   **`[content](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/keyboardlistener/#flet.KeyboardListener.content) `**(`[Control](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/control/#flet.Control) `) –
    
    The content control of the keyboard listener.
    
*   **`[include_semantics](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/keyboardlistener/#flet.KeyboardListener.include_semantics) `**(`[bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool) `) –
    
    Include semantics information in this control.
    

Events

*   **`[on_key_down](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/keyboardlistener/#flet.KeyboardListener.on_key_down) `**(`[EventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.EventHandler) [[KeyDownEvent](https://docs.flet.dev/types/keydownevent/#flet.KeyDownEvent) ] | None`) –
    
    Fires when a keyboard key is pressed.
    
*   **`[on_key_repeat](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/keyboardlistener/#flet.KeyboardListener.on_key_repeat) `**(`[EventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.EventHandler) [[KeyRepeatEvent](https://docs.flet.dev/types/keyrepeatevent/#flet.KeyRepeatEvent) ] | None`) –
    
    Fires when a keyboard key is being hold, causing repeated events.
    
*   **`[on_key_up](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/keyboardlistener/#flet.KeyboardListener.on_key_up) `**(`[EventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.EventHandler) [[KeyUpEvent](https://docs.flet.dev/types/keyupevent/#flet.KeyUpEvent) ] | None`) –
    
    Fires when a keyboard key is released.
    

Methods

*   **`[focus](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/keyboardlistener/#flet.KeyboardListener.focus) `** –
    
    Requests focus for this control.
    

Examples[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/keyboardlistener/#examples "Permanent link")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Press any keys[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/keyboardlistener/#press-any-keys "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/keyboardlistener/#__codelineno-0-1) import flet as ft [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/keyboardlistener/#__codelineno-0-2) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/keyboardlistener/#__codelineno-0-3)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/keyboardlistener/#__codelineno-0-4) async def main(page: ft.Page):     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/keyboardlistener/#__codelineno-0-5)     pressed_keys = set() [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/keyboardlistener/#__codelineno-0-6)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/keyboardlistener/#__codelineno-0-7)     def key_down(e: ft.KeyDownEvent):        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/keyboardlistener/#__codelineno-0-8)         pressed_keys.add(e.key)        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/keyboardlistener/#__codelineno-0-9)         keys.controls = [ft.Text(k, size=20) for k in pressed_keys] [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/keyboardlistener/#__codelineno-0-10)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/keyboardlistener/#__codelineno-0-11)     def key_up(e: ft.KeyUpEvent):        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/keyboardlistener/#__codelineno-0-12)         pressed_keys.remove(e.key)        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/keyboardlistener/#__codelineno-0-13)         keys.controls = [ft.Text(k, size=20) for k in pressed_keys] [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/keyboardlistener/#__codelineno-0-14)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/keyboardlistener/#__codelineno-0-15)     page.add(        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/keyboardlistener/#__codelineno-0-16)         ft.Text("Press any keys..."),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/keyboardlistener/#__codelineno-0-17)         ft.KeyboardListener(            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/keyboardlistener/#__codelineno-0-18)             content=(keys := ft.Row()),            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/keyboardlistener/#__codelineno-0-19)             autofocus=True,            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/keyboardlistener/#__codelineno-0-20)             on_key_down=key_down,            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/keyboardlistener/#__codelineno-0-21)             on_key_up=key_up,        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/keyboardlistener/#__codelineno-0-22)         ),    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/keyboardlistener/#__codelineno-0-23)     ) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/keyboardlistener/#__codelineno-0-24) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/keyboardlistener/#__codelineno-0-25)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/keyboardlistener/#__codelineno-0-26) ft.run(main)`
