# CupertinoListTile - Flet

 

[Skip to content](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinolisttile/#flet.CupertinoListTile)

CupertinoListTile
=================

An iOS-style list tile.

The CupertinoListTile is a Cupertino equivalent of the Material [`ListTile`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/listtile/#flet.ListTile)
.

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinolisttile/#__codelineno-0-1) ft.CupertinoListTile(     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinolisttile/#__codelineno-0-2)     title="Notifications",    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinolisttile/#__codelineno-0-3)     subtitle="Enabled",    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinolisttile/#__codelineno-0-4)     width=400,    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinolisttile/#__codelineno-0-5)     leading=ft.Icon(ft.Icons.NOTIFICATIONS_OUTLINED),    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinolisttile/#__codelineno-0-6)     trailing=ft.Icon(ft.Icons.CHEVRON_RIGHT),    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinolisttile/#__codelineno-0-7)     bgcolor=ft.Colors.SURFACE_CONTAINER_LOW, [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinolisttile/#__codelineno-0-8) )`

[![CupertinoListTile](https://docs.flet.dev/test-images/examples/cupertino/golden/macos/cupertino_list_tile/image_for_docs.png)](https://docs.flet.dev/test-images/examples/cupertino/golden/macos/cupertino_list_tile/image_for_docs.png)

Basic CupertinoListTile

Inherits: `[LayoutControl](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/layoutcontrol/#flet.LayoutControl) `

Properties

*   **`[additional_info](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinolisttile/#flet.CupertinoListTile.additional_info) `**(`[StrOrControl](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.StrOrControl)  | None`) –
    
    A `Control` to display on the right of the list tile, before [`trailing`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinolisttile/#flet.CupertinoListTile.trailing)
    .
    
*   **`[bgcolor](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinolisttile/#flet.CupertinoListTile.bgcolor) `**(`[ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None`) –
    
    The background color of this list tile.
    
*   **`[bgcolor_activated](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinolisttile/#flet.CupertinoListTile.bgcolor_activated) `**(`[ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None`) –
    
    The background color of this list tile after it was tapped.
    
*   **`[leading](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinolisttile/#flet.CupertinoListTile.leading) `**(`[IconDataOrControl](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.IconDataOrControl)  | None`) –
    
    A control to display before the [`title`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinolisttile/#flet.CupertinoListTile.title)
    .
    
*   **`[leading_size](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinolisttile/#flet.CupertinoListTile.leading_size) `**(`[Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  | None`) –
    
    Used to constrain the width and height of [`leading`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinolisttile/#flet.CupertinoListTile.leading)
     control.
    
*   **`[leading_to_title](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinolisttile/#flet.CupertinoListTile.leading_to_title) `**(`[Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  | None`) –
    
    The horizontal space between [`leading`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinolisttile/#flet.CupertinoListTile.leading)
     and `[`title\`\]\[flet.controls.cupertino.cupertino\_list\_tile.CupertinoListTile.title\].
    
*   **`[notched](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinolisttile/#flet.CupertinoListTile.notched) `**(`[bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool) `) –
    
    Whether this list tile should be created in an "Inset Grouped" form, known from either iOS Notes or Reminders app.
    
*   **`[padding](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinolisttile/#flet.CupertinoListTile.padding) `**(`[PaddingValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.PaddingValue)  | None`) –
    
    The tile's internal padding. Insets a CupertinoListTile's contents: its [`leading`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinolisttile/#flet.CupertinoListTile.leading)
    , [`title`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinolisttile/#flet.CupertinoListTile.title)
    , [`subtitle`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinolisttile/#flet.CupertinoListTile.subtitle)
    , [`additional_info`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinolisttile/#flet.CupertinoListTile.additional_info)
     and [`trailing`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinolisttile/#flet.CupertinoListTile.trailing)
     controls.
    
*   **`[subtitle](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinolisttile/#flet.CupertinoListTile.subtitle) `**(`[StrOrControl](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.StrOrControl)  | None`) –
    
    Additional content displayed below the [`title`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinolisttile/#flet.CupertinoListTile.title)
    .
    
*   **`[title](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinolisttile/#flet.CupertinoListTile.title) `**(`[StrOrControl](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.StrOrControl) `) –
    
    The primary content of this list tile.
    
*   **`[toggle_inputs](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinolisttile/#flet.CupertinoListTile.toggle_inputs) `**(`[bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool) `) –
    
    Whether clicking on this tile should toggle the state of (visible) toggleable controls like [`Radio`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#flet.Radio)
    , [`Checkbox`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#flet.Checkbox)
     or [`Switch`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#flet.Switch)
     inside it.
    
*   **`[trailing](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinolisttile/#flet.CupertinoListTile.trailing) `**(`[IconDataOrControl](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.IconDataOrControl)  | None`) –
    
    A control to display after the [`title`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinolisttile/#flet.CupertinoListTile.title)
    .
    
*   **`[url](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinolisttile/#flet.CupertinoListTile.url) `**(`[str](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str)  | [Url](https://docs.flet.dev/types/url/#flet.Url)  | None`) –
    
    The URL to open when this button is clicked.
    

Events

*   **`[on_click](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinolisttile/#flet.CupertinoListTile.on_click) `**(`[ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[CupertinoListTile](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinolisttile/#flet.CupertinoListTile) ] | None`) –
    
    Called when a user clicks/taps the list tile.
    

Examples[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinolisttile/#examples "Permanent link")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

[Live example](https://flet-controls-gallery.fly.dev/layout/cupertinolisttile)

### Notched and non-notched list tiles[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinolisttile/#notched-and-non-notched-list-tiles "Permanent link")

[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinolisttile/#__codelineno-0-3)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinolisttile/#__codelineno-0-4) def main(page: ft.Page):     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinolisttile/#__codelineno-0-5)     def handle_tile_click(e: ft.Event[ft.CupertinoListTile]):        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinolisttile/#__codelineno-0-6)         print("Tile clicked") [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinolisttile/#__codelineno-0-7)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinolisttile/#__codelineno-0-8)     page.add(        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinolisttile/#__codelineno-0-9)         ft.CupertinoListTile(         trailing=ft.Icon(ft.CupertinoIcons.ALARM),            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinolisttile/#__codelineno-0-16)             on_click=handle_tile_click, additional_info=ft.Text("Thu Jan 25"),            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinolisttile/#__codelineno-0-21)             leading=ft.Icon(ft.CupertinoIcons.GAME_CONTROLLER),            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinolisttile/#__codelineno-0-22)             title=ft.Text("CupertinoListTile: notched = True"),            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinolisttile/#__codelineno-0-23)             subtitle=ft.Text("Subtitle"),            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinolisttile/#__codelineno-0-24)             trailing=ft.Icon(ft.CupertinoIcons.ALARM),            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinolisttile/#__codelineno-0-25)             on_click=handle_tile_click, [![notched](https://docs.flet.dev/examples/controls/cupertino_list_tile/media/notched.png)](https://docs.flet.dev/examples/controls/cupertino_list_tile/media/notched.png)

Properties[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinolisttile/#flet.CupertinoListTile-properties "Permanent link")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### additional\_info `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinolisttile/#flet.CupertinoListTile.additional_info "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinolisttile/#__codelineno-0-1) additional_info: [StrOrControl](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.StrOrControl)  | None = None`

A `Control` to display on the right of the list tile, before [`trailing`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinolisttile/#flet.CupertinoListTile.trailing)
.

Similar to [`subtitle`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinolisttile/#flet.CupertinoListTile.subtitle)
, an [`additional_info`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinolisttile/#flet.CupertinoListTile.additional_info)
 is used to display additional information.

Typically a [`Text`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/text/#flet.Text)
 control.

### bgcolor `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinolisttile/#flet.CupertinoListTile.bgcolor "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinolisttile/#__codelineno-0-1) bgcolor: [ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None = None`

The background color of this list tile.

### bgcolor\_activated `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinolisttile/#flet.CupertinoListTile.bgcolor_activated "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinolisttile/#__codelineno-0-1) bgcolor_activated: [ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None = None`

The background color of this list tile after it was tapped.

### leading `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinolisttile/#flet.CupertinoListTile.leading "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinolisttile/#__codelineno-0-1) leading: [IconDataOrControl](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.IconDataOrControl)  | None = None`

A control to display before the [`title`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinolisttile/#flet.CupertinoListTile.title)
.

### leading\_size `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinolisttile/#flet.CupertinoListTile.leading_size "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinolisttile/#__codelineno-0-1) leading_size: [Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  | None = None`

Used to constrain the width and height of [`leading`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinolisttile/#flet.CupertinoListTile.leading)
 control.

Defaults to `30.0`, if [`notched`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinolisttile/#flet.CupertinoListTile.notched)
 is `True`, else `28.0`.

### leading\_to\_title `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinolisttile/#flet.CupertinoListTile.leading_to_title "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinolisttile/#__codelineno-0-1) leading_to_title: [Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  | None = None`

The horizontal space between [`leading`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinolisttile/#flet.CupertinoListTile.leading)
 and `[`title\`\]\[flet.controls.cupertino.cupertino\_list\_tile.CupertinoListTile.title\].

Defaults to `12.0`, if [`notched`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinolisttile/#flet.CupertinoListTile.notched)
 is `True`, else `16.0`.

### notched `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinolisttile/#flet.CupertinoListTile.notched "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinolisttile/#__codelineno-0-1) notched: [bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool)  = False`

Whether this list tile should be created in an "Inset Grouped" form, known from either iOS Notes or Reminders app.

### padding `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinolisttile/#flet.CupertinoListTile.padding "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinolisttile/#__codelineno-0-1) padding: [PaddingValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.PaddingValue)  | None = None`

The tile's internal padding. Insets a CupertinoListTile's contents: its [`leading`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinolisttile/#flet.CupertinoListTile.leading)
, [`title`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinolisttile/#flet.CupertinoListTile.title)
, [`subtitle`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinolisttile/#flet.CupertinoListTile.subtitle)
, [`additional_info`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinolisttile/#flet.CupertinoListTile.additional_info)
 and [`trailing`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinolisttile/#flet.CupertinoListTile.trailing)
 controls.

### subtitle `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinolisttile/#flet.CupertinoListTile.subtitle "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinolisttile/#__codelineno-0-1) subtitle: [StrOrControl](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.StrOrControl)  | None = None`

Additional content displayed below the [`title`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinolisttile/#flet.CupertinoListTile.title)
.

Typically a [`Text`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/text/#flet.Text)
 control.

### title `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinolisttile/#flet.CupertinoListTile.title "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinolisttile/#__codelineno-0-1) title: [StrOrControl](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.StrOrControl)`

The primary content of this list tile.

Typically a [`Text`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/text/#flet.Text)
 control.

Raises:

*   `[ValueError](https://docs.python.org/3/library/exceptions.html#ValueError) ` –
    
    If it is neither a string nor a visible `Control`.
    

### toggle\_inputs `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinolisttile/#flet.CupertinoListTile.toggle_inputs "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinolisttile/#__codelineno-0-1) toggle_inputs: [bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool)  = False`

Whether clicking on this tile should toggle the state of (visible) toggleable controls like [`Radio`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#flet.Radio)
, [`Checkbox`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#flet.Checkbox)
 or [`Switch`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#flet.Switch)
 inside it.

### trailing `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinolisttile/#flet.CupertinoListTile.trailing "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinolisttile/#__codelineno-0-1) trailing: [IconDataOrControl](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.IconDataOrControl)  | None = None`

A control to display after the [`title`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinolisttile/#flet.CupertinoListTile.title)
.

Typically an [`Icon`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/icon/#flet.Icon)
 control.

### url `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinolisttile/#flet.CupertinoListTile.url "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinolisttile/#__codelineno-0-1) url: [str](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str)  | [Url](https://docs.flet.dev/types/url/#flet.Url)  | None = None`

The URL to open when this button is clicked.

Additionally, if [`on_click`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinolisttile/#flet.CupertinoListTile.on_click)
 event callback is provided, it is fired after that.

Events[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinolisttile/#flet.CupertinoListTile-events "Permanent link")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### on\_click `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinolisttile/#flet.CupertinoListTile.on_click "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinolisttile/#__codelineno-0-1) on_click: [ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[CupertinoListTile](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinolisttile/#flet.CupertinoListTile) ] | None = (     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinolisttile/#__codelineno-0-2)     None [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinolisttile/#__codelineno-0-3) )`

Called when a user clicks/taps the list tile.

Back to top

# CupertinoCheckbox - Flet

 

[Skip to content](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#flet.CupertinoCheckbox)

CupertinoCheckbox
=================

A macOS style checkbox.

Checkbox allows to select one or more items from a group, or switch between two mutually exclusive options (checked or unchecked, on or off).

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#__codelineno-0-1) ft.Column(     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#__codelineno-0-2)     intrinsic_width=True,    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#__codelineno-0-3)     controls=[        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#__codelineno-0-4)         ft.CupertinoCheckbox(),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#__codelineno-0-5)         ft.CupertinoCheckbox(label="Checked", value=True),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#__codelineno-0-6)         ft.CupertinoCheckbox(label="Disabled", disabled=True),    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#__codelineno-0-7)     ], [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#__codelineno-0-8) )`

[![CupertinoCheckbox](https://docs.flet.dev/test-images/examples/cupertino/golden/macos/cupertino_checkbox/image_for_docs.png)](https://docs.flet.dev/test-images/examples/cupertino/golden/macos/cupertino_checkbox/image_for_docs.png)

Basic CupertinoCheckboxes

Inherits: `[LayoutControl](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/layoutcontrol/#flet.LayoutControl) `

Properties

*   **`[active_color](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#flet.CupertinoCheckbox.active_color) `**(`[ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None`) –
    
    The color used to fill checkbox when it is checked/selected.
    
*   **`[autofocus](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#flet.CupertinoCheckbox.autofocus) `**(`[bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool) `) –
    
    Whether this checkbox will be selected as the initial focus. If there is more than one control on a page with autofocus set, then the first one added to the page will get focus.
    
*   **`[border_side](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#flet.CupertinoCheckbox.border_side) `**(`[ControlStateValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlStateValue) [[BorderSide](https://docs.flet.dev/types/borderside/#flet.BorderSide) ] | None`) –
    
    Defines the checkbox's border sides in all or specific [`ControlState`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/controlstate/#flet.ControlState)
     states.
    
*   **`[check_color](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#flet.CupertinoCheckbox.check_color) `**(`[ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None`) –
    
    The color to use for the check icon when this checkbox is checked.
    
*   **`[fill_color](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#flet.CupertinoCheckbox.fill_color) `**(`[ControlStateValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlStateValue) [[ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue) ] | None`) –
    
    The color used to fill this checkbox in all or specific [`ControlState`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/controlstate/#flet.ControlState)
    
*   **`[focus_color](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#flet.CupertinoCheckbox.focus_color) `**(`[ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None`) –
    
    The color used for this checkbox's border shadow when it has the input focus.
    
*   **`[label](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#flet.CupertinoCheckbox.label) `**(`[str](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str)  | None`) –
    
    A clickable label to display on the right of this checkbox.
    
*   **`[label_position](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#flet.CupertinoCheckbox.label_position) `**(`[LabelPosition](https://docs.flet.dev/types/labelposition/#flet.LabelPosition) `) –
    
    Defines on which side of this checkbox the [`label`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#flet.CupertinoCheckbox.label)
     should be shown.
    
*   **`[mouse_cursor](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#flet.CupertinoCheckbox.mouse_cursor) `**(`[MouseCursor](https://docs.flet.dev/types/mousecursor/#flet.MouseCursor)  | None`) –
    
    The cursor for a mouse pointer entering or hovering over this checkbox.
    
*   **`[semantics_label](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#flet.CupertinoCheckbox.semantics_label) `**(`[str](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str)  | None`) –
    
    The semantic label for this checkbox that will be announced by screen readers.
    
*   **`[shape](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#flet.CupertinoCheckbox.shape) `**(`[OutlinedBorder](https://docs.flet.dev/types/outlinedborder/#flet.OutlinedBorder)  | None`) –
    
    The shape of this checkbox.
    
*   **`[spacing](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#flet.CupertinoCheckbox.spacing) `**(`[Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  | None`) –
    
    The space between this checkbox and the [`label`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#flet.CupertinoCheckbox.label)
    .
    
*   **`[tristate](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#flet.CupertinoCheckbox.tristate) `**(`[bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool) `) –
    
    If `True`, this checkbox's [`value`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#flet.CupertinoCheckbox.value)
     can be `True`, `False`, or `None`.
    
*   **`[value](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#flet.CupertinoCheckbox.value) `**(`[bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool)  | None`) –
    
    The value of this checkbox.
    

Events

*   **`[on_blur](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#flet.CupertinoCheckbox.on_blur) `**(`[ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[CupertinoCheckbox](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#flet.CupertinoCheckbox) ] | None`) –
    
    Called when this checkbox has lost focus.
    
*   **`[on_change](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#flet.CupertinoCheckbox.on_change) `**(`[ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[CupertinoCheckbox](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#flet.CupertinoCheckbox) ] | None`) –
    
    Called when the state of this checkbox is changed.
    
*   **`[on_focus](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#flet.CupertinoCheckbox.on_focus) `**(`[ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[CupertinoCheckbox](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#flet.CupertinoCheckbox) ] | None`) –
    
    Called when this checkbox has received focus.
    

Examples[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#examples "Permanent link")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

[Live example](https://flet-controls-gallery.fly.dev/input/cupertinocheckbox)

### Cupertino, Material and Adaptive Checkboxes[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#cupertino-material-and-adaptive-checkboxes "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#__codelineno-0-1) import flet as ft [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#__codelineno-0-2) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#__codelineno-0-3)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#__codelineno-0-4) def main(page: ft.Page):     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#__codelineno-0-5)     page.add(        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#__codelineno-0-6)         ft.CupertinoCheckbox(label="Cupertino Checkbox", value=True),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#__codelineno-0-7)         ft.Checkbox(label="Material Checkbox", value=True),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#__codelineno-0-8)         ft.Container(height=20),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#__codelineno-0-9)         ft.Text(            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#__codelineno-0-10)             value="Adaptive Checkbox shows as CupertinoCheckbox on macOS and iOS and as Checkbox on other platforms:"        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#__codelineno-0-11)         ),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#__codelineno-0-12)         ft.Checkbox(adaptive=True, label="Adaptive Checkbox", value=True),    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#__codelineno-0-13)     ) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#__codelineno-0-14) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#__codelineno-0-15)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#__codelineno-0-16) ft.run(main)`

[![cupertino-material-and-adaptive](https://docs.flet.dev/examples/controls/cupertino_checkbox/media/cupertino_material_and_adaptive.png)](https://docs.flet.dev/examples/controls/cupertino_checkbox/media/cupertino_material_and_adaptive.png)

### Styled checkboxes[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#styled-checkboxes "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#__codelineno-1-1) import flet as ft [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#__codelineno-1-2) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#__codelineno-1-3)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#__codelineno-1-4) def main(page: ft.Page):     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#__codelineno-1-5)     page.theme_mode = ft.ThemeMode.LIGHT [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#__codelineno-1-6)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#__codelineno-1-7)     page.add(        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#__codelineno-1-8)         ft.Column(            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#__codelineno-1-9)             controls=[                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#__codelineno-1-10)                 ft.CupertinoCheckbox(                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#__codelineno-1-11)                     label="Cupertino Checkbox tristate",                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#__codelineno-1-12)                     value=True,                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#__codelineno-1-13)                     tristate=True,                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#__codelineno-1-14)                     check_color=ft.Colors.GREY_900,                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#__codelineno-1-15)                     fill_color={                        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#__codelineno-1-16)                         ft.ControlState.HOVERED: ft.Colors.PINK_200,                        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#__codelineno-1-17)                         ft.ControlState.PRESSED: ft.Colors.LIME_ACCENT_200,                        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#__codelineno-1-18)                         ft.ControlState.SELECTED: ft.Colors.DEEP_ORANGE_200,                        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#__codelineno-1-19)                         ft.ControlState.DEFAULT: ft.Colors.TEAL_200,                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#__codelineno-1-20)                     },                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#__codelineno-1-21)                 ),                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#__codelineno-1-22)                 ft.CupertinoCheckbox(                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#__codelineno-1-23)                     label="Cupertino Checkbox circle border",                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#__codelineno-1-24)                     value=True,                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#__codelineno-1-25)                     shape=ft.CircleBorder(),                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#__codelineno-1-26)                     # scale=ft.Scale(2, alignment=ft.Alignment(-1, 0)),                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#__codelineno-1-27)                 ),                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#__codelineno-1-28)                 ft.CupertinoCheckbox(                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#__codelineno-1-29)                     label="Cupertino Checkbox border states",                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#__codelineno-1-30)                     value=True,                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#__codelineno-1-31)                     # v1 bug - border_side renders grey box                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#__codelineno-1-32)                     # border_side={                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#__codelineno-1-33)                     #     ft.ControlState.HOVERED: ft.BorderSide(width=5),                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#__codelineno-1-34)                     #     ft.ControlState.DEFAULT: ft.BorderSide(width=3),                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#__codelineno-1-35)                     #     ft.ControlState.FOCUSED: ft.BorderSide(),                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#__codelineno-1-36)                     # },                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#__codelineno-1-37)                     # scale=ft.Scale(2, alignment=ft.Alignment(-0.9, 0)),                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#__codelineno-1-38)                 ),                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#__codelineno-1-39)                 ft.CupertinoCheckbox(                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#__codelineno-1-40)                     label="Cupertino Checkbox label position",                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#__codelineno-1-41)                     value=True,                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#__codelineno-1-42)                     label_position=ft.LabelPosition.LEFT,                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#__codelineno-1-43)                 ),            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#__codelineno-1-44)             ]        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#__codelineno-1-45)         )    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#__codelineno-1-46)     ) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#__codelineno-1-47) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#__codelineno-1-48)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#__codelineno-1-49) ft.run(main)`

Properties[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#flet.CupertinoCheckbox-properties "Permanent link")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### active\_color `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#flet.CupertinoCheckbox.active_color "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#__codelineno-0-1) active_color: [ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None = [ACTIVE_BLUE](https://docs.flet.dev/types/cupertinocolors/#flet.CupertinoColors.ACTIVE_BLUE)`

The color used to fill checkbox when it is checked/selected.

If [`fill_color`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#flet.CupertinoCheckbox.fill_color)
 returns a non-null color in the [`ControlState.SELECTED`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/controlstate/#flet.ControlState.SELECTED)
 state, it will be used instead of this color.

### autofocus `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#flet.CupertinoCheckbox.autofocus "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#__codelineno-0-1) autofocus: [bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool)  = False`

Whether this checkbox will be selected as the initial focus. If there is more than one control on a page with autofocus set, then the first one added to the page will get focus.

### border\_side `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#flet.CupertinoCheckbox.border_side "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#__codelineno-0-1) border_side: [ControlStateValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlStateValue) [[BorderSide](https://docs.flet.dev/types/borderside/#flet.BorderSide) ] | None = None`

Defines the checkbox's border sides in all or specific [`ControlState`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/controlstate/#flet.ControlState)
 states.

Note

Supported states: [`ControlState.SELECTED`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/controlstate/#flet.ControlState.SELECTED)
, [`ControlState.HOVERED`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/controlstate/#flet.ControlState.HOVERED)
, [`ControlState.DISABLED`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/controlstate/#flet.ControlState.DISABLED)
, [`ControlState.FOCUSED`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/controlstate/#flet.ControlState.FOCUSED)
, [`ControlState.PRESSED`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/controlstate/#flet.ControlState.PRESSED)
, [`ControlState.ERROR`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/controlstate/#flet.ControlState.ERROR)
, and [`ControlState.DEFAULT`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/controlstate/#flet.ControlState.DEFAULT)
.

### check\_color `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#flet.CupertinoCheckbox.check_color "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#__codelineno-0-1) check_color: [ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None = None`

The color to use for the check icon when this checkbox is checked.

### fill\_color `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#flet.CupertinoCheckbox.fill_color "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#__codelineno-0-1) fill_color: [ControlStateValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlStateValue) [[ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue) ] | None = None`

The color used to fill this checkbox in all or specific [`ControlState`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/controlstate/#flet.ControlState)
 states.

[`active_color`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#flet.CupertinoCheckbox.active_color)
 is used as fallback color when the checkbox is in the [`SELECTED`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/controlstate/#flet.ControlState.SELECTED)
 state, [`CupertinoColors.WHITE`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/cupertinocolors/#flet.CupertinoColors.WHITE)
 at `50%` opacity is used as fallback color when this checkbox is in the [`DISABLED`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/controlstate/#flet.ControlState.DISABLED)
 state, and [`CupertinoColors.WHITE`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/cupertinocolors/#flet.CupertinoColors.WHITE)
 otherwise.

Note

Supported states: [`ControlState.SELECTED`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/controlstate/#flet.ControlState.SELECTED)
, [`ControlState.HOVERED`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/controlstate/#flet.ControlState.HOVERED)
, [`ControlState.DISABLED`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/controlstate/#flet.ControlState.DISABLED)
, [`ControlState.FOCUSED`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/controlstate/#flet.ControlState.FOCUSED)
, and [`ControlState.DEFAULT`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/controlstate/#flet.ControlState.DEFAULT)
.

### focus\_color `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#flet.CupertinoCheckbox.focus_color "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#__codelineno-0-1) focus_color: [ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None = None`

The color used for this checkbox's border shadow when it has the input focus.

### label `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#flet.CupertinoCheckbox.label "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#__codelineno-0-1) label: [str](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str)  | None = None`

A clickable label to display on the right of this checkbox.

### label\_position `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#flet.CupertinoCheckbox.label_position "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#__codelineno-0-1) label_position: [LabelPosition](https://docs.flet.dev/types/labelposition/#flet.LabelPosition)  = [RIGHT](https://docs.flet.dev/types/labelposition/#flet.LabelPosition.RIGHT)`

Defines on which side of this checkbox the [`label`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#flet.CupertinoCheckbox.label)
 should be shown.

### mouse\_cursor `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#flet.CupertinoCheckbox.mouse_cursor "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#__codelineno-0-1) mouse_cursor: [MouseCursor](https://docs.flet.dev/types/mousecursor/#flet.MouseCursor)  | None = None`

The cursor for a mouse pointer entering or hovering over this checkbox.

### semantics\_label `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#flet.CupertinoCheckbox.semantics_label "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#__codelineno-0-1) semantics_label: [str](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str)  | None = None`

The semantic label for this checkbox that will be announced by screen readers.

This is announced by assistive technologies (e.g TalkBack/VoiceOver) and not shown on the UI.

### shape `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#flet.CupertinoCheckbox.shape "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#__codelineno-0-1) shape: [OutlinedBorder](https://docs.flet.dev/types/outlinedborder/#flet.OutlinedBorder)  | None = None`

The shape of this checkbox.

Internally defaults to `RoundedRectangleBorder(radius=4)`.

### spacing `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#flet.CupertinoCheckbox.spacing "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#__codelineno-0-1) spacing: [Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  | None = 10`

The space between this checkbox and the [`label`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#flet.CupertinoCheckbox.label)
.

### tristate `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#flet.CupertinoCheckbox.tristate "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#__codelineno-0-1) tristate: [bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool)  = False`

If `True`, this checkbox's [`value`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#flet.CupertinoCheckbox.value)
 can be `True`, `False`, or `None`.

### value `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#flet.CupertinoCheckbox.value "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#__codelineno-0-1) value: [bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool)  | None = False`

The value of this checkbox.

*   If `True`, this checkbox is checked.
*   If `False`, this checkbox is unchecked.
*   If `None` and [`tristate`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#flet.CupertinoCheckbox.tristate)
     is `True`, this checkbox is indeterminate (displayed as a dash).

Events[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#flet.CupertinoCheckbox-events "Permanent link")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### on\_blur `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#flet.CupertinoCheckbox.on_blur "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#__codelineno-0-1) on_blur: [ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[CupertinoCheckbox](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#flet.CupertinoCheckbox) ] | None = (     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#__codelineno-0-2)     None [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#__codelineno-0-3) )`

Called when this checkbox has lost focus.

### on\_change `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#flet.CupertinoCheckbox.on_change "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#__codelineno-0-1) on_change: [ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[CupertinoCheckbox](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#flet.CupertinoCheckbox) ] | None = (     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#__codelineno-0-2)     None [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#__codelineno-0-3) )`

Called when the state of this checkbox is changed.

### on\_focus `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#flet.CupertinoCheckbox.on_focus "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#__codelineno-0-1) on_focus: [ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[CupertinoCheckbox](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#flet.CupertinoCheckbox) ] | None = (     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#__codelineno-0-2)     None [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinocheckbox/#__codelineno-0-3) )`

Called when this checkbox has received focus.

# CupertinoButton - Flet

 

[Skip to content](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#flet.CupertinoButton)

CupertinoButton
===============

An iOS-style button.

Example:

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#__codelineno-0-1) ft.CupertinoButton("Tap me")`

[![CupertinoButton](https://docs.flet.dev/test-images/examples/cupertino/golden/macos/cupertino_button/image_for_docs.png)](https://docs.flet.dev/test-images/examples/cupertino/golden/macos/cupertino_button/image_for_docs.png)

Basic CupertinoButton

Inherits: `[LayoutControl](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/layoutcontrol/#flet.LayoutControl) `

Properties

*   **`[alignment](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#flet.CupertinoButton.alignment) `**(`[Alignment](https://docs.flet.dev/types/alignment/#flet.Alignment)  | None`) –
    
    The alignment of this button's content.
    
*   **`[autofocus](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#flet.CupertinoButton.autofocus) `**(`[bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool) `) –
    
    Whether this button should be selected as the initial focus when no other node in its scope is currently focused.
    
*   **`[bgcolor](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#flet.CupertinoButton.bgcolor) `**(`[ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None`) –
    
    The background color of this button.
    
*   **`[border_radius](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#flet.CupertinoButton.border_radius) `**(`[BorderRadiusValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.BorderRadiusValue) `) –
    
    The radius of the button's corners when it has a background color.
    
*   **`[color](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#flet.CupertinoButton.color) `**(`[ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None`) –
    
    The color of this button's text.
    
*   **`[content](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#flet.CupertinoButton.content) `**(`[StrOrControl](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.StrOrControl)  | None`) –
    
    The content of this button.
    
*   **`[disabled_bgcolor](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#flet.CupertinoButton.disabled_bgcolor) `**(`[ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None`) –
    
    The background color of this button when disabled.
    
*   **`[focus_color](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#flet.CupertinoButton.focus_color) `**(`[ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None`) –
    
    The color to use for the focus highlight for keyboard interactions.
    
*   **`[icon](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#flet.CupertinoButton.icon) `**(`[IconDataOrControl](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.IconDataOrControl)  | None`) –
    
    An icon shown in this button.
    
*   **`[icon_color](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#flet.CupertinoButton.icon_color) `**(`[ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None`) –
    
    The foreground color of the [`icon`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#flet.CupertinoButton.icon)
    .
    
*   **`[min_size](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#flet.CupertinoButton.min_size) `**(`[Size](https://docs.flet.dev/types/size/#flet.Size)  | None`) –
    
    The minimum size of this button.
    
*   **`[mouse_cursor](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#flet.CupertinoButton.mouse_cursor) `**(`[MouseCursor](https://docs.flet.dev/types/mousecursor/#flet.MouseCursor)  | None`) –
    
    The cursor for a mouse pointer when it enters or is hovering over this button.
    
*   **`[opacity_on_click](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#flet.CupertinoButton.opacity_on_click) `**(`[Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number) `) –
    
    Defines the opacity of the button when it is clicked.
    
*   **`[padding](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#flet.CupertinoButton.padding) `**(`[PaddingValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.PaddingValue)  | None`) –
    
    The amount of space to surround the `content` control inside the bounds of the button.
    
*   **`[size](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#flet.CupertinoButton.size) `**(`[CupertinoButtonSize](https://docs.flet.dev/types/cupertinobuttonsize/#flet.CupertinoButtonSize) `) –
    
    The size of this button.
    
*   **`[url](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#flet.CupertinoButton.url) `**(`[str](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str)  | [Url](https://docs.flet.dev/types/url/#flet.Url)  | None`) –
    
    The URL to open when this button is clicked.
    

Events

*   **`[on_blur](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#flet.CupertinoButton.on_blur) `**(`[ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[CupertinoButton](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#flet.CupertinoButton) ] | None`) –
    
    Called when this button loses focus.
    
*   **`[on_click](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#flet.CupertinoButton.on_click) `**(`[ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[CupertinoButton](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#flet.CupertinoButton) ] | None`) –
    
    Called when a user clicks this button.
    
*   **`[on_focus](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#flet.CupertinoButton.on_focus) `**(`[ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[CupertinoButton](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#flet.CupertinoButton) ] | None`) –
    
    Called when this button receives focus.
    
*   **`[on_long_press](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#flet.CupertinoButton.on_long_press) `**(`[ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[CupertinoButton](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#flet.CupertinoButton) ] | None`) –
    
    Called when a user long-presses this button.
    

Methods

*   **`[focus](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#flet.CupertinoButton.focus) `** –
    
    Requests focus for this control.
    

Examples[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#examples "Permanent link")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

[Live example](https://flet-controls-gallery.fly.dev/buttons/cupertinobutton)

### Basic Example[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#basic-example "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#__codelineno-0-1) import flet as ft [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#__codelineno-0-2) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#__codelineno-0-3)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#__codelineno-0-4) def main(page: ft.Page):     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#__codelineno-0-5)     page.add(        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#__codelineno-0-6)         ft.CupertinoButton(            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#__codelineno-0-7)             bgcolor=ft.CupertinoColors.LIGHT_BACKGROUND_GRAY,            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#__codelineno-0-8)             opacity_on_click=0.3,            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#__codelineno-0-9)             on_click=lambda e: print("Normal CupertinoButton clicked!"),            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#__codelineno-0-10)             content=ft.Text(                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#__codelineno-0-11)                 value="Normal CupertinoButton",                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#__codelineno-0-12)                 color=ft.CupertinoColors.DESTRUCTIVE_RED,            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#__codelineno-0-13)             ),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#__codelineno-0-14)         ),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#__codelineno-0-15)         ft.CupertinoButton(            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#__codelineno-0-16)             bgcolor=ft.Colors.PRIMARY,            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#__codelineno-0-17)             alignment=ft.Alignment.TOP_LEFT,            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#__codelineno-0-18)             border_radius=ft.BorderRadius.all(15),            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#__codelineno-0-19)             opacity_on_click=0.5,            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#__codelineno-0-20)             on_click=lambda e: print("Filled CupertinoButton clicked!"),            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#__codelineno-0-21)             content=ft.Text("Filled CupertinoButton", color=ft.Colors.YELLOW),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#__codelineno-0-22)         ),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#__codelineno-0-23)         ft.CupertinoButton(            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#__codelineno-0-24)             bgcolor=ft.Colors.PRIMARY,            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#__codelineno-0-25)             disabled=True,            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#__codelineno-0-26)             alignment=ft.Alignment.TOP_LEFT,            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#__codelineno-0-27)             opacity_on_click=0.5,            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#__codelineno-0-28)             content=ft.Text("Disabled CupertinoButton"),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#__codelineno-0-29)         ),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#__codelineno-0-30)         ft.Button(            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#__codelineno-0-31)             adaptive=True,            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#__codelineno-0-32)             bgcolor=ft.CupertinoColors.SYSTEM_TEAL,            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#__codelineno-0-33)             content=ft.Row(                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#__codelineno-0-34)                 tight=True,                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#__codelineno-0-35)                 controls=[                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#__codelineno-0-36)                     ft.Icon(ft.Icons.FAVORITE, color="pink"),                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#__codelineno-0-37)                     ft.Text("Button+adaptive"),                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#__codelineno-0-38)                 ],            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#__codelineno-0-39)             ),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#__codelineno-0-40)         ),    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#__codelineno-0-41)     ) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#__codelineno-0-42) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#__codelineno-0-43)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#__codelineno-0-44) ft.run(main)`

[![basic](https://docs.flet.dev/examples/controls/cupertino_button/media/basic.png)](https://docs.flet.dev/examples/controls/cupertino_button/media/basic.png)

Properties[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#flet.CupertinoButton-properties "Permanent link")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### alignment `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#flet.CupertinoButton.alignment "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#__codelineno-0-1) alignment: [Alignment](https://docs.flet.dev/types/alignment/#flet.Alignment)  | None = [field](https://docs.python.org/3/library/dataclasses.html#dataclasses.field "<code>dataclasses.field</code>") (     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#__codelineno-0-2)     default_factory=lambda: [CENTER](https://docs.flet.dev/types/alignment/#flet.Alignment.CENTER) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#__codelineno-0-3) )`

The alignment of this button's content.

Typically buttons are sized to be just big enough to contain the child and its padding. If the button's size is constrained to a fixed size, this property defines how the child is aligned within the available space.

### autofocus `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#flet.CupertinoButton.autofocus "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#__codelineno-0-1) autofocus: [bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool)  = False`

Whether this button should be selected as the initial focus when no other node in its scope is currently focused.

### bgcolor `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#flet.CupertinoButton.bgcolor "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#__codelineno-0-1) bgcolor: [ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None = None`

The background color of this button.

### border\_radius `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#flet.CupertinoButton.border_radius "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#__codelineno-0-1) border_radius: [BorderRadiusValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.BorderRadiusValue)  = [field](https://docs.python.org/3/library/dataclasses.html#dataclasses.field "<code>dataclasses.field</code>") (     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#__codelineno-0-2)     default_factory=lambda: [all](https://docs.flet.dev/types/borderradius/#flet.BorderRadius.all) (8.0) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#__codelineno-0-3) )`

The radius of the button's corners when it has a background color.

### color `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#flet.CupertinoButton.color "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#__codelineno-0-1) color: [ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None = None`

The color of this button's text.

### content `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#flet.CupertinoButton.content "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#__codelineno-0-1) content: [StrOrControl](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.StrOrControl)  | None = None`

The content of this button.

### disabled\_bgcolor `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#flet.CupertinoButton.disabled_bgcolor "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#__codelineno-0-1) disabled_bgcolor: [ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None = None`

The background color of this button when disabled.

### focus\_color `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#flet.CupertinoButton.focus_color "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#__codelineno-0-1) focus_color: [ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None = None`

The color to use for the focus highlight for keyboard interactions.

Defaults to a slightly transparent [`bgcolor`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#flet.CupertinoButton.bgcolor)
. If `bgcolor` is `None`, defaults to a slightly transparent [`CupertinoColors.ACTIVE_BLUE`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/cupertinocolors/#flet.CupertinoColors.ACTIVE_BLUE)
. 'Slightly transparent' in this context means the color is used with an opacity of `0.80`, a brightness of `0.69` and a saturation of `0.835`.

### icon `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#flet.CupertinoButton.icon "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#__codelineno-0-1) icon: [IconDataOrControl](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.IconDataOrControl)  | None = None`

An icon shown in this button.

### icon\_color `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#flet.CupertinoButton.icon_color "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#__codelineno-0-1) icon_color: [ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None = None`

The foreground color of the [`icon`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#flet.CupertinoButton.icon)
.

### min\_size `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#flet.CupertinoButton.min_size "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#__codelineno-0-1) min_size: [Size](https://docs.flet.dev/types/size/#flet.Size)  | None = None`

The minimum size of this button.

### mouse\_cursor `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#flet.CupertinoButton.mouse_cursor "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#__codelineno-0-1) mouse_cursor: [MouseCursor](https://docs.flet.dev/types/mousecursor/#flet.MouseCursor)  | None = None`

The cursor for a mouse pointer when it enters or is hovering over this button.

### opacity\_on\_click `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#flet.CupertinoButton.opacity_on_click "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#__codelineno-0-1) opacity_on_click: [Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  = 0.4`

Defines the opacity of the button when it is clicked.

When not pressed, the button has an opacity of `1.0`.

Raises:

*   `[ValueError](https://docs.python.org/3/library/exceptions.html#ValueError) ` –
    
    If it is not between `0.0` and `1.0`, inclusive.
    

### padding `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#flet.CupertinoButton.padding "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#__codelineno-0-1) padding: [PaddingValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.PaddingValue)  | None = None`

The amount of space to surround the `content` control inside the bounds of the button.

### size `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#flet.CupertinoButton.size "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#__codelineno-0-1) size: [CupertinoButtonSize](https://docs.flet.dev/types/cupertinobuttonsize/#flet.CupertinoButtonSize)  = [LARGE](https://docs.flet.dev/types/cupertinobuttonsize/#flet.CupertinoButtonSize.LARGE)`

The size of this button.

### url `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#flet.CupertinoButton.url "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#__codelineno-0-1) url: [str](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str)  | [Url](https://docs.flet.dev/types/url/#flet.Url)  | None = None`

The URL to open when this button is clicked.

Additionally, if [`on_click`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#flet.CupertinoButton.on_click)
 event callback is provided, it is fired after that.

Events[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#flet.CupertinoButton-events "Permanent link")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### on\_blur `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#flet.CupertinoButton.on_blur "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#__codelineno-0-1) on_blur: [ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[CupertinoButton](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#flet.CupertinoButton) ] | None = None`

Called when this button loses focus.

### on\_click `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#flet.CupertinoButton.on_click "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#__codelineno-0-1) on_click: [ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[CupertinoButton](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#flet.CupertinoButton) ] | None = None`

Called when a user clicks this button.

### on\_focus `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#flet.CupertinoButton.on_focus "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#__codelineno-0-1) on_focus: [ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[CupertinoButton](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#flet.CupertinoButton) ] | None = None`

Called when this button receives focus.

### on\_long\_press `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#flet.CupertinoButton.on_long_press "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#__codelineno-0-1) on_long_press: (     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#__codelineno-0-2)     [ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[CupertinoButton](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#flet.CupertinoButton) ] | None [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#__codelineno-0-3) ) = None`

Called when a user long-presses this button.

Methods[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#flet.CupertinoButton-methods "Permanent link")

### focus `async` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#flet.CupertinoButton.focus "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinobutton/#__codelineno-0-1) focus()`

Requests focus for this control.

# ContextMenu - Flet

 

[Skip to content](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/contextmenu/#flet.ContextMenu)

ContextMenu
===========

Wraps its [`content`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/contextmenu/#flet.ContextMenu.content)
 and displays contextual menus for specific mouse events.

Tip

On web, call [`disable()`](https://docs.flet.dev/services/browsercontextmenu/#flet.BrowserContextMenu.disable)
 method of [`Page.browser_context_menu`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/page/#flet.Page.browser_context_menu)
 to suppress the default browser context menu before relying on custom menus.

[![ContextMenu](https://docs.flet.dev/test-images/examples/material/golden/macos/context_menu/image_for_docs.png)](https://docs.flet.dev/test-images/examples/material/golden/macos/context_menu/image_for_docs.png)

Basic ContextMenu

Inherits: `[LayoutControl](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/layoutcontrol/#flet.LayoutControl) `

Properties

*   **`[content](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/contextmenu/#flet.ContextMenu.content) `**(`[Control](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/control/#flet.Control) `) –
    
    The child control that listens for mouse interaction.
    
*   **`[items](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/contextmenu/#flet.ContextMenu.items) `**(`[list](https://docs.python.org/3/glossary.html#term-list) [[PopupMenuItem](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#flet.PopupMenuItem) ]`) –
    
    A list of menu items to display in the context menu, when [`open()`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/contextmenu/#flet.ContextMenu.open)
     is called.
    
*   **`[primary_items](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/contextmenu/#flet.ContextMenu.primary_items) `**(`[list](https://docs.python.org/3/glossary.html#term-list) [[PopupMenuItem](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#flet.PopupMenuItem) ]`) –
    
    A list of menu items to display in the context menu, for primary (usually left) mouse button actions.
    
*   **`[primary_trigger](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/contextmenu/#flet.ContextMenu.primary_trigger) `**(`[ContextMenuTrigger](https://docs.flet.dev/types/contextmenutrigger/#flet.ContextMenuTrigger)  | None`) –
    
    Defines a trigger mode for the display of [`primary_items`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/contextmenu/#flet.ContextMenu.primary_items)
    .
    
*   **`[secondary_items](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/contextmenu/#flet.ContextMenu.secondary_items) `**(`[list](https://docs.python.org/3/glossary.html#term-list) [[PopupMenuItem](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#flet.PopupMenuItem) ]`) –
    
    A list of menu items to display in the context menu for secondary (usually right) mouse button actions.
    
*   **`[secondary_trigger](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/contextmenu/#flet.ContextMenu.secondary_trigger) `**(`[ContextMenuTrigger](https://docs.flet.dev/types/contextmenutrigger/#flet.ContextMenuTrigger)  | None`) –
    
    Defines a trigger mode for the display of [`secondary_items`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/contextmenu/#flet.ContextMenu.secondary_items)
    .
    
*   **`[tertiary_items](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/contextmenu/#flet.ContextMenu.tertiary_items) `**(`[list](https://docs.python.org/3/glossary.html#term-list) [[PopupMenuItem](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#flet.PopupMenuItem) ]`) –
    
    A list of menu items to display in the context menu for tertiary (usually middle) mouse button actions.
    
*   **`[tertiary_trigger](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/contextmenu/#flet.ContextMenu.tertiary_trigger) `**(`[ContextMenuTrigger](https://docs.flet.dev/types/contextmenutrigger/#flet.ContextMenuTrigger)  | None`) –
    
    Defines a trigger mode for the display of [`tertiary_items`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/contextmenu/#flet.ContextMenu.tertiary_items)
    .
    

Events

*   **`[on_dismiss](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/contextmenu/#flet.ContextMenu.on_dismiss) `**(`[EventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.EventHandler) [[ContextMenuDismissEvent](https://docs.flet.dev/types/contextmenudismissevent/#flet.ContextMenuDismissEvent) ] | None`) –
    
    Fires when the menu is dismissed without a selection, or when an attempt is made to open the menu but no items are available.
    
*   **`[on_select](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/contextmenu/#flet.ContextMenu.on_select) `**(`[EventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.EventHandler) [[ContextMenuSelectEvent](https://docs.flet.dev/types/contextmenuselectevent/#flet.ContextMenuSelectEvent) ] | None`) –
    
    Fires when a context menu item is selected.
    

Methods

*   **`[open](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/contextmenu/#flet.ContextMenu.open) `** –
    
    Opens the context menu programmatically, and displays [`items`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/contextmenu/#flet.ContextMenu.items)
    .
    

Examples[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/contextmenu/#examples "Permanent link")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------
