# Checkbox - Flet

 

[Skip to content](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#flet.Checkbox)

Checkbox
========

Checkbox allows to select one or more items from a group, or switch between two mutually exclusive options (checked or unchecked, on or off).

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#__codelineno-0-1) ft.Checkbox() [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#__codelineno-0-2) ft.Checkbox(label="Checked", value=True) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#__codelineno-0-3) ft.Checkbox(label="Disabled", disabled=True)`

[![Checkbox](https://docs.flet.dev/test-images/examples/material/golden/macos/checkbox/image_for_docs.png)](https://docs.flet.dev/test-images/examples/material/golden/macos/checkbox/image_for_docs.png)

Basic checkboxes

Inherits: `[LayoutControl](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/layoutcontrol/#flet.LayoutControl) `, `[AdaptiveControl](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/adaptivecontrol/#flet.AdaptiveControl) `

Properties

*   **`[active_color](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#flet.Checkbox.active_color) `**(`[ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None`) –
    
    The color to use when this checkbox is checked.
    
*   **`[autofocus](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#flet.Checkbox.autofocus) `**(`[bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool) `) –
    
    True if the control will be selected as the initial focus. If there is more than one control on a page with autofocus set, then the first one added to the page will get focus.
    
*   **`[border_side](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#flet.Checkbox.border_side) `**(`[ControlStateValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlStateValue) [[BorderSide](https://docs.flet.dev/types/borderside/#flet.BorderSide) ] | None`) –
    
    The color and width of this checkbox's border in all or specific [`ControlState`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/controlstate/#flet.ControlState)
    s.
    
*   **`[check_color](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#flet.Checkbox.check_color) `**(`[ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None`) –
    
    The color to use for the check icon when this checkbox is checked.
    
*   **`[error](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#flet.Checkbox.error) `**(`[bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool) `) –
    
    Whether this checkbox wants to show an error state.
    
*   **`[fill_color](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#flet.Checkbox.fill_color) `**(`[ControlStateValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlStateValue) [[ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue) ] | None`) –
    
    The color that fills this checkbox in all or specific [`ControlState`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/controlstate/#flet.ControlState)
    s.
    
*   **`[focus_color](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#flet.Checkbox.focus_color) `**(`[ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None`) –
    
    The color for the checkbox's Material when it has the input focus.
    
*   **`[hover_color](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#flet.Checkbox.hover_color) `**(`[ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None`) –
    
    The color to use when this checkbox is hovered.
    
*   **`[label](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#flet.Checkbox.label) `**(`[StrOrControl](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.StrOrControl)  | None`) –
    
    The clickable label to display on the right of a checkbox.
    
*   **`[label_position](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#flet.Checkbox.label_position) `**(`[LabelPosition](https://docs.flet.dev/types/labelposition/#flet.LabelPosition) `) –
    
    Defines on which side of the checkbox the [`label`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#flet.Checkbox.label)
     should be shown.
    
*   **`[label_style](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#flet.Checkbox.label_style) `**(`[TextStyle](https://docs.flet.dev/types/textstyle/#flet.TextStyle)  | None`) –
    
    The [`label`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#flet.Checkbox.label)
    's text style.
    
*   **`[mouse_cursor](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#flet.Checkbox.mouse_cursor) `**(`[MouseCursor](https://docs.flet.dev/types/mousecursor/#flet.MouseCursor)  | None`) –
    
    The cursor to be displayed when a mouse pointer enters or is hovering over this checkbox.
    
*   **`[overlay_color](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#flet.Checkbox.overlay_color) `**(`[ControlStateValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlStateValue) [[ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue) ] | None`) –
    
    The color of this checkbox's overlay in various [`ControlState`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/controlstate/#flet.ControlState)
     states.
    
*   **`[semantics_label](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#flet.Checkbox.semantics_label) `**(`[str](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str)  | None`) –
    
    The semantic label for the checkbox that is not shown in the UI, but will be announced by screen readers in accessibility modes (e.g TalkBack/VoiceOver).
    
*   **`[shape](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#flet.Checkbox.shape) `**(`[OutlinedBorder](https://docs.flet.dev/types/outlinedborder/#flet.OutlinedBorder)  | None`) –
    
    The shape of the checkbox.
    
*   **`[splash_radius](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#flet.Checkbox.splash_radius) `**(`[Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  | None`) –
    
    The radius of the circular Material ink response (ripple) in logical pixels.
    
*   **`[tristate](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#flet.Checkbox.tristate) `**(`[bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool) `) –
    
    If `True` the checkbox's [`value`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#flet.Checkbox.value)
     can be `True`, `False`, or `None`.
    
*   **`[value](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#flet.Checkbox.value) `**(`[bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool)  | None`) –
    
    The value of this checkbox.
    
*   **`[visual_density](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#flet.Checkbox.visual_density) `**(`[VisualDensity](https://docs.flet.dev/types/visualdensity/#flet.VisualDensity)  | None`) –
    
    Defines how compact the checkbox's layout will be.
    

Events

*   **`[on_blur](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#flet.Checkbox.on_blur) `**(`[ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[Checkbox](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#flet.Checkbox) ] | None`) –
    
    Called when this checkbox has lost focus.
    
*   **`[on_change](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#flet.Checkbox.on_change) `**(`[ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[Checkbox](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#flet.Checkbox) ] | None`) –
    
    Called when the state of this checkbox is changed.
    
*   **`[on_focus](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#flet.Checkbox.on_focus) `**(`[ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[Checkbox](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#flet.Checkbox) ] | None`) –
    
    Called when this checkbox has received focus.
    

Examples[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#examples "Permanent link")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

[Live example](https://flet-controls-gallery.fly.dev/input/checkbox)

### Basic Example[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#basic-example "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#__codelineno-0-1) import flet as ft [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#__codelineno-0-2) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#__codelineno-0-3)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#__codelineno-0-4) def main(page: ft.Page):     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#__codelineno-0-5)     def handle_button_click(e: ft.Event[ft.Button]):        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#__codelineno-0-6)         message.value = (            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#__codelineno-0-7)             f"Checkboxes values are:  {c1.value}, {c2.value}, {c3.value}, "            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#__codelineno-0-8)             f"{c4.value}, {c5.value}."        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#__codelineno-0-9)         )        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#__codelineno-0-10)         page.update() [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#__codelineno-0-11)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#__codelineno-0-12)     page.add(        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#__codelineno-0-13)         c1 := ft.Checkbox(label="Unchecked by default checkbox", value=False),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#__codelineno-0-14)         c2 := ft.Checkbox(            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#__codelineno-0-15)             label="Undefined by default tristate checkbox", tristate=True        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#__codelineno-0-16)         ),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#__codelineno-0-17)         c3 := ft.Checkbox(label="Checked by default checkbox", value=True),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#__codelineno-0-18)         c4 := ft.Checkbox(label="Disabled checkbox", disabled=True),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#__codelineno-0-19)         c5 := ft.Checkbox(            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#__codelineno-0-20)             label="Checkbox with LEFT label_position",            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#__codelineno-0-21)             label_position=ft.LabelPosition.LEFT,        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#__codelineno-0-22)         ),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#__codelineno-0-23)         ft.Button(content="Submit", on_click=handle_button_click),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#__codelineno-0-24)         message := ft.Text(),    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#__codelineno-0-25)     ) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#__codelineno-0-26) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#__codelineno-0-27)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#__codelineno-0-28) if __name__ == "__main__":     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#__codelineno-0-29)     ft.run(main)`

[![basic](https://docs.flet.dev/test-images/examples/material/golden/macos/checkbox/basic.png)](https://docs.flet.dev/test-images/examples/material/golden/macos/checkbox/basic.png)

After clicking Submit

### Handling events[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#handling-events "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#__codelineno-1-1) import flet as ft [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#__codelineno-1-2) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#__codelineno-1-3)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#__codelineno-1-4) def main(page: ft.Page):     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#__codelineno-1-5)     def handle_checkbox_change(e: ft.Event[ft.Checkbox]):        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#__codelineno-1-6)         page.add(ft.Text(f"Checkbox value changed to {e.control.value}"))        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#__codelineno-1-7)         page.update() [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#__codelineno-1-8)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#__codelineno-1-9)     page.add(        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#__codelineno-1-10)         ft.Checkbox(            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#__codelineno-1-11)             label="Checkbox with 'change' event",            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#__codelineno-1-12)             on_change=handle_checkbox_change,        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#__codelineno-1-13)         )    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#__codelineno-1-14)     ) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#__codelineno-1-15) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#__codelineno-1-16)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#__codelineno-1-17) if __name__ == "__main__":     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#__codelineno-1-18)     ft.run(main)`

[![handling-events](https://docs.flet.dev/test-images/examples/material/golden/macos/checkbox/handling_events.png)](https://docs.flet.dev/test-images/examples/material/golden/macos/checkbox/handling_events.png)

After three clicks

### Styled checkboxes[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#styled-checkboxes "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#__codelineno-2-1) import flet as ft [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#__codelineno-2-2) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#__codelineno-2-3)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#__codelineno-2-4) def main(page: ft.Page):     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#__codelineno-2-5)     page.add(        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#__codelineno-2-6)         ft.Checkbox(label="Checkbox with default style"),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#__codelineno-2-7)         ft.Checkbox(            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#__codelineno-2-8)             label="Checkbox with constant fill color",            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#__codelineno-2-9)             fill_color=ft.Colors.RED,            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#__codelineno-2-10)             check_color=ft.Colors.YELLOW,        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#__codelineno-2-11)         ),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#__codelineno-2-12)         ft.Checkbox(            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#__codelineno-2-13)             label="Checkbox with dynamic fill color",            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#__codelineno-2-14)             fill_color={                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#__codelineno-2-15)                 ft.ControlState.HOVERED: ft.Colors.BLUE,                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#__codelineno-2-16)                 ft.ControlState.SELECTED: ft.Colors.GREEN,                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#__codelineno-2-17)                 ft.ControlState.DEFAULT: ft.Colors.RED,            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#__codelineno-2-18)             },            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#__codelineno-2-19)             # border_side={ft.ControlState.HOVERED: ft.BorderSide(width=1.0)},        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#__codelineno-2-20)         ),    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#__codelineno-2-21)     ) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#__codelineno-2-22) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#__codelineno-2-23)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#__codelineno-2-24) if __name__ == "__main__":     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#__codelineno-2-25)     ft.run(main)`

[![Styled checkboxes](https://docs.flet.dev/test-images/examples/material/golden/macos/checkbox/styled_checkboxes.png)](https://docs.flet.dev/test-images/examples/material/golden/macos/checkbox/styled_checkboxes.png)

Properties[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#flet.Checkbox-properties "Permanent link")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### active\_color `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#flet.Checkbox.active_color "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#__codelineno-0-1) active_color: [ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None = None`

The color to use when this checkbox is checked.

### autofocus `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#flet.Checkbox.autofocus "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#__codelineno-0-1) autofocus: [bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool)  = False`

True if the control will be selected as the initial focus. If there is more than one control on a page with autofocus set, then the first one added to the page will get focus.

### border\_side `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#flet.Checkbox.border_side "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#__codelineno-0-1) border_side: [ControlStateValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlStateValue) [[BorderSide](https://docs.flet.dev/types/borderside/#flet.BorderSide) ] | None = None`

The color and width of this checkbox's border in all or specific [`ControlState`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/controlstate/#flet.ControlState)
s.

Defaults to [`CheckboxTheme.border_side`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/checkboxtheme/#flet.CheckboxTheme.border_side)
, or if that is `None`, falls back to `BorderSide` with a width of `2.0`.

Note

Supported states: [`ControlState.SELECTED`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/controlstate/#flet.ControlState.SELECTED)
, [`ControlState.HOVERED`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/controlstate/#flet.ControlState.HOVERED)
, [`ControlState.DISABLED`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/controlstate/#flet.ControlState.DISABLED)
, [`ControlState.FOCUSED`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/controlstate/#flet.ControlState.FOCUSED)
, [`ControlState.PRESSED`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/controlstate/#flet.ControlState.PRESSED)
, [`ControlState.ERROR`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/controlstate/#flet.ControlState.ERROR)
, and [`ControlState.DEFAULT`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/controlstate/#flet.ControlState.DEFAULT)
.

### check\_color `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#flet.Checkbox.check_color "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#__codelineno-0-1) check_color: [ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None = None`

The color to use for the check icon when this checkbox is checked.

### error `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#flet.Checkbox.error "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#__codelineno-0-1) error: [bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool)  = False`

Whether this checkbox wants to show an error state.

If `True` this checkbox will have a different default container color and check color.

### fill\_color `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#flet.Checkbox.fill_color "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#__codelineno-0-1) fill_color: [ControlStateValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlStateValue) [[ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue) ] | None = None`

The color that fills this checkbox in all or specific [`ControlState`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/controlstate/#flet.ControlState)
s.

Note

Supported states: [`ControlState.SELECTED`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/controlstate/#flet.ControlState.SELECTED)
, [`ControlState.HOVERED`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/controlstate/#flet.ControlState.HOVERED)
, [`ControlState.DISABLED`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/controlstate/#flet.ControlState.DISABLED)
, [`ControlState.FOCUSED`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/controlstate/#flet.ControlState.FOCUSED)
, and [`ControlState.DEFAULT`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/controlstate/#flet.ControlState.DEFAULT)
.

### focus\_color `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#flet.Checkbox.focus_color "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#__codelineno-0-1) focus_color: [ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None = None`

The color for the checkbox's Material when it has the input focus. If [`overlay_color`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#flet.Checkbox.overlay_color)
 returns a non-None color in the [`ControlState.FOCUSED`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/controlstate/#flet.ControlState.FOCUSED)
 state, it will be used instead.

Defaults to [`CheckboxTheme.overlay_color`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/checkboxtheme/#flet.CheckboxTheme.overlay_color)
 in the [`ControlState.FOCUSED`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/controlstate/#flet.ControlState.FOCUSED)
 state, or if that is `None`, falls back to [`Theme.focus_color`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/theme/#flet.Theme.focus_color)
.

### hover\_color `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#flet.Checkbox.hover_color "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#__codelineno-0-1) hover_color: [ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None = None`

The color to use when this checkbox is hovered.

### label `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#flet.Checkbox.label "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#__codelineno-0-1) label: [StrOrControl](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.StrOrControl)  | None = None`

The clickable label to display on the right of a checkbox.

### label\_position `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#flet.Checkbox.label_position "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#__codelineno-0-1) label_position: [LabelPosition](https://docs.flet.dev/types/labelposition/#flet.LabelPosition)  = [RIGHT](https://docs.flet.dev/types/labelposition/#flet.LabelPosition.RIGHT)`

Defines on which side of the checkbox the [`label`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#flet.Checkbox.label)
 should be shown.

### label\_style `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#flet.Checkbox.label_style "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#__codelineno-0-1) label_style: [TextStyle](https://docs.flet.dev/types/textstyle/#flet.TextStyle)  | None = None`

The [`label`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#flet.Checkbox.label)
's text style.

### mouse\_cursor `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#flet.Checkbox.mouse_cursor "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#__codelineno-0-1) mouse_cursor: [MouseCursor](https://docs.flet.dev/types/mousecursor/#flet.MouseCursor)  | None = None`

The cursor to be displayed when a mouse pointer enters or is hovering over this checkbox.

Defaults to [`CheckboxTheme.mouse_cursor`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/checkboxtheme/#flet.CheckboxTheme.mouse_cursor)
, or if that is `None`, falls back to `MouseCursor.CLICK`.

### overlay\_color `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#flet.Checkbox.overlay_color "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#__codelineno-0-1) overlay_color: [ControlStateValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlStateValue) [[ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue) ] | None = None`

The color of this checkbox's overlay in various [`ControlState`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/controlstate/#flet.ControlState)
 states.

Note

Supported states: [`ControlState.PRESSED`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/controlstate/#flet.ControlState.PRESSED)
, [`ControlState.SELECTED`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/controlstate/#flet.ControlState.SELECTED)
, [`ControlState.HOVERED`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/controlstate/#flet.ControlState.HOVERED)
, [`ControlState.FOCUSED`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/controlstate/#flet.ControlState.FOCUSED)
, and [`ControlState.DEFAULT`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/controlstate/#flet.ControlState.DEFAULT)
.

### semantics\_label `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#flet.Checkbox.semantics_label "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#__codelineno-0-1) semantics_label: [str](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str)  | None = None`

The semantic label for the checkbox that is not shown in the UI, but will be announced by screen readers in accessibility modes (e.g TalkBack/VoiceOver).

### shape `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#flet.Checkbox.shape "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#__codelineno-0-1) shape: [OutlinedBorder](https://docs.flet.dev/types/outlinedborder/#flet.OutlinedBorder)  | None = None`

The shape of the checkbox.

Defaults to [`CheckboxTheme.shape`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/checkboxtheme/#flet.CheckboxTheme.shape)
, or if that is `None`, falls back to `RoundedRectangleBorder(radius=2)`.

### splash\_radius `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#flet.Checkbox.splash_radius "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#__codelineno-0-1) splash_radius: [Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  | None = None`

The radius of the circular Material ink response (ripple) in logical pixels.

Defaults to [`CheckboxTheme.splash_radius`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/checkboxtheme/#flet.CheckboxTheme.splash_radius)
, or if that is `None`, falls back to `20.0`.

### tristate `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#flet.Checkbox.tristate "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#__codelineno-0-1) tristate: [bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool)  = False`

If `True` the checkbox's [`value`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#flet.Checkbox.value)
 can be `True`, `False`, or `None`.

### value `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#flet.Checkbox.value "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#__codelineno-0-1) value: [bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool)  | None = False`

The value of this checkbox.

*   If `True`, this checkbox is checked.
*   If `False`, this checkbox is unchecked.
*   If `None` and [`tristate`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#flet.Checkbox.tristate)
     is `True`, this checkbox is indeterminate (displayed as a dash).

### visual\_density `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#flet.Checkbox.visual_density "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#__codelineno-0-1) visual_density: [VisualDensity](https://docs.flet.dev/types/visualdensity/#flet.VisualDensity)  | None = None`

Defines how compact the checkbox's layout will be.

Events[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#flet.Checkbox-events "Permanent link")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### on\_blur `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#flet.Checkbox.on_blur "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#__codelineno-0-1) on_blur: [ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[Checkbox](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#flet.Checkbox) ] | None = None`

Called when this checkbox has lost focus.

### on\_change `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#flet.Checkbox.on_change "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#__codelineno-0-1) on_change: [ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[Checkbox](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#flet.Checkbox) ] | None = None`

Called when the state of this checkbox is changed.

### on\_focus `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#flet.Checkbox.on_focus "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#__codelineno-0-1) on_focus: [ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[Checkbox](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/checkbox/#flet.Checkbox) ] | None = None`

Called when this checkbox has received focus.

# CupertinoDatePicker - Flet

 

[Skip to content](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodatepicker/#flet.CupertinoDatePicker)

CupertinoDatePicker
===================

An iOS-styled date picker.

Inherits: `[LayoutControl](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/layoutcontrol/#flet.LayoutControl) `

Properties

*   **`[bgcolor](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodatepicker/#flet.CupertinoDatePicker.bgcolor) `**(`[ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None`) –
    
    The background color of this date picker.
    
*   **`[date_order](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodatepicker/#flet.CupertinoDatePicker.date_order) `**(`[CupertinoDatePickerDateOrder](https://docs.flet.dev/types/cupertinodatepickerdateorder/#flet.CupertinoDatePickerDateOrder)  | None`) –
    
    The order in which the columns inside this picker are displayed.
    
*   **`[date_picker_mode](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodatepicker/#flet.CupertinoDatePicker.date_picker_mode) `**(`[CupertinoDatePickerMode](https://docs.flet.dev/types/cupertinodatepickermode/#flet.CupertinoDatePickerMode) `) –
    
    The mode of the date picker.
    
*   **`[first_date](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodatepicker/#flet.CupertinoDatePicker.first_date) `**(`[DateTimeValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.DateTimeValue)  | None`) –
    
    The earliest allowable date that the user can select.
    
*   **`[item_extent](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodatepicker/#flet.CupertinoDatePicker.item_extent) `**(`[Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number) `) –
    
    The uniform height of all children.
    
*   **`[last_date](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodatepicker/#flet.CupertinoDatePicker.last_date) `**(`[DateTimeValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.DateTimeValue)  | None`) –
    
    The latest allowable date that the user can select.
    
*   **`[locale](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodatepicker/#flet.CupertinoDatePicker.locale) `**(`[Locale](https://docs.flet.dev/types/locale/#flet.Locale)  | None`) –
    
    The locale for this date picker. It is intended for rare cases where this control should be localized differently from the rest of the page.
    
*   **`[maximum_year](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodatepicker/#flet.CupertinoDatePicker.maximum_year) `**(`[int](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#int)  | None`) –
    
    Maximum year to which the picker can be scrolled when in [`CupertinoDatePickerMode.DATE`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/cupertinodatepickermode/#flet.CupertinoDatePickerMode.DATE)
     mode.
    
*   **`[minimum_year](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodatepicker/#flet.CupertinoDatePicker.minimum_year) `**(`[int](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#int) `) –
    
    Minimum year to which the picker can be scrolled when in [`CupertinoDatePickerMode.DATE`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/cupertinodatepickermode/#flet.CupertinoDatePickerMode.DATE)
     mode.
    
*   **`[minute_interval](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodatepicker/#flet.CupertinoDatePicker.minute_interval) `**(`[int](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#int) `) –
    
    The granularity of the minutes spinner, if it is shown in the current [`date_picker_mode`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodatepicker/#flet.CupertinoDatePicker.date_picker_mode)
    .
    
*   **`[show_day_of_week](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodatepicker/#flet.CupertinoDatePicker.show_day_of_week) `**(`[bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool) `) –
    
    Whether to show day of week alongside day.
    
*   **`[use_24h_format](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodatepicker/#flet.CupertinoDatePicker.use_24h_format) `**(`[bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool) `) –
    
    Whether to use the 24-hour time format.
    
*   **`[value](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodatepicker/#flet.CupertinoDatePicker.value) `**(`[DateTimeValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.DateTimeValue) `) –
    
    The initial date and/or time of the picker.
    

Events

*   **`[on_change](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodatepicker/#flet.CupertinoDatePicker.on_change) `**(`[ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[CupertinoDatePicker](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodatepicker/#flet.CupertinoDatePicker) ] | None`) –
    
    Called when the selected date and/or time changes.
    

Examples[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodatepicker/#examples "Permanent link")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

[Live example](https://flet-controls-gallery.fly.dev/dialogs/cupertinodatepicker)

### Basic Example[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodatepicker/#basic-example "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodatepicker/#__codelineno-0-1) from datetime import datetime [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodatepicker/#__codelineno-0-2)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodatepicker/#__codelineno-0-3) import flet as ft [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodatepicker/#__codelineno-0-4) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodatepicker/#__codelineno-0-5)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodatepicker/#__codelineno-0-6) def main(page: ft.Page):     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodatepicker/#__codelineno-0-7)     page.horizontal_alignment = ft.CrossAxisAlignment.CENTER [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodatepicker/#__codelineno-0-8)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodatepicker/#__codelineno-0-9)     def handle_date_change(e: ft.Event[ft.CupertinoDatePicker]):        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodatepicker/#__codelineno-0-10)         message.value = f"Chosen Date: {e.control.value.strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M %p')}"        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodatepicker/#__codelineno-0-11)         page.update() [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodatepicker/#__codelineno-0-12)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodatepicker/#__codelineno-0-13)     cupertino_date_picker = ft.CupertinoDatePicker(        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodatepicker/#__codelineno-0-14)         value=datetime.now(),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodatepicker/#__codelineno-0-15)         date_picker_mode=ft.CupertinoDatePickerMode.DATE_AND_TIME,        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodatepicker/#__codelineno-0-16)         on_change=handle_date_change,    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodatepicker/#__codelineno-0-17)     ) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodatepicker/#__codelineno-0-18)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodatepicker/#__codelineno-0-19)     page.add(        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodatepicker/#__codelineno-0-20)         ft.CupertinoFilledButton(            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodatepicker/#__codelineno-0-21)             content="Open CupertinoDatePicker",            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodatepicker/#__codelineno-0-22)             on_click=lambda e: page.show_dialog(                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodatepicker/#__codelineno-0-23)                 ft.CupertinoBottomSheet(                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodatepicker/#__codelineno-0-24)                     content=cupertino_date_picker,                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodatepicker/#__codelineno-0-25)                     height=216,                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodatepicker/#__codelineno-0-26)                     padding=ft.Padding.only(top=6),                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodatepicker/#__codelineno-0-27)                 )            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodatepicker/#__codelineno-0-28)             ),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodatepicker/#__codelineno-0-29)         ),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodatepicker/#__codelineno-0-30)         message := ft.Text("Chosen Time: "),    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodatepicker/#__codelineno-0-31)     ) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodatepicker/#__codelineno-0-32) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodatepicker/#__codelineno-0-33)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodatepicker/#__codelineno-0-34) ft.run(main)`

[![basic](https://docs.flet.dev/examples/controls/cupertino_date_picker/media/basic.png)](https://docs.flet.dev/examples/controls/cupertino_date_picker/media/basic.png)

Properties[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodatepicker/#flet.CupertinoDatePicker-properties "Permanent link")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### bgcolor `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodatepicker/#flet.CupertinoDatePicker.bgcolor "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodatepicker/#__codelineno-0-1) bgcolor: [ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None = None`

The background color of this date picker.

### date\_order `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodatepicker/#flet.CupertinoDatePicker.date_order "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodatepicker/#__codelineno-0-1) date_order: [CupertinoDatePickerDateOrder](https://docs.flet.dev/types/cupertinodatepickerdateorder/#flet.CupertinoDatePickerDateOrder)  | None = None`

The order in which the columns inside this picker are displayed.

Note

The final order in which the columns are displayed is also influenced by the [`date_picker_mode`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodatepicker/#flet.CupertinoDatePicker.date_picker_mode)
. For example, if `date_picker_mode` is [`CupertinoDatePickerMode.MONTH_YEAR`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/cupertinodatepickermode/#flet.CupertinoDatePickerMode.MONTH_YEAR)
 both [`CupertinoDatePickerDateOrder.DAY_MONTH_YEAR`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/cupertinodatepickerdateorder/#flet.CupertinoDatePickerDateOrder.DAY_MONTH_YEAR)
 and [`CupertinoDatePickerDateOrder.MONTH_DAY_YEAR`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/cupertinodatepickerdateorder/#flet.CupertinoDatePickerDateOrder.MONTH_DAY_YEAR)
 will result in the `month|year` order.

### date\_picker\_mode `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodatepicker/#flet.CupertinoDatePicker.date_picker_mode "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodatepicker/#__codelineno-0-1) date_picker_mode: [CupertinoDatePickerMode](https://docs.flet.dev/types/cupertinodatepickermode/#flet.CupertinoDatePickerMode)  = [DATE_AND_TIME](https://docs.flet.dev/types/cupertinodatepickermode/#flet.CupertinoDatePickerMode.DATE_AND_TIME)`

The mode of the date picker.

### first\_date `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodatepicker/#flet.CupertinoDatePicker.first_date "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodatepicker/#__codelineno-0-1) first_date: [DateTimeValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.DateTimeValue)  | None = None`

The earliest allowable date that the user can select.

*   If set to `None` (the default), there is no lower date limit.
*   When not `None`, one can still scroll the picker to dates earlier than `first_date`, with the exception that the [`on_change`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodatepicker/#flet.CupertinoDatePicker.on_change)
     will not be called. Once let go, the picker will scroll back to `first_date`.

Note

In [`CupertinoDatePickerMode.TIME`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/cupertinodatepickermode/#flet.CupertinoDatePickerMode.TIME)
 mode, a time becomes unselectable if the datetime produced by combining that particular time and the date part of [`value`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodatepicker/#flet.CupertinoDatePicker.value)
 is earlier than `last_date`. So typically, `first_date` needs to be set to a datetime that is on the same date as [`value`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodatepicker/#flet.CupertinoDatePicker.value)
.

### item\_extent `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodatepicker/#flet.CupertinoDatePicker.item_extent "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodatepicker/#__codelineno-0-1) item_extent: [Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  = 32.0`

The uniform height of all children.

Raises:

*   `[ValueError](https://docs.python.org/3/library/exceptions.html#ValueError) ` –
    
    If it is not strictly greater than `0`.
    

### last\_date `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodatepicker/#flet.CupertinoDatePicker.last_date "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodatepicker/#__codelineno-0-1) last_date: [DateTimeValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.DateTimeValue)  | None = None`

The latest allowable date that the user can select.

*   If set to `None` (the default), there is no upper date limit.
*   When not `None`, one can still scroll the picker to dates later than `last_date`, with the exception that the [`on_change`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodatepicker/#flet.CupertinoDatePicker.on_change)
     will not be called. Once let go, the picker will scroll back to `last_date`.

Note

In [`CupertinoDatePickerMode.TIME`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/cupertinodatepickermode/#flet.CupertinoDatePickerMode.TIME)
 mode, a time becomes unselectable if the datetime produced by combining that particular time and the date part of [`value`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodatepicker/#flet.CupertinoDatePicker.value)
 is later than `last_date`. So typically, `last_date` needs to be set to a datetime that is on the same date as [`value`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodatepicker/#flet.CupertinoDatePicker.value)
.

### locale `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodatepicker/#flet.CupertinoDatePicker.locale "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodatepicker/#__codelineno-0-1) locale: [Locale](https://docs.flet.dev/types/locale/#flet.Locale)  | None = None`

The locale for this date picker. It is intended for rare cases where this control should be localized differently from the rest of the page.

Notes

*   The locale must be supported by Flutter's global localization delegates; otherwise the override is ignored and the control uses the page or system locale.
*   If `None` (the default), the page or system locale is used.

### maximum\_year `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodatepicker/#flet.CupertinoDatePicker.maximum_year "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodatepicker/#__codelineno-0-1) maximum_year: [int](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#int)  | None = None`

Maximum year to which the picker can be scrolled when in [`CupertinoDatePickerMode.DATE`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/cupertinodatepickermode/#flet.CupertinoDatePickerMode.DATE)
 mode.

Defaults to `None` - no limit.

Raises:

*   `[ValueError](https://docs.python.org/3/library/exceptions.html#ValueError) ` –
    
    If it is less than [`value`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodatepicker/#flet.CupertinoDatePicker.value)
     year.
    

### minimum\_year `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodatepicker/#flet.CupertinoDatePicker.minimum_year "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodatepicker/#__codelineno-0-1) minimum_year: [int](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#int)  = 1`

Minimum year to which the picker can be scrolled when in [`CupertinoDatePickerMode.DATE`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/cupertinodatepickermode/#flet.CupertinoDatePickerMode.DATE)
 mode.

Raises:

*   `[ValueError](https://docs.python.org/3/library/exceptions.html#ValueError) ` –
    
    If it is greater than [`value`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodatepicker/#flet.CupertinoDatePicker.value)
     year.
    

### minute\_interval `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodatepicker/#flet.CupertinoDatePicker.minute_interval "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodatepicker/#__codelineno-0-1) minute_interval: [int](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#int)  = 1`

The granularity of the minutes spinner, if it is shown in the current [`date_picker_mode`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodatepicker/#flet.CupertinoDatePicker.date_picker_mode)
.

Raises:

*   `[ValueError](https://docs.python.org/3/library/exceptions.html#ValueError) ` –
    
    If it is not strictly greater than `0`.
    
*   `[ValueError](https://docs.python.org/3/library/exceptions.html#ValueError) ` –
    
    If it is not a factor of `60`.
    

### show\_day\_of\_week `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodatepicker/#flet.CupertinoDatePicker.show_day_of_week "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodatepicker/#__codelineno-0-1) show_day_of_week: [bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool)  = False`

Whether to show day of week alongside day.

Raises:

*   `[ValueError](https://docs.python.org/3/library/exceptions.html#ValueError) ` –
    
    If it is set when [`date_picker_mode`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodatepicker/#flet.CupertinoDatePicker.date_picker_mode)
     is not [`CupertinoDatePickerMode.DATE`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/cupertinodatepickermode/#flet.CupertinoDatePickerMode.DATE)
    .
    

### use\_24h\_format `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodatepicker/#flet.CupertinoDatePicker.use_24h_format "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodatepicker/#__codelineno-0-1) use_24h_format: [bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool)  = False`

Whether to use the 24-hour time format.

If `False`, the 12-hour time format is used.

### value `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodatepicker/#flet.CupertinoDatePicker.value "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodatepicker/#__codelineno-0-1) value: [DateTimeValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.DateTimeValue)  = [field](https://docs.python.org/3/library/dataclasses.html#dataclasses.field "<code>dataclasses.field</code>") (default_factory=lambda: [now](https://docs.python.org/3/library/datetime.html#datetime.datetime.now "<code>datetime.datetime.now</code>") ())`

The initial date and/or time of the picker.

Defaults to the present date and time.

Raises:

*   `[ValueError](https://docs.python.org/3/library/exceptions.html#ValueError) ` –
    
    If it is not greater than or equal to [`first_date`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodatepicker/#flet.CupertinoDatePicker.first_date)
    , when [`first_date`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodatepicker/#flet.CupertinoDatePicker.first_date)
     is set.
    
*   `[ValueError](https://docs.python.org/3/library/exceptions.html#ValueError) ` –
    
    If it is not less than or equal to [`last_date`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodatepicker/#flet.CupertinoDatePicker.last_date)
    , when [`last_date`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodatepicker/#flet.CupertinoDatePicker.last_date)
     is set.
    
*   `[ValueError](https://docs.python.org/3/library/exceptions.html#ValueError) ` –
    
    If its year is not greater than or equal to [`minimum_year`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodatepicker/#flet.CupertinoDatePicker.minimum_year)
    , when [`date_picker_mode`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodatepicker/#flet.CupertinoDatePicker.date_picker_mode)
     is [`CupertinoDatePickerMode.DATE`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/cupertinodatepickermode/#flet.CupertinoDatePickerMode.DATE)
     or [`CupertinoDatePickerMode.MONTH_YEAR`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/cupertinodatepickermode/#flet.CupertinoDatePickerMode.MONTH_YEAR)
    .
    
*   `[ValueError](https://docs.python.org/3/library/exceptions.html#ValueError) ` –
    
    If its year is not less than or equal to [`maximum_year`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodatepicker/#flet.CupertinoDatePicker.maximum_year)
    , when [`maximum_year`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodatepicker/#flet.CupertinoDatePicker.maximum_year)
     is set.
    
*   `[ValueError](https://docs.python.org/3/library/exceptions.html#ValueError) ` –
    
    If its minute is not a multiple of [`minute_interval`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodatepicker/#flet.CupertinoDatePicker.minute_interval)
    .
    

Events[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodatepicker/#flet.CupertinoDatePicker-events "Permanent link")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### on\_change `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodatepicker/#flet.CupertinoDatePicker.on_change "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodatepicker/#__codelineno-0-1) on_change: (     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodatepicker/#__codelineno-0-2)     [ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[CupertinoDatePicker](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodatepicker/#flet.CupertinoDatePicker) ] | None [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodatepicker/#__codelineno-0-3) ) = None`

Called when the selected date and/or time changes.

Will not be called if the new selected value is not valid, or is not in the range of [`first_date`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodatepicker/#flet.CupertinoDatePicker.first_date)
 and [`last_date`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinodatepicker/#flet.CupertinoDatePicker.last_date)
.

# CupertinoSwitch - Flet

 

[Skip to content](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#flet.CupertinoSwitch)

CupertinoSwitch
===============

An iOS-style switch.

Used to toggle the on/off state of a single setting.

Example:

       `[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#__codelineno-0-1)        ft.CupertinoSwitch(value=True)`

[![CupertinoSwitch](https://docs.flet.dev/test-images/examples/cupertino/golden/macos/cupertino_switch/image_for_docs.png)](https://docs.flet.dev/test-images/examples/cupertino/golden/macos/cupertino_switch/image_for_docs.png)

Basic CupertinoSwitch

Inherits: `[LayoutControl](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/layoutcontrol/#flet.LayoutControl) `

Properties

*   **`[active_thumb_image_src](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#flet.CupertinoSwitch.active_thumb_image_src) `**(`[str](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str)  | [bytes](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#bytes)  | None`) –
    
    An image to use on the thumb of this switch when the switch is on.
    
*   **`[active_track_color](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#flet.CupertinoSwitch.active_track_color) `**(`[ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None`) –
    
    The color to use on the track when this switch is on.
    
*   **`[autofocus](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#flet.CupertinoSwitch.autofocus) `**(`[bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool) `) –
    
    Whether this switch will be selected as the initial focus.
    
*   **`[focus_color](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#flet.CupertinoSwitch.focus_color) `**(`[ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None`) –
    
    The color to use for the focus highlight for keyboard interactions.
    
*   **`[inactive_thumb_color](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#flet.CupertinoSwitch.inactive_thumb_color) `**(`[ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None`) –
    
    The color to use on the thumb when this switch is off.
    
*   **`[inactive_thumb_image_src](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#flet.CupertinoSwitch.inactive_thumb_image_src) `**(`[str](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str)  | [bytes](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#bytes)  | None`) –
    
    An image to use on the thumb of this switch when the switch is off.
    
*   **`[inactive_track_color](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#flet.CupertinoSwitch.inactive_track_color) `**(`[ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None`) –
    
    The color to use on the track when this switch is off.
    
*   **`[label](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#flet.CupertinoSwitch.label) `**(`[str](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str)  | None`) –
    
    The clickable label to display on the right of this switch.
    
*   **`[label_position](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#flet.CupertinoSwitch.label_position) `**(`[LabelPosition](https://docs.flet.dev/types/labelposition/#flet.LabelPosition) `) –
    
    The position of the [`label`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#flet.CupertinoSwitch.label)
     relative to this switch.
    
*   **`[off_label_color](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#flet.CupertinoSwitch.off_label_color) `**(`[ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None`) –
    
    The color to use for the accessibility label when the switch is off.
    
*   **`[thumb_color](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#flet.CupertinoSwitch.thumb_color) `**(`[ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None`) –
    
    The color of this switch's thumb.
    
*   **`[thumb_icon](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#flet.CupertinoSwitch.thumb_icon) `**(`[ControlStateValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlStateValue) [[IconData](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.IconData) ] | None`) –
    
    The icon of this Switch's thumb in various [`ControlState`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/controlstate/#flet.ControlState)
    s.
    
*   **`[track_outline_color](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#flet.CupertinoSwitch.track_outline_color) `**(`[ControlStateValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlStateValue) [[ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue) ] | None`) –
    
    The outline color of this switch's track in various [`ControlState`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/controlstate/#flet.ControlState)
    s.
    
*   **`[track_outline_width](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#flet.CupertinoSwitch.track_outline_width) `**(`[ControlStateValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlStateValue) [[Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  | None] | None`) –
    
    The outline width of this switch's track in all or specific [`ControlState`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/controlstate/#flet.ControlState)
    s.
    
*   **`[value](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#flet.CupertinoSwitch.value) `**(`[bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool) `) –
    
    The current value of this switch.
    

Events

*   **`[on_blur](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#flet.CupertinoSwitch.on_blur) `**(`[ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[CupertinoSwitch](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#flet.CupertinoSwitch) ] | None`) –
    
    Called when this switch has lost focus.
    
*   **`[on_change](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#flet.CupertinoSwitch.on_change) `**(`[ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[CupertinoSwitch](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#flet.CupertinoSwitch) ] | None`) –
    
    Called when the state of this switch is changed.
    
*   **`[on_focus](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#flet.CupertinoSwitch.on_focus) `**(`[ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[CupertinoSwitch](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#flet.CupertinoSwitch) ] | None`) –
    
    Called when this switch has received focus.
    
*   **`[on_image_error](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#flet.CupertinoSwitch.on_image_error) `**(`[ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[CupertinoSwitch](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#flet.CupertinoSwitch) ] | None`) –
    
    Called when [`active_thumb_image_src`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#flet.CupertinoSwitch.active_thumb_image_src)
     or [`inactive_thumb_image_src`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#flet.CupertinoSwitch.inactive_thumb_image_src)
     fails to load.
    
*   **`[on_label_color](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#flet.CupertinoSwitch.on_label_color) `**(`[ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None`) –
    
    The color to use for the accessibility label when the switch is on.

### Cupertino, Material and Adaptive Switches[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#cupertino-material-and-adaptive-switches "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#__codelineno-0-1) import flet as ft [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#__codelineno-0-2) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#__codelineno-0-3)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#__codelineno-0-4) def main(page: ft.Page):     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#__codelineno-0-5)     page.add(        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#__codelineno-0-6)         ft.CupertinoSwitch(            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#__codelineno-0-7)             label="Cupertino Switch",            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#__codelineno-0-8)             value=True,        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#__codelineno-0-9)         ),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#__codelineno-0-10)         ft.Switch(            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#__codelineno-0-11)             label="Material Switch",            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#__codelineno-0-12)             value=True,            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#__codelineno-0-13)             thumb_color={ft.ControlState.SELECTED: ft.Colors.BLUE},            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#__codelineno-0-14)             track_color=ft.Colors.YELLOW,            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#__codelineno-0-15)             focus_color=ft.Colors.PURPLE,        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#__codelineno-0-16)         ),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#__codelineno-0-17)         ft.Container(height=20),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#__codelineno-0-18)         ft.Text(            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#__codelineno-0-19)             value="Adaptive Switch shows as CupertinoSwitch on macOS and iOS and as Switch on other platforms:"        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#__codelineno-0-20)         ),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#__codelineno-0-21)         ft.Switch(            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#__codelineno-0-22)             adaptive=True,            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#__codelineno-0-23)             label="Adaptive Switch",            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#__codelineno-0-24)             value=True,        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#__codelineno-0-25)         ),    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#__codelineno-0-26)     ) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#__codelineno-0-27) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#__codelineno-0-28)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#__codelineno-0-29) ft.run(main)`

[![cupertino-material-and-adaptive](https://docs.flet.dev/examples/controls/cupertino_switch/media/cupertino_material_and_adaptive.gif)](https://docs.flet.dev/examples/controls/cupertino_switch/media/cupertino_material_and_adaptive.gif)

Properties[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#flet.CupertinoSwitch-properties "Permanent link")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### active\_thumb\_image\_src `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#flet.CupertinoSwitch.active_thumb_image_src "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#__codelineno-0-1) active_thumb_image_src: [str](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str)  | [bytes](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#bytes)  | None = None`

An image to use on the thumb of this switch when the switch is on.

It can be one of the following: - A URL or local [asset file](https://docs.flet.dev/cookbook/assets)
 path; - A base64 string; - Raw bytes.

### active\_track\_color `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#flet.CupertinoSwitch.active_track_color "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#__codelineno-0-1) active_track_color: [ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None = None`

The color to use on the track when this switch is on.

### autofocus `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#flet.CupertinoSwitch.autofocus "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#__codelineno-0-1) autofocus: [bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool)  = False`

Whether this switch will be selected as the initial focus.

If there is more than one control on a page with autofocus set, then the first one added to the page will get focus.

### focus\_color `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#flet.CupertinoSwitch.focus_color "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#__codelineno-0-1) focus_color: [ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None = None`

The color to use for the focus highlight for keyboard interactions.

### inactive\_thumb\_color `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#flet.CupertinoSwitch.inactive_thumb_color "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#__codelineno-0-1) inactive_thumb_color: [ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None = None`

The color to use on the thumb when this switch is off.

If `None`, defaults to [`thumb_color`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#flet.CupertinoSwitch.thumb_color)
, and if this is also `None`, defaults to [`CupertinoColors.WHITE`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/cupertinocolors/#flet.CupertinoColors.WHITE)
.

### inactive\_thumb\_image\_src `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#flet.CupertinoSwitch.inactive_thumb_image_src "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#__codelineno-0-1) inactive_thumb_image_src: [str](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str)  | [bytes](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#bytes)  | None = None`

An image to use on the thumb of this switch when the switch is off.

It can be one of the following: - A URL or local [asset file](https://docs.flet.dev/cookbook/assets)
 path; - A base64 string; - Raw bytes.

### inactive\_track\_color `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#flet.CupertinoSwitch.inactive_track_color "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#__codelineno-0-1) inactive_track_color: [ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None = None`

The color to use on the track when this switch is off.

### label `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#flet.CupertinoSwitch.label "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#__codelineno-0-1) label: [str](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str)  | None = None`

The clickable label to display on the right of this switch.

### label\_position `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#flet.CupertinoSwitch.label_position "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#__codelineno-0-1) label_position: [LabelPosition](https://docs.flet.dev/types/labelposition/#flet.LabelPosition)  = [RIGHT](https://docs.flet.dev/types/labelposition/#flet.LabelPosition.RIGHT)`

The position of the [`label`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#flet.CupertinoSwitch.label)
 relative to this switch.

### off\_label\_color `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#flet.CupertinoSwitch.off_label_color "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#__codelineno-0-1) off_label_color: [ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None = None`

The color to use for the accessibility label when the switch is off.

### thumb\_color `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#flet.CupertinoSwitch.thumb_color "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#__codelineno-0-1) thumb_color: [ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None = None`

The color of this switch's thumb.

### thumb\_icon `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#flet.CupertinoSwitch.thumb_icon "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#__codelineno-0-1) thumb_icon: [ControlStateValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlStateValue) [[IconData](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.IconData) ] | None = None`

The icon of this Switch's thumb in various [`ControlState`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/controlstate/#flet.ControlState)
s.

Supported states: [`ControlState.SELECTED`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/controlstate/#flet.ControlState.SELECTED)
, [`ControlState.HOVERED`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/controlstate/#flet.ControlState.HOVERED)
, [`ControlState.DISABLED`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/controlstate/#flet.ControlState.DISABLED)
, [`ControlState.FOCUSED`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/controlstate/#flet.ControlState.FOCUSED)
, and [`ControlState.DEFAULT`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/controlstate/#flet.ControlState.DEFAULT)
.

### track\_outline\_color `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#flet.CupertinoSwitch.track_outline_color "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#__codelineno-0-1) track_outline_color: (     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#__codelineno-0-2)     [ControlStateValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlStateValue) [[ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue) ] | None [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#__codelineno-0-3) ) = None`

The outline color of this switch's track in various [`ControlState`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/controlstate/#flet.ControlState)
s.

Supported states: [`ControlState.SELECTED`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/controlstate/#flet.ControlState.SELECTED)
, [`ControlState.HOVERED`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/controlstate/#flet.ControlState.HOVERED)
, [`ControlState.DISABLED`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/controlstate/#flet.ControlState.DISABLED)
, [`ControlState.FOCUSED`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/controlstate/#flet.ControlState.FOCUSED)
, and [`ControlState.DEFAULT`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/controlstate/#flet.ControlState.DEFAULT)
.

### track\_outline\_width `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#flet.CupertinoSwitch.track_outline_width "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#__codelineno-0-1) track_outline_width: (     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#__codelineno-0-2)     [ControlStateValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlStateValue) [[Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  | None] | None [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#__codelineno-0-3) ) = None`

The outline width of this switch's track in all or specific [`ControlState`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/controlstate/#flet.ControlState)
s.

Supported states: [`ControlState.SELECTED`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/controlstate/#flet.ControlState.SELECTED)
, [`ControlState.HOVERED`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/controlstate/#flet.ControlState.HOVERED)
, [`ControlState.DISABLED`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/controlstate/#flet.ControlState.DISABLED)
, [`ControlState.FOCUSED`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/controlstate/#flet.ControlState.FOCUSED)
, and [`ControlState.DEFAULT`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/controlstate/#flet.ControlState.DEFAULT)
.

### value `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#flet.CupertinoSwitch.value "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#__codelineno-0-1) value: [bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool)  = False`

The current value of this switch.

Events[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#flet.CupertinoSwitch-events "Permanent link")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### on\_blur `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#flet.CupertinoSwitch.on_blur "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#__codelineno-0-1) on_blur: [ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[CupertinoSwitch](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#flet.CupertinoSwitch) ] | None = None`

Called when this switch has lost focus.

### on\_change `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#flet.CupertinoSwitch.on_change "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#__codelineno-0-1) on_change: [ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[CupertinoSwitch](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#flet.CupertinoSwitch) ] | None = (     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#__codelineno-0-2)     None [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#__codelineno-0-3) )`

Called when the state of this switch is changed.

### on\_focus `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#flet.CupertinoSwitch.on_focus "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#__codelineno-0-1) on_focus: [ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[CupertinoSwitch](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#flet.CupertinoSwitch) ] | None = None`

Called when this switch has received focus.

### on\_image\_error `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#flet.CupertinoSwitch.on_image_error "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#__codelineno-0-1) on_image_error: (     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#__codelineno-0-2)     [ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[CupertinoSwitch](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#flet.CupertinoSwitch) ] | None [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#__codelineno-0-3) ) = None`

Called when [`active_thumb_image_src`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#flet.CupertinoSwitch.active_thumb_image_src)
 or [`inactive_thumb_image_src`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#flet.CupertinoSwitch.inactive_thumb_image_src)
 fails to load.

### on\_label\_color `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#flet.CupertinoSwitch.on_label_color "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#__codelineno-0-1) on_label_color: [ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None = None`

The color to use for the accessibility label when the switch is on.
