# Dismissible - Flet

 

[Skip to content](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#flet.Dismissible)

Dismissible
===========

A control that can be dismissed by dragging in the indicated [`dismiss_direction`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#flet.Dismissible.dismiss_direction)
. When dragged or flung in the specified [`dismiss_direction`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#flet.Dismissible.dismiss_direction)
, its [`content`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#flet.Dismissible.content)
 smoothly slides out of view.

After completing the sliding animation, if a [`resize_duration`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#flet.Dismissible.resize_duration)
 is provided, this control further animates its height (or width, depending on what is perpendicular to the [`dismiss_direction`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#flet.Dismissible.dismiss_direction)
), gradually reducing it to zero over the specified [`resize_duration`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#flet.Dismissible.resize_duration)
.

Inherits: `[LayoutControl](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/layoutcontrol/#flet.LayoutControl) `, `[AdaptiveControl](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/adaptivecontrol/#flet.AdaptiveControl) `

Properties

*   **`[background](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#flet.Dismissible.background) `**(`[Control](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/control/#flet.Control)  | None`) –
    
    A control that is stacked behind the [`content`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#flet.Dismissible.content)
    .
    
*   **`[content](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#flet.Dismissible.content) `**(`[Control](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/control/#flet.Control) `) –
    
    The control that is being dismissed.
    
*   **`[cross_axis_end_offset](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#flet.Dismissible.cross_axis_end_offset) `**(`[Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number) `) –
    
    Specifies the end offset along the main axis once the [`content`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#flet.Dismissible.content)
     has been dismissed.
    
*   **`[dismiss_direction](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#flet.Dismissible.dismiss_direction) `**(`[DismissDirection](https://docs.flet.dev/types/dismissdirection/#flet.DismissDirection) `) –
    
    The direction in which the control can be dismissed.
    
*   **`[dismiss_thresholds](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#flet.Dismissible.dismiss_thresholds) `**(`[dict](https://docs.python.org/3/reference/expressions.html#dict) [[DismissDirection](https://docs.flet.dev/types/dismissdirection/#flet.DismissDirection) , [Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  | None]`) –
    
    The offset threshold the item has to be dragged in order to be considered as dismissed. This is specified as a dictionary where the key is of type [`DismissDirection`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/dismissdirection/#flet.DismissDirection)
     and the value is the threshold (a fractional/decimal value between `0.0` and `1.0`, inclusive).
    
*   **`[movement_duration](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#flet.Dismissible.movement_duration) `**(`[DurationValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.DurationValue) `) –
    
    The duration for [`content`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#flet.Dismissible.content)
     to dismiss or to come back to original position if not dismissed.
    
*   **`[resize_duration](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#flet.Dismissible.resize_duration) `**(`[DurationValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.DurationValue) `) –
    
    The amount of time the control will spend contracting before [`on_dismiss`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#flet.Dismissible.on_dismiss)
     is called.
    
*   **`[secondary_background](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#flet.Dismissible.secondary_background) `**(`[Control](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/control/#flet.Control)  | None`) –
    
    A control that is stacked behind the [`content`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#flet.Dismissible.content)
     and is exposed when it has been dragged up or to the left.
    

Events

*   **`[on_confirm_dismiss](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#flet.Dismissible.on_confirm_dismiss) `**(`[EventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.EventHandler) [[DismissibleDismissEvent](https://docs.flet.dev/types/dismissibledismissevent/#flet.DismissibleDismissEvent) ] | None`) –
    
    Gives the app an opportunity to confirm or veto a pending dismissal.
    
*   **`[on_dismiss](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#flet.Dismissible.on_dismiss) `**(`[EventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.EventHandler) [[DismissibleDismissEvent](https://docs.flet.dev/types/dismissibledismissevent/#flet.DismissibleDismissEvent) ] | None`) –
    
    Called when this control has been dismissed, after finishing resizing.
    
*   **`[on_resize](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#flet.Dismissible.on_resize) `**(`[ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[Dismissible](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#flet.Dismissible) ] | None`) –
    
    Called when this dismissible changes size, for example, when contracting before being dismissed.
    
*   **`[on_update](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#flet.Dismissible.on_update) `**(`[EventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.EventHandler) [[DismissibleUpdateEvent](https://docs.flet.dev/types/dismissibleupdateevent/#flet.DismissibleUpdateEvent) ] | None`) –
    
    Called when this control has been dragged.
    

Methods

*   **`[confirm_dismiss](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#flet.Dismissible.confirm_dismiss) `** –
    
    Resolve a pending dismissal decision triggered by [`on_confirm_dismiss`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#flet.Dismissible.on_confirm_dismiss)
    .
    

Examples[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#examples "Permanent link")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------

[Live example](https://flet-controls-gallery.fly.dev/layout/dismissible)

### Dismissible `ListTile`s[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#dismissible-listtiles "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#__codelineno-0-1) import flet as ft [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#__codelineno-0-2) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#__codelineno-0-3)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#__codelineno-0-4) def main(page: ft.Page):     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#__codelineno-0-5)     async def handle_dialog_action_click(e: ft.Event[ft.TextButton]):        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#__codelineno-0-6)         page.pop_dialog()        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#__codelineno-0-7)         await dlg.data.confirm_dismiss(e.control.data) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#__codelineno-0-8)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#__codelineno-0-9)     dlg = ft.AlertDialog(        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#__codelineno-0-10)         modal=True,        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#__codelineno-0-11)         title=ft.Text("Please confirm"),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#__codelineno-0-12)         content=ft.Text("Do you really want to delete this item?"),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#__codelineno-0-13)         actions=[            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#__codelineno-0-14)             ft.TextButton("Yes", data=True, on_click=handle_dialog_action_click),            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#__codelineno-0-15)             ft.TextButton("No", data=False, on_click=handle_dialog_action_click),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#__codelineno-0-16)         ],        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#__codelineno-0-17)         actions_alignment=ft.MainAxisAlignment.CENTER,    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#__codelineno-0-18)     ) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#__codelineno-0-19) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#__codelineno-0-23)             # handle_dialog_action_click            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#__codelineno-0-24)             dlg.data = e.control            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#__codelineno-0-25)             page.show_dialog(dlg) e.control.confirm_dismiss(True) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#__codelineno-0-28)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#__codelineno-0-29)     def handle_dismiss(e): [![dismissible-list-tiles](https://docs.flet.dev/examples/controls/dismissible/media/dismissible_list_tiles.gif)](https://docs.flet.dev/examples/controls/dismissible/media/dismissible_list_tiles.gif)

### Remove Dismissible `on_dismiss` inside component[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#remove-dismissible-on_dismiss-inside-component "Permanent link")

Important

Always specify a key for `Dismissible` when using inside Flet component.

The issue you may encounter here is specific to the `Dismissible` control used inside Flet component (declarative UI).

When a user swipes (dismisses) an item, that widget is marked as “dismissed” on the Flutter side and effectively removed from the UI. However, when Flet recalculates the UI diff on the Python side, it may attempt to reuse widgets in the list based on their order rather than their identity.

If no key is provided, Flet’s diffing algorithm can’t tell that a particular `Dismissible` corresponds to a specific item — so it assumes the items have merely shifted. That leads to update commands like:

> “Update text in items 0…N-1, then delete the last item (N).”

On Flutter’s side, though, the already-dismissed `Dismissible` widget in the middle of the list can’t be updated — it’s gone — causing runtime errors.

**Always assign a stable, unique key to each `Dismissible`, typically based on the item’s identifier or index.**

Example:

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#__codelineno-1-1) import flet as ft [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#__codelineno-1-2) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#__codelineno-1-3)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#__codelineno-1-4) @ft.component [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#__codelineno-1-5) def App():     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#__codelineno-1-6)     items, set_items = ft.use_state(list(range(5))) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#__codelineno-1-7)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#__codelineno-1-8)     return ft.ListView(        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#__codelineno-1-9)         controls=[            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#__codelineno-1-10)             ft.Dismissible(                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#__codelineno-1-11)                 key=i,                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#__codelineno-1-12)                 content=ft.ListTile(title=ft.Text(f"Item {i}")),                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#__codelineno-1-13)                 dismiss_direction=ft.DismissDirection.HORIZONTAL,                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#__codelineno-1-14)                 background=ft.Container(bgcolor=ft.Colors.GREEN),                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#__codelineno-1-15)                 secondary_background=ft.Container(bgcolor=ft.Colors.RED),                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#__codelineno-1-16)                 on_dismiss=lambda e, index=i: set_items(                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#__codelineno-1-17)                     [item for item in items if item != index]                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#__codelineno-1-18)                 ),                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#__codelineno-1-19)                 dismiss_thresholds={                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#__codelineno-1-20)                     ft.DismissDirection.HORIZONTAL: 0.1,                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#__codelineno-1-21)                     ft.DismissDirection.START_TO_END: 0.1,                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#__codelineno-1-22)                 },            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#__codelineno-1-23)             )            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#__codelineno-1-24)             for i in items        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#__codelineno-1-25)         ],    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#__codelineno-1-26)     ) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#__codelineno-1-27) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#__codelineno-1-28)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#__codelineno-1-29) ft.run(lambda page: page.render(App))`

Properties[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#flet.Dismissible-properties "Permanent link")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### background `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#flet.Dismissible.background "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#__codelineno-0-1) background: [Control](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/control/#flet.Control)  | None = None`

A control that is stacked behind the [`content`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#flet.Dismissible.content)
.

If [`secondary_background`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#flet.Dismissible.secondary_background)
 is also specified, then this control only appears when the content has been dragged down or to the right.

### content `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#flet.Dismissible.content "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#__codelineno-0-1) content: [Control](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/control/#flet.Control)`

The control that is being dismissed.

Raises:

*   `[ValueError](https://docs.python.org/3/library/exceptions.html#ValueError) ` –
    
    If it is not visible.
    

### cross\_axis\_end\_offset `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#flet.Dismissible.cross_axis_end_offset "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#__codelineno-0-1) cross_axis_end_offset: [Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  = 0.0`

Specifies the end offset along the main axis once the [`content`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#flet.Dismissible.content)
 has been dismissed.

If set to a non-zero value, then this dismissible moves in cross direction depending on whether it is positive or negative.

### dismiss\_direction `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#flet.Dismissible.dismiss_direction "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#__codelineno-0-1) dismiss_direction: [DismissDirection](https://docs.flet.dev/types/dismissdirection/#flet.DismissDirection)  = [HORIZONTAL](https://docs.flet.dev/types/dismissdirection/#flet.DismissDirection.HORIZONTAL)`

The direction in which the control can be dismissed.

### dismiss\_thresholds `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#flet.Dismissible.dismiss_thresholds "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#__codelineno-0-1) dismiss_thresholds: [dict](https://docs.python.org/3/reference/expressions.html#dict) [     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#__codelineno-0-2)     [DismissDirection](https://docs.flet.dev/types/dismissdirection/#flet.DismissDirection) , [Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  | None [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#__codelineno-0-3) ] = [field](https://docs.python.org/3/library/dataclasses.html#dataclasses.field "<code>dataclasses.field</code>") (default_factory=[dict](https://docs.python.org/3/reference/expressions.html#dict) )`

The offset threshold the item has to be dragged in order to be considered as dismissed. This is specified as a dictionary where the key is of type [`DismissDirection`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/dismissdirection/#flet.DismissDirection)
 and the value is the threshold (a fractional/decimal value between `0.0` and `1.0`, inclusive).

Example

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#__codelineno-0-1) ft.Dismissible(     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#__codelineno-0-2)     # ...    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#__codelineno-0-3)     dismiss_thresholds={        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#__codelineno-0-4)         ft.DismissDirection.VERTICAL: 0.1,        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#__codelineno-0-5)         ft.DismissDirection.START_TO_END: 0.7    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#__codelineno-0-6)     } [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#__codelineno-0-7) )`

### movement\_duration `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#flet.Dismissible.movement_duration "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#__codelineno-0-1) movement_duration: [DurationValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.DurationValue)  = [field](https://docs.python.org/3/library/dataclasses.html#dataclasses.field "<code>dataclasses.field</code>") (     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#__codelineno-0-2)     default_factory=lambda: [Duration](https://docs.flet.dev/types/duration/#flet.Duration) (milliseconds=200) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#__codelineno-0-3) )`

The duration for [`content`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#flet.Dismissible.content)
 to dismiss or to come back to original position if not dismissed.

### resize\_duration `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#flet.Dismissible.resize_duration "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#__codelineno-0-1) resize_duration: [DurationValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.DurationValue)  = [field](https://docs.python.org/3/library/dataclasses.html#dataclasses.field "<code>dataclasses.field</code>") (     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#__codelineno-0-2)     default_factory=lambda: [Duration](https://docs.flet.dev/types/duration/#flet.Duration) (milliseconds=300) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#__codelineno-0-3) )`

The amount of time the control will spend contracting before [`on_dismiss`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#flet.Dismissible.on_dismiss)
 is called.

### secondary\_background `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#flet.Dismissible.secondary_background "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#__codelineno-0-1) secondary_background: [Control](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/control/#flet.Control)  | None = None`

A control that is stacked behind the [`content`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#flet.Dismissible.content)
 and is exposed when it has been dragged up or to the left.

Raises:

*   `[ValueError](https://docs.python.org/3/library/exceptions.html#ValueError) ` –
    
    If it is provided and visible but the [`background`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#flet.Dismissible.background)
     is not provided and visible.
    

Events[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#flet.Dismissible-events "Permanent link")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### on\_confirm\_dismiss `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#flet.Dismissible.on_confirm_dismiss "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#__codelineno-0-1) on_confirm_dismiss: (     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#__codelineno-0-2)     [EventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.EventHandler) [[DismissibleDismissEvent](https://docs.flet.dev/types/dismissibledismissevent/#flet.DismissibleDismissEvent) ] | None [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#__codelineno-0-3) ) = None`

Gives the app an opportunity to confirm or veto a pending dismissal. This dismissible cannot be dragged again until this pending dismissal is resolved.

To resolve the pending dismissal, call the [`confirm_dismiss()`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#flet.Dismissible.confirm_dismiss)
 method passing it a boolean representing the decision. If `True`, then the control will be dismissed, otherwise it will be moved back to its original location.

### on\_dismiss `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#flet.Dismissible.on_dismiss "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#__codelineno-0-1) on_dismiss: [EventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.EventHandler) [[DismissibleDismissEvent](https://docs.flet.dev/types/dismissibledismissevent/#flet.DismissibleDismissEvent) ] | None = (     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#__codelineno-0-2)     None [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#__codelineno-0-3) )`

Called when this control has been dismissed, after finishing resizing.

### on\_resize `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#flet.Dismissible.on_resize "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#__codelineno-0-1) on_resize: [ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[Dismissible](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#flet.Dismissible) ] | None = None`

Called when this dismissible changes size, for example, when contracting before being dismissed.

### on\_update `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#flet.Dismissible.on_update "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#__codelineno-0-1) on_update: [EventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.EventHandler) [[DismissibleUpdateEvent](https://docs.flet.dev/types/dismissibleupdateevent/#flet.DismissibleUpdateEvent) ] | None = (     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#__codelineno-0-2)     None [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#__codelineno-0-3) )`

Called when this control has been dragged.

Methods[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#flet.Dismissible-methods "Permanent link")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### confirm\_dismiss `async` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#flet.Dismissible.confirm_dismiss "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#__codelineno-0-1) confirm_dismiss(dismiss: [bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool) )`

Resolve a pending dismissal decision triggered by [`on_confirm_dismiss`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#flet.Dismissible.on_confirm_dismiss)
.

Call this method from your confirmation flow after handling [`on_confirm_dismiss`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dismissible/#flet.Dismissible.on_confirm_dismiss)
.

Parameters:

*   **`dismiss`** (`[bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool) `) –
    
    `True` to continue dismissing the control, `False` to cancel and return it to the original position.
    

Back to top

---

# ProgressRing - Flet

 

[Skip to content](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/progressring/#flet.ProgressRing)

ProgressRing
============

A material design circular progress indicator, which spins to indicate that the application is busy.

A control that shows progress along a circle.

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/progressring/#__codelineno-0-1) ft.ProgressRing(value=0.4, padding=ft.Padding.all(10))`

[![ProgressRing](https://docs.flet.dev/test-images/examples/material/golden/macos/progress_ring/image_for_docs.png)](https://docs.flet.dev/test-images/examples/material/golden/macos/progress_ring/image_for_docs.png)

Fixed progress ring

Inherits: `[LayoutControl](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/layoutcontrol/#flet.LayoutControl) `

Properties

*   **`[bgcolor](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/progressring/#flet.ProgressRing.bgcolor) `**(`[ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None`) –
    
    Color of the circular track being filled by the circular indicator.
    
*   **`[color](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/progressring/#flet.ProgressRing.color) `**(`[ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None`) –
    
    The progress indicator's color.
    
*   **`[padding](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/progressring/#flet.ProgressRing.padding) `**(`[PaddingValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.PaddingValue)  | None`) –
    
    The padding around the indicator track.
    
*   **`[semantics_label](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/progressring/#flet.ProgressRing.semantics_label) `**(`[str](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str)  | None`) –
    
    Used to identify the purpose of this progress bar for screen reading software.
    
*   **`[semantics_value](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/progressring/#flet.ProgressRing.semantics_value) `**(`[Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  | None`) –
    
    Used for determinate progress indicators to indicate how much progress has been made.
    
*   **`[size_constraints](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/progressring/#flet.ProgressRing.size_constraints) `**(`[BoxConstraints](https://docs.flet.dev/types/boxconstraints/#flet.BoxConstraints)  | None`) –
    
    Defines the minimum and maximum size of the progress indicator.
    
*   **`[stroke_align](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/progressring/#flet.ProgressRing.stroke_align) `**(`[Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  | None`) –
    
    The relative position of the stroke.
    
*   **`[stroke_cap](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/progressring/#flet.ProgressRing.stroke_cap) `**(`[StrokeCap](https://docs.flet.dev/types/strokecap/#flet.StrokeCap)  | None`) –
    
    The progress indicator's line ending.
    
*   **`[stroke_width](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/progressring/#flet.ProgressRing.stroke_width) `**(`[Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  | None`) –
    
    The width of the line used to draw the circle.
    
*   **`[track_gap](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/progressring/#flet.ProgressRing.track_gap) `**(`[Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  | None`) –
    
    The gap between the active indicator and the background track.
    
*   **`[value](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/progressring/#flet.ProgressRing.value) `**(`[Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  | None`) –
    
    The value of this progress indicator.
    
*   **`[year_2023](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/progressring/#flet.ProgressRing.year_2023) `**(`[bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool)  | None`) –
    
    If this is set to `False`, the `ProgressRing` will use the latest Material Design 3 appearance, which was introduced in December 2023.
    

Examples[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/progressring/#examples "Permanent link")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

[Live example](https://flet-controls-gallery.fly.dev/displays/progressring)

### Determinate and indeterminate progress rings[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/progressring/#determinate-and-indeterminate-progress-rings "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/progressring/#__codelineno-0-1) import asyncio [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/progressring/#__codelineno-0-2)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/progressring/#__codelineno-0-3) import flet as ft [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/progressring/#__codelineno-0-4) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/progressring/#__codelineno-0-5)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/progressring/#__codelineno-0-6) async def main(page: ft.Page):     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/progressring/#__codelineno-0-7)     page.add(        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/progressring/#__codelineno-0-8)         ft.Text(            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/progressring/#__codelineno-0-9)             value="Circular progress indicator",            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/progressring/#__codelineno-0-10)             theme_style=ft.TextThemeStyle.HEADLINE_SMALL,        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/progressring/#__codelineno-0-11)         ),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/progressring/#__codelineno-0-12)         ft.Row(            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/progressring/#__codelineno-0-13)             controls=[                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/progressring/#__codelineno-0-14)                 determinate_ring := ft.ProgressRing(                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/progressring/#__codelineno-0-15)                     width=16, height=16, stroke_width=2                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/progressring/#__codelineno-0-16)                 ),                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/progressring/#__codelineno-0-17)                 determinate_message := ft.Text("Wait for the completion..."),            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/progressring/#__codelineno-0-18)             ]        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/progressring/#__codelineno-0-19)         ),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/progressring/#__codelineno-0-20)         ft.Text(            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/progressring/#__codelineno-0-21)             value="Indeterminate cicrular progress",            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/progressring/#__codelineno-0-22)             theme_style=ft.TextThemeStyle.HEADLINE_SMALL,        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/progressring/#__codelineno-0-23)         ),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/progressring/#__codelineno-0-24)         ft.Column(            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/progressring/#__codelineno-0-25)             horizontal_alignment=ft.CrossAxisAlignment.CENTER,            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/progressring/#__codelineno-0-26)             controls=[ft.ProgressRing(), ft.Text("I'm going to run for ages...")],        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/progressring/#__codelineno-0-27)         ),    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/progressring/#__codelineno-0-28)     ) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/progressring/#__codelineno-0-29)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/progressring/#__codelineno-0-30)     for i in range(0, 101):        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/progressring/#__codelineno-0-31)         determinate_ring.value = i * 0.01        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/progressring/#__codelineno-0-32)         await asyncio.sleep(0.1)        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/progressring/#__codelineno-0-33)         if i == 100:            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/progressring/#__codelineno-0-34)             determinate_message.value = "Finished!"        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/progressring/#__codelineno-0-35)         page.update() [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/progressring/#__codelineno-0-36) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/progressring/#__codelineno-0-37)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/progressring/#__codelineno-0-38) if __name__ == "__main__":     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/progressring/#__codelineno-0-39)     ft.run(main)`

[![determinate-and-indeterminate](https://docs.flet.dev/examples/controls/progress_ring/media/determinate_and_indeterminate.gif)](https://docs.flet.dev/examples/controls/progress_ring/media/determinate_and_indeterminate.gif)

### Gauge with progress[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/progressring/#gauge-with-progress "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/progressring/#__codelineno-1-1) import flet as ft [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/progressring/#__codelineno-1-2) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/progressring/#__codelineno-1-3)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/progressring/#__codelineno-1-4) def main(page: ft.Page):     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/progressring/#__codelineno-1-5)     page.add(        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/progressring/#__codelineno-1-6)         ft.Stack(            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/progressring/#__codelineno-1-7)             width=100,            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/progressring/#__codelineno-1-8)             height=100,            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/progressring/#__codelineno-1-9)             controls=[                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/progressring/#__codelineno-1-10)                 ft.Container(content=ft.Text("60%"), alignment=ft.Alignment.CENTER),                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/progressring/#__codelineno-1-11)                 ft.ProgressRing(value=0.6, width=100, height=100),            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/progressring/#__codelineno-1-12)             ],        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/progressring/#__codelineno-1-13)         )    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/progressring/#__codelineno-1-14)     ) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/progressring/#__codelineno-1-15) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/progressring/#__codelineno-1-16)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/progressring/#__codelineno-1-17) if __name__ == "__main__":     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/progressring/#__codelineno-1-18)     ft.run(main)`

[![determinate-and-indeterminate](https://docs.flet.dev/test-images/examples/material/golden/macos/progress_ring/gauge_with_progress.png)](https://docs.flet.dev/test-images/examples/material/golden/macos/progress_ring/gauge_with_progress.png)

Properties[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/progressring/#flet.ProgressRing-properties "Permanent link")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### bgcolor `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/progressring/#flet.ProgressRing.bgcolor "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/progressring/#__codelineno-0-1) bgcolor: [ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None = None`

Color of the circular track being filled by the circular indicator.

### color `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/progressring/#flet.ProgressRing.color "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/progressring/#__codelineno-0-1) color: [ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None = None`

The progress indicator's color.

### padding `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/progressring/#flet.ProgressRing.padding "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/progressring/#__codelineno-0-1) padding: [PaddingValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.PaddingValue)  | None = None`

The padding around the indicator track.

If `None`, [`ProgressIndicatorTheme.circular_track_padding`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/progressindicatortheme/#flet.ProgressIndicatorTheme.circular_track_padding)
 is used.

If that's is also `None` and [`year_2023`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/progressring/#flet.ProgressRing.year_2023)
 is `False`, defaults to `Padding.all(4.0)`.

Otherwise, defaults to `Padding.all(0.0)`.

### semantics\_label `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/progressring/#flet.ProgressRing.semantics_label "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/progressring/#__codelineno-0-1) semantics_label: [str](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str)  | None = None`

Used to identify the purpose of this progress bar for screen reading software.

### semantics\_value `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/progressring/#flet.ProgressRing.semantics_value "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/progressring/#__codelineno-0-1) semantics_value: [Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  | None = None`

Used for determinate progress indicators to indicate how much progress has been made.

### size\_constraints `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/progressring/#flet.ProgressRing.size_constraints "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/progressring/#__codelineno-0-1) size_constraints: [BoxConstraints](https://docs.flet.dev/types/boxconstraints/#flet.BoxConstraints)  | None = None`

Defines the minimum and maximum size of the progress indicator.

If `None`, [`ProgressIndicatorTheme.size_constraints`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/progressindicatortheme/#flet.ProgressIndicatorTheme.size_constraints)
 is used.

If that's is also `None`, defaults to a minimum width and height of `36`.

### stroke\_align `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/progressring/#flet.ProgressRing.stroke_align "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/progressring/#__codelineno-0-1) stroke_align: [Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  | None = None`

The relative position of the stroke.

Value typically ranges be `-1.0` (inside stroke) and `1.0` (outside stroke).

A value of 0 (center stroke) will center the border on the edge of the control.

If [`ProgressRing.year_2023`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/progressring/#flet.ProgressRing.year_2023)
 is `True`, then the default value is `0`. Otherwise, the default value is `-1`.

### stroke\_cap `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/progressring/#flet.ProgressRing.stroke_cap "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/progressring/#__codelineno-0-1) stroke_cap: [StrokeCap](https://docs.flet.dev/types/strokecap/#flet.StrokeCap)  | None = None`

The progress indicator's line ending.

### stroke\_width `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/progressring/#flet.ProgressRing.stroke_width "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/progressring/#__codelineno-0-1) stroke_width: [Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  | None = None`

The width of the line used to draw the circle.

### track\_gap `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/progressring/#flet.ProgressRing.track_gap "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/progressring/#__codelineno-0-1) track_gap: [Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  | None = None`

The gap between the active indicator and the background track.

If [`year_2023`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/progressring/#flet.ProgressRing.year_2023)
 is `True` or `Theme.use_material3` is `False`, then no track gap will be drawn.

Set `track_gap` to `0` to hide this track gap.

If `None`, [`ProgressIndicatorTheme.track_gap`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/progressindicatortheme/#flet.ProgressIndicatorTheme.track_gap)
 is used.

If that's is also `None`, defaults to `4.0`.

### value `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/progressring/#flet.ProgressRing.value "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/progressring/#__codelineno-0-1) value: [Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  | None = None`

The value of this progress indicator.

A value of `0.0` means no progress and `1.0` means that progress is complete. The value will be clamped to be in the range `0.0` - `1.0`. If `None`, this progress indicator is indeterminate, which means the indicator displays a predetermined animation that does not indicate how much actual progress is being made.

### year\_2023 `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/progressring/#flet.ProgressRing.year_2023 "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/progressring/#__codelineno-0-1) year_2023: [bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool)  | None = None`

If this is set to `False`, the `ProgressRing` will use the latest Material Design 3 appearance, which was introduced in December 2023.

When `True`, the `ProgressRing` will use the 2023 Material Design 3 appearance.

If not set, then the [`ProgressIndicatorTheme.year_2023`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/progressindicatortheme/#flet.ProgressIndicatorTheme.year_2023)
 will be used, which is `False` by default.

If [`Theme.use_material3`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/theme/#flet.Theme.use_material3)
 is `False`, then this property is ignored.

Back to top

---

# MenuBar - Flet

 

[Skip to content](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menubar/#flet.MenuBar)

MenuBar
=======

A menu bar that manages cascading child menus.

It could be placed anywhere but typically resides above the main body of the application and defines a menu system for invoking callbacks in response to user selection of a menu item.

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menubar/#__codelineno-0-1) ft.MenuBar(     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menubar/#__codelineno-0-2)     controls=[        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menubar/#__codelineno-0-3)         ft.SubmenuButton(            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menubar/#__codelineno-0-4)             content=ft.Text("Submenu"),            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menubar/#__codelineno-0-5)             controls=[                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menubar/#__codelineno-0-6)                 ft.MenuItemButton(content=ft.Text("Item 1")),                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menubar/#__codelineno-0-7)                 ft.MenuItemButton(content=ft.Text("Item 2")),                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menubar/#__codelineno-0-8)                 ft.MenuItemButton(content=ft.Text("Item 3")),            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menubar/#__codelineno-0-9)             ],        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menubar/#__codelineno-0-10)         ),    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menubar/#__codelineno-0-11)     ], [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menubar/#__codelineno-0-12) )`

[![MenuBar](https://docs.flet.dev/test-images/examples/material/golden/macos/menu_bar/image_for_docs.png)](https://docs.flet.dev/test-images/examples/material/golden/macos/menu_bar/image_for_docs.png)

Basic menu bar

Inherits: `[Control](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/control/#flet.Control) `

Properties

*   **`[clip_behavior](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menubar/#flet.MenuBar.clip_behavior) `**(`[ClipBehavior](https://docs.flet.dev/types/clipbehavior/#flet.ClipBehavior) `) –
    
    Whether to clip the content of this control or not.
    
*   **`[controls](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menubar/#flet.MenuBar.controls) `**(`[list](https://docs.python.org/3/glossary.html#term-list) [[Control](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/control/#flet.Control) ]`) –
    
    A list of top-level menu controls to display in this menu bar.
    
*   **`[style](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menubar/#flet.MenuBar.style) `**(`[MenuStyle](https://docs.flet.dev/types/menustyle/#flet.MenuStyle)  | None`) –
    
    The menu bar style.
    

Examples[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menubar/#examples "Permanent link")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

[Live example](https://flet-controls-gallery.fly.dev/navigation/menubar)

### `MenuBar` with Nested Submenus[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menubar/#menubar-with-nested-submenus "Permanent link")

Properties[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menubar/#flet.MenuBar-properties "Permanent link")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### clip\_behavior `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menubar/#flet.MenuBar.clip_behavior "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menubar/#__codelineno-0-1) clip_behavior: [ClipBehavior](https://docs.flet.dev/types/clipbehavior/#flet.ClipBehavior)  = [NONE](https://docs.flet.dev/types/clipbehavior/#flet.ClipBehavior.NONE)`

Whether to clip the content of this control or not.

### controls `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menubar/#flet.MenuBar.controls "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menubar/#__codelineno-0-1) controls: [list](https://docs.python.org/3/glossary.html#term-list) [[Control](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/control/#flet.Control) ] = [field](https://docs.python.org/3/library/dataclasses.html#dataclasses.field "<code>dataclasses.field</code>") (default_factory=[list](https://docs.python.org/3/glossary.html#term-list) )`

A list of top-level menu controls to display in this menu bar.

Raises:

*   `[ValueError](https://docs.python.org/3/library/exceptions.html#ValueError) ` –
    
    If it does not contain at least one visible `Control`.
    

### style `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menubar/#flet.MenuBar.style "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menubar/#__codelineno-0-1) style: [MenuStyle](https://docs.flet.dev/types/menustyle/#flet.MenuStyle)  | None = None`

The menu bar style.

Back to top

# MenuItemButton - Flet

 

[Skip to content](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#flet.MenuItemButton)

MenuItemButton
==============

A button for use in a MenuBar or on its own, that can be activated by click or keyboard navigation.

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#__codelineno-0-1) ft.Row(     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#__codelineno-0-2)     controls=[        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#__codelineno-0-3)         ft.MenuItemButton(            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#__codelineno-0-4)             content=ft.Text("Yes"),            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#__codelineno-0-5)             on_click=lambda e: print("yes"),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#__codelineno-0-6)         ),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#__codelineno-0-7)         ft.MenuItemButton(            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#__codelineno-0-8)             content=ft.Text("No"),            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#__codelineno-0-9)             on_click=lambda e: print("no"),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#__codelineno-0-10)         ),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#__codelineno-0-11)         ft.MenuItemButton(            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#__codelineno-0-12)             content=ft.Text("Maybe"),            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#__codelineno-0-13)             on_click=lambda e: print("maybe"),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#__codelineno-0-14)         ),    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#__codelineno-0-15)     ], [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#__codelineno-0-16) )`

[![MenuItemButton](https://docs.flet.dev/test-images/examples/material/golden/macos/menu_item_button/image_for_docs.png)](https://docs.flet.dev/test-images/examples/material/golden/macos/menu_item_button/image_for_docs.png)

Menu item buttons outside of menubar

Inherits: `[LayoutControl](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/layoutcontrol/#flet.LayoutControl) `

Properties

*   **`[autofocus](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#flet.MenuItemButton.autofocus) `**(`[bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool) `) –
    
    Whether this button should automatically request focus.
    
*   **`[clip_behavior](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#flet.MenuItemButton.clip_behavior) `**(`[ClipBehavior](https://docs.flet.dev/types/clipbehavior/#flet.ClipBehavior) `) –
    
    Whether to clip the content of this control or not.
    
*   **`[close_on_click](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#flet.MenuItemButton.close_on_click) `**(`[bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool) `) –
    
    Defines if the menu will be closed when the `MenuItemButton` is clicked.
    
*   **`[content](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#flet.MenuItemButton.content) `**(`[StrOrControl](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.StrOrControl)  | None`) –
    
    The child control or text to be displayed in the center of this button.
    
*   **`[focus_on_hover](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#flet.MenuItemButton.focus_on_hover) `**(`[bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool) `) –
    
    Determine if hovering can request focus.
    
*   **`[leading](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#flet.MenuItemButton.leading) `**(`[Control](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/control/#flet.Control)  | None`) –
    
    An optional control to display before the `content`.
    
*   **`[overflow_axis](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#flet.MenuItemButton.overflow_axis) `**(`[Axis](https://docs.flet.dev/types/axis/#flet.Axis) `) –
    
    The direction in which the menu item expands.
    
*   **`[semantic_label](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#flet.MenuItemButton.semantic_label) `**(`[str](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str)  | None`) –
    
    A string that describes the button's action to assistive technologies.
    
*   **`[style](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#flet.MenuItemButton.style) `**(`[ButtonStyle](https://docs.flet.dev/types/buttonstyle/#flet.ButtonStyle)  | None`) –
    
    Customizes this button's appearance.
    
*   **`[trailing](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#flet.MenuItemButton.trailing) `**(`[Control](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/control/#flet.Control)  | None`) –
    
    An optional control to display after the `content`.
    

Events

*   **`[on_blur](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#flet.MenuItemButton.on_blur) `**(`[ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[MenuItemButton](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#flet.MenuItemButton) ] | None`) –
    
    Called when this button loses focus.
    
*   **`[on_click](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#flet.MenuItemButton.on_click) `**(`[ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[MenuItemButton](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#flet.MenuItemButton) ] | None`) –
    
    Called when the button is clicked.If not defined the button will be disabled.
    
*   **`[on_focus](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#flet.MenuItemButton.on_focus) `**(`[ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[MenuItemButton](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#flet.MenuItemButton) ] | None`) –
    
    Called when the button receives focus.
    
*   **`[on_hover](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#flet.MenuItemButton.on_hover) `**(`[ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[MenuItemButton](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#flet.MenuItemButton) ] | None`) –
    
    Called when the button is hovered.
    

Examples[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#examples "Permanent link")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

[Live example](https://flet-controls-gallery.fly.dev/buttons/menuitembutton)

### Basic Example[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#basic-example "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#__codelineno-0-1) import flet as ft [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#__codelineno-0-2) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#__codelineno-0-3)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#__codelineno-0-4) def main(page: ft.Page):     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#__codelineno-0-5)     page.padding = 0    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#__codelineno-0-6)     page.spacing = 0    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#__codelineno-0-7)     page.theme_mode = ft.ThemeMode.LIGHT [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#__codelineno-0-8)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#__codelineno-0-9)     def handle_color_click(e: ft.Event[ft.MenuItemButton]):        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#__codelineno-0-10)         color = e.control.content.value        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#__codelineno-0-11)         background_container.content.value = f"{color} background color"        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#__codelineno-0-12)         background_container.bgcolor = color.lower()        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#__codelineno-0-13)         page.update() [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#__codelineno-0-14)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#__codelineno-0-15)     def handle_on_hover(e: ft.Event[ft.MenuItemButton]):        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#__codelineno-0-16)         print(e) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#__codelineno-0-17)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#__codelineno-0-18)     menubar = ft.MenuBar(        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#__codelineno-0-19)         expand=True,        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#__codelineno-0-20)         controls=[            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#__codelineno-0-21)             ft.SubmenuButton(                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#__codelineno-0-22)                 content=ft.Text("BgColors"),                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#__codelineno-0-23)                 controls=[                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#__codelineno-0-24)                     ft.MenuItemButton(                        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#__codelineno-0-25)                         content=ft.Text("Blue"),                        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#__codelineno-0-26)                         leading=ft.Icon(ft.Icons.COLORIZE),                        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#__codelineno-0-27)                         style=ft.ButtonStyle(                            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#__codelineno-0-28)                             bgcolor={ft.ControlState.HOVERED: ft.Colors.BLUE}                        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#__codelineno-0-29)                         ),                        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#__codelineno-0-30)                         on_click=handle_color_click,                        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#__codelineno-0-31)                         on_hover=handle_on_hover,                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#__codelineno-0-32)                     ),                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#__codelineno-0-33)                     ft.MenuItemButton(                        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#__codelineno-0-34)                         content=ft.Text("Green"),                        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#__codelineno-0-35)                         leading=ft.Icon(ft.Icons.COLORIZE),                        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#__codelineno-0-36)                         style=ft.ButtonStyle(                            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#__codelineno-0-37)                             bgcolor={ft.ControlState.HOVERED: ft.Colors.GREEN}                        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#__codelineno-0-38)                         ),                        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#__codelineno-0-39)                         on_click=handle_color_click,                        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#__codelineno-0-40)                         on_hover=handle_on_hover,                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#__codelineno-0-41)                     ),                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#__codelineno-0-42)                     ft.MenuItemButton(                        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#__codelineno-0-43)                         content=ft.Text("Red"),                        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#__codelineno-0-44)                         leading=ft.Icon(ft.Icons.COLORIZE),                        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#__codelineno-0-45)                         style=ft.ButtonStyle(                            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#__codelineno-0-46)                             bgcolor={ft.ControlState.HOVERED: ft.Colors.RED}                        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#__codelineno-0-47)                         ),                        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#__codelineno-0-48)                         on_click=handle_color_click,                        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#__codelineno-0-49)                         on_hover=handle_on_hover,                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#__codelineno-0-50)                     ),                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#__codelineno-0-51)                 ], [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#__codelineno-0-54)     ) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#__codelineno-0-55)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#__codelineno-0-56)     page.add(        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#__codelineno-0-57)         ft.Row(controls=[menubar]),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#__codelineno-0-58)         background_container := ft.Container(            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#__codelineno-0-59)             expand=True,            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#__codelineno-0-60)             bgcolor=ft.Colors.WHITE,            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#__codelineno-0-61)             alignment=ft.Alignment.CENTER,            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#__codelineno-0-62)             content=ft.Text(                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#__codelineno-0-63)                 value="Choose a bgcolor from the menu",                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#__codelineno-0-64)                 style=ft.TextStyle(weight=ft.FontWeight.W_500),            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#__codelineno-0-65)             ),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#__codelineno-0-66)         ), [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#__codelineno-0-69)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#__codelineno-0-70) if __name__ == "__main__": [![basic](https://docs.flet.dev/test-images/examples/material/golden/macos/menu_item_button/basic.gif)](https://docs.flet.dev/test-images/examples/material/golden/macos/menu_item_button/basic.gif)

Properties[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#flet.MenuItemButton-properties "Permanent link")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### autofocus `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#flet.MenuItemButton.autofocus "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#__codelineno-0-1) autofocus: [bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool)  = False`

Whether this button should automatically request focus.

Defaults to `False`.

### clip\_behavior `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#flet.MenuItemButton.clip_behavior "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#__codelineno-0-1) clip_behavior: [ClipBehavior](https://docs.flet.dev/types/clipbehavior/#flet.ClipBehavior)  = [NONE](https://docs.flet.dev/types/clipbehavior/#flet.ClipBehavior.NONE)`

Whether to clip the content of this control or not.

### close\_on\_click `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#flet.MenuItemButton.close_on_click "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#__codelineno-0-1) close_on_click: [bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool)  = True`

Defines if the menu will be closed when the `MenuItemButton` is clicked.

### content `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#flet.MenuItemButton.content "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#__codelineno-0-1) content: [StrOrControl](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.StrOrControl)  | None = None`

The child control or text to be displayed in the center of this button.

Typically this is the button's label, using a `Text` control.

### focus\_on\_hover `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#flet.MenuItemButton.focus_on_hover "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#__codelineno-0-1) focus_on_hover: [bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool)  = True`

Determine if hovering can request focus.

### leading `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#flet.MenuItemButton.leading "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#__codelineno-0-1) leading: [Control](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/control/#flet.Control)  | None = None`

An optional control to display before the `content`.

Typically an [`Icon`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/icon/#flet.Icon)
 control.

### overflow\_axis `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#flet.MenuItemButton.overflow_axis "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#__codelineno-0-1) overflow_axis: [Axis](https://docs.flet.dev/types/axis/#flet.Axis)  = [HORIZONTAL](https://docs.flet.dev/types/axis/#flet.Axis.HORIZONTAL)`

The direction in which the menu item expands.

If the menu item button is a descendent of `MenuBar`, then this property is ignored.

### semantic\_label `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#flet.MenuItemButton.semantic_label "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#__codelineno-0-1) semantic_label: [str](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str)  | None = None`

A string that describes the button's action to assistive technologies.

### style `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#flet.MenuItemButton.style "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#__codelineno-0-1) style: [ButtonStyle](https://docs.flet.dev/types/buttonstyle/#flet.ButtonStyle)  | None = None`

Customizes this button's appearance.

### trailing `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#flet.MenuItemButton.trailing "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#__codelineno-0-1) trailing: [Control](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/control/#flet.Control)  | None = None`

An optional control to display after the `content`.

Typically an [`Icon`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/icon/#flet.Icon)
 control.

Events[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#flet.MenuItemButton-events "Permanent link")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### on\_blur `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#flet.MenuItemButton.on_blur "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#__codelineno-0-1) on_blur: [ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[MenuItemButton](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#flet.MenuItemButton) ] | None = None`

Called when this button loses focus.

### on\_click `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#flet.MenuItemButton.on_click "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#__codelineno-0-1) on_click: [ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[MenuItemButton](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#flet.MenuItemButton) ] | None = None`

Called when the button is clicked.If not defined the button will be disabled.

### on\_focus `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#flet.MenuItemButton.on_focus "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#__codelineno-0-1) on_focus: [ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[MenuItemButton](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#flet.MenuItemButton) ] | None = None`

Called when the button receives focus.

### on\_hover `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#flet.MenuItemButton.on_hover "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#__codelineno-0-1) on_hover: [ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[MenuItemButton](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#flet.MenuItemButton) ] | None = None`

Called when the button is hovered.

# DialogControl - Flet

DialogControl
=============

Inherits: `[AdaptiveControl](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/adaptivecontrol/#flet.AdaptiveControl) `

A base class for dialog controls.

Properties

*   **`[open](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dialogcontrol/#flet.DialogControl.open) `**(`[bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool) `) –
    
    Set to `True` to display this dialog.
    

Events

*   **`[on_dismiss](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dialogcontrol/#flet.DialogControl.on_dismiss) `**(`[ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[DialogControl](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dialogcontrol/#flet.DialogControl) ] | None`) –
    
    Called when dialog is dismissed.
    

Properties[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dialogcontrol/#flet.DialogControl-properties "Permanent link")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### open `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dialogcontrol/#flet.DialogControl.open "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dialogcontrol/#__codelineno-0-1) open: [bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool)  = False`

Set to `True` to display this dialog.

Events[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dialogcontrol/#flet.DialogControl-events "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dialogcontrol/#__codelineno-0-1) on_dismiss: [ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[DialogControl](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dialogcontrol/#flet.DialogControl) ] | None = None`

Called when dialog is dismissed.
