# Radio - Flet

 

[Skip to content](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#flet.Radio)

Radio
=====

Radio buttons let people select a single option from two or more choices.

Example:

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#__codelineno-0-1) ft.RadioGroup(     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#__codelineno-0-2)     content=ft.Row(        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#__codelineno-0-3)         controls=[ft.Radio(label=f"{i}") for i in range(1, 4)],        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#__codelineno-0-4)         alignment=ft.MainAxisAlignment.CENTER,    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#__codelineno-0-5)     ) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#__codelineno-0-6) )`

[![Radio](https://docs.flet.dev/test-images/examples/material/golden/macos/radio/image_for_docs.png)](https://docs.flet.dev/test-images/examples/material/golden/macos/radio/image_for_docs.png)

Simple radio buttons

Inherits: `[LayoutControl](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/layoutcontrol/#flet.LayoutControl) `, `[AdaptiveControl](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/adaptivecontrol/#flet.AdaptiveControl) `

Properties

*   **`[active_color](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#flet.Radio.active_color) `**(`[ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None`) –
    
    The color used to fill this radio when it is selected.
    
*   **`[autofocus](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#flet.Radio.autofocus) `**(`[bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool) `) –
    
    True if the control will be selected as the initial focus.
    
*   **`[fill_color](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#flet.Radio.fill_color) `**(`[ControlStateValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlStateValue) [[ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue) ] | None`) –
    
    The color that fills the radio, in all or specific [`ControlState`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/controlstate/#flet.ControlState)
     states.
    
*   **`[focus_color](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#flet.Radio.focus_color) `**(`[ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None`) –
    
    The color of this radio when it has the input focus.
    
*   **`[hover_color](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#flet.Radio.hover_color) `**(`[ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None`) –
    
    The color of this radio when it is hovered.
    
*   **`[label](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#flet.Radio.label) `**(`[str](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str) `) –
    
    The clickable label to display on the right of a Radio.
    
*   **`[label_position](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#flet.Radio.label_position) `**(`[LabelPosition](https://docs.flet.dev/types/labelposition/#flet.LabelPosition) `) –
    
    Defaults to `LabelPosition.RIGHT`.
    
*   **`[label_style](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#flet.Radio.label_style) `**(`[TextStyle](https://docs.flet.dev/types/textstyle/#flet.TextStyle)  | None`) –
    
    The label's style.
    
*   **`[mouse_cursor](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#flet.Radio.mouse_cursor) `**(`[MouseCursor](https://docs.flet.dev/types/mousecursor/#flet.MouseCursor)  | None`) –
    
    The cursor for a mouse pointer entering or hovering over this control.
    
*   **`[overlay_color](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#flet.Radio.overlay_color) `**(`[ControlStateValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlStateValue) [[ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue) ] | None`) –
    
    The overlay color of this radio in all or specific [`ControlState`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/controlstate/#flet.ControlState)
     states.
    
*   **`[splash_radius](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#flet.Radio.splash_radius) `**(`[Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  | None`) –
    
    The splash radius of the circular Material ink response.
    
*   **`[toggleable](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#flet.Radio.toggleable) `**(`[bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool) `) –
    
    Set to `True` if this radio button is allowed to be returned to an indeterminate state by selecting it again when selected.
    
*   **`[value](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#flet.Radio.value) `**(`[str](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str)  | None`) –
    
    The value to set to containing `RadioGroup` when the radio is selected.
    
*   **`[visual_density](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#flet.Radio.visual_density) `**(`[VisualDensity](https://docs.flet.dev/types/visualdensity/#flet.VisualDensity)  | None`) –
    
    Defines how compact the radio's layout will be.
    

Events

*   **`[on_blur](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#flet.Radio.on_blur) `**(`[ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[Radio](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#flet.Radio) ] | None`) –
    
    Called when the control has lost focus.
    
*   **`[on_focus](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#flet.Radio.on_focus) `**(`[ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[Radio](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#flet.Radio) ] | None`) –
    
    Called when the control has received focus.
    

Examples[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#examples "Permanent link")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

[Live example](https://flet-controls-gallery.fly.dev/input/radio)

### Basic Example[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#basic-example "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#__codelineno-0-1) import flet as ft [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#__codelineno-0-2) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#__codelineno-0-3)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#__codelineno-0-4) def main(page: ft.Page):     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#__codelineno-0-5)     def handle_button_click(e: ft.Event[ft.Button]):        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#__codelineno-0-6)         message.value = f"Your favorite color is:  {group.value}"        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#__codelineno-0-7)         page.update() [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#__codelineno-0-8)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#__codelineno-0-9)     page.add(        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#__codelineno-0-10)         ft.Text("Select your favorite color:"),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#__codelineno-0-11)         group := ft.RadioGroup(            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#__codelineno-0-12)             content=ft.Column(                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#__codelineno-0-13)                 controls=[                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#__codelineno-0-14)                     ft.Radio(value="red", label="Red"),                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#__codelineno-0-15)                     ft.Radio(value="green", label="Green"),                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#__codelineno-0-16)                     ft.Radio(value="blue", label="Blue"),                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#__codelineno-0-17)                 ]            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#__codelineno-0-18)             )        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#__codelineno-0-19)         ),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#__codelineno-0-20)         ft.Button(content="Submit", on_click=handle_button_click),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#__codelineno-0-21)         message := ft.Text(),    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#__codelineno-0-22)     ) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#__codelineno-0-23) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#__codelineno-0-24)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#__codelineno-0-25) if __name__ == "__main__":     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#__codelineno-0-26)     ft.run(main)`

### Handling selection changes[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#handling-selection-changes "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#__codelineno-1-1) import flet as ft [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#__codelineno-1-2) message.value = f"Your favorite color is:  {e.control.value}"        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#__codelineno-1-7)         page.update() [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#__codelineno-1-8)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#__codelineno-1-9)     page.add(        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#__codelineno-1-10)         ft.Text("Select your favorite color:"),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#__codelineno-1-11)         ft.RadioGroup(            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#__codelineno-1-12)             on_change=handle_selection_change,            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#__codelineno-1-13)             content=ft.Column(                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#__codelineno-1-14)                 controls=[                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#__codelineno-1-15)                     ft.Radio(value="red", label="Red"),                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#__codelineno-1-16)                     ft.Radio(value="green", label="Green"),                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#__codelineno-1-17)                     ft.Radio(value="blue", label="Blue"),                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#__codelineno-1-18)                 ]            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#__codelineno-1-19)             ),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#__codelineno-1-20)         ),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#__codelineno-1-21)         message := ft.Text(),    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#__codelineno-1-22)     ) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#__codelineno-1-23) ### Styled radio buttons[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#styled-radio-buttons "Permanent link")

[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#__codelineno-2-3)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#__codelineno-2-4) def main(page: ft.Page): label="Radio with constant fill color",                        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#__codelineno-2-12)                         value="2",                        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#__codelineno-2-13)                         fill_color=ft.Colors.RED,                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#__codelineno-2-14)                     ),                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#__codelineno-2-15)                     ft.Radio(                        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#__codelineno-2-16)                         label="Radio with dynamic fill color",                        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#__codelineno-2-17)                         value="3",                        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#__codelineno-2-18)                         fill_color={                            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#__codelineno-2-19)                             ft.ControlState.HOVERED: ft.Colors.BLUE,    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#__codelineno-2-24)                 ]            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#__codelineno-2-25)             ) Properties[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#flet.Radio-properties "Permanent link")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### active\_color `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#flet.Radio.active_color "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#__codelineno-0-1) active_color: [ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None = None`

The color used to fill this radio when it is selected.

### autofocus `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#flet.Radio.autofocus "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#__codelineno-0-1) autofocus: [bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool)  = False`

True if the control will be selected as the initial focus.

If there is more than one control on a page with autofocus set, then the first one added to the page will get focus.

### fill\_color `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#flet.Radio.fill_color "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#__codelineno-0-1) fill_color: [ControlStateValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlStateValue) [[ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue) ] | None = None`

The color that fills the radio, in all or specific [`ControlState`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/controlstate/#flet.ControlState)
 states.

### focus\_color `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#flet.Radio.focus_color "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#__codelineno-0-1) focus_color: [ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None = None`

The color of this radio when it has the input focus.

### hover\_color `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#flet.Radio.hover_color "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#__codelineno-0-1) hover_color: [ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None = None`

The color of this radio when it is hovered.

### label `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#flet.Radio.label "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#__codelineno-0-1) label: [str](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str)  = ''`

The clickable label to display on the right of a Radio.

### label\_position `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#flet.Radio.label_position "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#__codelineno-0-1) label_position: [LabelPosition](https://docs.flet.dev/types/labelposition/#flet.LabelPosition)  = [RIGHT](https://docs.flet.dev/types/labelposition/#flet.LabelPosition.RIGHT)`

Defaults to `LabelPosition.RIGHT`.

### label\_style `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#flet.Radio.label_style "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#__codelineno-0-1) label_style: [TextStyle](https://docs.flet.dev/types/textstyle/#flet.TextStyle)  | None = None`

The label's style.

### mouse\_cursor `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#flet.Radio.mouse_cursor "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#__codelineno-0-1) mouse_cursor: [MouseCursor](https://docs.flet.dev/types/mousecursor/#flet.MouseCursor)  | None = None`

The cursor for a mouse pointer entering or hovering over this control.

### overlay\_color `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#flet.Radio.overlay_color "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#__codelineno-0-1) overlay_color: [ControlStateValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlStateValue) [[ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue) ] | None = None`

The overlay color of this radio in all or specific [`ControlState`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/controlstate/#flet.ControlState)
 states.

### splash\_radius `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#flet.Radio.splash_radius "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#__codelineno-0-1) splash_radius: [Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  | None = None`

The splash radius of the circular Material ink response.

### toggleable `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#flet.Radio.toggleable "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#__codelineno-0-1) toggleable: [bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool)  = False`

Set to `True` if this radio button is allowed to be returned to an indeterminate state by selecting it again when selected.

### value `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#flet.Radio.value "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#__codelineno-0-1) value: [str](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str)  | None = None`

The value to set to containing `RadioGroup` when the radio is selected.

### visual\_density `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#flet.Radio.visual_density "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#__codelineno-0-1) visual_density: [VisualDensity](https://docs.flet.dev/types/visualdensity/#flet.VisualDensity)  | None = None`

Defines how compact the radio's layout will be.

Events[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#flet.Radio-events "Permanent link")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### on\_blur `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#flet.Radio.on_blur "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#__codelineno-0-1) on_blur: [ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[Radio](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#flet.Radio) ] | None = None`

Called when the control has lost focus.

### on\_focus `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#flet.Radio.on_focus "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#__codelineno-0-1) on_focus: [ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[Radio](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/radio/#flet.Radio) ] | None = None`

Called when the control has received focus.

# VerticalDivider - Flet

 

[Skip to content](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/verticaldivider/#flet.VerticalDivider)

VerticalDivider
===============

A thin vertical line, with padding on either side.

In the material design language, this represents a divider.

Example:

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/verticaldivider/#__codelineno-0-1) ft.Row(     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/verticaldivider/#__codelineno-0-2)     width=120,    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/verticaldivider/#__codelineno-0-3)     height=60,    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/verticaldivider/#__codelineno-0-4)     expand=True,    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/verticaldivider/#__codelineno-0-5)     spacing=0,    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/verticaldivider/#__codelineno-0-6)     controls=[        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/verticaldivider/#__codelineno-0-7)         ft.Container(            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/verticaldivider/#__codelineno-0-8)             bgcolor=ft.Colors.BLUE_GREY_200,            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/verticaldivider/#__codelineno-0-9)             alignment=ft.Alignment.CENTER,            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/verticaldivider/#__codelineno-0-10)             expand=True,        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/verticaldivider/#__codelineno-0-11)         ),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/verticaldivider/#__codelineno-0-12)         ft.VerticalDivider(),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/verticaldivider/#__codelineno-0-13)         ft.Container(            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/verticaldivider/#__codelineno-0-14)             bgcolor=ft.Colors.GREY_500,            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/verticaldivider/#__codelineno-0-15)             alignment=ft.Alignment.CENTER,            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/verticaldivider/#__codelineno-0-16)             expand=True,        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/verticaldivider/#__codelineno-0-17)         ),    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/verticaldivider/#__codelineno-0-18)     ], [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/verticaldivider/#__codelineno-0-19) )`

[![VerticalDivider](https://docs.flet.dev/test-images/examples/core/golden/macos/vertical_divider/image_for_docs.png)](https://docs.flet.dev/test-images/examples/core/golden/macos/vertical_divider/image_for_docs.png)

Vertical divider

Inherits: `[Control](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/control/#flet.Control) `

Properties

*   **`[color](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/verticaldivider/#flet.VerticalDivider.color) `**(`[ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None`) –
    
    The color to use when painting the line.
    
*   **`[leading_indent](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/verticaldivider/#flet.VerticalDivider.leading_indent) `**(`[Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  | None`) –
    
    The amount of empty space to the leading edge of the divider.
    
*   **`[radius](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/verticaldivider/#flet.VerticalDivider.radius) `**(`[BorderRadiusValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.BorderRadiusValue)  | None`) –
    
    The border radius of the divider.
    
*   **`[thickness](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/verticaldivider/#flet.VerticalDivider.thickness) `**(`[Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  | None`) –
    
    The thickness of this divider.
    
*   **`[trailing_indent](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/verticaldivider/#flet.VerticalDivider.trailing_indent) `**(`[Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  | None`) –
    
    The amount of empty space to the trailing edge of the divider.
    
*   **`[width](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/verticaldivider/#flet.VerticalDivider.width) `**(`[Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  | None`) –
    
    The divider's width. The divider itself is always drawn as a vertical line that is centered within the width specified by this value.
    

Examples[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/verticaldivider/#examples "Permanent link")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

[Live example](https://flet-controls-gallery.fly.dev/layout/verticaldivider)

### Basic Example[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/verticaldivider/#basic-example "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/verticaldivider/#__codelineno-0-1) import flet as ft [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/verticaldivider/#__codelineno-0-2) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/verticaldivider/#__codelineno-0-3)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/verticaldivider/#__codelineno-0-4) def main(page: ft.Page):     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/verticaldivider/#__codelineno-0-5)     page.add(        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/verticaldivider/#__codelineno-0-6)         ft.Row(            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/verticaldivider/#__codelineno-0-7)             width=180,            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/verticaldivider/#__codelineno-0-8)             height=100,            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/verticaldivider/#__codelineno-0-9)             spacing=0,            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/verticaldivider/#__codelineno-0-10)             controls=[                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/verticaldivider/#__codelineno-0-11)                 ft.Container(                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/verticaldivider/#__codelineno-0-12)                     bgcolor=ft.Colors.ORANGE_300,                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/verticaldivider/#__codelineno-0-13)                     alignment=ft.Alignment.CENTER,                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/verticaldivider/#__codelineno-0-14)                     expand=True,                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/verticaldivider/#__codelineno-0-15)                 ),                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/verticaldivider/#__codelineno-0-16)                 ft.VerticalDivider(),                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/verticaldivider/#__codelineno-0-17)                 ft.Container(                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/verticaldivider/#__codelineno-0-18)                     bgcolor=ft.Colors.BROWN_400,                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/verticaldivider/#__codelineno-0-19)                     alignment=ft.Alignment.CENTER,                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/verticaldivider/#__codelineno-0-20)                     expand=True,                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/verticaldivider/#__codelineno-0-21)                 ),                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/verticaldivider/#__codelineno-0-22)                 ft.VerticalDivider(width=1, color=ft.Colors.WHITE),                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/verticaldivider/#__codelineno-0-23)                 ft.Container(                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/verticaldivider/#__codelineno-0-24)                     bgcolor=ft.Colors.BLUE_300,                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/verticaldivider/#__codelineno-0-25)                     alignment=ft.Alignment.CENTER,                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/verticaldivider/#__codelineno-0-26)                     expand=True,                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/verticaldivider/#__codelineno-0-27)                 ),                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/verticaldivider/#__codelineno-0-28)                 ft.VerticalDivider(width=9, thickness=3),                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/verticaldivider/#__codelineno-0-29)                 ft.Container(                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/verticaldivider/#__codelineno-0-30)                     bgcolor=ft.Colors.GREEN_300,                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/verticaldivider/#__codelineno-0-31)                     alignment=ft.Alignment.CENTER,                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/verticaldivider/#__codelineno-0-32)                     expand=True,                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/verticaldivider/#__codelineno-0-33)                 ),            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/verticaldivider/#__codelineno-0-34)             ],        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/verticaldivider/#__codelineno-0-35)         )    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/verticaldivider/#__codelineno-0-36)     ) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/verticaldivider/#__codelineno-0-37) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/verticaldivider/#__codelineno-0-38)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/verticaldivider/#__codelineno-0-39) if __name__ == "__main__":     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/verticaldivider/#__codelineno-0-40)     ft.run(main)`

[![basic](https://docs.flet.dev/test-images/examples/core/golden/macos/vertical_divider/basic.png)](https://docs.flet.dev/test-images/examples/core/golden/macos/vertical_divider/basic.png)

Properties[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/verticaldivider/#flet.VerticalDivider-properties "Permanent link")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### color `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/verticaldivider/#flet.VerticalDivider.color "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/verticaldivider/#__codelineno-0-1) color: [ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None = None`

The color to use when painting the line.

If `None`, [`DividerTheme.color`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/dividertheme/#flet.DividerTheme.color)
 is used.

### leading\_indent `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/verticaldivider/#flet.VerticalDivider.leading_indent "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/verticaldivider/#__codelineno-0-1) leading_indent: [Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  | None = None`

The amount of empty space to the leading edge of the divider.

If `None`, [`DividerTheme.leading_indent`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/dividertheme/#flet.DividerTheme.leading_indent)
 is used. If that's is also `None`, defaults to `0.0`.

Raises:

*   `[ValueError](https://docs.python.org/3/library/exceptions.html#ValueError) ` –
    
    If it is not greater than or equal to `0`.
    

### radius `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/verticaldivider/#flet.VerticalDivider.radius "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/verticaldivider/#__codelineno-0-1) radius: [BorderRadiusValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.BorderRadiusValue)  | None = None`

The border radius of the divider.

### thickness `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/verticaldivider/#flet.VerticalDivider.thickness "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/verticaldivider/#__codelineno-0-1) thickness: [Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  | None = None`

The thickness of this divider.

Note

A divider with a thickness of `0.0` is always drawn as a line with a width of exactly one device pixel.

If `None`, [`DividerTheme.thickness`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/dividertheme/#flet.DividerTheme.thickness)
 is used. If that's is also `None`, defaults to `0.0`.

Raises:

*   `[ValueError](https://docs.python.org/3/library/exceptions.html#ValueError) ` –
    
    If it is not greater than or equal to `0`.
    

### trailing\_indent `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/verticaldivider/#flet.VerticalDivider.trailing_indent "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/verticaldivider/#__codelineno-0-1) trailing_indent: [Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  | None = None`

The amount of empty space to the trailing edge of the divider.

If `None`, [`DividerTheme.trailing_indent`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/dividertheme/#flet.DividerTheme.trailing_indent)
 is used. If that's is also `None`, defaults to `0.0`.

Raises:

*   `[ValueError](https://docs.python.org/3/library/exceptions.html#ValueError) ` –
    
    If it is not greater than or equal to `0`.
    

### width `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/verticaldivider/#flet.VerticalDivider.width "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/verticaldivider/#__codelineno-0-1) width: [Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  | None = None`

The divider's width. The divider itself is always drawn as a vertical line that is centered within the width specified by this value.

If `None`, [`DividerTheme.space`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/dividertheme/#flet.DividerTheme.space)
 is used. If that's is also `None`, defaults to `16.0`.

Raises:

*   `[ValueError](https://docs.python.org/3/library/exceptions.html#ValueError) ` –
    
    If it is not greater than or equal to `0`.
    

Back to top

---

# DropdownM2 - Flet

 

[Skip to content](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#flet.DropdownM2)

DropdownM2
==========

A dropdown lets the user select from a number of items. The dropdown shows the currently selected item as well as an arrow that opens a menu for selecting another item.

Example:

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-0-1) ft.DropdownM2(     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-0-2)     width=220,    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-0-3)     value="Alice",    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-0-4)     options=[        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-0-5)         ft.dropdownm2.Option(key="Alice", text="Alice"),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-0-6)         ft.dropdownm2.Option(key="Bob", text="Bob"),    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-0-7)     ], [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-0-8) )`

[![DropdownM2](https://docs.flet.dev/test-images/examples/material/golden/macos/dropdown_m2/image_for_docs.png)](https://docs.flet.dev/test-images/examples/material/golden/macos/dropdown_m2/image_for_docs.png)

Basic DropdownM2

Inherits: `[FormFieldControl](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/formfieldcontrol/#flet.FormFieldControl) `

Properties

*   **`[alignment](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#flet.DropdownM2.alignment) `**(`[Alignment](https://docs.flet.dev/types/alignment/#flet.Alignment)  | None`) –
    
    Defines how the `hint` or the selected item is positioned within this dropdown.
    
*   **`[autofocus](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#flet.DropdownM2.autofocus) `**(`[bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool) `) –
    
    True if the control will be selected as the initial focus. If there is more than one control on a page with autofocus set, then the first one added to the page will get focus.
    
*   **`[disabled_hint_content](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#flet.DropdownM2.disabled_hint_content) `**(`[Control](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/control/#flet.Control)  | None`) –
    
    A placeholder `Control` for the dropdown's value that is displayed when `value` is `None` and the dropdown is disabled.
    
*   **`[elevation](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#flet.DropdownM2.elevation) `**(`[Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number) `) –
    
    The dropdown's elevation.
    
*   **`[enable_feedback](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#flet.DropdownM2.enable_feedback) `**(`[bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool)  | None`) –
    
    Whether detected gestures should provide acoustic and/or haptic feedback. On Android, for example, setting this to `True` produce a click sound and a long-press will produce a short vibration.
    
*   **`[hint_content](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#flet.DropdownM2.hint_content) `**(`[Control](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/control/#flet.Control)  | None`) –
    
    A placeholder `Control` for the dropdown's value that is displayed when `value` is `None`.
    
*   **`[item_height](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#flet.DropdownM2.item_height) `**(`[Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  | None`) –
    
    The height of the items/options in the dropdown menu.
    
*   **`[max_menu_height](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#flet.DropdownM2.max_menu_height) `**(`[Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  | None`) –
    
    The maximum height of the dropdown menu.
    
*   **`[options](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#flet.DropdownM2.options) `**(`[list](https://docs.python.org/3/glossary.html#term-list) [Option] | None`) –
    
    A list of `Option` controls representing items in this dropdown.
    
*   **`[options_fill_horizontally](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#flet.DropdownM2.options_fill_horizontally) `**(`[bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool) `) –
    
    Whether the dropdown's inner contents to horizontally fill its parent.
    
*   **`[padding](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#flet.DropdownM2.padding) `**(`[PaddingValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.PaddingValue)  | None`) –
    
    The padding around the visible portion of this dropdown.
    
*   **`[select_icon](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#flet.DropdownM2.select_icon) `**(`[IconDataOrControl](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.IconDataOrControl)  | None`) –
    
    The [name of the icon](https://docs.flet.dev/types/icons)
     or `Control` to use for the drop-down select button's icon.
    
*   **`[select_icon_disabled_color](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#flet.DropdownM2.select_icon_disabled_color) `**(`[ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None`) –
    
    The color of any `Icon` descendant of `select_icon` if this button is disabled.
    
*   **`[select_icon_enabled_color](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#flet.DropdownM2.select_icon_enabled_color) `**(`[ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None`) –
    
    The color of any `Icon` descendant of `select_icon` if this button is enabled.
    
*   **`[select_icon_size](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#flet.DropdownM2.select_icon_size) `**(`[Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number) `) –
    
    The size of the icon button which wraps `select_icon`.
    
*   **`[value](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#flet.DropdownM2.value) `**(`[str](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str)  | None`) –
    
    `key` value of the selected option.
    

Events

*   **`[on_blur](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#flet.DropdownM2.on_blur) `**(`[ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[DropdownM2](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#flet.DropdownM2) ] | None`) –
    
    Called when the control has lost focus.
    
*   **`[on_change](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#flet.DropdownM2.on_change) `**(`[ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[DropdownM2](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#flet.DropdownM2) ] | None`) –
    
    Called when the selected item of this dropdown has changed.
    
*   **`[on_click](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#flet.DropdownM2.on_click) `**(`[ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[DropdownM2](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#flet.DropdownM2) ] | None`) –
    
    Called when this dropdown is clicked.
    
*   **`[on_focus](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#flet.DropdownM2.on_focus) `**(`[ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[DropdownM2](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#flet.DropdownM2) ] | None`) –
    
    Called when the control has received focus.
    

Examples[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#examples "Permanent link")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------

[Live example](https://flet-controls-gallery.fly.dev/input/dropdown)

### Basic Example[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#basic-example "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-0-1) import flet as ft [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-0-2) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-0-3)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-0-4) def main(page: ft.Page):     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-0-5)     # page.theme_mode = ft.ThemeMode.DARK [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-0-6)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-0-7)     def handle_button_click(e):        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-0-8)         message.value = f"Dropdown value is:  {dd.value}"        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-0-9)         page.update() [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-0-10)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-0-11)     page.add(        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-0-12)         dd := ft.DropdownM2(            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-0-13)             width=100,            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-0-14)             value="Green",            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-0-15)             options=[                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-0-16)                 ft.dropdownm2.Option("Red"),                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-0-17)                 ft.dropdownm2.Option("Green"),                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-0-18)                 ft.dropdownm2.Option("Blue"),            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-0-19)             ],        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-0-20)         ),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-0-21)         ft.Button(content="Submit", on_click=handle_button_click),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-0-22)         message := ft.Text(),    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-0-23)     ) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-0-24) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-0-25)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-0-26) ft.run(main)`

[![basic](https://docs.flet.dev/examples/controls/dropdown_m2/media/basic.gif)](https://docs.flet.dev/examples/controls/dropdown_m2/media/basic.gif)

### Dropdown with label and hint[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#dropdown-with-label-and-hint "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-1-1) import flet as ft [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-1-2) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-1-3)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-1-4) def main(page: ft.Page):     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-1-5)     page.add(        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-1-6)         ft.DropdownM2(            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-1-7)             label="Color",            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-1-8)             hint_text="Choose your favourite color?",            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-1-9)             autofocus=True,            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-1-10)             color=ft.Colors.BLACK,            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-1-11)             options=[                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-1-12)                 ft.dropdownm2.Option("Red"),                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-1-13)                 ft.dropdownm2.Option("Green"),                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-1-14)                 ft.dropdownm2.Option("Blue"),            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-1-15)             ],        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-1-16)         )    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-1-17)     ) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-1-18) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-1-19)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-1-20) ft.run(main)`

[![label-and-hint](https://docs.flet.dev/examples/controls/dropdown_m2/media/label_and_hint.gif)](https://docs.flet.dev/examples/controls/dropdown_m2/media/label_and_hint.gif)

### Handling events[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#handling-events "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-2-1) import flet as ft [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-2-2) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-2-3)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-2-4) def main(page: ft.Page):     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-2-5)     def dropdown_changed(e: ft.Event[ft.DropdownM2]):        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-2-6)         message.value = f"Dropdown changed to {e.control.value}"        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-2-7)         page.update() [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-2-8)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-2-9)     page.add(        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-2-10)         ft.DropdownM2(            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-2-11)             width=200,            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-2-12)             color=ft.Colors.BLUE_GREY_700,            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-2-13)             on_change=dropdown_changed,            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-2-14)             options=[                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-2-15)                 ft.dropdownm2.Option("Red"),                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-2-16)                 ft.dropdownm2.Option("Green"),                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-2-17)                 ft.dropdownm2.Option("Blue"),            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-2-18)             ],        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-2-19)         ),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-2-20)         message := ft.Text(),    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-2-21)     ) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-2-22) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-2-23)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-2-24) ft.run(main)`

[![handling-events](https://docs.flet.dev/examples/controls/dropdown_m2/media/handling_events.gif)](https://docs.flet.dev/examples/controls/dropdown_m2/media/handling_events.gif)

### Add and delete options[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#add-and-delete-options "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-3-1) import flet as ft [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-3-2) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-3-3)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-3-4) def main(page: ft.Page):     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-3-5)     def find_option(option_name):        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-3-6)         for option in dropdown.options:            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-3-7)             if option_name == option.key:                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-3-8)                 return option        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-3-9)         return None [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-3-10)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-3-11)     def handle_addition(e: ft.Event[ft.Button]):        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-3-12)         dropdown.options.append(ft.dropdownm2.Option(input_field.value))        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-3-13)         dropdown.value = input_field.value        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-3-14)         input_field.value = ""        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-3-15)         page.update() [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-3-16)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-3-17)     def handle_deletion(e: ft.Event[ft.OutlinedButton]):        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-3-18)         option = find_option(dropdown.value)        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-3-19)         if option is not None:            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-3-20)             dropdown.options.remove(option)            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-3-21)             # d.value = None            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-3-22)             page.update() [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-3-23)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-3-24)     page.add(        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-3-25)         dropdown := ft.DropdownM2(options=[], color=ft.Colors.BLUE_400),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-3-26)         ft.Row(            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-3-27)             controls=[                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-3-28)                 input_field := ft.TextField(hint_text="Enter item name"),                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-3-29)                 ft.Button(content="Add", on_click=handle_addition),                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-3-30)                 ft.OutlinedButton(                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-3-31)                     content="Delete selected",                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-3-32)                     on_click=handle_deletion,                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-3-33)                     style=ft.ButtonStyle(bgcolor=ft.Colors.RED),                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-3-34)                 ),            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-3-35)             ]        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-3-36)         ),    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-3-37)     ) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-3-38) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-3-39)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-3-40) ft.run(main)`

[![add-and-delete-options](https://docs.flet.dev/examples/controls/dropdown_m2/media/add_and_delete_options.gif)](https://docs.flet.dev/examples/controls/dropdown_m2/media/add_and_delete_options.gif)

Properties[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#flet.DropdownM2-properties "Permanent link")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### alignment `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#flet.DropdownM2.alignment "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-0-1) alignment: [Alignment](https://docs.flet.dev/types/alignment/#flet.Alignment)  | None = None`

Defines how the `hint` or the selected item is positioned within this dropdown.

### autofocus `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#flet.DropdownM2.autofocus "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-0-1) autofocus: [bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool)  = False`

True if the control will be selected as the initial focus. If there is more than one control on a page with autofocus set, then the first one added to the page will get focus.

### disabled\_hint\_content `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#flet.DropdownM2.disabled_hint_content "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-0-1) disabled_hint_content: [Control](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/control/#flet.Control)  | None = None`

A placeholder `Control` for the dropdown's value that is displayed when `value` is `None` and the dropdown is disabled.

### elevation `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#flet.DropdownM2.elevation "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-0-1) elevation: [Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  = 8`

The dropdown's elevation.

### enable\_feedback `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#flet.DropdownM2.enable_feedback "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-0-1) enable_feedback: [bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool)  | None = None`

Whether detected gestures should provide acoustic and/or haptic feedback. On Android, for example, setting this to `True` produce a click sound and a long-press will produce a short vibration.

### hint\_content `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#flet.DropdownM2.hint_content "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-0-1) hint_content: [Control](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/control/#flet.Control)  | None = None`

A placeholder `Control` for the dropdown's value that is displayed when `value` is `None`.

### item\_height `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#flet.DropdownM2.item_height "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-0-1) item_height: [Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  | None = None`

The height of the items/options in the dropdown menu.

### max\_menu\_height `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#flet.DropdownM2.max_menu_height "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-0-1) max_menu_height: [Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  | None = None`

The maximum height of the dropdown menu.

### options `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#flet.DropdownM2.options "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-0-1) options: [list](https://docs.python.org/3/glossary.html#term-list) [Option] | None = None`

A list of `Option` controls representing items in this dropdown.

### options\_fill\_horizontally `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#flet.DropdownM2.options_fill_horizontally "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-0-1) options_fill_horizontally: [bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool)  = True`

Whether the dropdown's inner contents to horizontally fill its parent. By default this button's inner width is the minimum size of its content.

If `True`, the inner width is expanded to fill its surrounding container.

### padding `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#flet.DropdownM2.padding "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-0-1) padding: [PaddingValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.PaddingValue)  | None = None`

The padding around the visible portion of this dropdown.

### select\_icon `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#flet.DropdownM2.select_icon "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-0-1) select_icon: [IconDataOrControl](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.IconDataOrControl)  | None = None`

The [name of the icon](https://docs.flet.dev/types/icons)
 or `Control` to use for the drop-down select button's icon.

Defaults to `Icon(ft.Icons.ARROW_DROP_DOWN)`.

### select\_icon\_disabled\_color `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#flet.DropdownM2.select_icon_disabled_color "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-0-1) select_icon_disabled_color: [ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None = None`

The color of any `Icon` descendant of `select_icon` if this button is disabled.

### select\_icon\_enabled\_color `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#flet.DropdownM2.select_icon_enabled_color "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-0-1) select_icon_enabled_color: [ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None = None`

The color of any `Icon` descendant of `select_icon` if this button is enabled.

### select\_icon\_size `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#flet.DropdownM2.select_icon_size "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-0-1) select_icon_size: [Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  = 24.0`

The size of the icon button which wraps `select_icon`.

### value `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#flet.DropdownM2.value "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-0-1) value: [str](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str)  | None = None`

`key` value of the selected option.

Events[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#flet.DropdownM2-events "Permanent link")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### on\_blur `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#flet.DropdownM2.on_blur "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-0-1) on_blur: [ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[DropdownM2](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#flet.DropdownM2) ] | None = None`

Called when the control has lost focus.

### on\_change `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#flet.DropdownM2.on_change "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-0-1) on_change: [ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[DropdownM2](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#flet.DropdownM2) ] | None = None`

Called when the selected item of this dropdown has changed.

### on\_click `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#flet.DropdownM2.on_click "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-0-1) on_click: [ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[DropdownM2](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#flet.DropdownM2) ] | None = None`

Called when this dropdown is clicked.

### on\_focus `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#flet.DropdownM2.on_focus "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#__codelineno-0-1) on_focus: [ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[DropdownM2](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/dropdownm2/#flet.DropdownM2) ] | None = None`

Called when the control has received focus.

# PopupMenuButton - Flet

 

[Skip to content](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#flet.PopupMenuButton)

PopupMenuButton
===============

An icon button which displays a menu when clicked.

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#__codelineno-0-1) ft.PopupMenuButton(     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#__codelineno-0-2)     items=[        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#__codelineno-0-3)         ft.PopupMenuItem(content="Sm"),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#__codelineno-0-4)         ft.PopupMenuItem(content="Med"),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#__codelineno-0-5)         ft.PopupMenuItem(content="Lg"),    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#__codelineno-0-6)     ],    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#__codelineno-0-7)     menu_position=ft.PopupMenuPosition.UNDER, [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#__codelineno-0-8) )`

[![PopupMenuButton](https://docs.flet.dev/test-images/examples/material/golden/macos/popup_menu_button/image_for_docs.png)](https://docs.flet.dev/test-images/examples/material/golden/macos/popup_menu_button/image_for_docs.png)

Opened popup menu under button

Inherits: `[LayoutControl](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/layoutcontrol/#flet.LayoutControl) `

Properties

*   **`[bgcolor](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#flet.PopupMenuButton.bgcolor) `**(`[ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None`) –
    
    The menu's background color.
    
*   **`[clip_behavior](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#flet.PopupMenuButton.clip_behavior) `**(`[ClipBehavior](https://docs.flet.dev/types/clipbehavior/#flet.ClipBehavior) `) –
    
    The `content` will be clipped (or not) according to this option.
    
*   **`[content](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#flet.PopupMenuButton.content) `**(`[StrOrControl](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.StrOrControl)  | None`) –
    
    A `Control` that will be displayed instead of "more" icon.
    
*   **`[elevation](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#flet.PopupMenuButton.elevation) `**(`[Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  | None`) –
    
    The menu's elevation when opened.
    
*   **`[enable_feedback](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#flet.PopupMenuButton.enable_feedback) `**(`[bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool)  | None`) –
    
    Whether detected gestures should provide acoustic and/or haptic feedback.
    
*   **`[icon](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#flet.PopupMenuButton.icon) `**(`[IconDataOrControl](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.IconDataOrControl)  | None`) –
    
    If provided, an icon to draw on the button.
    
*   **`[icon_color](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#flet.PopupMenuButton.icon_color) `**(`[ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None`) –
    
    The `icon`'s color.
    
*   **`[icon_size](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#flet.PopupMenuButton.icon_size) `**(`[Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  | None`) –
    
    The `icon`'s size.
    
*   **`[items](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#flet.PopupMenuButton.items) `**(`[list](https://docs.python.org/3/glossary.html#term-list) [[PopupMenuItem](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#flet.PopupMenuItem) ]`) –
    
    A collection of `PopupMenuItem` controls to display in a dropdown menu.
    
*   **`[menu_padding](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#flet.PopupMenuButton.menu_padding) `**(`[PaddingValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.PaddingValue)  | None`) –
    
    TBD
    
*   **`[menu_position](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#flet.PopupMenuButton.menu_position) `**(`[PopupMenuPosition](https://docs.flet.dev/types/popupmenuposition/#flet.PopupMenuPosition)  | None`) –
    
    Defines position of the popup menu relative to the button.
    
*   **`[padding](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#flet.PopupMenuButton.padding) `**(`[PaddingValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.PaddingValue) `) –
    
    TBD
    
*   **`[popup_animation_style](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#flet.PopupMenuButton.popup_animation_style) `**(`[AnimationStyle](https://docs.flet.dev/types/animationstyle/#flet.AnimationStyle)  | None`) –
    
    TBD
    
*   **`[shadow_color](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#flet.PopupMenuButton.shadow_color) `**(`[ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None`) –
    
    The color used to paint the shadow below the menu.
    
*   **`[shape](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#flet.PopupMenuButton.shape) `**(`[OutlinedBorder](https://docs.flet.dev/types/outlinedborder/#flet.OutlinedBorder)  | None`) –
    
    The menu's shape.
    
*   **`[size_constraints](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#flet.PopupMenuButton.size_constraints) `**(`[BoxConstraints](https://docs.flet.dev/types/boxconstraints/#flet.BoxConstraints)  | None`) –
    
    TBD
    
*   **`[splash_radius](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#flet.PopupMenuButton.splash_radius) `**(`[Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  | None`) –
    
    The splash radius.
    
*   **`[style](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#flet.PopupMenuButton.style) `**(`[ButtonStyle](https://docs.flet.dev/types/buttonstyle/#flet.ButtonStyle)  | None`) –
    
    TBD
    

Events

*   **`[on_cancel](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#flet.PopupMenuButton.on_cancel) `**(`[ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[PopupMenuButton](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#flet.PopupMenuButton) ] | None`) –
    
    Called when the user dismisses/cancels the popup menu without selecting an item.
    
*   **`[on_open](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#flet.PopupMenuButton.on_open) `**(`[ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[PopupMenuButton](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#flet.PopupMenuButton) ] | None`) –
    
    Called when the popup menu is shown.
    
*   **`[on_select](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#flet.PopupMenuButton.on_select) `**(`[ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[PopupMenuButton](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#flet.PopupMenuButton) ] | None`) –
    
    TBD
    

Examples[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#examples "Permanent link")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Basic Example[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#basic-example "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#__codelineno-0-1) import flet as ft [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#__codelineno-0-2) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#__codelineno-0-3)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#__codelineno-0-4) def main(page: ft.Page):     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#__codelineno-0-5)     def handle_check_item_click(e: ft.Event[ft.PopupMenuItem]):        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#__codelineno-0-6)         e.control.checked = not e.control.checked        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#__codelineno-0-7)         page.update() [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#__codelineno-0-8)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#__codelineno-0-9)     page.add(        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#__codelineno-0-10)         ft.PopupMenuButton(            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#__codelineno-0-11)             key="popup",            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#__codelineno-0-12)             items=[                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#__codelineno-0-13)                 ft.PopupMenuItem(content="Item 1"),                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#__codelineno-0-14)                 ft.PopupMenuItem(icon=ft.Icons.POWER_INPUT, content="Check power"),                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#__codelineno-0-15)                 ft.PopupMenuItem(                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#__codelineno-0-16)                     content=ft.Row(                        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#__codelineno-0-17)                         controls=[                            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#__codelineno-0-18)                             ft.Icon(ft.Icons.HOURGLASS_TOP_OUTLINED),                            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#__codelineno-0-19)                             ft.Text("Item with a custom content"),                        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#__codelineno-0-20)                         ]                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#__codelineno-0-21)                     ),                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#__codelineno-0-22)                     on_click=lambda _: print("Button with custom content clicked!"),                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#__codelineno-0-23)                 ),                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#__codelineno-0-24)                 ft.PopupMenuItem(),  # divider                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#__codelineno-0-25)                 ft.PopupMenuItem(                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#__codelineno-0-26)                     content="Checked item",                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#__codelineno-0-27)                     checked=False,                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#__codelineno-0-28)                     on_click=handle_check_item_click,                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#__codelineno-0-29)                 ),            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#__codelineno-0-30)             ],        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#__codelineno-0-31)         )    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#__codelineno-0-32)     ) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#__codelineno-0-33) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#__codelineno-0-34)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#__codelineno-0-35) if __name__ == "__main__":     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#__codelineno-0-36)     ft.run(main)`

[![basic](https://docs.flet.dev/examples/controls/popup_menu_button/media/basic.gif)](https://docs.flet.dev/examples/controls/popup_menu_button/media/basic.gif)

Properties[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#flet.PopupMenuButton-properties "Permanent link")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### bgcolor `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#flet.PopupMenuButton.bgcolor "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#__codelineno-0-1) bgcolor: [ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None = None`

The menu's background color.

### clip\_behavior `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#flet.PopupMenuButton.clip_behavior "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#__codelineno-0-1) clip_behavior: [ClipBehavior](https://docs.flet.dev/types/clipbehavior/#flet.ClipBehavior)  = [NONE](https://docs.flet.dev/types/clipbehavior/#flet.ClipBehavior.NONE)`

The `content` will be clipped (or not) according to this option.

### content `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#flet.PopupMenuButton.content "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#__codelineno-0-1) content: [StrOrControl](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.StrOrControl)  | None = None`

A `Control` that will be displayed instead of "more" icon.

### elevation `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#flet.PopupMenuButton.elevation "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#__codelineno-0-1) elevation: [Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  | None = None`

The menu's elevation when opened.

Defaults to `8`.

### enable\_feedback `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#flet.PopupMenuButton.enable_feedback "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#__codelineno-0-1) enable_feedback: [bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool)  | None = None`

Whether detected gestures should provide acoustic and/or haptic feedback.

On Android, for example, setting this to `True` produce a click sound and a long-press will produce a short vibration.

Defaults to `True`.

### icon `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#flet.PopupMenuButton.icon "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#__codelineno-0-1) icon: [IconDataOrControl](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.IconDataOrControl)  | None = None`

If provided, an icon to draw on the button.

Inherits: `[Control](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/control/#flet.Control) `

A popup menu item.

Properties

*   **`[checked](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#flet.PopupMenuItem.checked) `**(`[bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool)  | None`) –
    
    Whether this menu item is checked.
    
*   **`[content](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#flet.PopupMenuItem.content) `**(`[StrOrControl](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.StrOrControl)  | None`) –
    
    A `Control` representing custom content of this menu item.
    
*   **`[height](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#flet.PopupMenuItem.height) `**(`[Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number) `) –
    
    The minimum height of this menu item.
    
*   **`[icon](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#flet.PopupMenuItem.icon) `**(`[IconDataOrControl](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.IconDataOrControl)  | None`) –
    
    An icon to draw before the text label of this menu item.
    
*   **`[label_text_style](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#flet.PopupMenuItem.label_text_style) `**(`[TextStyle](https://docs.flet.dev/types/textstyle/#flet.TextStyle)  | None`) –
    
    The text style of the label of this menu item.
    
*   **`[mouse_cursor](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#flet.PopupMenuItem.mouse_cursor) `**(`[MouseCursor](https://docs.flet.dev/types/mousecursor/#flet.MouseCursor)  | None`) –
    
    The cursor to be displayed when a mouse pointer enters or is hovering over this item.
    
*   **`[padding](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#flet.PopupMenuItem.padding) `**(`[PaddingValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.PaddingValue)  | None`) –
    
    The padding of this menu item.
    

Events

*   **`[on_click](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#flet.PopupMenuItem.on_click) `**(`[ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[PopupMenuItem](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#flet.PopupMenuItem) ] | None`) –
    
    Called when a user clicks on this menu item.
    

Properties[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#flet.PopupMenuItem-properties "Permanent link")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### checked `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#flet.PopupMenuItem.checked "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#__codelineno-0-1) checked: [bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool)  | None = None`

Whether this menu item is checked.

If set to `True`, a checkmark will be shown on the left of the [`content`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#flet.PopupMenuItem.content)
.

### content `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#flet.PopupMenuItem.content "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#__codelineno-0-1) content: [StrOrControl](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.StrOrControl)  | None = None`

A `Control` representing custom content of this menu item.

### height `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#flet.PopupMenuItem.height "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#__codelineno-0-1) height: [Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  = 48.0`

The minimum height of this menu item.

### icon `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#flet.PopupMenuItem.icon "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#__codelineno-0-1) icon: [IconDataOrControl](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.IconDataOrControl)  | None = None`

An icon to draw before the text label of this menu item.

### label\_text\_style `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#flet.PopupMenuItem.label_text_style "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#__codelineno-0-1) label_text_style: [TextStyle](https://docs.flet.dev/types/textstyle/#flet.TextStyle)  | None = None`

The text style of the label of this menu item.

### mouse\_cursor `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#flet.PopupMenuItem.mouse_cursor "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#__codelineno-0-1) mouse_cursor: [MouseCursor](https://docs.flet.dev/types/mousecursor/#flet.MouseCursor)  | None = None`

The cursor to be displayed when a mouse pointer enters or is hovering over this item.

### padding `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#flet.PopupMenuItem.padding "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#__codelineno-0-1) padding: [PaddingValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.PaddingValue)  | None = None`

The padding of this menu item.

Defaults to `Padding.symmetric(horizontal=12)`.

Note

The [`height`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#flet.PopupMenuItem.height)
 value of this menu item may influence the applied padding.

For example, if a `height` greater than the height of the sum of the padding and a [`content`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#flet.PopupMenuItem.content)
 is provided, then the padding's effect will not be visible.

Events[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/popupmenubutton/#flet.PopupMenuItem-events "Permanent link")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
