[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/textbutton/#__codelineno-3-34)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/textbutton/#__codelineno-3-35) if __name__ == "__main__":     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/textbutton/#__codelineno-3-36)     ft.run(main)`

[![custom-content](https://docs.flet.dev/test-images/examples/material/golden/macos/text_button/custom_content.png)](https://docs.flet.dev/test-images/examples/material/golden/macos/text_button/custom_content.png)

Properties[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/textbutton/#flet.TextButton-properties "Permanent link")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### autofocus `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/textbutton/#flet.TextButton.autofocus "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/textbutton/#__codelineno-0-1) autofocus: [bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool)  = False`

True if the control will be selected as the initial focus.

If there is more than one control on a page with autofocus set, then the first one added to the page will get focus.

### clip\_behavior `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/textbutton/#flet.TextButton.clip_behavior "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/textbutton/#__codelineno-0-1) clip_behavior: [ClipBehavior](https://docs.flet.dev/types/clipbehavior/#flet.ClipBehavior)  = [NONE](https://docs.flet.dev/types/clipbehavior/#flet.ClipBehavior.NONE)`

Defines how the content of this button is clipped.

### content `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/textbutton/#flet.TextButton.content "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/textbutton/#__codelineno-0-1) content: [StrOrControl](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.StrOrControl)  | None = None`

A Control representing custom button content.

### icon `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/textbutton/#flet.TextButton.icon "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/textbutton/#__codelineno-0-1) icon: [IconDataOrControl](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.IconDataOrControl)  | None = None`

An icon to show in this button.

### icon\_color `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/textbutton/#flet.TextButton.icon_color "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/textbutton/#__codelineno-0-1) icon_color: [ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None = None`

Icon color.

### style `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/textbutton/#flet.TextButton.style "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/textbutton/#__codelineno-0-1) style: [ButtonStyle](https://docs.flet.dev/types/buttonstyle/#flet.ButtonStyle)  | None = None`

Defines the style of this button.

### url `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/textbutton/#flet.TextButton.url "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/textbutton/#__codelineno-0-1) url: [str](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str)  | [Url](https://docs.flet.dev/types/url/#flet.Url)  | None = None`

The URL to open when this button is clicked.

Additionally, if [`on_click`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/textbutton/#flet.TextButton.on_click)
 event callback is provided, it is fired after that.

Events[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/textbutton/#flet.TextButton-events "Permanent link")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### on\_blur `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/textbutton/#flet.TextButton.on_blur "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/textbutton/#__codelineno-0-1) on_blur: [ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[TextButton](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/textbutton/#flet.TextButton) ] | None = None`

Called when this button has lost focus.

### on\_click `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/textbutton/#flet.TextButton.on_click "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/textbutton/#__codelineno-0-1) on_click: [ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[TextButton](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/textbutton/#flet.TextButton) ] | None = None`

Called when a user clicks this button.

### on\_focus `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/textbutton/#flet.TextButton.on_focus "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/textbutton/#__codelineno-0-1) on_focus: [ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[TextButton](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/textbutton/#flet.TextButton) ] | None = None`

Called when this button has received focus.

### on\_hover `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/textbutton/#flet.TextButton.on_hover "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/textbutton/#__codelineno-0-1) on_hover: [ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[TextButton](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/textbutton/#flet.TextButton) ] | None = None`

Called when a mouse pointer enters or exists this button's response area.

The [`data`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/event/#flet.Event.data)
 property of the event handler argument is `True` when cursor enters and `False` when it exits.

### on\_long\_press `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/textbutton/#flet.TextButton.on_long_press "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/textbutton/#__codelineno-0-1) on_long_press: [ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[TextButton](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/textbutton/#flet.TextButton) ] | None = None`

Called when this button is long-pressed.

Methods[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/textbutton/#flet.TextButton-methods "Permanent link")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### focus `async` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/textbutton/#flet.TextButton.focus "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/textbutton/#__codelineno-0-1) focus()`

Requests focus for this control.

# SubmenuButton - Flet

 

[Skip to content](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/submenubutton/#flet.SubmenuButton)

SubmenuButton
=============

A menu button that displays a cascading menu.

Typically used in a [`MenuBar`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menubar/#flet.MenuBar)
 control.

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/submenubutton/#__codelineno-0-1) ft.SubmenuButton(     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/submenubutton/#__codelineno-0-2)     content=ft.Text("Choose text style"),    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/submenubutton/#__codelineno-0-3)     key="smbutton",    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/submenubutton/#__codelineno-0-4)     expand=True,    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/submenubutton/#__codelineno-0-5)     menu_style=ft.MenuStyle(        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/submenubutton/#__codelineno-0-6)         alignment=ft.Alignment.BOTTOM_LEFT, side=ft.BorderSide(1)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/submenubutton/#__codelineno-0-7)     ),    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/submenubutton/#__codelineno-0-8)     controls=[        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/submenubutton/#__codelineno-0-9)         ft.MenuItemButton(            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/submenubutton/#__codelineno-0-10)             content=ft.Text("Underlined"),            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/submenubutton/#__codelineno-0-11)             on_click=lambda e: print(f"{e.control.content.value}.on_click"),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/submenubutton/#__codelineno-0-12)         ),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/submenubutton/#__codelineno-0-13)         ft.MenuItemButton(...),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/submenubutton/#__codelineno-0-14)         ...,    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/submenubutton/#__codelineno-0-15)     ], [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/submenubutton/#__codelineno-0-16) )`

[![SubmenuButton](https://docs.flet.dev/test-images/examples/material/golden/macos/submenu_button/image_for_docs.png)](https://docs.flet.dev/test-images/examples/material/golden/macos/submenu_button/image_for_docs.png)

Activated submenu button

Inherits: `[LayoutControl](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/layoutcontrol/#flet.LayoutControl) `

Properties

*   **`[alignment_offset](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/submenubutton/#flet.SubmenuButton.alignment_offset) `**(`[OffsetValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.OffsetValue)  | None`) –
    
    The offset of the menu relative to the alignment origin determined by [`MenuStyle.alignment`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/menustyle/#flet.MenuStyle.alignment)
     on the [`style`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/submenubutton/#flet.SubmenuButton.style)
     attribute.
    
*   **`[clip_behavior](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/submenubutton/#flet.SubmenuButton.clip_behavior) `**(`[ClipBehavior](https://docs.flet.dev/types/clipbehavior/#flet.ClipBehavior) `) –
    
    Whether to clip the content of this control or not.
    
*   **`[content](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/submenubutton/#flet.SubmenuButton.content) `**(`[StrOrControl](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.StrOrControl)  | None`) –
    
    The child control to be displayed in the middle portion of this button.
    
*   **`[controls](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/submenubutton/#flet.SubmenuButton.controls) `**(`[list](https://docs.python.org/3/glossary.html#term-list) [[Control](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/control/#flet.Control) ]`) –
    
    A list of controls that appear in the menu when it is opened.
    
*   **`[leading](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/submenubutton/#flet.SubmenuButton.leading) `**(`[Control](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/control/#flet.Control)  | None`) –
    
    An optional control to display before the [`content`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/submenubutton/#flet.SubmenuButton.content)
    .
    
*   **`[menu_style](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/submenubutton/#flet.SubmenuButton.menu_style) `**(`[MenuStyle](https://docs.flet.dev/types/menustyle/#flet.MenuStyle)  | None`) –
    
    Customizes this menu's appearance.
    
*   **`[style](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/submenubutton/#flet.SubmenuButton.style) `**(`[ButtonStyle](https://docs.flet.dev/types/buttonstyle/#flet.ButtonStyle)  | None`) –
    
    Customizes this button's appearance.
    
*   **`[trailing](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/submenubutton/#flet.SubmenuButton.trailing) `**(`[Control](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/control/#flet.Control)  | None`) –
    
    An optional control to display after the [`content`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/submenubutton/#flet.SubmenuButton.content)
    .
    

Events

*   **`[on_blur](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/submenubutton/#flet.SubmenuButton.on_blur) `**(`[ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[SubmenuButton](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/submenubutton/#flet.SubmenuButton) ] | None`) –
    
    Called when this button loses focus.
    
*   **`[on_close](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/submenubutton/#flet.SubmenuButton.on_close) `**(`[ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[SubmenuButton](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/submenubutton/#flet.SubmenuButton) ] | None`) –
    
    Called when the menu is closed.
    
*   **`[on_focus](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/submenubutton/#flet.SubmenuButton.on_focus) `**(`[ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[SubmenuButton](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/submenubutton/#flet.SubmenuButton) ] | None`) –
    
    Called when the button receives focus.
    
*   **`[on_hover](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/submenubutton/#flet.SubmenuButton.on_hover) `**(`[ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[SubmenuButton](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/submenubutton/#flet.SubmenuButton) ] | None`) –
    
    Called when the button is hovered.
    
*   **`[on_open](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/submenubutton/#flet.SubmenuButton.on_open) `**(`[ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[SubmenuButton](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/submenubutton/#flet.SubmenuButton) ] | None`) –
    
    Called when the menu is opened.
    

Examples[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/submenubutton/#examples "Permanent link")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

[Live example](https://flet-controls-gallery.fly.dev/buttons/submenubutton)

### Basic Example[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/submenubutton/#basic-example "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/submenubutton/#__codelineno-0-1) import flet as ft [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/submenubutton/#__codelineno-0-2) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/submenubutton/#__codelineno-0-3)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/submenubutton/#__codelineno-0-4) def main(page: ft.Page):     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/submenubutton/#__codelineno-0-5)     page.padding = 0    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/submenubutton/#__codelineno-0-6)     page.spacing = 0 [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/submenubutton/#__codelineno-0-7)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/submenubutton/#__codelineno-0-8)     def handle_color_click(e: ft.Event[ft.MenuItemButton]):        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/submenubutton/#__codelineno-0-9)         color = e.control.content.value        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/submenubutton/#__codelineno-0-10) [![basic](https://docs.flet.dev/test-images/examples/material/golden/macos/submenu_button/basic.png)](https://docs.flet.dev/test-images/examples/material/golden/macos/submenu_button/basic.png)

Properties[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/submenubutton/#flet.SubmenuButton-properties "Permanent link")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### alignment\_offset `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/submenubutton/#flet.SubmenuButton.alignment_offset "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/submenubutton/#__codelineno-0-1) alignment_offset: [OffsetValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.OffsetValue)  | None = None`

The offset of the menu relative to the alignment origin determined by [`MenuStyle.alignment`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/menustyle/#flet.MenuStyle.alignment)
 on the [`style`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/submenubutton/#flet.SubmenuButton.style)
 attribute.

### clip\_behavior `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/submenubutton/#flet.SubmenuButton.clip_behavior "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/submenubutton/#__codelineno-0-1) clip_behavior: [ClipBehavior](https://docs.flet.dev/types/clipbehavior/#flet.ClipBehavior)  = [HARD_EDGE](https://docs.flet.dev/types/clipbehavior/#flet.ClipBehavior.HARD_EDGE)`

Whether to clip the content of this control or not.

### content `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/submenubutton/#flet.SubmenuButton.content "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/submenubutton/#__codelineno-0-1) content: [StrOrControl](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.StrOrControl)  | None = None`

The child control to be displayed in the middle portion of this button.

Typically this is the button's label, using a [`Text`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/text/#flet.Text)
 control.

### controls `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/submenubutton/#flet.SubmenuButton.controls "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/submenubutton/#__codelineno-0-1) controls: [list](https://docs.python.org/3/glossary.html#term-list) [[Control](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/control/#flet.Control) ] = [field](https://docs.python.org/3/library/dataclasses.html#dataclasses.field "<code>dataclasses.field</code>") (default_factory=[list](https://docs.python.org/3/glossary.html#term-list) )`

A list of controls that appear in the menu when it is opened.

Typically either [`MenuItemButton`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/menuitembutton/#flet.MenuItemButton)
 or `SubMenuButton` controls.

If this list is empty, then the button for this menu item will be disabled.

### leading `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/submenubutton/#flet.SubmenuButton.leading "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/submenubutton/#__codelineno-0-1) leading: [Control](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/control/#flet.Control)  | None = None`

An optional control to display before the [`content`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/submenubutton/#flet.SubmenuButton.content)
.

Typically an [`Icon`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/icon/#flet.Icon)
 control.

### menu\_style `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/submenubutton/#flet.SubmenuButton.menu_style "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/submenubutton/#__codelineno-0-1) menu_style: [MenuStyle](https://docs.flet.dev/types/menustyle/#flet.MenuStyle)  | None = None`

Customizes this menu's appearance.

### style `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/submenubutton/#flet.SubmenuButton.style "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/submenubutton/#__codelineno-0-1) style: [ButtonStyle](https://docs.flet.dev/types/buttonstyle/#flet.ButtonStyle)  | None = None`

Customizes this button's appearance.

### trailing `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/submenubutton/#flet.SubmenuButton.trailing "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/submenubutton/#__codelineno-0-1) trailing: [Control](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/control/#flet.Control)  | None = None`

An optional control to display after the [`content`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/submenubutton/#flet.SubmenuButton.content)
.

Typically an [`Icon`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/icon/#flet.Icon)
 control.

Events[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/submenubutton/#flet.SubmenuButton-events "Permanent link")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### on\_blur `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/submenubutton/#flet.SubmenuButton.on_blur "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/submenubutton/#__codelineno-0-1) on_blur: [ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[SubmenuButton](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/submenubutton/#flet.SubmenuButton) ] | None = None`

Called when this button loses focus.

### on\_close `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/submenubutton/#flet.SubmenuButton.on_close "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/submenubutton/#__codelineno-0-1) on_close: [ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[SubmenuButton](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/submenubutton/#flet.SubmenuButton) ] | None = None`

Called when the menu is closed.

### on\_focus `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/submenubutton/#flet.SubmenuButton.on_focus "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/submenubutton/#__codelineno-0-1) on_focus: [ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[SubmenuButton](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/submenubutton/#flet.SubmenuButton) ] | None = None`

Called when the button receives focus.

### on\_hover `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/submenubutton/#flet.SubmenuButton.on_hover "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/submenubutton/#__codelineno-0-1) on_hover: [ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[SubmenuButton](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/submenubutton/#flet.SubmenuButton) ] | None = None`

Called when the button is hovered.

### on\_open `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/submenubutton/#flet.SubmenuButton.on_open "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/submenubutton/#__codelineno-0-1) on_open: [ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[SubmenuButton](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/submenubutton/#flet.SubmenuButton) ] | None = None`

Called when the menu is opened.

=======

# View - Flet

 

[Skip to content](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/view/#flet.View)

View
====

Inherits: `[ScrollableControl](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/scrollablecontrol/#flet.ScrollableControl) `, `[LayoutControl](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/layoutcontrol/#flet.LayoutControl) `

View is the top most container for all other controls.

A root view is automatically created when a new user session started. From layout perspective the View represents a [`Column`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/column/#flet.Column)
 control, so it has a similar behavior and shares same properties.

Properties

*   **`[appbar](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/view/#flet.View.appbar) `**(`[AppBar](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/appbar/#flet.AppBar)  | [CupertinoAppBar](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoappbar/#flet.CupertinoAppBar)  | None`) –
    
    An [`AppBar`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/appbar/#flet.AppBar)
     control to display at the top of the `Page`.
    
*   **`[bgcolor](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/view/#flet.View.bgcolor) `**(`[ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None`) –
    
    Background color of the view.
    
*   **`[bottom_appbar](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/view/#flet.View.bottom_appbar) `**(`[BottomAppBar](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomappbar/#flet.BottomAppBar)  | None`) –
    
    A [`BottomAppBar`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/bottomappbar/#flet.BottomAppBar)
     control to display at the bottom of the `Page`.
    
*   **`[can_pop](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/view/#flet.View.can_pop) `**(`[bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool) `) –
    
    Whether the view can be popped.
    
*   **`[controls](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/view/#flet.View.controls) `**(`[list](https://docs.python.org/3/glossary.html#term-list) [[BaseControl](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/basecontrol/#flet.BaseControl) ]`) –
    
    A list of controls to display.
    
*   **`[decoration](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/view/#flet.View.decoration) `**(`[BoxDecoration](https://docs.flet.dev/types/boxdecoration/#flet.BoxDecoration)  | None`) –
    
    The background decoration.
    
*   **`[drawer](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/view/#flet.View.drawer) `**(`[NavigationDrawer](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/navigationdrawer/#flet.NavigationDrawer)  | None`) –
    
    A [`NavigationDrawer`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/navigationdrawer/#flet.NavigationDrawer)
     control to display as a panel sliding from the start edge of the view.
    
*   **`[end_drawer](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/view/#flet.View.end_drawer) `**(`[NavigationDrawer](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/navigationdrawer/#flet.NavigationDrawer)  | None`) –
    
    A [`NavigationDrawer`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/navigationdrawer/#flet.NavigationDrawer)
     control to display as a panel sliding from the end edge of the view.
    
*   **`[floating_action_button](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/view/#flet.View.floating_action_button) `**(`[FloatingActionButton](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/floatingactionbutton/#flet.FloatingActionButton)  | None`) –
    
    A [`FloatingActionButton`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/floatingactionbutton/#flet.FloatingActionButton)
     control to display on top of `Page` content.
    
*   **`[floating_action_button_location](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/view/#flet.View.floating_action_button_location) `**(`[FloatingActionButtonLocation](https://docs.flet.dev/types/floatingactionbuttonlocation/#flet.FloatingActionButtonLocation)  | [OffsetValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.OffsetValue)  | None`) –
    
    Describes position of [`floating_action_button`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/view/#flet.View.floating_action_button)
    
*   **`[foreground_decoration](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/view/#flet.View.foreground_decoration) `**(`[BoxDecoration](https://docs.flet.dev/types/boxdecoration/#flet.BoxDecoration)  | None`) –
    
    The foreground decoration.
    
*   **`[fullscreen_dialog](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/view/#flet.View.fullscreen_dialog) `**(`[bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool) `) –
    
    If `True`, the view is a fullscreen modal dialog.
    
*   **`[horizontal_alignment](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/view/#flet.View.horizontal_alignment) `**(`[CrossAxisAlignment](https://docs.flet.dev/types/crossaxisalignment/#flet.CrossAxisAlignment) `) –
    
    How the child Controls should be placed horizontally.
    
*   **`[navigation_bar](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/view/#flet.View.navigation_bar) `**(`[NavigationBar](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/navigationbar/#flet.NavigationBar)  | [CupertinoNavigationBar](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#flet.CupertinoNavigationBar)  | None`) –
    
    A navigation bar ([`NavigationBar`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/navigationbar/#flet.NavigationBar)
     or [`CupertinoNavigationBar`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinonavigationbar/#flet.CupertinoNavigationBar)
    ) control to display at the bottom of the `Page`.
    
*   **`[padding](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/view/#flet.View.padding) `**(`[PaddingValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.PaddingValue)  | None`) –
    
    A space between page contents and its edges.
    
*   **`[route](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/view/#flet.View.route) `**(`[str](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str) `) –
    
    View's route - not currently used by Flet framework, but can be used in a user program to update [`Page.route`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/page/#flet.Page.route)
     when a view popped.
    
*   **`[services](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/view/#flet.View.services) `**(`[list](https://docs.python.org/3/glossary.html#term-list) [[Service](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/service/#flet.Service) ]`) –
    
    A list of [`Service`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/service/#flet.Service)
     controls associated with this view.
    
*   **`[spacing](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/view/#flet.View.spacing) `**(`[Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number) `) –
    
    The vertical spacing between [`controls`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/view/#flet.View.controls)
     on the `Page`.
    
*   **`[vertical_alignment](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/view/#flet.View.vertical_alignment) `**(`[MainAxisAlignment](https://docs.flet.dev/types/mainaxisalignment/#flet.MainAxisAlignment) `) –
    
    Defines how the child [`controls`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/view/#flet.View.controls)
     should be placed vertically.
    

Events

*   **`[on_confirm_pop](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/view/#flet.View.on_confirm_pop) `**(`[ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[View](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/view/#flet.View) ] | None`) –
    
    An event handler that is called when the view is about to be popped.
    

Methods

*   **`[close_drawer](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/view/#flet.View.close_drawer) `** –
    
    Close the drawer.
    
*   **`[close_end_drawer](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/view/#flet.View.close_end_drawer) `** –
    
    Close the end drawer.
    
*   **`[confirm_pop](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/view/#flet.View.confirm_pop) `** –
    
    Resolves a pending pop-confirmation request for this view.
    
*   **`[show_drawer](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/view/#flet.View.show_drawer) `** –
    
    Show the drawer.
    
*   **`[show_end_drawer](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/view/#flet.View.show_end_drawer) `** –
    
    Show the end drawer.
    

Properties[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/view/#flet.View-properties "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/view/#__codelineno-0-1) services: [list](https://docs.python.org/3/glossary.html#term-list) [[Service](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/service/#flet.Service) ] = [field](https://docs.python.org/3/library/dataclasses.html#dataclasses.field "<code>dataclasses.field</code>") (     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/view/#__codelineno-0-2)     default_factory=[list](https://docs.python.org/3/glossary.html#term-list) , metadata={"skip": True} [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/view/#__codelineno-0-3) )`

A list of [`Service`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/service/#flet.Service)
 controls associated with this view.

### spacing `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/view/#flet.View.spacing "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/view/#__codelineno-0-1) spacing: [Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  = 10`

The vertical spacing between [`controls`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/view/#flet.View.controls)
 on the `Page`.

Note

Has effect only when [`vertical_alignment`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/view/#flet.View.vertical_alignment)
 is set to [`MainAxisAlignment.START`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/mainaxisalignment/#flet.MainAxisAlignment.START)
, [`MainAxisAlignment.END`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/mainaxisalignment/#flet.MainAxisAlignment.END)
, or [`MainAxisAlignment.CENTER`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/mainaxisalignment/#flet.MainAxisAlignment.CENTER)
.

### vertical\_alignment `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/view/#flet.View.vertical_alignment "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/view/#__codelineno-0-1) vertical_alignment: [MainAxisAlignment](https://docs.flet.dev/types/mainaxisalignment/#flet.MainAxisAlignment)  = [START](https://docs.flet.dev/types/mainaxisalignment/#flet.MainAxisAlignment.START)`

Defines how the child [`controls`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/view/#flet.View.controls)
 should be placed vertically.

Events[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/view/#flet.View-events "Permanent link")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### on\_confirm\_pop `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/view/#flet.View.on_confirm_pop "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/view/#__codelineno-0-1) on_confirm_pop: [ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[View](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/view/#flet.View) ] | None = None`

An event handler that is called when the view is about to be popped. You can use this event to confirm or cancel the pop action by calling [`confirm_pop`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/view/#flet.View.confirm_pop)
 method.

Methods[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/view/#flet.View-methods "Permanent link")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### close\_drawer `async` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/view/#flet.View.close_drawer "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/view/#__codelineno-0-1) close_drawer()`

Close the drawer.

### close\_end\_drawer `async` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/view/#flet.View.close_end_drawer "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/view/#__codelineno-0-1) close_end_drawer()`

Close the end drawer.

### confirm\_pop `async` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/view/#flet.View.confirm_pop "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/view/#__codelineno-0-1) confirm_pop(should_pop: [bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool) ) -> None`

Resolves a pending pop-confirmation request for this view.

Call this from [`on_confirm_pop`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/view/#flet.View.on_confirm_pop)
 to allow or cancel the current back-navigation attempt.

Parameters:

*   **`should_pop`** (`[bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool) `) –
    
    `True` to proceed with popping this view, `False` to keep the view on the navigation stack.
    

Notes

*   This method only has effect while a pop confirmation is pending.
*   If not called, the frontend confirmation wait times out and the pop is canceled.

### show\_drawer `async` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/view/#flet.View.show_drawer "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/view/#__codelineno-0-1) show_drawer()`

Show the drawer.

Raises:

*   `[ValueError](https://docs.python.org/3/library/exceptions.html#ValueError) ` –
    
    If no [`drawer`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/view/#flet.View.drawer)
     is defined.
    

### show\_end\_drawer `async` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/view/#flet.View.show_end_drawer "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/view/#__codelineno-0-1) show_end_drawer()`

Show the end drawer.

Raises:

*   `[ValueError](https://docs.python.org/3/library/exceptions.html#ValueError) ` –
    
    If no [`end_drawer`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/view/#flet.View.end_drawer)
     is defined.

# Switch - Flet

 

[Skip to content](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#flet.Switch)

Switch
======

A toggle represents a physical switch that allows someone to choose between two mutually exclusive options.

For example, "On/Off", "Show/Hide".

    `[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#__codelineno-0-1)     ft.Switch(label="Unchecked switch", value=False)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#__codelineno-0-2)     ft.Switch(label="Disabled switch", disabled=True)`

[![Switch](https://docs.flet.dev/test-images/examples/material/golden/macos/switch/image_for_docs.png)](https://docs.flet.dev/test-images/examples/material/golden/macos/switch/image_for_docs.png)

Basic switch and disabled switch

Inherits: `[LayoutControl](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/layoutcontrol/#flet.LayoutControl) `, `[AdaptiveControl](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/adaptivecontrol/#flet.AdaptiveControl) `

Properties

*   **`[active_color](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#flet.Switch.active_color) `**(`[ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None`) –
    
    The color to use when this switch is on.
    
*   **`[active_track_color](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#flet.Switch.active_track_color) `**(`[ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None`) –
    
    The color to use on the track when this switch is on.
    
*   **`[adaptive](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#flet.Switch.adaptive) `**(`[bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool)  | None`) –
    
    Whether an adaptive Switch should be created based on the target platform.
    
*   **`[autofocus](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#flet.Switch.autofocus) `**(`[bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool) `) –
    
    Whether this switch will be selected as the initial focus. If there is more than one control on a page with autofocus set, then the first one added to the page will get focus.
    
*   **`[focus_color](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#flet.Switch.focus_color) `**(`[ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None`) –
    
    The color to use for the focus highlight for keyboard interactions.
    
*   **`[hover_color](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#flet.Switch.hover_color) `**(`[ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None`) –
    
    The color to be used when it is being hovered over by the mouse pointer.
    
*   **`[inactive_thumb_color](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#flet.Switch.inactive_thumb_color) `**(`[ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None`) –
    
    The color to use on the thumb when this switch is off.
    
*   **`[inactive_track_color](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#flet.Switch.inactive_track_color) `**(`[ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None`) –
    
    The color to use on the track when this switch is off.
    
*   **`[label](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#flet.Switch.label) `**(`[StrOrControl](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.StrOrControl)  | None`) –
    
    The clickable label to display on the right of this switch.
    
*   **`[label_position](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#flet.Switch.label_position) `**(`[LabelPosition](https://docs.flet.dev/types/labelposition/#flet.LabelPosition) `) –
    
    The position of the [`label`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#flet.Switch.label)
    , if provided.
    
*   **`[label_text_style](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#flet.Switch.label_text_style) `**(`[TextStyle](https://docs.flet.dev/types/textstyle/#flet.TextStyle)  | None`) –
    
    The [`label`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#flet.Switch.label)
    's text style, when it is a string.
    
*   **`[mouse_cursor](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#flet.Switch.mouse_cursor) `**(`[MouseCursor](https://docs.flet.dev/types/mousecursor/#flet.MouseCursor)  | None`) –
    
    The cursor to be displayed when a mouse pointer enters or is hovering over this control.
    
*   **`[overlay_color](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#flet.Switch.overlay_color) `**(`[ControlStateValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlStateValue) [[ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue) ] | None`) –
    
    The color for the switch's Material in various [`ControlState`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/controlstate/#flet.ControlState)
     states.
    
*   **`[padding](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#flet.Switch.padding) `**(`[PaddingValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.PaddingValue)  | None`) –
    
    The amount of space to surround the child inside the bounds of the Switch.
    
*   **`[splash_radius](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#flet.Switch.splash_radius) `**(`[Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  | None`) –
    
    The radius of the splash effect when the switch is pressed.
    
*   **`[thumb_color](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#flet.Switch.thumb_color) `**(`[ControlStateValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlStateValue) [[ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue) ] | None`) –
    
    The color of this switch's thumb in various [`ControlState`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/controlstate/#flet.ControlState)
    
*   **`[thumb_icon](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#flet.Switch.thumb_icon) `**(`[ControlStateValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlStateValue) [[IconData](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.IconData) ] | None`) –
    
    The icon of this Switch's thumb in various [`ControlState`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/controlstate/#flet.ControlState)
     states.
    
*   **`[track_color](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#flet.Switch.track_color) `**(`[ControlStateValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlStateValue) [[ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue) ] | None`) –
    
    The color of this switch's track in various [`ControlState`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/controlstate/#flet.ControlState)
     states.
    
*   **`[track_outline_color](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#flet.Switch.track_outline_color) `**(`[ControlStateValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlStateValue) [[ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue) ] | None`) –
    
    The outline color of this switch's track in various [`ControlState`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/controlstate/#flet.ControlState)
    
*   **`[track_outline_width](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#flet.Switch.track_outline_width) `**(`[ControlStateValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlStateValue) [[Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  | None] | None`) –
    
    The outline width of this switch's track in all or specific [`ControlState`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/controlstate/#flet.ControlState)
     states.
    
*   **`[value](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#flet.Switch.value) `**(`[bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool) `) –
    
    Current value of this switch.
    

Events

*   **`[on_blur](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#flet.Switch.on_blur) `**(`[ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[Switch](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#flet.Switch) ] | None`) –
    
    Called when the control has lost focus.
    
*   **`[on_change](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#flet.Switch.on_change) `**(`[ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[Switch](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#flet.Switch) ] | None`) –
    
    Called when the state of the Switch is changed.
    
*   **`[on_focus](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#flet.Switch.on_focus) `**(`[ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[Switch](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#flet.Switch) ] | None`) –
    
    Called when the control has received focus.
    

Examples[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#examples "Permanent link")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------

[Live example](https://flet-controls-gallery.fly.dev/input/switch)

### Basic Example[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#basic-example "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#__codelineno-0-1) import flet as ft [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#__codelineno-0-2) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#__codelineno-0-3)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#__codelineno-0-4) def main(page: ft.Page):     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#__codelineno-0-5)     def handle_button_click(e: ft.Event[ft.Button]):        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#__codelineno-0-6)         message.value = (            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#__codelineno-0-7)             f"Switch values are:  {c1.value}, {c2.value}, {c3.value}, {c4.value}."        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#__codelineno-0-8)         )        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#__codelineno-0-9)         page.update() [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#__codelineno-0-10)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#__codelineno-0-11)     page.add(        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#__codelineno-0-12)         c1 := ft.Switch(label="Unchecked switch", value=False),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#__codelineno-0-13)         c2 := ft.Switch(label="Checked switch", value=True),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#__codelineno-0-14)         c3 := ft.Switch(label="Disabled switch", disabled=True),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#__codelineno-0-15)         c4 := ft.Switch(            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#__codelineno-0-16)             label="Switch with rendered label_position='left'",            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#__codelineno-0-17)             label_position=ft.LabelPosition.LEFT,        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#__codelineno-0-18)         ),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#__codelineno-0-19)         ft.Button(content="Submit", on_click=handle_button_click),        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#__codelineno-0-20)         message := ft.Text(),    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#__codelineno-0-21)     ) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#__codelineno-0-22) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#__codelineno-0-23)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#__codelineno-0-24) if __name__ == "__main__":     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#__codelineno-0-25)     ft.run(main)`

[![basic](https://docs.flet.dev/test-images/examples/material/golden/macos/switch/basic.png)](https://docs.flet.dev/test-images/examples/material/golden/macos/switch/basic.png)

### Handling change events[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#handling-change-events "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#__codelineno-1-1) import flet as ft [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#__codelineno-1-2) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#__codelineno-1-3)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#__codelineno-1-4) def main(page: ft.Page):     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#__codelineno-1-5)     def handle_switch_change(e: ft.Event[ft.Switch]):        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#__codelineno-1-6)         page.theme_mode = (            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#__codelineno-1-7)             ft.ThemeMode.DARK            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#__codelineno-1-8)             if page.theme_mode == ft.ThemeMode.LIGHT            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#__codelineno-1-9)             else ft.ThemeMode.LIGHT        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#__codelineno-1-10)         )        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#__codelineno-1-11)         e.control.label = (            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#__codelineno-1-12)             "Light ThemeMode"            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#__codelineno-1-13)             if page.theme_mode == ft.ThemeMode.LIGHT            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#__codelineno-1-14)             else "Dark ThemeMode"        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#__codelineno-1-15)         )        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#__codelineno-1-16)         page.update() [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#__codelineno-1-17)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#__codelineno-1-18)     page.theme_mode = ft.ThemeMode.LIGHT    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#__codelineno-1-19)     page.add(ft.Switch(label="Light ThemeMode", on_change=handle_switch_change)) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#__codelineno-1-20) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#__codelineno-1-21)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#__codelineno-1-22) if __name__ == "__main__":     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#__codelineno-1-23)     ft.run(main)`

[![handling-events](https://docs.flet.dev/examples/controls/switch/media/handling_events.gif)](https://docs.flet.dev/examples/controls/switch/media/handling_events.gif)

Properties[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#flet.Switch-properties "Permanent link")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### active\_color `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#flet.Switch.active_color "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#__codelineno-0-1) active_color: [ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None = None`

The color to use when this switch is on.

### active\_track\_color `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#flet.Switch.active_track_color "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#__codelineno-0-1) active_track_color: [ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None = None`

The color to use on the track when this switch is on.

If [`track_color`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#flet.Switch.track_color)
 returns a non-none color in the `ControlState.SELECTED` state, it will be used instead of this color.

### adaptive `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#flet.Switch.adaptive "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#__codelineno-0-1) adaptive: [bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool)  | None = None`

Whether an adaptive Switch should be created based on the target platform.

On iOS and macOS, a [`CupertinoSwitch`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#flet.CupertinoSwitch)
 is created, which has matching functionality and presentation as `Switch`, and the graphics as expected on iOS. On other platforms, a Material Switch is created.

Defaults to `False`. See the example of usage [here](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/cupertinoswitch/#cupertino-material-and-adaptive-switches)
.

### autofocus `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#flet.Switch.autofocus "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#__codelineno-0-1) autofocus: [bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool)  = False`

Whether this switch will be selected as the initial focus. If there is more than one control on a page with autofocus set, then the first one added to the page will get focus.

### focus\_color `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#flet.Switch.focus_color "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#__codelineno-0-1) focus_color: [ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None = None`

The color to use for the focus highlight for keyboard interactions.

### hover\_color `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#flet.Switch.hover_color "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#__codelineno-0-1) hover_color: [ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None = None`

The color to be used when it is being hovered over by the mouse pointer.

### inactive\_thumb\_color `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#flet.Switch.inactive_thumb_color "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#__codelineno-0-1) inactive_thumb_color: [ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None = None`

The color to use on the thumb when this switch is off.

Defaults to colors defined in the [material design specification](https://m3.material.io/components/switch/specs)
.

If [`thumb_color`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#flet.Switch.thumb_color)
 returns a non-none color in the `ControlState.DEFAULT` state, it will be used instead of this color.

### inactive\_track\_color `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#flet.Switch.inactive_track_color "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#__codelineno-0-1) inactive_track_color: [ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue)  | None = None`

The color to use on the track when this switch is off.

Defaults to colors defined in the [material design specification](https://m3.material.io/components/switch/specs)
.

If [`track_color`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#flet.Switch.track_color)
 returns a non-none color in the `ControlState.DEFAULT` state, it will be used instead of this color.

### label `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#flet.Switch.label "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#__codelineno-0-1) label: [StrOrControl](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.StrOrControl)  | None = None`

The clickable label to display on the right of this switch.

### label\_position `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#flet.Switch.label_position "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#__codelineno-0-1) label_position: [LabelPosition](https://docs.flet.dev/types/labelposition/#flet.LabelPosition)  = [RIGHT](https://docs.flet.dev/types/labelposition/#flet.LabelPosition.RIGHT)`

The position of the [`label`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#flet.Switch.label)
, if provided.

### label\_text\_style `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#flet.Switch.label_text_style "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#__codelineno-0-1) label_text_style: [TextStyle](https://docs.flet.dev/types/textstyle/#flet.TextStyle)  | None = None`

The [`label`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#flet.Switch.label)
's text style, when it is a string.

### mouse\_cursor `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#flet.Switch.mouse_cursor "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#__codelineno-0-1) mouse_cursor: [MouseCursor](https://docs.flet.dev/types/mousecursor/#flet.MouseCursor)  | None = None`

The cursor to be displayed when a mouse pointer enters or is hovering over this control.

### overlay\_color `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#flet.Switch.overlay_color "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#__codelineno-0-1) overlay_color: [ControlStateValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlStateValue) [[ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue) ] | None = None`

The color for the switch's Material in various [`ControlState`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/controlstate/#flet.ControlState)
 states.

The following states are supported: `ControlState.PRESSED`, `ControlState.SELECTED`, `ControlState.HOVERED`, `ControlState.FOCUSED` and `ControlState.DEFAULT`.

### padding `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#flet.Switch.padding "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#__codelineno-0-1) padding: [PaddingValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.PaddingValue)  | None = None`

The amount of space to surround the child inside the bounds of the Switch.

Defaults to horizontal padding of 4 pixels. If [`Theme.use_material3`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/theme/#flet.Theme.use_material3)
 is false, then there is no padding by default.

### splash\_radius `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#flet.Switch.splash_radius "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#__codelineno-0-1) splash_radius: [Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  | None = None`

The radius of the splash effect when the switch is pressed.

Raises:

*   `[ValueError](https://docs.python.org/3/library/exceptions.html#ValueError) ` –
    
    If it is not greater than or equal to `0`.
    

### thumb\_color `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#flet.Switch.thumb_color "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#__codelineno-0-1) thumb_color: [ControlStateValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlStateValue) [[ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue) ] | None = None`

The color of this switch's thumb in various [`ControlState`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/controlstate/#flet.ControlState)
 states.

The following states are supported: `ControlState.SELECTED`, `ControlState.HOVERED`, `ControlState.DISABLED`, `ControlState.FOCUSED` and `ControlState.DEFAULT` (fallback).

### thumb\_icon `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#flet.Switch.thumb_icon "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#__codelineno-0-1) thumb_icon: [ControlStateValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlStateValue) [[IconData](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.IconData) ] | None = None`

The icon of this Switch's thumb in various [`ControlState`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/controlstate/#flet.ControlState)
 states.

The following states are supported: `ControlState.SELECTED`, `ControlState.HOVERED`, `ControlState.DISABLED`, `ControlState.FOCUSED` and `ControlState.DEFAULT` (fallback).

### track\_color `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#flet.Switch.track_color "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#__codelineno-0-1) track_color: [ControlStateValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlStateValue) [[ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue) ] | None = None`

The color of this switch's track in various [`ControlState`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/controlstate/#flet.ControlState)
 states.

The following states are supported: `ControlState.SELECTED`, `ControlState.HOVERED`, `ControlState.DISABLED`, `ControlState.FOCUSED` and `ControlState.DEFAULT` (fallback).

### track\_outline\_color `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#flet.Switch.track_outline_color "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#__codelineno-0-1) track_outline_color: (     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#__codelineno-0-2)     [ControlStateValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlStateValue) [[ColorValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ColorValue) ] | None [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#__codelineno-0-3) ) = None`

The outline color of this switch's track in various [`ControlState`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/controlstate/#flet.ControlState)
 states.

The following states are supported: `ControlState.SELECTED`, `ControlState.HOVERED`, `ControlState.DISABLED`, `ControlState.FOCUSED` and `ControlState.DEFAULT` (fallback).

### track\_outline\_width `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#flet.Switch.track_outline_width "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#__codelineno-0-1) track_outline_width: (     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#__codelineno-0-2)     [ControlStateValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlStateValue) [[Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  | None] | None [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#__codelineno-0-3) ) = None`

The outline width of this switch's track in all or specific [`ControlState`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/controlstate/#flet.ControlState)
 states.

The following states are supported: `ControlState.SELECTED`, `ControlState.HOVERED`, `ControlState.DISABLED`, `ControlState.FOCUSED` and `ControlState.DEFAULT` (fallback).

### value `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#flet.Switch.value "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#__codelineno-0-1) value: [bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool)  = False`

Current value of this switch.

Events[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#flet.Switch-events "Permanent link")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### on\_blur `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#flet.Switch.on_blur "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#__codelineno-0-1) on_blur: [ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[Switch](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#flet.Switch) ] | None = None`

Called when the control has lost focus.

### on\_change `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#flet.Switch.on_change "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#__codelineno-0-1) on_change: [ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[Switch](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#flet.Switch) ] | None = None`

Called when the state of the Switch is changed.

### on\_focus `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#flet.Switch.on_focus "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#__codelineno-0-1) on_focus: [ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[Switch](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/switch/#flet.Switch) ] | None = None`
