# Markdown - Flet

 

[Skip to content](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#flet.Markdown)

Markdown
========

Renders text in markdown format.

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-1) ft.Markdown(     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-2)     value="# Welcome\n\nThis is **Markdown** rendered in Flet.",    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-3)     width=260, [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-4) )`

[![Markdown](https://docs.flet.dev/test-images/examples/core/golden/macos/markdown/image_for_docs.png)](https://docs.flet.dev/test-images/examples/core/golden/macos/markdown/image_for_docs.png)

Basic Markdown

Inherits: `[LayoutControl](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/layoutcontrol/#flet.LayoutControl) `

Properties

*   **`[auto_follow_links](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#flet.Markdown.auto_follow_links) `**(`[bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool) `) –
    
    Automatically open URLs in the document.
    
*   **`[auto_follow_links_target](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#flet.Markdown.auto_follow_links_target) `**(`[UrlTarget](https://docs.flet.dev/types/urltarget/#flet.UrlTarget)  | None`) –
    
    Where to open URL in the web mode.
    
*   **`[code_style_sheet](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#flet.Markdown.code_style_sheet) `**(`[MarkdownStyleSheet](https://docs.flet.dev/types/markdownstylesheet/#flet.MarkdownStyleSheet)  | None`) –
    
    The styles to use when displaying the code blocks.
    
*   **`[code_theme](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#flet.Markdown.code_theme) `**(`[MarkdownCodeTheme](https://docs.flet.dev/types/markdowncodetheme/#flet.MarkdownCodeTheme)  | [MarkdownCustomCodeTheme](https://docs.flet.dev/types/markdowncustomcodetheme/#flet.MarkdownCustomCodeTheme)  | None`) –
    
    A syntax highlighting theme for code blocks.
    
*   **`[extension_set](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#flet.Markdown.extension_set) `**(`[MarkdownExtensionSet](https://docs.flet.dev/types/markdownextensionset/#flet.MarkdownExtensionSet) `) –
    
    The extensions to use when rendering the markdown content.
    
*   **`[fit_content](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#flet.Markdown.fit_content) `**(`[bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool) `) –
    
    Whether to allow the widget to fit the child content.
    
*   **`[image_error_content](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#flet.Markdown.image_error_content) `**(`[Control](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/control/#flet.Control)  | None`) –
    
    The control to display when an image fails to load.
    
*   **`[latex_scale_factor](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#flet.Markdown.latex_scale_factor) `**(`[float](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#float)  | None`) –
    
    The scale factor for LaTeX formulas rendering.
    
*   **`[latex_style](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#flet.Markdown.latex_style) `**(`[TextStyle](https://docs.flet.dev/types/textstyle/#flet.TextStyle)  | None`) –
    
    The text style to apply to LaTeX formulas.
    
*   **`[md_style_sheet](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#flet.Markdown.md_style_sheet) `**(`[MarkdownStyleSheet](https://docs.flet.dev/types/markdownstylesheet/#flet.MarkdownStyleSheet)  | None`) –
    
    The styles to use when displaying the markdown.
    
*   **`[selectable](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#flet.Markdown.selectable) `**(`[bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool) `) –
    
    Whether rendered text is selectable or not.
    
*   **`[shrink_wrap](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#flet.Markdown.shrink_wrap) `**(`[bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool) `) –
    
    Whether the extent of the scroll view in the scroll direction should be determined by the contents being viewed.
    
*   **`[soft_line_break](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#flet.Markdown.soft_line_break) `**(`[bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool) `) –
    
    The soft line break is used to identify the spaces at the end of a line of text and the leading spaces in the immediately following the line of text.
    
*   **`[value](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#flet.Markdown.value) `**(`[str](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str) `) –
    
    Markdown content to render.
    

Events

*   **`[on_selection_change](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#flet.Markdown.on_selection_change) `**(`[EventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.EventHandler) [[TextSelectionChangeEvent](https://docs.flet.dev/types/textselectionchangeevent/#flet.TextSelectionChangeEvent) [[Markdown](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#flet.Markdown) ]] | None`) –
    
    Called when the text selection changes.
    
*   **`[on_tap_link](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#flet.Markdown.on_tap_link) `**(`[ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[Markdown](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#flet.Markdown) ] | None`) –
    
    Called when a link within Markdown document is clicked/tapped.
    
*   **`[on_tap_text](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#flet.Markdown.on_tap_text) `**(`[ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[Markdown](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#flet.Markdown) ] | None`) –
    
    Called when some text is clicked/tapped.
    

Examples[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#examples "Permanent link")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

[Live example](https://flet-controls-gallery.fly.dev/displays/markdown)

### Basic Example[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#basic-example "Permanent link")

``[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-1) import flet as ft [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-2)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-3) sample = """ [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-4) # Markdown Example [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-5) Markdown allows you to easily include formatted text, images, and even formatted Dart [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-6) code in your app. [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-7)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-8) ## Titles [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-9)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-10) Setext-style [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-11)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-12) This is an H1 [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-13) ============= [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-14)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-15) This is an H2 [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-16) ------------- [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-17)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-18) Atx-style [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-19)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-20) # This is an H1 [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-21)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-22) ## This is an H2 [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-23)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-24) ###### This is an H6 [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-25)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-26) Select the valid headers: [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-27)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-28) - [x] `# hello` [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-29) - [ ] `#hello` [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-30)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-31) ## Links [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-32)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-33) [inline-style](https://www.google.com) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-34)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-35) ## Images [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-36)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-37) ![Image from Flet assets](/icons/icon-192.png) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-38)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-39) ![Test image](https://picsum.photos/200/300) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-40)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-41) ## Tables [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-42)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-43) |Syntax                                 |Result                               | [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-44) |---------------------------------------|-------------------------------------| [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-45) |`*italic 1*`                           |*italic 1*                           | [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-46) |`_italic 2_`                           | _italic 2_                          | [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-47) |`**bold 1**`                           |**bold 1**                           | [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-48) |`__bold 2__`                           |__bold 2__                           | [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-49) |`This is a ~~strikethrough~~`          |This is a ~~strikethrough~~          | [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-50) |`***italic bold 1***`                  |***italic bold 1***                  | [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-51) |`___italic bold 2___`                  |___italic bold 2___                  | [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-52) |`***~~italic bold strikethrough 1~~***`|***~~italic bold strikethrough 1~~***| [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-53) |`~~***italic bold strikethrough 2***~~`|~~***italic bold strikethrough 2***~~| [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-54)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-55) ## Styling [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-56)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-57) Style text as _italic_, __bold__, ~~strikethrough~~, or `inline code`. [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-58)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-59) - Use bulleted lists [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-60) - To better clarify [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-61) - Your points [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-62)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-63) ## Code blocks [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-64)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-65) Formatted Dart code looks really pretty too: [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-66)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-67) ~~~dart [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-68) void main() {   [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-69)   runApp(MaterialApp(    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-70)     home: Scaffold(      [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-71)       body: ft.Markdown(data: markdownData),    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-72)     ),  [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-73)   )); [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-74) } [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-75) ~~~ [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-76) """ [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-77) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-78)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-79) def main(page: ft.Page):     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-80)     page.scroll = ft.ScrollMode.AUTO [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-81)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-82)     async def handle_link_tap(e: ft.Event[ft.Markdown]):        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-83)         await page.launch_url(e.data) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-84)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-85)     page.add(        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-86)         ft.Markdown(            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-87)             value=sample,            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-88)             selectable=True,            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-89)             extension_set=ft.MarkdownExtensionSet.GITHUB_WEB,            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-90)             on_tap_link=handle_link_tap,        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-91)         )    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-92)     ) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-93) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-94)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-95) ft.run(main)``

[![basic](https://docs.flet.dev/examples/controls/markdown/media/basic.gif)](https://docs.flet.dev/examples/controls/markdown/media/basic.gif)

### Code syntax highlight[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#code-syntax-highlight "Permanent link")

``[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-1) import flet as ft [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-2)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-3) sample = """ [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-4) # Flet [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-5)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-6) <img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/flet-dev/flet/flet-widget/media/logo/flet-logo.svg" width="50%"/> [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-7)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-8) Flet is a framework for adding server-driven UI (SDUI) experiences to existing Flutter [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-9) apps or building standalone web, mobile and desktop apps with Flutter UI. [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-10)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-11) Add an interactive `FletApp` widget to your Flutter app whose content is controlled by a remote Python script. [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-12) It is an ideal solution for building non-core or frequently changing functionality such as product catalog, feedback form, in-app survey or support chat. Flet enables your team to ship new features faster by reducing the number of App Store validation cycles. Just re-deploy a web app hosting a Python script and your users will get an instant update! [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-13)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-14) On the server side Flet provides an easy to learn programming model that enables Python developers without prior Flutter (or even front-end) experience to participate in development of your larger Flutter app or build their own apps with Flutter UI from scratch. [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-15)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-16) ## Getting started with Flet [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-17)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-18) ### Install `flet` Python module [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-19)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-20) Flet requires Python 3.7 or above. To start with Flet, you need to install flet module first: [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-21)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-22) ~~~bash [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-23) pip install flet [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-24) ~~~ [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-25)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-26) ### Create Python program [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-27)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-28) Create a new Python program using Flet which will be driving the content of `FletApp` widget. [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-29)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-30) Let's do a simple `counter.py` app similar to a Flutter new project template: [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-31)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-32) ~~~python [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-33) import flet [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-34) from flet import IconButton, Page, Row, TextField, icons [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-35)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-36) def main(page: Page):     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-37)     page.title = "Flet counter example"    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-38)     page.vertical_alignment = "center" [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-39)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-40)     txt_number = TextField(value="0", text_align="right", width=100) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-41)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-42)     def minus_click(e):        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-43)         txt_number.value = int(txt_number.value) - 1        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-44)         page.update() [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-45)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-46)     def plus_click(e):        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-47)         txt_number.value = int(txt_number.value) + 1        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-48)         page.update() [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-49)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-50)     page.add(        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-51)         Row(            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-52)             [                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-53)                 IconButton(icons.REMOVE, on_click=minus_click),                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-54)                 txt_number,                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-55)                 IconButton(icons.ADD, on_click=plus_click),            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-56)             ],            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-57)             alignment="center",        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-58)         )    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-59)     ) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-60)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-61) flet.app(main, port=8550) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-62) ~~~ [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-63)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-64) Run the app: [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-65)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-66) ~~~bash [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-67) python counter.py [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-68) ~~~ [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-69)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-70) You should see the app running in a native OS window. [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-71)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-72) There is a web server (Fletd) running in the background on a fixed port `8550`. Fletd web server is a "bridge" between Python and Flutter. [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-73)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-74) `FletApp` widget in your Flutter application will be communicating with Fletd web server via WebSockets to receive UI updates and send user-generated UI events. [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-75)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-76) For production use Python app along with Fletd could be [deployed to a public web host](https://docs.flet.dev/publish/web/dynamic-website/) and be accessible via HTTPS with domain name. [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-77)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-78) ### Add Flet widget to a Flutter app [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-79)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-80) Create a new or open existing Flutter project. [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-81)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-82) Install Flutter `flet` package: [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-83)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-84) ~~~bash [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-85) flutter pub add flet [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-86) ~~~ [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-87)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-88) For a new project replace `main.dart` with the following: [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-89)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-90) ~~~dart [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-91) import 'package:flet/flet.dart'; [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-92) import 'package:flutter/material.dart'; [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-93)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-94) void main() async {   [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-95)   await setupDesktop();  [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-96)   runApp(const MyApp()); [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-97) } [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-98)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-99) class MyApp extends StatelessWidget {   [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-100)   const MyApp({super.key}); [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-101)  [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-102)   @override  [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-103)   Widget build(BuildContext context) {    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-104)     return const MaterialApp(      [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-105)       title: 'Flet Flutter Demo',      [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-106)       home: FletApp(pageUrl: "http://localhost:8550"),    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-107)     );  [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-108)   } [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-109) } [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-110) ~~~ [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-111)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-112) In the app above `FletApp` widget is hosted inside `MaterialApp` widget. [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-113)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-114) If Flet app must be able to handle page route change events (web browser URL changes, mobile app deep linking) it must be the top most widget as it contains its own `MaterialApp` widget handling route changes: [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-115)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-116) ~~~dart [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-117) import 'package:flet/flet.dart'; [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-118) import 'package:flutter/material.dart'; [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-119)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-120) void main() async {   [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-121)   await setupDesktop();  [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-122)   runApp(const FletApp(pageUrl: "http://localhost:8550")); [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-123) } [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-124) ~~~ [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-125)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-126) Run the program and see Flet app running inside a Flutter app. [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-127)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-128) When adding `FletApp` widget to the existing desktop Flutter app make sure `setupDesktop()` is called before `runApp()` to initialize Flet's built-in window manager. [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-129)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-130) ## Flet learning resources [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-131)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-132) * [Getting started for Python](https://docs.flet.dev/getting-started/installation/) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-133) * [Controls reference](https://docs.flet.dev/controls) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-134) * [Tutorials](https://docs.flet.dev/tutorials) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-135) * [Examples](https://github.com/flet-dev/examples/tree/main/python) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-136)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-137) ## Flet community [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-138)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-139) * [Discussions](https://github.com/flet-dev/flet/discussions) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-140) * [Discord](https://discord.gg/dzWXP8SHG8) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-141) * [Twitter](https://twitter.com/fletdev) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-142) * [Email](mailto:[[email protected]](https://docs.flet.dev/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection) ) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-143)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-144) ## FAQ [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-145)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-146) Coming soon. [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-151) """  # noqa: E501 [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-152) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-153)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-154) def main(page: ft.Page):     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-155)     page.scroll = ft.ScrollMode.AUTO [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-156)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-157)     page.fonts = {        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-158)         "Roboto Mono": "RobotoMono-VariableFont_wght.ttf",    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-159)     } [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-160)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-161)     async def navigate_md_link(e: ft.Event[ft.Markdown]):        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-162)         await page.launch_url(e.data) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-163)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-164)     page.add(        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-165)         ft.Markdown(            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-166)             value=sample,            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-167)             selectable=True,            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-168)             extension_set=ft.MarkdownExtensionSet.GITHUB_WEB,            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-169)             code_theme=ft.MarkdownCodeTheme.ATOM_ONE_DARK,            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-170)             code_style_sheet=ft.MarkdownStyleSheet(                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-171)                 code_text_style=ft.TextStyle(font_family="Roboto Mono")            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-172)             ),            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-173)             on_tap_link=navigate_md_link,        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-174)         )    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-175)     ) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-176) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-177)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-1-178) ft.run(main)``

### Custom text theme[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#custom-text-theme "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-2-1) import flet as ft [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-2-2) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-2-3)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-2-4) def main(page: ft.Page):     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-2-5)     page.theme_mode = ft.ThemeMode.DARK [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-2-6)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-2-7)     def change_theme_mode(e: ft.Event[ft.Switch]):        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-2-8)         if page.theme_mode == ft.ThemeMode.DARK:            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-2-9)             page.theme_mode = ft.ThemeMode.LIGHT            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-2-10)             switch.thumb_icon = ft.Icons.LIGHT_MODE        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-2-11)         else:            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-2-12)             switch.thumb_icon = ft.Icons.DARK_MODE            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-2-13)             page.theme_mode = ft.ThemeMode.DARK        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-2-14)         page.update() [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-2-15)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-2-16)     switch = ft.Switch(thumb_icon=ft.Icons.DARK_MODE, on_change=change_theme_mode) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-2-17)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-2-18)     page.add(        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-2-19)         ft.Row(            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-2-20)             alignment=ft.MainAxisAlignment.SPACE_BETWEEN,            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-2-21)             controls=[                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-2-22)                 ft.Container(                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-2-23)                     content=ft.Markdown("I can read this!"),                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-2-24)                     bgcolor="#550000",                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-2-25)                     padding=20,                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-2-26)                     theme=ft.Theme(                        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-2-27)                         text_theme=ft.TextTheme(                            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-2-28)                             body_medium=ft.TextStyle(color=ft.Colors.WHITE),                            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-2-29)                             body_large=ft.TextStyle(color=ft.Colors.WHITE),                            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-2-30)                             body_small=ft.TextStyle(color=ft.Colors.WHITE),                        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-2-31)                         )                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-2-32)                     ),                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-2-33)                 ),                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-2-34)                 ft.Container(                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-2-35)                     content=switch,                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-2-36)                     padding=ft.Padding.only(bottom=50),                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-2-37)                     alignment=ft.Alignment.TOP_RIGHT,                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-2-38)                 ),            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-2-39)             ], Properties[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#flet.Markdown-properties "Permanent link")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### auto\_follow\_links `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#flet.Markdown.auto_follow_links "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-1) auto_follow_links: [bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool)  = False`

Automatically open URLs in the document.

If registered, `on_tap_link` event is fired after that.

### auto\_follow\_links\_target `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#flet.Markdown.auto_follow_links_target "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-1) auto_follow_links_target: [UrlTarget](https://docs.flet.dev/types/urltarget/#flet.UrlTarget)  | None = None`

Where to open URL in the web mode.

### code\_style\_sheet `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#flet.Markdown.code_style_sheet "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-1) code_style_sheet: [MarkdownStyleSheet](https://docs.flet.dev/types/markdownstylesheet/#flet.MarkdownStyleSheet)  | None = None`

The styles to use when displaying the code blocks.

### code\_theme `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#flet.Markdown.code_theme "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-1) code_theme: (     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-2)     [MarkdownCodeTheme](https://docs.flet.dev/types/markdowncodetheme/#flet.MarkdownCodeTheme)  | [MarkdownCustomCodeTheme](https://docs.flet.dev/types/markdowncustomcodetheme/#flet.MarkdownCustomCodeTheme)  | None [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-3) ) = None`

A syntax highlighting theme for code blocks.

Defaults to `MarkdownCodeTheme.GITHUB`.

### extension\_set `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#flet.Markdown.extension_set "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-1) extension_set: [MarkdownExtensionSet](https://docs.flet.dev/types/markdownextensionset/#flet.MarkdownExtensionSet)  = [NONE](https://docs.flet.dev/types/markdownextensionset/#flet.MarkdownExtensionSet.NONE)`

The extensions to use when rendering the markdown content.

### fit\_content `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#flet.Markdown.fit_content "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-1) fit_content: [bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool)  = True`

Whether to allow the widget to fit the child content.

### image\_error\_content `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#flet.Markdown.image_error_content "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-1) image_error_content: [Control](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/control/#flet.Control)  | None = None`

The control to display when an image fails to load.

### latex\_scale\_factor `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#flet.Markdown.latex_scale_factor "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-1) latex_scale_factor: [float](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#float)  | None = None`

The scale factor for LaTeX formulas rendering. Controls the size of rendered mathematical expressions.

### latex\_style `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#flet.Markdown.latex_style "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-1) latex_style: [TextStyle](https://docs.flet.dev/types/textstyle/#flet.TextStyle)  | None = None`

The text style to apply to LaTeX formulas. Allows customization of font, color, and other text properties for mathematical expressions.

### md\_style\_sheet `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#flet.Markdown.md_style_sheet "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-1) md_style_sheet: [MarkdownStyleSheet](https://docs.flet.dev/types/markdownstylesheet/#flet.MarkdownStyleSheet)  | None = None`

The styles to use when displaying the markdown.

### selectable `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#flet.Markdown.selectable "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-1) selectable: [bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool)  = False`

Whether rendered text is selectable or not.

### shrink\_wrap `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#flet.Markdown.shrink_wrap "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-1) shrink_wrap: [bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool)  = True`

Whether the extent of the scroll view in the scroll direction should be determined by the contents being viewed.

### soft\_line\_break `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#flet.Markdown.soft_line_break "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-1) soft_line_break: [bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool)  = False`

The soft line break is used to identify the spaces at the end of a line of text and the leading spaces in the immediately following the line of text.

### value `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#flet.Markdown.value "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-1) value: [str](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str)  = ''`

Markdown content to render.

Events[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#flet.Markdown-events "Permanent link")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### on\_selection\_change `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#flet.Markdown.on_selection_change "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-1) on_selection_change: (     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-2)     [EventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.EventHandler) [[TextSelectionChangeEvent](https://docs.flet.dev/types/textselectionchangeevent/#flet.TextSelectionChangeEvent) [[Markdown](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#flet.Markdown) ]] | None [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-3) ) = None`

Called when the text selection changes.

### on\_tap\_link `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#flet.Markdown.on_tap_link "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-1) on_tap_link: [ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[Markdown](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#flet.Markdown) ] | None = None`

Called when a link within Markdown document is clicked/tapped.

The [`data`](https://docs.flet.dev/types/event/#flet.Event.data)
 property of the event handler argument contains the clickedURL.

Example: [https://github.com/flet-dev/examples/blob/main/python/controls/information-displays/markdown/markdown-event-example.py](https://github.com/flet-dev/examples/blob/main/python/controls/information-displays/markdown/markdown-event-example.py)

### on\_tap\_text `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#flet.Markdown.on_tap_text "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#__codelineno-0-1) on_tap_text: [ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[Markdown](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/markdown/#flet.Markdown) ] | None = None`

Called when some text is clicked/tapped.

Back to top
