# Semantics - Flet

 

[Skip to content](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/semantics/#flet.Semantics)

Semantics
=========

Provides semantic annotations for the control tree, describing the meaning and purpose of controls.

These annotations are utilized by accessibility tools, search engines, and semantic analysis software to better understand the structure and functionality of the application.

Inherits: `[Control](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/control/#flet.Control) `

Properties

*   **`[badge](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/semantics/#flet.Semantics.badge) `**(`[BadgeValue](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.BadgeValue)  | None`) –
    
    TBD
    
*   **`[button](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/semantics/#flet.Semantics.button) `**(`[bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool)  | None`) –
    
    Whether this subtree represents a button.
    
*   **`[checked](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/semantics/#flet.Semantics.checked) `**(`[bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool)  | None`) –
    
    Whether this subtree represents a checkbox or similar widget with a "checked" state, and what its current state is.
    
*   **`[container](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/semantics/#flet.Semantics.container) `**(`[bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool)  | None`) –
    
    TBD
    
*   **`[content](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/semantics/#flet.Semantics.content) `**(`[Control](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/control/#flet.Control)  | None`) –
    
    The Control to annotate.
    
*   **`[current_value_length](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/semantics/#flet.Semantics.current_value_length) `**(`[int](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#int)  | None`) –
    
    The current number of characters that have been entered into an editable text field.
    
*   **`[decreased_value](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/semantics/#flet.Semantics.decreased_value) `**(`[str](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str)  | None`) –
    
    The value that the semantics node represents when it is decreased.
    
*   **`[exclude_semantics](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/semantics/#flet.Semantics.exclude_semantics) `**(`[bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool) `) –
    
    TBD
    
*   **`[expanded](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/semantics/#flet.Semantics.expanded) `**(`[bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool)  | None`) –
    
    Whether this subtree represents something that can be in an "expanded" or "collapsed" state.
    
*   **`[focus](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/semantics/#flet.Semantics.focus) `**(`[bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool)  | None`) –
    
    Whether the node currently holds input focus.
    
*   **`[focusable](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/semantics/#flet.Semantics.focusable) `**(`[bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool)  | None`) –
    
    Whether the node is able to hold input focus.
    
*   **`[header](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/semantics/#flet.Semantics.header) `**(`[bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool)  | None`) –
    
    Whether this subtree represents a header.
    
*   **`[heading_level](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/semantics/#flet.Semantics.heading_level) `**(`[int](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#int)  | None`) –
    
    The heading level in the DOM document structure.
    
*   **`[hidden](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/semantics/#flet.Semantics.hidden) `**(`[bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool)  | None`) –
    
    Whether this subtree is currently hidden.
    
*   **`[hint_text](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/semantics/#flet.Semantics.hint_text) `**(`[str](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str)  | None`) –
    
    A brief textual description of the result of an action performed on the `content` control.
    
*   **`[image](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/semantics/#flet.Semantics.image) `**(`[bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool)  | None`) –
    
    Whether the node represents an image.
    
*   **`[increased_value](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/semantics/#flet.Semantics.increased_value) `**(`[str](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str)  | None`) –
    
    The value that the semantics node represents when it is increased.
    
*   **`[label](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/semantics/#flet.Semantics.label) `**(`[str](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str)  | None`) –
    
    A textual description of the [`content`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/semantics/#flet.Semantics.content)
    .
    
*   **`[link](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/semantics/#flet.Semantics.link) `**(`[bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool)  | None`) –
    
    Whether this subtree represents a link.
    
*   **`[live_region](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/semantics/#flet.Semantics.live_region) `**(`[bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool)  | None`) –
    
    Whether this subtree should be considered a live region.
    
*   **`[max_value_length](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/semantics/#flet.Semantics.max_value_length) `**(`[Number](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.Number)  | None`) –
    
    The maximum number of characters that can be entered into an editable text field.
    
*   **`[mixed](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/semantics/#flet.Semantics.mixed) `**(`[bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool)  | None`) –
    
    Whether this subtree represents a checkbox or similar control with a "half-checked" state or similar, and whether it is currently in this half-checked state.
    
*   **`[multiline](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/semantics/#flet.Semantics.multiline) `**(`[bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool)  | None`) –
    
    Whether the [`value`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/semantics/#flet.Semantics.value)
     is coming from a field that supports multiline text editing.
    
*   **`[obscured](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/semantics/#flet.Semantics.obscured) `**(`[bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool)  | None`) –
    
    Whether [`value`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/semantics/#flet.Semantics.value)
     should be obscured.
    
*   **`[read_only](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/semantics/#flet.Semantics.read_only) `**(`[bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool)  | None`) –
    
    Whether this subtree is read only.
    
*   **`[selected](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/semantics/#flet.Semantics.selected) `**(`[bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool)  | None`) –
    
    Whether this subtree represents something that can be in a selected or unselected state, and what its current state is.
    
*   **`[slider](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/semantics/#flet.Semantics.slider) `**(`[bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool)  | None`) –
    
    Whether this subtree represents a slider.
    
*   **`[textfield](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/semantics/#flet.Semantics.textfield) `**(`[bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool)  | None`) –
    
    Whether this subtree represents a text field.
    
*   **`[toggled](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/semantics/#flet.Semantics.toggled) `**(`[bool](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool)  | None`) –
    
    Whether this subtree represents a toggle switch or similar widget with an "on" state, and what its current state is.
    
*   **`[tooltip](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/semantics/#flet.Semantics.tooltip) `**(`[str](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str)  | None`) –
    
    A textual description of the widget's tooltip.
    
*   **`[value](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/semantics/#flet.Semantics.value) `**(`[str](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str)  | None`) –
    
    A textual description of the `value` of the `content` control.
    

Events

*   **`[on_copy](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/semantics/#flet.Semantics.on_copy) `**(`[ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[Semantics](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/semantics/#flet.Semantics) ] | None`) –
    
    Called when the current selection is copied to the clipboard.
    
*   **`[on_cut](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/semantics/#flet.Semantics.on_cut) `**(`[ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[Semantics](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/semantics/#flet.Semantics) ] | None`) –
    
    Called when the current selection is cut to the clipboard.
    
*   **`[on_decrease](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/semantics/#flet.Semantics.on_decrease) `**(`[ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[Semantics](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/semantics/#flet.Semantics) ] | None`) –
    
    Called when the value represented by the semantics node is decreased.
    
*   **`[on_did_gain_accessibility_focus](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/semantics/#flet.Semantics.on_did_gain_accessibility_focus) `**(`[ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[Semantics](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/semantics/#flet.Semantics) ] | None`) –
    
    Called when the node has gained accessibility focus.
    
*   **`[on_did_lose_accessibility_focus](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/semantics/#flet.Semantics.on_did_lose_accessibility_focus) `**(`[ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[Semantics](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/semantics/#flet.Semantics) ] | None`) –
    
    Called when the node has lost accessibility focus.
    
*   **`[on_dismiss](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/semantics/#flet.Semantics.on_dismiss) `**(`[ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[Semantics](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/semantics/#flet.Semantics) ] | None`) –
    
    Called when the node is dismissed.
    
*   **`[on_double_tap](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/semantics/#flet.Semantics.on_double_tap) `**(`[ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[Semantics](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/semantics/#flet.Semantics) ] | None`) –
    
    TBD
    
*   **`[on_increase](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/semantics/#flet.Semantics.on_increase) `**(`[ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[Semantics](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/semantics/#flet.Semantics) ] | None`) –
    
    Called when the value represented by the semantics node is increased.
    
*   **`[on_long_press](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/semantics/#flet.Semantics.on_long_press) `**(`[ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[Semantics](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/semantics/#flet.Semantics) ] | None`) –
    
    Called when the node is long-pressed (pressing and holding the screen with the finger for a few seconds without moving it).
    
*   **`[on_long_press_hint_text](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/semantics/#flet.Semantics.on_long_press_hint_text) `**(`[str](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str)  | None`) –
    
    TBD
    
*   **`[on_move_cursor_backward_by_character](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/semantics/#flet.Semantics.on_move_cursor_backward_by_character) `**(`[ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[Semantics](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/semantics/#flet.Semantics) ] | None`) –
    
    Called when the cursor is moved backward by one character.
    
*   **`[on_move_cursor_forward_by_character](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/semantics/#flet.Semantics.on_move_cursor_forward_by_character) `**(`[ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[Semantics](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/semantics/#flet.Semantics) ] | None`) –
    
    Called when the cursor is moved forward by one character.
    
*   **`[on_paste](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/semantics/#flet.Semantics.on_paste) `**(`[ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[Semantics](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/semantics/#flet.Semantics) ] | None`) –
    
    Called when the current content of the clipboard is pasted.
    
*   **`[on_scroll_down](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/semantics/#flet.Semantics.on_scroll_down) `**(`[ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[Semantics](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/semantics/#flet.Semantics) ] | None`) –
    
    Called when a user moves their finger across the screen from top to bottom.
    
*   **`[on_scroll_left](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/semantics/#flet.Semantics.on_scroll_left) `**(`[ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[Semantics](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/semantics/#flet.Semantics) ] | None`) –
    
    Called when a user moves their finger across the screen from right to left.
    
*   **`[on_scroll_right](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/semantics/#flet.Semantics.on_scroll_right) `**(`[ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[Semantics](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/semantics/#flet.Semantics) ] | None`) –
    
    Called when a user moves their finger across the screen from left to right.
    
*   **`[on_scroll_up](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/semantics/#flet.Semantics.on_scroll_up) `**(`[ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[Semantics](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/semantics/#flet.Semantics) ] | None`) –
    
    Called when a user moves their finger across the screen from bottom to top.
    
*   **`[on_set_text](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/semantics/#flet.Semantics.on_set_text) `**(`[ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[Semantics](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/semantics/#flet.Semantics) ] | None`) –
    
    Called when a user wants to replace the current text in the text field with a new text.
    
*   **`[on_tap](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/semantics/#flet.Semantics.on_tap) `**(`[ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[Semantics](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/semantics/#flet.Semantics) ] | None`) –
    
    Called when this control is tapped.
    
*   **`[on_tap_hint_text](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/semantics/#flet.Semantics.on_tap_hint_text) `**(`[str](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str)  | None`) –
    
    TBD
    

Examples[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/semantics/#examples "Permanent link")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Basic Example[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/semantics/#basic-example "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/semantics/#__codelineno-0-1) import flet as ft [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/semantics/#__codelineno-0-2) [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/semantics/#__codelineno-0-3)[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/semantics/#__codelineno-0-4) def main(page: ft.Page):     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/semantics/#__codelineno-0-5)     def handle_gain_accessibility_focus(e: ft.Event[ft.Semantics]):        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/semantics/#__codelineno-0-6)         print("focus gained") [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/semantics/#__codelineno-0-7)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/semantics/#__codelineno-0-8)     def handle_lose_accessibility_focus(e: ft.Event[ft.Semantics]):        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/semantics/#__codelineno-0-9)         print("focus lost") [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/semantics/#__codelineno-0-10)    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/semantics/#__codelineno-0-11)     page.add(        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/semantics/#__codelineno-0-12)         ft.Column(            [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/semantics/#__codelineno-0-13)             controls=[                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/semantics/#__codelineno-0-14)                 ft.Semantics(                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/semantics/#__codelineno-0-15)                     label="Input your occupation",                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/semantics/#__codelineno-0-16)                     on_did_gain_accessibility_focus=handle_gain_accessibility_focus,                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/semantics/#__codelineno-0-17)                     on_did_lose_accessibility_focus=handle_lose_accessibility_focus,                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/semantics/#__codelineno-0-18)                     content=ft.TextField(                        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/semantics/#__codelineno-0-19)                         label="Occupation",                        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/semantics/#__codelineno-0-20)                         hint_text="Use 20 words or less",                        [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/semantics/#__codelineno-0-21)                         value="What is your occupation?",                    [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/semantics/#__codelineno-0-22)                     ),                [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/semantics/#__codelineno-0-23)                 ), Called when a user moves their finger across the screen from right to left.

### on\_scroll\_right `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/semantics/#flet.Semantics.on_scroll_right "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/semantics/#__codelineno-0-1) on_scroll_right: [ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[Semantics](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/semantics/#flet.Semantics) ] | None = (     [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/semantics/#__codelineno-0-2)     None [](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/semantics/#__codelineno-0-3) )`

Called when a user moves their finger across the screen from left to right.

Called when a user moves their finger across the screen from bottom to top.

### on\_set\_text `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/semantics/#flet.Semantics.on_set_text "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/semantics/#__codelineno-0-1) on_set_text: [ControlEventHandler](https://docs.flet.dev/types/aliases/#flet.ControlEventHandler) [[Semantics](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/semantics/#flet.Semantics) ] | None = None`

Called when a user wants to replace the current text in the text field with a new text.

Voice access users can trigger this handler by speaking type `<text>` to their Android devices.

# Fill - Flet

 

[Skip to content](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/canvas/fill/#flet.canvas.Fill)

Fill
====

Inherits: `[Shape](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/canvas/shape/#flet.canvas.Shape) `

Fills the canvas with the given [`paint`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/canvas/fill/#flet.canvas.Fill.paint)
.

To fill the canvas with a solid color and blend mode, consider [`Color`](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/canvas/color/#flet.canvas.Color)
 shape instead.

Properties

*   **`[paint](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/canvas/fill/#flet.canvas.Fill.paint) `**(`[Paint](https://docs.flet.dev/types/paint/#flet.Paint) `) –
    
    A style to fill the canvas with.
    

Properties[#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/canvas/fill/#flet.canvas.Fill-properties "Permanent link")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### paint `class-attribute` `instance-attribute` [#](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/canvas/fill/#flet.canvas.Fill.paint "Permanent link")

`[](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/canvas/fill/#__codelineno-0-1) paint: [Paint](https://docs.flet.dev/types/paint/#flet.Paint)  = [field](https://docs.python.org/3/library/dataclasses.html#dataclasses.field "<code>dataclasses.field</code>") (default_factory=lambda: [Paint](https://docs.flet.dev/types/paint/#flet.Paint) ())`

A style to fill the canvas with.

Back to top

---

# Color - Flet

 

[Skip to content](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/canvas/color/#flet.canvas.Color)

Color
=====

Inherits: `[Shape](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/canvas/shape/#flet.canvas.Shape) `

Paints the given `color` onto the canvas, applying the given `blend_mode`, with the given color being the source and the background being the destination.

Properties

*   **`[blend_mode](https://docs.flet.dev/controls/canvas/color/#flet.canvas.Color.blend_mode) `**(`[BlendMode](https://docs.flet.dev/types/blendmode/#flet.BlendMode) `) –
